name: Governor's Inaugural Committee
subject: Invitation: Inaugural Celebration of Governor Phil Scott
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Phil Scott for Vermont
body:
Experience the 14 |
---
| | [ ](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=9dbca40e40&e=19cebfe173)
---
| Governor Phil Scott and First Lady Diana McTeague-Scott invite you to join the Inaugural Celebration of the Governor on Saturday, January 11 at at the Barre Auditorium at 7:00 PM. Enjoy Vermont cocktails and hors d'oeuvres at this semi-formal event, featuring vendors from all of Vermont's 14 Counties. All proceeds of the event will benefit those who have served, and those that continue to serve. **[Tickets are available for purchase online by clicking here.](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=184bd6e0c1&e=19cebfe173)** You can also [click here](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=4b8eb02f14&e=19cebfe173) to pay by check and mail a response card to PO Box 52, Montpelier, VT 05601. Sponsorship details can be found on page 2: [2024 Experience the 14 Response Card](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=b6f7a77994&e=19cebfe173) For questions, please email celebratevermont@philscott.org.

Thanks to the United States Postal Service, tens of millions of Americans were able to vote by mail in the last election.
And at the height of the COVID pandemic in 2020, over _66 million_ people used the Post Office to vote by mail.
**But now,** Trump and his allies are trying to PRIVATIZE the Post Office, which would dramatically reshape this vital institution.
We cannot afford the destruction of a service American families depend on. That’s why we’re launching an urgent petition to BLOCK the privatization of the Post Office.

[**Will you add your name now by clicking here or the button below? We’re counting on [3] signatures from 43614 before 8:00 PM.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98923682/518263172/-1749258056?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTdjOTcyZC05Y2JkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kUXzbCNG-CGprbNC0Toi8aIBWzkU8h86VYIZgJy5oV0=&emci=8229be41-8cbd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=957c972d-9cbd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=26828920)

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: Officially APPEALED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
I will continue to fight this injustice.
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=16cf3dec188e44149efdc6934c643b67&_e=QFz6z1v0AXnElLyRMRe21cbd-ttvctmAOvFLOkAMNB1__Ef67qLgW16Bl8af100V8pwI3o6s_b4Y7CBwMS3V1aZwVrmX4QFEEHAiGQKW9Ekty1lpY69ry1L-hwzV5XuDtvWeL4-ABJCxR70Y8fEROiwTkL_dtKqYI0Ki-uesP7Rs7s2Y1hUp0GVuk0TjMb4UiVbHinVTxQ-zL-dEjYHHlaK4jmpiycGJD1dgDsTaXUEPAmhYauwNeWc2cQcvPv0INL8IvzB_XhYooaMI1pu_iV15B7K9q4m-l8nGJb9ebtWwznfxaHf15xVJI5A_UMPISe9eTwRhc6ioGUMpgWyg4JOrrJpYfIy8PGSE-W1fawQtQBeVYMx_Q4fNTo-I__ltb8hqUnkqDx5kgLzUyMWn3w%3D%3D)
---
Dear Peter,
---
The Democrat Deep State wants **$146 MILLION** from me – all because I dared to ask questions about the legitimacy of America’s elections.
---
To comply with such a frivolous demand, I’d have to give up **_everything_** I own – including my dignity.
---
That’s why I have **officially _APPEALED_** this outrageous ruling that would leave me on the streets.
---
_As I stand on the brink of losing everything, I remind myself that the Bible says that earthly possessions will always fade, but greater “heavenly treasures” await us._
---
Truth, justice, and the fight for freedom are worth _infinitely_ more... They are the “heavenly treasures... that cannot be stolen and will never rust, decay or lose their value.”
---
**And when I see that TWO of the rigged cases brought against President Trump have now been dismissed and “delayed indefinitely,” I have hope that I can win mine too!**
---
_But my ability to win this appeal and stay in this fight until justice is served depends entirely on the support given to me by kind souls like you, Peter._
---
Let me also say that I know we’re in the midst of the holidays, so family and friends come first. Please don’t feel pressured to give if you can’t!
---
[**But if you can fund my battle to appeal this unjust ruling, please make a contribution of any amount to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund now that I’ve officially appealed this unjust ruling.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=16cf3dec188e44149efdc6934c643b67&_e=QFz6z1v0AXnElLyRMRe21cbd-ttvctmAOvFLOkAMNB1__Ef67qLgW16Bl8af100V8pwI3o6s_b4Y7CBwMS3V1aZwVrmX4QFEEHAiGQKW9Ekty1lpY69ry1L-hwzV5XuDtvWeL4-ABJCxR70Y8fEROiwTkL_dtKqYI0Ki-uesP7Rs7s2Y1hUp0GVuk0TjMb4UiVbHinVTxQ-zL-dEjYHHlaK4jmpiycGJD1dgDsTaXUEPAmhYauwNeWc2cQcvPv0IwjYBfuO5x7XwZRKpHm4MmrOertb2M_cWrDIXbOfYhN4lmz447p_jA87ZBOO37J4LKvHx4R9adwpxdJgIfDiu6yB22dN3nukdgHG9DKRS7bcI8NgYou-dgyI2L2y2RpLREP8jYAd9AoyvR2lgwuHShA%3D%3D)

clean_body: I will continue to fight this injustice. | Dear Peter, The Democrat Deep State wants $146 MILLION from me – all because I dared to ask questions about the legitimacy of America’s elections. To comply with such a frivolous demand, I’d have to give up everything I own – including my dignity. That’s why I have officially APPEALED this outrageous ruling that would leave me on the streets. As I stand on the brink of losing everything, I remind myself that the Bible says that earthly possessions will always fade, but greater “heavenly treasures” await us. Truth, justice, and the fight for freedom are worth infinitely more... They are the “heavenly treasures... that cannot be stolen and will never rust, decay or lose their value.” And when I see that TWO of the rigged cases brought against President Trump have now been dismissed and “delayed indefinitely,” I have hope that I can win mine too! But my ability to win this appeal and stay in this fight until justice is served depends entirely on the support given to me by kind souls like you, Peter. Let me also say that I know we’re in the midst of the holidays, so family and friends come first. Please don’t feel pressured to give if you can’t! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Jessica Mackler, EMILYs List
subject: From our president:
body:
The only way to stop Donald Trump is to dilute his political power. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98924135/518269972/2025016054?refcode=WTEFEX40_20241218_JMMem_PL_v1s1&sourceid=1055510&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2JiMzZkMC05ZGJkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gi2H2uCtpQqFriXj8QkxyiUJsm0EXTIH90cDUAcxH9I=) Peter,

If you've been reading our emails, then you know that right now EMILYs List is focused on the work ahead. But that doesn't mean we're not still thinking deeply about the 2024 election results and what they mean for this community.

And trust me, I know how disheartening those results were. Kamala Harris, a candidate we've championed for decades, lost her historic race for the presidency. Republicans took back the Senate. Democrats fell just a few seats short of clinching the House majority.

But we cannot let those results detract from our wins, Peter. Because Democratic pro-choice women had some _momentous victories_ this year, and those wins will be CRITICAL in protecting our rights and our democracy. Thanks to the hard work and dedication of this community, we helped Sens. **Tammy Baldwin (WI)** and **Jacky Rosen (NV)** , as well as Sen.-elect **Elissa Slotkin (MI)** , win three of the most competitive Senate races of the cycle. We helped 33 House women secure their seats, including Rep. **Emilia Sykes (OH-13)** and Rep.-elect **Laura Gillen (NY-04)** , who were running in incredibly tough toss-up districts. Thanks to them, we're only a few seats shy of a majority in both chambers.

Why were these victories so important, even with some tough losses? Because **the only way to stop Donald Trump is to check his political power** by taking back Democratic control wherever we can. And because of the victories of EMILYs List women in 2024, we are now in a position to do just that — as soon as 2026. That's what your support did, and will continue to do.

This community was built to advance Democratic women's political power. And no single election result, no matter how devastating, will come between EMILYs List and our mission.

Thank you for being in this fight with us.

Jessica Mackler
President, EMILYs List

P.S. If you're ready to get to work, **[donate before midnight to become an official EMILYs List 2025 member:](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98924136/518269973/2025016054?refcode=WTEFEX40_20241218_JMMem_PL_v1s1&sourceid=1055510&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2JiMzZkMC05ZGJkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gi2H2uCtpQqFriXj8QkxyiUJsm0EXTIH90cDUAcxH9I=)** | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98924137/518269974/-389131302?refcode=WTEFEX40_20241218_JMMem_PL_v1s1&sourceid=1055510&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2JiMzZkMC05ZGJkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gi2H2uCtpQqFriXj8QkxyiUJsm0EXTIH90cDUAcxH9I=)

clean_body: The only way to stop Donald Trump is to dilute his political power. | = Peter, If you've been reading our emails, then you know that right now EMILYs List is focused on the work ahead. But that doesn't mean we're not still thinking deeply about the 2024 election results and what they mean for this community. And trust me, I know how disheartening those results were. Kamala Harris, a candidate we've championed for decades, lost her historic race for the presidency. Republicans took back the Senate. Democrats fell just a few seats short of clinching the House majority. But we cannot let those results detract from our wins, Peter. Because Democratic pro-choice women had some momentous victories this year, and those wins will be CRITICAL in protecting our rights and our democracy. Thanks to the hard work and dedication of this community, we helped Sens. Tammy Baldwin (WI) and Jacky Rosen (NV) , as well as Sen.-elect Elissa Slotkin (MI) , win three of the most competitive Senate races of the cycle. We helped 33 House women secure their seats, including Rep. Emilia Sykes (OH-13) and Rep.-elect Laura Gillen (NY-04) , who were running in incredibly tough toss-up districts. Thanks to them, we're only a few seats shy of a majority in both chambers. Why were these victories so important, even with some tough losses? Because the only way to stop Donald Trump is to check his political power by taking back Democratic control wherever we can. And because of the victories of EMILYs List women in 2024, we are now in a position to do just that — as soon as 2026. That's what your support did, and will continue to do. This community was built to advance Democratic women's political power. And no single election result, no matter how devastating, will come between EMILYs List and our mission. Thank you for being in this fight with us. Jessica Mackler President, EMILYs List P.S. If you're ready to get to work, = | = = Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Hollywood has done enough
body:
| | | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---
| |
---
| | Peter, Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Take it from me, Peter, as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, **_you are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children_**. Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=deb139b5d7a84a81b464b242b068cf51&_e=tCWJOoKzhMOL8q9Yq1WNz_e6RKDg6WXzLHPrXaeupVC7TzSnd8GpC57x1fYBBXP9v3dM_1-4daKd8JDKjhW4NAV0q6mwaWJwgec0KusZ6ZXL3f71Fqh-xVveZmqSRSRWui17cf6V88reBuGfBnIujk1ZvIWDwcMsmDFYiCgYC696J7gyWyvQg8mivwS_qyBG4mbzepD5PSfAiYtLB20rbvOwXu7C4wPNn3Q4L7jpqIkF8EFf5uIFEWIK0qgFo8UiDFkWOf93dZ7J-Cxh35fzQEG_7FVaNH6mXAxqivTqLwA_8K22IJF3TGS4RTFMs5Wfc03JRBzC_5ye4gFwEr6qfUtO6jCOc0YT-jhp_Xb1by3veZvfZRaBb08IN6ivC3nwhTpQbiKoekk3HLO6Jdj2Zg%3D%3D)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth.**That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=deb139b5d7a84a81b464b242b068cf51&_e=tCWJOoKzhMOL8q9Yq1WNz_e6RKDg6WXzLHPrXaeupVC7TzSnd8GpC57x1fYBBXP9v3dM_1-4daKd8JDKjhW4NAV0q6mwaWJwgec0KusZ6ZXL3f71Fqh-xVveZmqSRSRWui17cf6V88reBuGfBnIujk1ZvIWDwcMsmDFYiCgYC696J7gyWyvQg8mivwS_qyBG4mbzepD5PSfAiYtLB20rbvOwXu7C4wPNn3Q4L7jpqIkF8EFf5uIFEWIK0qgFo8Ui0sF-8FUkp2qe_0YjJia9BGwOuJEOMEvgg3U7KDRWLxeyL6DJRi7xZGI4mJcdRbMUSShicuIwU12L91MJ_8pXKXYxlZFy2KHsAjA1ISyGGii2ajwtNCRkzGRAH7-MjbQy_8_aCeb_5gMHBmv29064Sw%3D%3D)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=deb139b5d7a84a81b464b242b068cf51&_e=tCWJOoKzhMOL8q9Yq1WNz_e6RKDg6WXzLHPrXaeupVC7TzSnd8GpC57x1fYBBXP9v3dM_1-4daKd8JDKjhW4NAV0q6mwaWJwgec0KusZ6ZXL3f71Fqh-xVveZmqSRSRWui17cf6V88reBuGfBnIujk1ZvIWDwcMsmDFYiCgYC696J7gyWyvQg8mivwS_qyBG4mbzepD5PSfAiYtLB20rbvOwXu7C4wPNn3Q4L7jpqIkF8EFf5uIFEWIK0qgFo8Ui17ZLJv84qmVjfW3TFRGbQ531_zy_oUnDT3eBc42ofCSLgPd6WyPxDXHVEDZQK4U3xxwRcx6wXq7Gm2_28jpJCUktbLJ0nggFtyVDIMiuqecmNq9bcA7bGp1k9PnnCU9qOGKrqItLrhj_GJMIcRYQoA%3D%3D)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=deb139b5d7a84a81b464b242b068cf51&_e=tCWJOoKzhMOL8q9Yq1WNz_e6RKDg6WXzLHPrXaeupVC7TzSnd8GpC57x1fYBBXP9v3dM_1-4daKd8JDKjhW4NAV0q6mwaWJwgec0KusZ6ZXL3f71Fqh-xVveZmqSRSRWui17cf6V88reBuGfBnIujk1ZvIWDwcMsmDFYiCgYC696J7gyWyvQg8mivwS_qyBG4mbzepD5PSfAiYtLB20rbvOwXu7C4wPNn3Q4L7jpqIkF8EFf5uIFEWIK0qgFo8UiLoS4j-MTY7AUjEk6bX_RbB5UFVdTqB2cMbWCgE7gdLHkU73C_LSgJJLwl_nFnKYkVFlD6nL-v2btn-SnLy52TAayoez45X_khWSt_QOQytPBfwzQq-SkK5Y_KWBNO2_HJnMybg4-tKV6ykv02k6aMw%3D%3D) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=deb139b5d7a84a81b464b242b068cf51&_e=tCWJOoKzhMOL8q9Yq1WNz_e6RKDg6WXzLHPrXaeupVC7TzSnd8GpC57x1fYBBXP9v3dM_1-4daKd8JDKjhW4NAV0q6mwaWJwgec0KusZ6ZXL3f71Fqh-xVveZmqSRSRWui17cf6V88reBuGfBnIujk1ZvIWDwcMsmDFYiCgYC696J7gyWyvQg8mivwS_qyBG4mbzepD5PSfAiYtLB20rbvOwXu7C4wPNn3Q4L7jpqIkF8EFf5uIFEWIK0qgFo8Ui_ahoUWV2DIVEr_Q_4D6zanZurIyX4twZ2qm5Sv-KbwII_0h2VXENM5sE56ewnZd1PKKT73aDtCcMVERU20UBjgdsQghHVSb38sLEnDLcZLZQPnQE1TkZLc8ozyDkdByCOo5eD1P2YWwg5C4OJEFb3Q%3D%3D)

| | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=deb139b5d7a84a81b464b242b068cf51&_e=tCWJOoKzhMOL8q9Yq1WNz_e6RKDg6WXzLHPrXaeupVC7TzSnd8GpC57x1fYBBXP9v3dM_1-4daKd8JDKjhW4NAV0q6mwaWJwgec0KusZ6ZXL3f71Fqh-xVveZmqSRSRWui17cf6V88reBuGfBnIujk1ZvIWDwcMsmDFYiCgYC696J7gyWyvQg8mivwS_qyBG4mbzepD5PSfAiYtLB20rbvOwXu7C4wPNn3Q4L7jpqIkF8EFf5uIFEWIK0qgFo8Uifwz49Co0xePnWz-JwWGLik1sf8dsdd3ZjQVebMDoc_MYCkHHkYh78ZOrcX3IbWC8ri3R9qLJyp_PX0S5NCEsVCIuXnKu8iTg5CJC0PxPuWQgPCutL-nPMG3oDj65b0DnnddJ9ue4JBLll8XGJLf_hQ%3D%3D)

name: Rick Larsen
subject: Good news heading into 2025:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
Creating safer, cleaner, greener and more accessible transportation
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98924503/518289200/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWE2ODA3NS1hM2JkLWVmMTEtODhkMC0wMDBkM2E5ZDU4NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OL-UklbW3m3vLD8_AmGFYHss4yoNHh_Vgc90kmu9gqo=&emci=42d829b9-a0bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=e9a68075-a3bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **Good news: I have been selected to continue leading the Transportation & Infrastructure Committee for the Democrats in Congress! ** It is an honor to continue serving as Ranking Member of the T&I Committee. This Committee is the largest in Congress by membership, and has broad jurisdiction over the U.S. Department of Transportation (think our nation's highways, public transit, railroads, airports, pipelines, and seaports) as well as important groups like the U.S. Coast Guard, the Army Corps of Engineers, Amtrak, the EPA, FEMA, and more. I have served on the Transportation & Infrastructure Committee since arriving in the House in 2001, and I am eager to continue this work in the next Congress.**I will continue to focus on passing bipartisan legislation that will keep people and the economy moving while creating safer, cleaner, greener, and more accessible transportation.** Some key areas of focus have been and will remain:
* Helping Washingtonians and Americans across the country capitalize on the once-in-a-generation investments included in the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law. Billions of dollars in reinvestments in our infrastructure have created jobs and made our communities safer.
* Innovations to enable our communities to grow and thrive for generations to come, including: bike and pedestrian infrastructure, broadband internet, electric vehicle chargers, and more climate-resilient structures.
* Improvements to passenger and freight rail, and stronger pipeline safety standards.
* Building climate resiliency so we can better recover from natural disasters and protect our resources.

Happy holidays, and cheers to more bipartisan laws that create good-paying jobs and improve America's infrastructure. More soon, _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly:

clean_body: Creating safer, cleaner, greener and more accessible transportation | | | | Good news: I have been selected to continue leading the Transportation & Infrastructure Committee for the Democrats in Congress! It is an honor to continue serving as Ranking Member of the T&I Committee. This Committee is the largest in Congress by membership, and has broad jurisdiction over the U.S. Department of Transportation (think our nation's highways, public transit, railroads, airports, pipelines, and seaports) as well as important groups like the U.S. Coast Guard, the Army Corps of Engineers, Amtrak, the EPA, FEMA, and more. I have served on the Transportation & Infrastructure Committee since arriving in the House in 2001, and I am eager to continue this work in the next Congress.I will continue to focus on passing bipartisan legislation that will keep people and the economy moving while creating safer, cleaner, greener, and more accessible transportation. Some key areas of focus have been and will remain: Helping Washingtonians and Americans across the country capitalize on the once-in-a-generation investments included in the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law. Billions of dollars in reinvestments in our infrastructure have created jobs and made our communities safer. Innovations to enable our communities to grow and thrive for generations to come, including: bike and pedestrian infrastructure, broadband internet, electric vehicle chargers, and more climate-resilient structures. Improvements to passenger and freight rail, and stronger pipeline safety standards. Building climate resiliency so we can better recover from natural disasters and protect our resources. Happy holidays, and cheers to more bipartisan laws that create good-paying jobs and improve America's infrastructure. clean_body: This is our biggest year EVER| | | Fellow Patriot, The Turning Point USA team has heard from THOUSANDS of America-loving young people about AMERICAFEST 2024 -- and I don't want to turn away ANY student! With MILLIONS MORE young people turning away from Leftism and deciding to LOVE AMERICA again, Turning Point USA's AMERICAFEST is on track to be our BIGGEST EVENT EVER. But any amount is a true blessing ... and it will help me bring another patriotic young person to this year's AMERICAFEST. Turning Point USA's AMERICAFEST is the BIGGEST and BOLDEST celebration of America and our freedoms ... and with YOUR help, this year's event will bring us to OVERWHELMING VICTORY in the American Culture War. Over four action-packed days, 15,000+ attendees will: Hear from the MOST EXCITING speakers in the conservative movement , including TUCKER CARLSON, DONALD TRUMP JR., RILEY GAINES, and MANY MORE, Get critical activism and leadership TRAINING so these hard-working kids are ready to return home and inspire MILLIONS MORE in their generation to LOVE AMERICA again, and Build a NATIONWIDE NETWORK of PATRIOTIC STUDENTS -- with 15,000+ attendees from ALL 50 states! -- so that our pro-America Movement is STRONGER and MORE UNITED than ever before heading into 2025! Your gift today to Turning Point USA 's AMERICAFEST Scholarship Fund could be the reason that a young conservative from <<%STATE% / default: your state >>, or elsewhere in America, can join this one-of-a-kind event. ** Earlier this year, I told Turning Point USA supporters that -- when we worked together -- we could inspire GEN Z to become the MOST CONSERVATIVE and MOST PATRIOTIC youth generation EVER. Now we have seen the BIGGEST CONSERVATIVE SHIFT among young people in generations! While we must celebrate this MASSIVE VICTORY, we must also continue to press our advantage and keep up the pressure on the "Woke" Left ... so we can make this PERMANENT GENERATIONAL CHANGE. Thank YOU, Fellow Patriot, for standing with Turning Point USA to build the NEXT GENERATION of America-loving patriots! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121824_2&amount=25]
Team,
It may seem like there isn’t much we can do to better our world after the election we just had and opponents of voting rights seemingly tightening their grip on our country. But, in reality, the fight has just begun.
It’s time to lace up our boots and fight for our democracy. Opponents of voting rights are dead set on dismantling our democratic system. State legislatures start in a few weeks and even when the vote suppressors don't win at the ballot box they codify their power however else they can.
That's exactly what we are gearing up to stop. We've worked too hard for too long to quit now.
We set an important goal to be ready for whatever suppressive bills come in 2025's new legislative sessions. Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can today and help us protect voting rights? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=121824_2&amount=25]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121824_2&amount=25]

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I refuse to give up my rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Newsweek: Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst
| [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=66dd1f47e71e431dadc2c1e0ae9c4c4c&_e=MJwF3qmv_7_4S1P0f-RpSs-vAJNmNCuv2b-W5qumpUO9Eko0TAev2uusFDxx9koD5k7VtGUxno0lw0Lalp9E6pXHJ-q5jDUho4VxBHcW1MVvbGkW1ffMha4h-9oXb8MpOW4Rh0Ysx-1IGItaqAh0ybYTp6YAQ2s5jEmdFiiRznSZQFGSUy3peiDUJ-QbxVeQXk8yfu07hYDQZukT-cLar_HDBE4XjqQ1yj3NhkVd_0onbzUxwvvcieJBs4ApK7uwxgSsCSWLWlEyHQ2Y3ZoDoh1v0CTia-uQRvxZUcRI0K7AhbAI8jK9HewNSrZqaY4LU6_hvBsjqzA4zrSjWw9JH0FTVPuPTYGeGSSFhRqGfeCYFOyC1PxZgyNkR31NDj1hdVMBCZs7_BuWCTdpeqLqHg%3D%3D)
---
Dear Friend,
---
Even as the Deep State continues its efforts to rob me of EVERYTHING – _my home, my possessions, my credit cards, my car_ – _I will never surrender the fight for my freedom and justice._
---
And even with headlines like these popping up, I refuse to roll over like a dog and give up my rights:
---
**_Newsweek_ : Trump Ally Rudy Giuliani 'About to Find Himself' in Jail—Legal Analyst**
---
Outside the New York City Courthouse, I was asked, _“Do you think Mr. Trump can help you get out of this?”_
---
Here’s what I said: _**“Mr. Trump doesn’t have to help me get out of it. All Mr. Trump has to do is straighten out the legal system and we’ll find out who the real criminals are.”**_
---
Anyone with common sense knows this case was a complete abuse of power. _They want me to pay _$148 MILLION!__
---
It’s punitive! It’s ridiculous! This was done solely because I’m a Republican living in the Democrat Dictatorship of New York.
---
But now that President Trump is headed back to the White House, I have hope that our broken, corrupt, and predatory judicial system will be fixed – and justice for ALL Americans will be restored.
---
Don’t forget: President Trump refused to surrender to the tyrannical Democrats even after four wrongful arrests, a felony conviction, and an assassin’s bullet. And he just won the White House!
---
_**That’s why I will _KEEP_ _FIGHTING_ for my God-given freedoms and rights.**_
---
If you can support me in my fight, I’d be eternally grateful. But if you cannot, please do not even think twice. Take care of yourself and your family!
---
[**If you can, and, seriously, only if you can, please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – as I keep fighting for my freedom and justice as the Democrats’ Deep State tries to JAIL me for life.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=66dd1f47e71e431dadc2c1e0ae9c4c4c&_e=MJwF3qmv_7_4S1P0f-RpSs-vAJNmNCuv2b-W5qumpUO9Eko0TAev2uusFDxx9koD5k7VtGUxno0lw0Lalp9E6pXHJ-q5jDUho4VxBHcW1MVvbGkW1ffMha4h-9oXb8MpOW4Rh0Ysx-1IGItaqAh0ybYTp6YAQ2s5jEmdFiiRznSZQFGSUy3peiDUJ-QbxVeQXk8yfu07hYDQZukT-cLar_HDBE4XjqQ1yj3NhkVd_0qQsHwqOfpT5IcZ_8_7SBb5LSVj9BQS4HOOqFQL1tItjJldvIxBifilhHlH_yiA_oR-c3GsayjfhIxuuWb3WzBDBzhT1zMxJVTysw2ZB0TPQJilH4n3A9O8gJ11W_fYz_y3dzGRNGIfF80Vx6z6d81jvB8jbkA8PAIV88_xbbbUgQ%3D%3D)

subject: Last night was historic, but the real work begins today.

body:

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: The Democratic Party & the Working Class
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
A couple weeks ago, we sent our supporters a survey and asked if folks had any questions. One question/theme we heard a few times was Alexandria’s thoughts on the Democratic Party »
Now, I think that when it comes to the Democratic Party, one of the big questions that we've seen is, what has happened with the Democratic Party and the working class?
And I think that from my vantage point, I think I see a lot of what's happened.
I was a waitress, right up until I got elected to Congress. This was not a cute summer job that I had as a teenager and then I did some jobs and then I got elected to Congress years later. I went from wiping down a bar and walking behind it to walking into the halls of Congress.
And the reason I did that and the reason I ran was not because I was running against a Republican. It's because I ran against a Democrat that I did not believe centered families or communities like mine or saw the pain of people like me.
And a lot of what I saw at that time was a Democrat that only ran against Trump and did not support a vision with clarity that spoke to my material reality.
And I got to a point as a waitress where I felt like if my member of Congress wouldn't support a $15 minimum wage and say it with their full chest with clarity, then I would, and again, I'm not speaking for every single district or every single person.
I'm recounting the story of what happened in my life. I felt like if my representative from a deep blue seat could not fight for my right to have health care unequivocally, then I would fight for my right to have health care and for my community's right to have health care guaranteed, unequivocally.
I, at the time, felt like our representation took a lot of corporate money, a lot of lobbyist money and answered more to the people and the class that they raised money from than the people who voted for them.
And I ran for office to change that.
Any observations that I raise, I believe have to do with longer term trends around our Party and what we can do to improve and get back to our roots as champions of the working class.
But at the end of the day, the ultimate problem is our ability to clearly and forthrightly advocate for an agenda that clearly champions the working class.
To me, that's things like a $15 minimum wage, Medicare for All or at the very least lowering the age of Medicare until it hits zero.
In solidarity,
Alexandria
We need to show widespread support for Alexandria so she can continue doing what she was elected to do: **demand better.**
[Will you make a grassroots contribution today to help us continue to fight for meaningful change?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241218.HY4uXn&refcode=em20241218-7769-P_FND_EXP_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7769%2E2526796%2EjIav0C)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20241218.HY4uXn&refcode=em20241218-7769-P_FND_EXP_CTR&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=7769%2E2526796%2EjIav0C)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20241218?refcode=em20241218-7769-P_FND_EXP_CTR&t=21&refcode2=7769_2526796_jIav0C&akid=7769%2E2526796%2EjIav0C)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20241218-7769-P_FND_EXP_CTR&t=22&akid=7769%2E2526796%2EjIav0C)**

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: How we stop the Hollywood Groomers
body:
you are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.

| | | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend, Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Take it from me, Friend, as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, **_you are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children_**. Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbpe53tk2e1uqnenbondmdkbpofeo4he7k0a28r0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1clie1o76cth2bs)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth.**That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9afh74tf4ptl28tee0v9ia10eecme3pq5l35nv8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1clie1o76cth2bs)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6g1sdntipjc8qfr0ugi5fijv3ragaveub1nrcs8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1clie1o76cth2bs)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkfrihqri5gsoai41mkh8lfhe0ivos1riih342po_rp22sh2s8i6epj1clie1o76cth2bs) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2u4vbrmmj9onlkl8h8gp56nhq261os01f3h4ghg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1clie1o76cth2bs)
---

---

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: ah! Humbug!
body:
Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5q2j8ptl7adl4uvqfu72biu9tqs6jj59e8us0vo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1clie1o76cjh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

"Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol._ "

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk4nfsi4v6ilsb20m7jtp5ck2ho4g3qcv63fjg9g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1clie1o76cjh2bs)
Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives.

You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ ," by clicking on the link below.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2oj17ja4e6rao8n5mmctdc5no9obg955nk785bo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1clie1o76cjh2bs)**

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

clean_body: Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite. This sponsored message from ICYMI News Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend, Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile. "Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster." Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite. The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser. But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol. " Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of A Christmas Carol , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation. In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster." It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine. Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year. And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives. You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol ," by clicking on the link below. And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well. Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College ICYMI News PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: How we stop the Hollywood Groomers
body:
you are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.

| | | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend, Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Take it from me, Friend, as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, **_you are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children_**. Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z0ghgilb870ahp4bpmg01jkffcjaqiiuaf8942t8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdg64ob6chh2bs)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say......and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth.**That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. ** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zspe94e487i1acup5ouhqobvkankgdrot5ajmep0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdg64ob6chh2bs)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z4jvtqjlaunpbe3qvc170v0pfnbpgfleqhm3vo08_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdg64ob6chh2bs)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z1mar5jtus1gb8d4i8tto8omvqhkc5lerit65a60_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdg64ob6chh2bs) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of** _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.** ** Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter. **
---
| | Kirk CameronActor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z1lfnk5ha5nbptegtb3qbdojs3orof9fnhb39kig_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdg64ob6chh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zgf9i6qb9vr63mht6f8cem4i6p088rt7kvsu9qfg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdg64ob6chh2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron****Actor, Author, and Father**
---

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zuo3vcn4k6462uuta8atkdei43fvnbff8aneqiq0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdg64ob6chh2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z15qsajpp502ircuvnv4c9hu3tmehmnrd2uko36o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdg64ob6chh2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8ieiqjhsesj0o03jqpi7n3lm7gt5jn8fv1u89d8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdg64ob6chh2bs)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zedsv9o2s6iil551qosnv5138duau5qfm6eecmh8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdg64ob6chh2bs)
What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4frpf2m7vipk7652ts1m14ln6gmuvm4sskck148_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdg64ob6chh2bs)

name: URGENT HOUSE MAJORITY COMMUNICATION [From House GOP]
subject: 29 Conservatives on the CHOPPING BLOCK
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
House Democrats’ TOP Super PAC just released their target list of 29 vulnerable, GOP-held seats in battleground districts.

| |
---
| | | **- URGENT HOUSE MAJORITY COMMUNICATION -**
_From House GOP_
Election Day was just a few weeks ago and the Democrat Machine is already laying the groundwork to destroy our Conservative Majority.

The top House Democrat Super PAC just released their target list of 29 vulnerable, GOP-held seats in battleground districts. This is the same dark money-funded Liberal group that unloaded a QUARTER-BILLION DOLLARS against our Conservative candidates.

And on top of that, House Republicans have our FINAL fundraising deadline before President Trump takes control and we're falling dangerously behind our goal.

* * *
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlmv1buo8pfql5oqg87jnbe57t619vna9ucdloq8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdg64ob6chh2bs "*** CALLING EVERY LOYAL PATRIOT *** HELP SAVE THESE VULNERABLE CONSERVATIVES")

name: THREE SPECIAL ELECTIONS [From House GOP]
subject: Of all the emails you’ve received today, this is BY FAR the most important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House – so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House.

| |
---
| | | Of all the emails you've received today, this is BY FAR the most important. Why? Because...

_We 're about to have a NEW Special Election in NY-21 for Elise Stefanik's seat, a NEW Special Election in FL-06 for Mike Waltz's seat, and a NEW Special Election in FL-01 for Matt Gaetz's seat!_

**Remember:** We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House - so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House.

**Remember:** If they take the House, they can stonewall EVERY America First Agenda item President Trump tries to pass through Congress.

**Remember:** If they jam up Trump's agenda, everything we fought so hard for this year will completely COLLAPSE.

**_[Friend- we need AT LEAST 20,000 contributions before the end of the year to maximize the chances of Republicans winning all three and stop the Democrats from taking control of our House Majority. ](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zn78343bcrjgr34nmk3dajda5pbfv7hqh6mpgvt0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdg62oj2cjh2bs "Friend – we’re racing to maximize the chances of Republicans winning all three. We need AT LEAST 20,000 contributions before the end of the year to help win these Special Elections and stop the Democrats from taking control of our House Majority.")_**

If there was ever a moment to pitch in a few bucks, that moment is right now. Our Conservative House Majority - and the fate of President Trump's legislative agenda - hangs in the balance.
_***** CALLING ALL CONSERVATIVES *** **_
**THREE SPECIAL ELECTIONS**
| | [CONTRIBUTE 10 BUCKS BEFORE 12/31](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3mnjb83b7nek3frba85iiu37ms96dvu8jcpvcjg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdg62oj2cjh2bs "CONTRIBUTE 10 BUCKS BEFORE 12/31")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE 20 BUCKS BEFORE 12/31](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zolc61r3spnrqs3vq4lrk9hsl4h0e1sqeq1kbtj8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdg62oj2cjh2bs "CONTRIBUTE 20 BUCKS BEFORE 12/31")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE 50 BUCKS BEFORE 12/31](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrso8p8m9dpuui1tf3c3169qgqc0ahldb5b4c5ug_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdg62oj2cjh2bs "CONTRIBUTE 50 BUCKS BEFORE 12/31")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE MORE BEFORE 12/31](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zh7haau7itt5fa5p86uie5nosjlqep80nv9kv6d8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdg62oj2cjh2bs "CONTRIBUTE MORE BEFORE 12/31")
---

Listen -

_This final deadline of 2024 was important before but now that our House Majority may depend on winning three Special Elections ..._

**THIS IS THE MOST IMPORTANT DEADLINE OF THE YEAR! **

Majority Leader Steve Scalise agreed that 20,000 more contributions is the bare minimum we need before the end of the year to help jumpstart our efforts to hold FL-01, FL-06, and NY-21.

Every contribution helps us refuel our voter contact budgets, recruit volunteers, and get our positive message out to voters - that's how we win key races like these.

Please don't underestimate the seriousness of the situation.

_**[Our deadline is closing in! We're PLEADING for your help right here and right now. ](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsc5g1thkfo7192ie38d99ak53ofmfs4ng5ir5ag_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdg62oj2cjh2bs "Our deadline is closing in! We’re PLEADING for your help right here and right now.")**_

Thanks for all you do.

**- SPECIAL ELECTION ALERTS - **
_From House Republicans_

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3rrqve1k068j9dun082a0d4m2e9fsti3cq2palo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdg62oj2cjh2bs "Majority Leader Survey")
---

_A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise:_

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

_**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zntdnede7f2gmmie97t79gljrajaet0put8lurm8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdg62oj2cjh2bs "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.")**_

---
Thank you,

Steve Scalise
_House Majority Leader_

I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to receive your 2025 calendar.

This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts to reach and teach Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

You can make a tremendous difference for our country.

name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: “Charles Dickens’ A ChristmasCarol” – Our free online course
body:
Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

This sponsored message from First Look News is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z00su6p3otn2juv3l49mgltd6u8vicmqnbfptsd8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdg69or6clh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

"Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! a squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

Dickens is a master at developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is my favorite.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol._ "

[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zihgja000hq1jofi9v4dbdikt2o5nnrn0nvqqv7g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdg69or6clh2bs)
Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter into the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives.

You can register for our free course, "Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ ," by clicking on the link below.

**[https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/christmas-carol](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zc338tonf1bhtidu398l8gbo4c37tftdiht6l01g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdg69or6clh2bs)**

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

---

First Look News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: The Liberty Ledger

name: Rand Paul
subject: Politicians will not save us
body:
The Swamp will not save the economy, abide by our Constitution, nor will they restore our Republic.

|
---
| | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zj7tak0mr487mmhf9ku797bo9of2u0lh0k0dl6u0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdi68ob4cph2bs)
Friend,

I came to Washington, D.C. just over a decade ago with one overarching mission: to support and defend our Constitution and the political and personal freedoms it upholds. **Do you want to know something important I’ve learned? **

Politicians will not save us.

The Swamp will not save the economy, abide by our Constitution, nor will they restore our Republic. _Politics is downstream from culture_. Restoring our Republic requires a citizenry who understands the principles of the Founding Fathers, capitalism, and our Constitution.

**Which is why I am supporting the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE):** FEE is educating both high school and college students about the true principles of free markets, entrepreneurship, individual liberties, and personal responsibility.

In fact, the Foundation for Economic Education has launched “FEE In the Classroom.”

It is a unique program held in brick-and-mortar and virtual classrooms across the country that teaches young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government.

As thousands of young Americans come to understand the positive impact freedom has on their lives, their communities, and our country through FEE in the Classroom workshops, their most frequently asked question afterward is: “ _Why haven’t I heard these ideas before_?”

You and I both know why these students have never heard the ideas of liberty before. _America’s public schools don’t teach our nation’s founding principles anymore_. But FEE is changing this--and they are doing it in classrooms and virtual classrooms across the country.

[I am PERSONALLY supporting FEE In the Classroom and am asking all of my supporters to contribute or even sponsor a FEE In the Classroom program. Please click here to contribute $1,000, $500, $250, $100, $50, or even $25.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhj3u9va1mrkf5mghn905sspo0fj0dn01uvc0560_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdi68ob4cph2bs)
[Help more high school and college students learn about free markets, entrepreneurship, and our Founding Principles by supporting FEE In the Classroom!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zlm2q90oht0tbs30qa76ra9tji6i87g6gitpv7t0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdi68ob4cph2bs) [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1n9fr5mr1lu1l4m2bgqead9cqijvpq3nhg4ih08_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdi68ob4cph2bs)
**_Let me tell you more about FEE In the Classroom and why you should support this essential program and FEE’s efforts to defeat socialism in the classroom_.**

It’s no secret the Radical Left, Cancel Culture, and big government have teamed up to indoctrinate our nation’s youth into embracing socialism.

The sad truth is that free market capitalism, the history of our Founding Fathers, entrepreneurship, and are NOT being taught in high schools or college campuses across the country.

Trust me... if some of my colleagues in the U.S. Senate attended a FEE In the Classroom teaching, we would not be the same mess we are in today.

**Here is our goal:** I am trying to help FEE raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours to help fund FEE In the Classroom workshops for over 1,000 students. I hope you will consider making a donation of ANY size by using one of the bittons below:
[Donate $10 >>>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zj7cb3kb0s3348idivj00rofi7aqs2j2rb1bqpv8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdi68ob4cph2bs)

[Donate $35 >>>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3jaif50fkad70ndcagrdcmbka8r17td9s5sr608_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdi68ob4cph2bs)

[Donate $50 >>>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ze47dru2rbre37qqj1qjhsd3s37m5aq0a1ltfqm8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdi68ob4cph2bs)

[Donate $100 >>>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgdenjgpralc9mumksd0r036m4g6tsqnal2g9lbo_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdi68ob4cph2bs)

[Donate $250 >>>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zimnihjl5ltl3o3fdcuv2qh9ar7vtv87oh1j9g50_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdi68ob4cph2bs)

[Donate $500 >>>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjrk5hv27uim61i8oq397q0ebdn4d80hnvasj0v8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdi68ob4cph2bs)

[Donate $1,000 >>>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3q7nkqoofffe2fi968hvhl2tcv8plrlmfiutel0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdi68ob4cph2bs)

[Donate Any Amount >>>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z51f5pmcgk4uq10thrgp0vrimgk1jgr01f4g2bsg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdi68ob4cph2bs) Friend, I’m sure you share my frustration with the direction of our country. We cannot count on our government for fiscal restraint, nor our schools or universities for any fair argument for free-market ideas.

[Today I invite you to join me, and thousands of other committed Americans, in supporting FEE and contributing to the economic education of the young men and women who will lead our nation tomorrow.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrll1uukqp7cdj28g741213gbdv9sgkklrln8r2o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdi68ob4cph2bs)

I hope I can count on your support and see your name on the list of FEE’s newest supporters.

Thank you for everything,

Senator Rand Paul

_FEE is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit educational organization, so donations made to FEE are tax-deductible to the full extent allowable by law._

clean_body: We are wishing you all a happy, healthy holiday season! | | | | | Dear Peter, We are wishing you all a happy, healthy holiday season! United Sovereign Americans is a movement about renewing the knowledge of our history, conforming our laws to the Constitution, and teaching our children to value and protect their individual sovereignty. While courts are slow as a tool to solve problems, the 2024 election experience showed that our nine lawsuits were a powerful deterrent against the theft of our republic. Our upcoming wave of election lawsuits is exciting and will focus on both accountability and election integrity. | | Check out these media highlights. This from Dec 15, 2024 highlights the consequence of censorship: "Those who begin coercive elimination of dissent soon find themselves exterminating dissenters. Compulsory unification of opinion achieves only the unanimity of the graveyard." West Virginia State Board of Education v. Barnette, 319 U.S. 624 (1943) Learn More video highlight: | | Since November 2024, we've tracked voter complaints and plan to incorporate them as exhibits into our ongoing litigation in nine states. We also intend to initiate new federal lawsuits based on 2024 Election Scorecards. If you experienced voting issues in 2024, fill out our election complaint form or share it with others who have. Citizen-submitted reports are crucial to our lawsuits, and help us hold officials accountable to follow the law. | | Do you want to play a part in our citizen-led movement for valid elections? Follow, Comment and Share our social media to expand our mission reach: , , , , & Share our Report what you see by using the Invest in our legal fight. Your contribution is vital, and drives our efforts to restore and protect the constitutional governance our founders intended. Our goal is $2 million for accountability actions in 2024 and beyond. | | Join us TONIGHT at 7:00 PM Eastern to learn how to defend your civil right to a fair election. We'll cover the Constitution, key case law, and how to demand true election integrity. You can view past study sessions I look forward to seeing you tonight! Marly Hornik CEO, | | United Sovereign Americans, Inc., a 501(c)(4) nonprofit organization, Suite 194, 167 LAMP & LANTERN VILLAGE, CHESTERFIELD, MO 63017

subject: Claim your Night Vision Binoculars... (1080pHD)

I’ve got something here you’re gonna want to see:

In fact, you’ll never see the world the same way again...

Because these new goggles will let you peer through the darkest, moonless night like it’s high noon!

In fact, these night vision binoculars are so powerful, we’ve dubbed them...

**[Claim Your 7-Level Infrared Night Vision Binoculars - 50% OFF!](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19413/6374453/9c009acee0c39270d287f0b1d66e57a4693b5fa3/b998b876d695435c5e796d0af58c1b16cc2707ce) **

Once reserved for the SEALs and Special Ops, this battlefield technology is now available to civilians.

**[Check it out](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19413/6374453/9c009acee0c39270d287f0b1d66e57a4693b5fa3/b998b876d695435c5e796d0af58c1b16cc2707ce)** : These bad boys have real-time IR night vision with 5X magnification, video recording and playback.

Plus they’re IP54 water resistant.

Thanks to an exclusive distribution agreement, I’m able to offer these DarkForce binos to you at an insane 50% OFF discount...

While supplies last, I’m throwing in a free neck strap, charging cable and **free shipping!** **[Grab your Night Vision Binoculars before we run out](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19413/6374453/9c009acee0c39270d287f0b1d66e57a4693b5fa3/b998b876d695435c5e796d0af58c1b16cc2707ce)**

P.S. These bad boys have 7 levels of IR intensity, are USB rechargeable (no batteries needed), and they’re super compact.

body:
We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House – so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House.

| |
---
| | | Of all the emails you've received today, this is BY FAR the most important. Why? Because...

_We 're about to have a NEW Special Election in NY-21 for Elise Stefanik's seat, a NEW Special Election in FL-06 for Mike Waltz's seat, and a NEW Special Election in FL-01 for Matt Gaetz's seat!_

**Remember:** We have a RAZOR-THIN Majority in the House - so if we lose these Special Elections, Democrats could take control of the House.

**Remember:** If they take the House, they can stonewall EVERY America First Agenda item President Trump tries to pass through Congress.

**Remember:** If they jam up Trump's agenda, everything we fought so hard for this year will completely COLLAPSE.

**_[Friend- we need AT LEAST 20,000 contributions before the end of the year to maximize the chances of Republicans winning all three and stop the Democrats from taking control of our House Majority. ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9179523261584737ac3117527030ed32&_e=M9kU_pHSBixP6KYaYD6JsmhhwwFpNhXgSBDJI0lWv2ktJGI27SQf8XgseQQ6Of_yVOWUL6q7COgswp64cIfZKfAo4tJ8L0UQaO0V-ljgQh5-zQFxrbT-C0dlzjvVZJ3DWrG9_zPtn7luI4IjLvj9SZGncCa0YrXaHNsgWVhmYRbe_lQBE4guuGeSPXEEmaJ-t7tkhZKo0PCGebVMcgfqBGWPAOcFT0jwZ2aNdM2YCS5e10KMHnwo56kqB3Ju7Ank7PUv1mcNK2JUa_cKsHLDRPCWdx9PbVaeA4fKQ-O4Bww0un1vbgN9Arh22kzleociyRYyyXn7P5yobHoYNWm5v5lKLeN34rBi8J87f-t-mk28arHeqQLqFrvfYGIBuoTrFhEphWmmxtEoxehqhXc_3wdEqjSOfl0AvMrLO8rWWd9F8RrIIv7JiEn3_lJH5WTh1qNzNEK_YfDOvrzJyfrjJA%3D%3D "Friend – we’re racing to maximize the chances of Republicans winning all three. I'm reaching out to you today because I'd like to send you your **2025 Hillsdale College calendar**.

I know, I know. It's a little early to be thinking about 2025. But since you're someone who cares about liberty, I wanted to make sure you had this chance to receive your 2025 calendar.

This calendar is a small thank-you gift for everyone who helps our efforts to reach and teach Americans about our nation's great heritage of liberty.

You can make a tremendous difference for our country.

**That 's why I hope you'll claim your 2025 Hillsdale College calendar by October 31.** You can reserve your calendar by clicking on this secure link:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/2025calendar](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ae0d742184d24f4a9e80db19e7035b98&_e=rlO0hGk9E9l2f9sEm57XXjp00ZsOZWk2ggIQvURl-Lta1mVGXR-t1nXBWV0LqgkGkwc23b3c_5i1lI1SPgkizMWvInxopQfXhV62oqNUadbZlfEmOv4_pNf6CHxWef5QwoQ_nwUG9SFnSZWIvG_Y_I-Mp1-H7UMjPyqweK_uVUw1Fc7xmsTlAqm7U8Bkjyw6wvhQ_9F7ek36mEA54cAysX5diXsrNagr6YbXtJul1CYCKHxp4aKXHavw84G0NZxHMR3IvHS5Xy1Gmn6p1Oykg-K-ITvM_xChfRRRGIJzx1JghfxOV3jpA6k2axqemy-4PPMG1oOVsmWbivPOr8_NzxacXwCaz9P4tZG6B7m31ILzYxGQY90vi2WRjks2lvV4nxNV9UYt0pbkai0nfT_ZeQ%3D%3D)**

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01

## [Feds Look To Hire Up To 1,200 New DEI Bureaucrats Before Trump Takes Office](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/X3PXoFOJEMI3nKg8H2LKSQ~~/AAVLBgA~/RgRpRn8aP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZGFpbHl3aXJlLmNvbS9uZXdzL2ZlZHMtbG9vay10by1oaXJlLXVwLXRvLTEyMDAtbmV3LWRlaS1idXJlYXVjcmF0cy1iZWZvcmUtdHJ1bXAtdGFrZXMtb2ZmaWNlVwNzcGNCCmdVGvpjZ3mjA2tSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
The jobs have annual salaries of up to $310,000, and could add up to total salary payouts of $160 million a year. Thirty-three DEI jobs were posted in the 10 days immediately following the election of Donald Trump, and the hiring window closes before he takes office.
[Read more >](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/X3PXoFOJEMI3nKg8H2LKSQ~~/AAVLBgA~/RgRpRn8aP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZGFpbHl3aXJlLmNvbS9uZXdzL2ZlZHMtbG9vay10by1oaXJlLXVwLXRvLTEyMDAtbmV3LWRlaS1idXJlYXVjcmF0cy1iZWZvcmUtdHJ1bXAtdGFrZXMtb2ZmaWNlVwNzcGNCCmdVGvpjZ3mjA2tSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

---

clean_body: This shouldn’t take more than a minute. | | | Friend, I want to get to know you a little better. In the aftermath of this historic election cycle, my top priority is learning more about voters like you who made President Trump’s victory possible. We’re thrilled with what happened this year, but we aren’t going to stop now. We need to make sure that we can replicate this success in future elections – Please, Friend, I need your input to make sure our operation is set to deliver conservative victories for generations to come! Thanks again for everything you’ve done to lead our movement to victory. Sincerely, Speaker Johnson | | | | | Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana | Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

body:
Help guide our agenda!

| | | Peter,

With less than a month until the 119th Congress is sworn in, we are set to have a historically slim Majority.

With such a razor-thin lead, we need to know exactly where to focus our energy, so we’re turning to **YOU**. **[**Will you take a moment to let us know what YOUR #1 priority is for 2025?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._jofJuRNlbNw)**

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Largest Army Contract Ever, Drones Over North Texas, and Best New Restaurants
body:
Fort Worth-based Bell Textron has been awarded a contract with the U.S. Army to build its next-generation assault helicopter, the V-280 Valor. The contract, the largest in U.S. Army history, is worth up to $70 billion.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx80D_PpCAQx_FXg90aZkDQguKSzXZ77ZUGZVQSEAPsv3d_cfvnqeeTSb6_f_fxbn3w-_rXRjL1vaQROcoL4AWG0VkfPqNsnJm4G6AhA1pIxXtAaDYj7ERC8Ukq6lBx2emeD4vChXNt0Q6NN-czQBgARAey7WUnYAZwU4-AHTHJyfmacls3qvS2ZQmf9KTczik2wWy1HoWJPwxvDG9-f1KpLc2pZqIjpzXbeMrzLG6PGseSHnkmJq4u5lfKwZ0y2N35fT3sSgzVySI5_4hMXA-b6065bP6Anl8k1-M3naGqu41UfjEjaOBdh0JraLJxx8uH4IvSTPI1Wh--EfXHVZ8G_wcAAP__kYx3_g) | |
# Thursday, December 19, 2024

**Good morning!** On this day in 1832, delegates from San Antonio presented a list of grievances to the legislature of Coahuila and Texas.
