## Paxton Moves to Block Biden From Selling Wall
Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton filed a motion in federal court Tuesday to block the Biden administration’s efforts to [sell unused border wall materials](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOgzAQRL_GdEbs2iRQuLiGLtdeiRavSawsOAJfTP7-lPTXzuiNRu_nMl4oSlyv37QEl485jdig1YAa-pEpymu0Fbup4R6q4OBs7KnpAKG6OcNEtvUn7Nj7PvTUGJ65t2h47gxjFd17DBB6ANOCrTvbGvAAPHUI2AZlm8Axp63Ot5DDQfssr_QMW-3TUom75fzYlflSOCgcSin1_aD1XSoc1lB2hcMHUzg86Mhp1XOUsOsl5ZhWnZOeJPm7pl__CdKsp7Rx2HQhEb1QDlskefPV5vhRokjcT2dlm-tCUT4_8r9ing7_AgAA__8dhmdv), alleging its actions violate a May 2024 court order mandating continued construction with allocated funds. According to reports, the Department of Defense has [sold unused sections of the border wall](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LuOwyAQheGnwd1YDCa-FBTbuMu2W1pchgQtDhaQkLz9Kum3_3X06fyct7MOMdwu33onVZ8-bYILCSgAl83pEF-b7Jwy3C3YkcJpkCOfUWB3VY5PmkZHcrGLmSUaY4xbNPrZjnyy1AX1HkOBC-JwQtnP8jSgRXRmFihOxCQnF2rKfb1SpacuPr7Sg3Jv095Fda31KGz4YmJlYm2t9R9SC5neBRPrjVphYqWnjfcSHgQmOLpB1pYK1ASFYoTkPZiUHWVoOkY4dK4FDPmUCWq-7wdU_UvlHQZLXVbuaCHGUMaJSX7ZdYgfUf33oocSfwEAAP__DdxsYw) through government surplus retailer GovPlanet, with auctions starting at $5.00 per panel. Paxton argued that selling the panels is illegal if they were purchased using the $1.4 billion Congress designated for the barrier. On Monday, President-elect Donald Trump [urged the administration](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGPhCAQhX8NdhpmBMSC4hq6vfZKgzK7S4JikF3Xf3_h-msmXzHv5cv7uU03F2LYHt9uJVM-9zQhR9ECtjBO3oV4TaLxZuZ-hIYMDL1QXANC8zRSkh40KL4I5-VMM4L0elTak6Je9E0wtQwQRoBegui0kD0sAH7WCCiJCU4-lJS78qRCH3fc45XelLslrU00z1L2g_VfDC1De55n9zpcSd5d9YGhPUrKF0O70XkwtHuKoYSlIkVaSkhb5WrB0ALWoxjakl_r3s7B09bOKXvK7elibHeXSw0MA0c1jpzzgaFtsvH7GWIMhxqY4I_VhfhnWP6d7G3wNwAA___UamsC) to “stop selling the wall.” Last Friday, Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick pledged to purchase usable materials and give them to the incoming Trump administration. “ _President Trump has an overwhelming mandate from the American people to build the wall, and I will do everything in my power to prevent any acts of sabotage by the outgoing administration_ ,” [Paxton said](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGvozAQhH8NdEbsYggULq6hy7VXogUvZHXGRrYPkn9_SvRe-aoZjT6NRvPnPt1JnPjtN-1s8nMNE9aoFaCCYbIk7jXp0pq5tgOUbODW6K7uAaF8mJWIemraZR245bmrb3NDeul6qDUtiKWYdxkgDABNC7rqddvAAmDnHgFbLnTNVnKIVX5w5iel1b3CybFawl4688j5SEXzq8CxwPG6ruoDUc4hen5t7DmSq7ZwFjh6vlKBY2THlPhtvzn1Baq_7NVBzxy82sPJSaUcDjWLZa_I7uIl5UhZglf0b3mr-E3NIVqO6iLnVOJPnNTB3gunMhp7XOKcpO5W6HrbSdxnff7xztPg_wAAAP__-ft-HQ).
## Ellis County Jailer Killed by Inmate
Ellis County jailer Isaiah Bias, 28, was [killed by an inmate](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO8yAQhJ8Gd1jsghNTUPyNu_ztlRaYJV6JmMhwcfL2J19_3RQz80nf122-ec683f_7B7n2TmVGhUYCSrBz9Jw_s-miCypa6MjBVZuLGgGhWx0FuNhEwSoIUcUByQSdQhhpJD0E27E7zwDBAugBTD-aQcMCEMOIgAMJoyhyK3vfVmr09jXlT3nR3i_l0WW3tvasQv8TOAmcjuPoU3mbjY56FgROZxQ4Uc5c5VK-t_aRkRptjcsmS0q80C65evarDOyrjOTb2u0uPg8-V5erMOr-8Jx_me1PCS-HPwEAAP__c05g0g) on Monday while escorting him back to his cell. The suspect, 45-year-old Aaron Thompson, attacked Bias while he was [returning him to his cell](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOpDAQRL_GZD1yNzbggOASsr30wlFjtxfrPHiEfcvO35-YfMNSSa9U78_H_YNTTvvnb37I3L5juZMmA0iA7h445dfddGFedXDYyYxjbwY9IWG3zQPZ4EWPwmIwDrof1xC0s86jXl0_dWm-YEjoEHuL5jYZ26NHDOtESFaU0RJSK8etbdLkm2vMr_Ilx82XR5fnrbVnVf0vRYui5TzP2xmZr1LRwkdLPouiZZezKlpy8ZwVLZJzquDLv7294E2FIE32lsoOJcbk5YBUOfEGa-IKf1POEoCPo-zQtvJ41rJfUWqToGihaYTRmTWitdAHGsF4v4KbVgfaDTraPlhk7o45PM907Q-jMvrzwSm_v7Qf5X7N9D8AAP__ov57jA) following a one-hour break from solitary confinement. According to an affidavit, Thompson punched Bias in the back of the head, knocking him to the ground, before choking and repeatedly beating the officer. Bias was transported to a local hospital, where he later died. He had [worked for the jail since he was a teenager](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DGPgzAMBeBfE7YgHNICQ4Zb2HrrjcghTrEaoCK-Uv79ie632nqfnt7PbbghJ17u3ziTk3dcB1MZq8Fo6IaAnI7BFsH5KnRQkIOmtteqBQPF5Jq2i11D_koNhAZq76sK0WJjW4iBsGB3YmCgA6gvYMvWXmoYAYJvDZgLKVtRYFm3UiYSemOO6VhftJXjOhfJTSLPrOovZXpl-n3fy9HnhfZ8_pXpPxFl-vOkTE8pcdbj-rvIoQMJLcLrotcYeaRNPzglChqj0KY98XLXKILjg4L2h-ZlRiGdJ9o4Rp3xOM1ic-G58ylfG2Wr-4ycPvXk371ezvwFAAD__w4ncCQ) and was promoted to detention officer after attending community college. Thompson, who had been jailed last month on charges of assaulting a public servant and evading arrest, has now been charged with capital murder. Ellis County Sheriff Brad Norman [described the attack as "pure evil"](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LHOozAQBOCnMd1G3sVAKFxcQ_dfeyWy2SWxZDDCDglvfyL930wz0qfR_PsZf1yIYX38dYvY8pnTSJoMIAH2I7sQz9FUbL3mHiux2NWm1XckrJ6WzNRNjNiy1tx579nPmtqu0dT5ttdVsBeGhD1i3aC53U1T44TI_k5IjSijhUNJ-608pcjH5Tme6ZD9NqWlivZZypZV_UfRoGhYzy3lclWKhktWNCBd0SkaXhlWeWdFg5eYDmH4gsBSZC0hrZDmOUyyA4tjcHORHbyE9QEuZ_eKRRj8CdtrF5AjRAjr4oooGqrd8vYOMYbcdsrox-JC_E4sv352WPofAAD__6a3bjw) and stated that he would advocate for the death penalty. The Texas Rangers are investigating the case.
## Bell Textron Gets Largest Army Contract Ever
Fort Worth-based Bell Textron has been awarded a contract with the U.S. Army to build its next-generation assault helicopter, the V-280 Valor. The contract, the [largest in U.S. Army history](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGuozAQRb_GdEaewTxM4WIburftlmg8HoIlE0eOFcLfr7LVNq--V0dH58_3-k0pp_vtNx3i23srKxq0GlDDvEZK-VptF30wcYZOPEyD_TIOELrdRzQ0GnaOmMW5MKFs0Y0U5jhvcdi65D8wQJgBhhFs7-w4AAPE4BBwFGWNxNRK7dsuTd703PJVXlJ7LkeX_d7a46mGXwoXhct5nv25EX1GhQvVljiLwuUod7kULkFy1rvkxOXRpOqt1KbPUtuuudxbJW6a6nH991G4oJt0QEdiZtQzWtZWjNNkRqOtMLMZAw8cuurj40w5p-fXpKy5HZTyP9H2Y7mXx78BAAD__9KScA4), is worth up to $70 billion. Bell announced it will assemble the helicopter at a 44,373-square-foot factory formerly occupied by Stanley Black & Decker. By 2039, Bell will invest $632 million and [employ 520 full-time employees](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL-SmzAQh59GdPKwi8BQqEhDd2lTegRam50Tkkfas-HtM0qapLhmi99-8-2fXx-3D8eB4-On28nKcU83bNFoQA3TzTsO58003i6tn6AhC9fODO0ICM1m3YRwvSJh7xYzurHt1n6Zhsl7530LQ8O2ygBhAuh6MJfR9B2sAH4ZEbAnZVryLClfZCOhw5V7ONOL8mVNexPsJvIsqvuhcFY4r2nfvyLLyfvTrVIZhbN3Ibii7ymLfqcsm8L5k0KgrHNyMX2SjjUmV-R_avkqHKkUhXPdU-EMWMtYexSCFjokp6glaY4vKqKHDnfN8a_xH5u-u5UDy1kzHekQ_aCoNwq8pqdQrkOabP3zzSFwGa7KtI_dcfhzqXz7-pfF3wEAAP__N3iJVQ) with an average annual salary of $85,000. The Fort Worth City Council approved a $46 million incentive agreement for the new facility, including an 85% abatement on incremental property taxes for up to 10 years. The Northwest ISD Board of Trustees approved a 50% abatement for the same period. _" It's kind of a big deal when you have an opportunity of that size come around,"_ [said Bell CEO Lisa Atherton](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuOwyAQAL8Gd7bYBb8Kimvocu2VFo91jEQgwig4f3_K9VePNCPNz227mRBDun-bB6l67XlDjrIH7GHdvAnxvcnOK8v9Ch0pmIWc-AII3aGE41xKsqs1OO4rN0B8MrObphmFANkF9ZEBwgogRpDDIkcBDsDbBQFHYpKTDzWXoR5U6TLnHt_5RWVw-dFFddT6PJn4YqgZ6tbakKzze_tghjpROxnqmJ2JDLWlGPtKVy059XsutW-51KOn62nSGXJiqMWMOC2Soe6K8s8WYgznNDPJ7w8T4l-3_jvipfA3AAD__1IZXss) on Tuesday.

Ellis County Jailer Killed by Inmate Ellis County jailer Isaiah Bias, 28, was on Monday while escorting him back to his cell. The suspect, 45-year-old Aaron Thompson, attacked Bias while he was following a one-hour break from solitary confinement. According to an affidavit, Thompson punched Bias in the back of the head, knocking him to the ground, before choking and repeatedly beating the officer. Bias was transported to a local hospital, where he later died. He had and was promoted to detention officer after attending community college. Thompson, who had been jailed last month on charges of assaulting a public servant and evading arrest, has now been charged with capital murder. Ellis County Sheriff Brad Norman and stated that he would advocate for the death penalty. The Texas Rangers are investigating the case. Bell Textron Gets Largest Army Contract Ever Fort Worth-based Bell Textron has been awarded a contract with the U.S. Army to build its next-generation assault helicopter, the V-280 Valor. The contract, the , is worth up to $70 billion. Bell announced it will assemble the helicopter at a 44,373-square-foot factory formerly occupied by Stanley Black & Decker. By 2039, Bell will invest $632 million and with an average annual salary of $85,000. ## Fed Cuts Rates a Quarter-Point, Stocks Plunge
The Federal Reserve [cut its key interest rate](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7GO8yAQhJ8GOlvswg92QfE37nLtlRaGJd4TNpGDYuXtT05_zWikkb7R932bb4EL7_evsJFvuc6o0HSAHYxzClzes5HJZyIkLcmD08aqAZyTqx8wLqBRGxyRckTIGBfr0ARrskpJsr9ogDACaKuGPiMpCqPD8C-ElKwwihK3evQ_lfe2Ui7v-qKjj3WTxa-tPZ5C_xc4CZzO8-zjvsRrFDhdaIET4BWDwClT6o7QqEsU-cl1vwptCx3dR6pf21bk4dPj5FL4aZ0w6r4FLp-79pf-y-NvAAAA__9A3VoJ) for the third consecutive time Wednesday, lowering rates by a quarter-point and signaling it expects only two more rate cuts in 2025. Rates now stand at 4.25%- 4.5%, back to the level they were at in December 2022. Chair [Jerome Powell](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOwyAQRL_G7ohgjQEXFNeky7VXWhtYkj1hsDBKlL8_Jf1pqtFIo6f3c1kvyJnL7Rs38j3VFSRooUCoZY3I-bXqMfpEBDSN5JWdtJFOWTve_TQ7lMklBAyonHEmuqtBE69gJpjmkf37TYFalJqMdKcEJAkXCzgjxmgGLSlyr-30W7n0O6X8qg9qp1C3Mft77_sxTF8DnAc4417oebynd2mdQ6YBzokiNcyi0UHtQYJLyti5FpErFtGw0yEo1FK3l9gbBzqE1Z9Et8ggUwzBWT3rFHVwEhH12Hzcn5wzH8YOWt425PyB6v9Jenj4CwAA__-K5mmI) called the decision a reflection of higher inflation readings and “expectations that inflation will be higher in 2025.” The announcement [triggered a market plunge](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFuwyAQxvGnwRsWdxBjDwytKm_p2tE6myOhxcYyJFHevkr3zp_006f_13k6U0xxu3zSyq6GPKFCIwElDJOnmJ6TabwLzMi6YQdWm071YG1zddYG2y8GYenn09CD10DBzIPvyfSL6proXhogDAC6U30bkBXTYJFORN53wij2seaj_c5xq1cO6ZnvfLRLXpvkrrXuReg3gaPAkeZl40dpL_k1CxzfbyVuXIrA0eeH3NNtXbkWCaCU3F9gkRQqHzKwl2WhxEXOtPwIHEvNx1PoMXqhPwC6AbWy0BzO74-YUiydFUZdVorp70z9L87d4W8AAAD__6LUZaI), with the Dow dropping 1,100 points (2.5%), extending its losing streak to 10 days, the longest since 1974. The S&P 500 fell nearly 3%, and the Nasdaq dropped 3.5%.
## Defense Bill Passes Senate
The Senate approved the 1,800-page, [$895 billion National Defense](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb8Gd1gwEBMXFK9xl9duaY3N4MwK4whQrPz9yttvd6UrnSOdr8f8QE6ct_-4k2_xmEGBlRqkHueAnD6z7YKPRECmI6-dsYO6a-e6pzcQ3d1YvYBVqyYF-qbsGNyAbgmOYsf-omnQo9ZmUPc-AinC0QHeEEMYhFUUuB2l_z44tyfF9DneVPr12Lvkn629qjD_BEwCpvM8-3Wpmc56_QKmawqYKmVsJHNAlIEi5Upy4ZTkRjlQkRgjl53zJlcsJGDqig-vk1PiOjhh1bYjp19n-6vB28NPAAAA__8uiF8Q) Authorization Act in an 85 to 14 vote on Wednesday, authorizing funding for the Defense Department next year. The bill arrived in the Senate [two months late](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DGP4yAQBeBfg7uJYOyAXVBc4y7XXmlNwhDPHQbLcIny71fefptpRvre0_tzW24kSfLzN23sWywLahzAIJhpCSTpswxd8JEZue_YG9cPVo_GuW71OjruY--0sZbR6evDWBPHGAj7yVnbiT81g2Yyprd6vERkzTQ5pCtRCFYNmoO0clz-Fslt5Zg-5cXH5VG2Lvm1tb2q_pfCWeGcP3up7XwpnE9Y4WzwPKPC-X-FzO-qcK6cqTHsVCtXGKfrHQJHzpXhLilB4LpLYwi8wXuVLPkJZyi0g3KFBx0Md8oQywH_JJxkd_iwvyUlqdapQT83kvRdsv002svjVwAAAP__uwFtyw) as Democrats fought against a part of the bill that prohibited military health care services from providing sex-change procedures on children. The House passed the bill 281 to 140 [last week](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAQRp_G7rD4i3EKitu4y223tAYYnFlhsADFytuvsv12n_RJR0fn67E9gBLl_T8caHssm-RSMyGZuG8BKL03PQYbESWqEa0wSs98EcaMT-tui55vnjspgps9F9qp4LV0JiptlBnJfmhCirsQaubLFCVyhLuRcAMIYR40x0C91Om7UO5PjOldXlgnX44x2WfvZxvUv0Gug1yv65qy8xmv9vkHuZ4lUSffBrn6kveK7TMbZujITmgNGwsYMTdkjlJiDjLbMQesDGKkelDemYeK7KBcamPVZxCLNnoZqw3nRSlRm82g-X4ApV-v_lenl5U_AQAA__856mxy), with Speaker Mike Johnson stating that it refocuses "the Pentagon on military lethality, not radical woke ideology." The bill has been sent to President Biden’s desk to be signed into law.
## CNN Hits Record Low as Fox News Surges
CNN’s [ratings have hit an all-time low](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L2O2zAQBOCnobo1yJUsSoWKNOoubUpjYa7kzfFHINc2_PaB0l8zzQAfMPPn6_ZFEiXvvynxolu5ocUBHIKbb4Ekfm5DF5aNGbnveHG-H0Y7Oe-7xxJGb13w_bWfRp6cv16dxdEOFLxDP8-dLKfm0M3O9aOdLhuyZZo90pUohNEMloNoqZe_RbI-eIuf8uJ6uZfUxeWhejTT_zK4Glzz5yhNz8rgesIGV4dnTAbXxEHI4HrPGSqp5L1Bk_wNWoBiBJXEEMsbJMNLlCIETmWvdDzkDlupQOHFVaVxbUANIm8KkSlL3iGzvkv9bnDEZ0qsQJtyBa3PdMBbssG1q0s43hKjtNGbwe6JJP4foj8d-1rwXwAAAP__SpJ75Q) in the key 25-54 demographic, with primetime viewership plunging 52% following President-elect Donald Trump’s victory. MSNBC also saw a steep decline, with ratings dropping over 60%, while Fox News gained 7% and captured 72% of cable news viewers. CNN is in the midst of a major overhaul that will reportedly include mass layoffs. It averaged only 92,000 total day viewers in the key 25-to-54-year-old demographic this year and suffered a 52% decline in its primetime core audience. Experts attribute the declines at left-leaning networks to [partisan disengagement](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kD2LtDAUhX9N7K6YGL-KFNMIbzFvtbCl3EmuepeYiMmMzL9fXNhyuwcO53B4Pu_THdlzWP7jRibPcVKV0iAVyGFyyP496cKZmUhRXZCRXa3bqpddV6yGdN-ixPqhm66XXd_b2amH1I0ddIuWCjbXmlRykLJuq76cFVWEQ6ewQXSuFboixzke5VfkkFea_Tu-6Cht3Apv1pz3JOqbUKNQ43me5ZbClQk1UoBnEmrco-fM9kLyZDPHcPGWwsMCBgc2BJh5WTPkCI4XiM8McQaEPab824EDM4clwRo9CTXiAbebfH00_1JxGLef7D2nthO6WjZk__Mw_2XsZdR3AAAA__9aMG9b), though both networks hope for a rebound as political activity ramps up.

Today, we're sponsored by ; check them out in today's edition. | Fed Cuts Rates a Quarter-Point, Stocks Plunge The Federal Reserve for the third consecutive time Wednesday, lowering rates by a quarter-point and signaling it expects only two more rate cuts in 2025. Rates now stand at 4.25%- 4.5%, back to the level they were at in December 2022. Chair called the decision a reflection of higher inflation readings and “expectations that inflation will be higher in 2025.” The announcement , with the Dow dropping 1,100 points (2.5%), extending its losing streak to 10 days, the longest since 1974. The S&P 500 fell nearly 3%, and the Nasdaq dropped 3.5%. Defense Bill Passes Senate The Senate approved the 1,800-page, Authorization Act in an 85 to 14 vote on Wednesday, authorizing funding for the Defense Department next year. The bill arrived in the Senate as Democrats fought against a part of the bill that prohibited military health care services from providing sex-change procedures on children. The House passed the bill 281 to 140 , with Speaker Mike Johnson stating that it refocuses "the Pentagon on military lethality, not radical woke ideology." The bill has been sent to President Biden’s desk to be signed into law. CNN Hits Record Low as Fox News Surges CNN’s in the key 25-54 demographic, with primetime viewership plunging 52% following President-elect Donald Trump’s victory. MSNBC also saw a steep decline, with ratings dropping over 60%, while Fox News gained 7% and captured 72% of cable news viewers. CNN is in the midst of a major overhaul that will reportedly include mass layoffs. It averaged only 92,000 total day viewers in the key 25-to-54-year-old demographic this year and suffered a 52% decline in its primetime core audience. By Illinois Review

Yesterday, IR published a story titled, "Blagojevich Urges Trump Legal Team to File Massive Defamation Suit Against Billionaire Pritzker After ABC News Agrees to $15M Suit." Shortly after it's publication, it was shared by Trump allies Bernie Kerik and Roger Stone. Today, Politico picked up on our story and it's now front page! Check out the story here!

clean_body: Proving to be Illinois' only conservative news medium, Illinois Review finds its way onto the front page of Politico.com view in browser () | update preferences () | unsubscribe () This IR e-Blast Powered By: Dear Peter, We thought you may be interested to receive this conservative news alert from Illinois Review, the largest conservative media source in Illinois, and the only source in Illinois that has been shared by President Donald Trump. Twitter () Facebook () IllinoisReview.com () Blagojevich Urges Trump Legal Team to File Massive Defamation Suit Against Billionaire Pritzker After ABC News Agrees to $15M Settlement () Vice President Kamala Harris participates in a rally to support Illinois Democrats with Illinois Gov. J.B. Pritzker on the campus of University of Illinois Chicago. (Scott Olson/Getty Images-file) By Illinois Review Yesterday, IR published a story titled, "Blagojevich Urges Trump Legal Team to File Massive Defamation Suit Against Billionaire Pritzker After ABC News Agrees to $15M Suit." Shortly after it's publication, it was shared by Trump allies Bernie Kerik and Roger Stone. Today, Politico picked up on our story and it's now front page! Check out the story here! name: History Facts
subject: The "typo" on the Liberty Bell
body:
In 1751, Pennsylvania statesman Isaac Norris placed an order to the Whitechapel Bell Foundry in London for a large bell to be placed in the State House in Philadelphia. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68cnh6kt36he6p9y58ztlyghto2mtjehxxs7b5fzywx2p6k0wd60xgiy0fbvelz2spv3258lxkkcm80skm1kip3aoq286i01uo0nwkogl3yophafy7ic8awzzry210282u0d5q5aa0n9gud11&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soqpp1&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# ["Pennsylvania" is written with a missing "n" on the Liberty Bell.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soqpp1&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [U.S. History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soqpp1&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soqpp1&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| I n [1751](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soqpp1&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), Pennsylvania statesman Isaac Norris placed an order to the Whitechapel Bell Foundry in London for a large bell to be placed in the State House in Philadelphia. The bell was meant to commemorate the 50th anniversary of the Pennsylvania Charter of Privileges, the colony’s original constitution. Now known as the Liberty Bell, this colonial landmark remains on display in Philadelphia as a symbol of the United States’ ideals of liberty and equality. The bell is inscribed with a Bible verse extolling the virtues of liberty, as well as these [words](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soqpp1&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com): "By Order of the Assembly of the Province of Pensylvania for the State House in Philada." That’s right, Pennsylvania is spelled with a missing “n” on the Liberty Bell — but it’s not a typo. Though it looks unorthodox today, “Pensylvania” was [generally](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soqpp1&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) [accepted](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soqpp1&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) in the 18th century as one of several legitimate spellings for the colony’s name, along with “Pensilvania” and “Pennsilvania.”
---
In fact, this same spelling of “Pensylvania” appears in the U.S. Constitution, in the section where delegates from Pennsylvania signed their names to the document. The word was written by Alexander Hamilton in that instance, but the “Pennsylvania” spelling we know now appears elsewhere in the Constitution. To this day, the word “Pensylvania” remains unaltered on both the Liberty Bell and the Constitution, forever enshrining this alternate spelling in the story of the nation’s founding.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soqpp1&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soqpp1&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## The Liberty Bell was hidden during the Revolutionary War.
For about 10 months during the American Revolutionary War, the Liberty Bell was rushed away from Philadelphia to a hidden location that was classified as a military secret. The mission to hide the bell was launched in 1777, and in September of that year, George Washington’s troops were defeated by the British army at the Battle of Brandywine in Pennsylvania. Washington’s defeat left Philadelphia vulnerable to British occupation, and the British began advancing on the city. Anticipating the impending invasion, Philadelphians rushed to remove all the large bells in the city — including the Liberty Bell — so that the occupying soldiers wouldn’t be able to melt them down to make new weapons. The bell was [relocated](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soqpp1&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) from Philadelphia to Allentown, Pennsylvania, where it was hidden underneath the floorboards of a local church. It remained concealed in the church until June 1778, when the British occupation of Philadelphia ended and the bell could safely be returned to Philadelphia.

We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb5a8f89f-9dc8-4d8e-af1c-73fef0fdf845/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| 7,309 votes, Peter. That’s how many votes it took for the House Majority to be decided in 3 battleground districts in favor of Republicans: Iowa’s 1st District, Colorado’s 8th District, and Pennsylvania’s 7th District. And if you want the breakdown for the final margin of victory for each race:
* PA-07: 4,061 votes
* CO-08: 2,449 votes
* IA-01: _797 votes_

If there’s one thing we learned from the 2024 election, it’s this: Every. Vote. Matters. In 2025, we need to close the gap and swing every race back to Democrats at all levels. With a Trump administration poised to take away our fundamental freedoms, we need to do everything we can to fight back. [Peter: 2025 has to be Democrats’ year, not Trump’s Project 2025. So if you’re ready to fight for freedom and democracy, chip in any amount today to close the gap and help put Democrats back in charge.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td2027c39-5197-4984-8cca-397fb16c349f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. subject: Walmart just bowed to evil liberal demands...
body:
Once you get access to this book you’ll need to review it ASAP...
| | | We are a community of gun-loving Americans. We hope you stick around but remember you can [unsubscribe](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19415/6374453/a5f035ad8afa7589abc03864170ed401c7c4b1c0/744bb1788bb5a08684223c48722a58e52382f1b2) here at any time.

|

December 19th, 2024
---
|
---
Walmart, a company who’s known to be one of the biggest supporters of conservative causes, has just bowed to evil liberal demands.

Here’s what happened...

Several major companies (including Amazon, Walmart, Barnes & Noble and more) have decided it’s against Americans’ best interests to carry a new book on their store shelves.

And the reason why should have you fuming...

The book is called _The First 72 Hours._

_The First 72 Hours_ was written by one of the world's leading survival authors, Damian Campbell.

And the reason these companies **won’t allow you to buy his book** is because it exposes how the left is using the current political unrest to steal our freedom in ways we never imagined...

And it teaches you how to prepare for the coming collapse.

The secrets in this book are well-known by government insiders...

And Cambell has put them all in this book in an attempt to warn you about what is going to happen in the next few months.

Since Campbell isn’t allowed to sell this book in stores we convinced him to let us hand out a few copies at a **deep discount.**

name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: No Turning Back Now
body:
Democrats need new, fresh faces to stop the cycle of failure. This week, we took a step backward.
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vso0m-p2q0d2-kyd76rh9/)
---
# **No Turning Back Now.**
---
|
---
| | | | folks, \\\ Trump beat us again. But this time, it wasn’t just the Republicans handing him the win—it was House Democrats. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, a widely respected and well-liked political figure, was vying to lead the powerful House Oversight Committee. Instead, **establishment Democrats, in a secret ballot, chose to elevate 74-year-old Gerry Connolly.** It seems House Democrats didn’t get the message from the 2024 election: **the American people will no longer tolerate business as usual in Washington, D.C., at our expense.** We’ve lost our right to choose. We’ve lost any shred of moral clarity by funding and advocating for a genocide. We’re shamed for daring to bring up essential policies like Medicare for All. **That ends now. We’re not going back.** At No Dem Left Behind, it has long been our policy to avoid involvement in contested primaries. **That changes today.** We’re taking on the establishment, and **2026 will be the year of the working man and woman.** We plan to identify candidates from diverse backgrounds and equip them with the tools and resources to run strong, well-funded campaigns. We didn’t ask for this fight. But **corporate Democrats—like Manchin, Sinema, and their allies—have forced us down this path.** The protection of the Old Guard at the expense of the people will no longer be tolerated. **And make no mistake: we will not back down.** We’re not doing this alone. A movement is building, and No Dem Left Behind is stepping up to help lead it. We’re not here to divide the party—we’re here to **take it back from the corporations and oligarchs who have a stranglehold on our democracy.** If this is not the fight you signed up for, we understand if you choose to unsubscribe. But if you choose to stay, here’s what you can expect: **we’re going to think BIG. We’re going to dream BIG. And we’re going to win BIG.** **America is crying out for new leadership.** People didn’t vote for Trump because they were inspired—they voted for him out of spite. And why? **Because the D.C. establishment angered millions, driving them into the arms of a convicted felon.** The American people overwhelmingly rejected corporate Democrats and Republicans alike. [**_This is an ambitious mission, and we need your help. Yes, we need funding, but we also need to expand our movement. If this vision resonates with you, share this message with allies who feel the same. We know it will also reach establishment figures—and we don’t care. We are taking back our party. Then, we’re taking back our country. And we will lead as true Democrats._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2vso0m-p2q0d3-kyd76rh0/)
---

A Historic Moment: Robert F. Kennedy on Capitol Hill
[A HEALTHIER FUTURE FOR ALL AMERICANS](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=capitol_hill_12_18_24_a1&n=5)
Dear Peter,
This week, Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is on Capitol Hill meeting with more than 20 senators as he prepares for Senate hearings next month.
As President Trump’s nominee for Secretary of Health and Human Services, Kennedy is talking with Senators to hear what matters most to them and their constituents.
This moment is about more than one nomination. It’s about reimagining what health can look like in our country—addressing chronic disease, getting toxins out of our food, and ensuring transparency throughout the entire agency.
[**Kennedy has always been a voice for healthier, stronger families—and now he needs our support. >>**](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=capitol_hill_12_18_24_a1&n=6)
When Robert F. Kennedy Jr. launched his campaign, he knew the road ahead would require extraordinary commitment. He made every sacrifice to ensure his message reached the people.
Now, as he works to execute President Trump’s vision for a healthier America, _we can lighten his load and strengthen his efforts to Make America Healthy Again._
[**Will you stand with Kennedy today and be part of this historic moment? >>**](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=capitol_hill_12_18_24_a1&n=7)
[Chip in $25, $50, or $100](https://www.mahanow.org/donate-em1?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=capitol_hill_12_18_24_a1&n=8)
Every contribution helps close out the necessary campaign debt from the road we’ve traveled together, freeing Kennedy to focus fully on this mission: improving health policies, promoting transparency, and prioritizing the well-being of every American.
**Together, we can Make America Healthy Again.**
Thank you for being part of this extraordinary journey.
Team Kennedy
[Mahanow.org](https://www.mahanow.org/r?u=y_k5EP27yTOsxSw3tqBFMOXUy1MXBZnG7PhKqYOpRo0&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=capitol_hill_12_18_24_a1&n=9)

"Well, what are YOU doing to change the climate?!" Tatum pressed the student.
She reveals her MASSIVELY expensive solution for climate change... **[Watch him give her the reality check she needs.](https://substack.com/redirect/fcc9b4e9-c115-4a8c-9d04-beb085bdd125?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "Who is gonna pay for that?!!"

# **Man SHOOTS DOWN drone over his property - What happens next is unbelievable...**
A Florida man **[was arrested after shooting down a drone](https://substack.com/redirect/557b07d8-755d-447e-9a33-09828029bb47?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** flying over his property with a 9mm pistol.
"At some point today, did a drone fly over your house and you shot at it," a police officer asked the man standing at his front door.
"Yes I did,... what am I gonna lie?!!" the man answered. **[Watch what happened next:](https://substack.com/redirect/557b07d8-755d-447e-9a33-09828029bb47?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/557b07d8-755d-447e-9a33-09828029bb47?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/557b07d8-755d-447e-9a33-09828029bb47?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The incident occurred in June 2024 in Lake County, Florida. The drone was in-fact a Walmart delivery drone, which responding deputies **[confirmed had a bullet hole](https://substack.com/redirect/d0cc09e2-e1e9-4eab-9359-cb9dcf08fde2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** through the load it was carrying when they examined the scene.
**[Drone sitings have baffled many Americans](https://substack.com/redirect/557b07d8-755d-447e-9a33-09828029bb47?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in recent weeks, especially in east coast states such as New Jersey and New York. There is no clear answer yet from authorities as to what is going on or why drones appear to be suddenly inundating the skies.
* * *
# **Stephen A. Smith GOES BALLISTIC on the entire Democrat party during EPIC rant**
Stephen A. Smith, a known woke sports commentator, **[TORE the democrats a new one](https://substack.com/redirect/689ddd43-fb95-4e44-94dd-fa1e49753c8a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for repeated "patheticness" which lost them the election to Trump.
"He beat you!!" Smith shouted to the camera. "It just shows another level of patheticness, if that is even a word,... DAMN!!"

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
Take a moment to look around.

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlg4genkbfpqpbkj65suc66h3jsgsevmfsm8644o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdj6co35c1h2bs)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhe3q06d0l66jo59b17f4r5o8qr3v4qgedoe8c1o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdj6co35c1h2bs)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

clean_body: Take a moment to look around. | | | Hello Friend, Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator. Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan? I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return. That's the heart of Revelation. Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness. Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead. It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near. This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey. Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ. When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence. As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King. In my brand-new book, Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into: 1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist? 2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event? 3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture? 4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance? 5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem? Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Discover the Facts: Socialism and Capitalism Explained
body:
In recent years, there has been a noticeable shift among young Americans who increasingly favor socialism over capitalism.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi97klb9mjt6r3d7hbemq2vss5lurvig62sbduq0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdj6co31clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, In recent years, there has been a noticeable shift among young Americans who increasingly favor socialism over capitalism. This trend raises a critical question: do they fully understand these two systems' historical contexts and real-world outcomes?
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh5iv17ud3ev3elqctfv5ii3ovemlc4m10roinu8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdj6co31clh2bs)
---
| | To address this, we have created a new eBook, _**The History of Socialism and Capitalism**_ , authored by two of the most prominent voices in today's political discourse, Hoover Institution senior fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson.

This new eBook offers a deep dive into the origins, development, and impacts of socialism and capitalism. Each scholar presents an in-depth analysis through two different lenses. It's hard to overstate the relevance of this eBook in today's policy debates, where radical proposals are gaining traction.

Understanding the historical and practical implications of socialism and capitalism is crucial for making informed decisions about our economic and political future. The insights provided by Ferguson and Hanson will equip you with the knowledge to critically evaluate these competing ideologies and their potential impact on society.

Don't miss this opportunity to enhance your understanding of these pivotal economic systems. [Click here to request your free copy of **The History of Socialism and Capitalism** today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z16sknarl0dhhgi2r6rhvk8c7bhc0n39ubhml2no_rp22sh2s8i6epj1cdj6co31clh2bs)
Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

generosity.

Since our
founding in 1844, we have been dedicated to learning, character,
faith, and freedom. And we accomplish this work entirely through
the support of generous individuals like you-not one penny of
government funding.

This
Christmas, we invite you to join us in this mission by making a
special year-end gift. As a symbol of our gratitude, we'll send
you a limited-edition Hillsdale College Christmas ornament for
your gift of $50 or more.

Each
ornament is a beautiful reminder of the Christmas season.
Supplies are limited. It's a meaningful keepsake to hang on your
tree or share with a loved one.

Your
generosity will have a lasting impact by helping Hillsdale
College:

Provide free online courses to millions of Americans, such as
"The Genesis Story," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on
Christianity."
Reach
over 6.6 million households and businesses with Imprimis, our
free "digest of liberty."

Restore excellence to K-12 education through our network of
classical charter schools, which teach American history and
civics.

We
accomplish all this while remaining independent of all government
funding, thanks to your generous support. Your gift today will
help us continue to provide these free resources and promote the
principles of liberty and faith far and wide.

You can
reserve your ornament by making a tax-deductible gift here:
https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/christmas-ornament

Thank you
for your kindness and support.

On behalf
of everyone at Hillsdale College-our students, faculty, and
staff-I wish you and your loved ones a very Merry Christmas and a
Happy New Year.

Warm
regards,

Labin
Duke, Th.M.
Associate
Vice President
National
Donor Outreach
Hillsdale
College

subject: Fwd: [Read] You may have heard of me…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98939707/518329804/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241219bump_N_SG_NO_8_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhYjk3ODg2LTExYmUtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=onS-zq3WtpsdhczlWzRH2YzR7M7Pe7x6f-uqkq2mTtQ=)
---
I wanted to make sure you saw this message from me, Susanna Gibson. I was on track to win a Republican-leaning district in Virginia until I became the target of a reprehensible and sexist attack that derailed my campaign.

The official Republican party of my state sent _explicit photos_ of me to everyone in my district. My neighbors.

My children had to be accompanied by security at school. I received hundreds of death threats and rape threats. I was forced to leave my job as a nurse practitioner.

**Her Bold Move stepped up when too many other organizations were afraid to publicly support me.** They understood that their role in my campaign had become more important than ever – that I was the victim of a sexist attack reserved for women candidates. They renewed their support for me and encouraged other endorsers to follow their lead, they checked in on me constantly, and they helped me fundraise when institutions were actually pulling funding from my campaign.

**At one of the loneliest times of my life, the HBM team made me feel less alone. It’s clear their mission to fight misogyny shows up in their actions as an org – not just their words.**

**I was only 715 votes shy of winning that seat in the Virginia House of Delegates. It’s frustrating to imagine how the outcome might have been different if more orgs had followed Her Bold Move’s lead. We could have avoided electing one more anti-choice legislator in my state.**

Her Bold Move is proud to do this work to ensure that women who are brave enough to run for office – like me – have the support they need and deserve. With your help, they can continue providing this critical support for candidates running in future elections.

[**Will you help support HBM’s efforts to elect pro-choice, pro-WOMEN women candidates in 2025 and beyond by rushing $25 or more today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98939714/518329865/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241219bump_N_SG_NO_8_NG_N_L1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhYjk3ODg2LTExYmUtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=onS-zq3WtpsdhczlWzRH2YzR7M7Pe7x6f-uqkq2mTtQ=)

Thank you,

Susanna Gibson

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
---
Hi Peter,

Ahead of the holidays, I wanted to introduce myself. In a previous election cycle, Her Bold Move endorsed me while I was running for a State Delegate seat in Virginia. The polls showed I was on track to win a Republican-leaning district – **until my campaign was the target of a uniquely sexist attack.**

In the final weeks of my run for office, I found out I had been the target of nonconsensual pornography, nonconsensual distribution of intimate images, and severe image-based sexual abuse both online and in person.

In fact, the Republican Party of Virginia – yes, the _official state Republican party_ – sent out explicit photos of me to thousands of homes in my district. My neighbors’ homes.

**Here is a look at what I went through in the wake of these attacks:**

❌ I received hundreds of phone calls and social media messages that included threats of rape and death.

❌ My children had to have security stay with them at school for weeks.

❌ I was forced to leave my job as a nurse practitioner.

❌ I had to leave the state to escape reporters and threatening strangers showing up at my house.

❌ I was unable to meet with voters for three weeks during the height of election season.

Male candidates do not experience this type of sexual harassment or abuse when they run for office. **But here’s the thing:_we need women to run for office._ Stories like mine are the reason many women don’t.**

I’m writing this email today to spread an important message to any woman considering a run for office: Her Bold Move is an amazing resource. I hope every woman candidate will take advantage of what HBM can offer.

**Her Bold Move stepped up when too many other organizations were afraid to publicly support me.** They understood that their role in my campaign had become more important than ever – that I was the victim of a _sexist attack_ reserved for _women candidates_. They renewed their support for me and encouraged other endorsers to follow their lead, they checked in on me constantly, they helped me fundraise when institutions were actually pulling funding from my campaign. At one of the loneliest times of my life, the HBM team made me feel less alone. It’s clear their mission to fight misogyny shows up in their actions as an org – not just their words.

I was only 715 votes shy of winning that seat in the Virginia House of Delegates. It’s frustrating to imagine how the outcome might have been different if more orgs had followed Her Bold Move’s lead. We could have avoided electing one more anti-choice legislator in my state.

[**That’s why I am reaching out today. I am so grateful for the work that Her Bold Move is doing to defend and empower women like me. Will you join me in supporting this important organization by pitching in $25 or more today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-pac/?refcode=EM_F_241219bump_N_SG_NO_8_NG_N_L2&amount=25) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$20.25 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98939720/518329887/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241219bump_N_SG_NO_8_NG_N_EB20.25&express_lane=true&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhYjk3ODg2LTExYmUtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=onS-zq3WtpsdhczlWzRH2YzR7M7Pe7x6f-uqkq2mTtQ=)

** ** | | [**OTHER »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98939744/518329950/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_241219bump_N_SG_NO_8_NG_N_BOther&refcode2=other&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhYjk3ODg2LTExYmUtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=onS-zq3WtpsdhczlWzRH2YzR7M7Pe7x6f-uqkq2mTtQ=)

Running for office as a woman can be dangerous and scary. The political landscape is a safer and more supportive place for women with Her Bold Move at the forefront.

Susanna Gibson

Since our founding in 2020, we have supported hundreds of pro-choice, pro-women women candidates across 42 states and counting. As abortion bans and other dangerous laws about women tend to get passed in states with the lowest representation numbers for women in government (4%, 11%, 12%....) we've made it our mission to break the anti-choice male supermajorities in those state legislatures.

name: Nancy Northup
subject: Where we are
body:
Hi Peter,

There's only 12 days left until the end of the year, and the deadline for our 5X match: [**reprorights.org/year-end**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98943805/518343528/-1586972746?sourceid=1150210&utm_campaign=25emjge-1210aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=eoy&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjY2NTk1YS0xM2JlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oYmqowdxj0vg_uSkAMT2d26m45drZSWGLu38lLBOCJ8=&emci=0d946dc9-77bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=2b66595a-13be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=954237)

That might sound like a lot of time. But I want to pull back the curtain a bit: here's where we are right now for year-end fundraising: $81,246.

That's 40% of the way to our $200,000 year-end goal. It's a testament to our incredible community—but we need to push even further before the 12/31 deadline if we want to have the resources needed to fight back against the oppressive Project 2025 agenda.

Please make your year-end gift here: [**reprorights.org/year-end**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98943807/518343537/-1586972746?sourceid=1150210&utm_campaign=25emjge-1210aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=eoy&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYjY2NTk1YS0xM2JlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oYmqowdxj0vg_uSkAMT2d26m45drZSWGLu38lLBOCJ8=&emci=0d946dc9-77bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=2b66595a-13be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=954237)

In this fight, every voice matters—including yours. Thank you for taking action today.

Onward,

Nancy

Sent from my iPhone
Center for Reproductive Rights
199 Water St.
New York, NY 10038
United States

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Important Update: Kash Patel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
It’s time to finally end the weaponization of the Bureau. Read more >>>

| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.--G7DDJ3xP0PmA)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, I had the opportunity to meet one-on-one with Kash Patel last week and let me tell you - President Trump absolutely nailed it with this pick. We had an in depth conversation about many issues that our country faces- including the urgent need to fix our dysfunctional and lawless Federal bureaucracy in Washington, DC.
If you're not familiar with him, Kash is a former federal prosecutor and national security aide; and more importantly, he is a man of principle who believes it is crucial that we stop the weaponization of government, most especially in regard to the Department of Justice and the FBI. And that's why in my view, he is the perfect choice for FBI Director.

I can tell you I look forward to voting "YES" on Kash Patel's confirmation and to doing all I can to support him in his mission. I'm also going to be counting on your support along the way to get out our message and rally the American people behind us.

**_[**_Please rush your most generous possible sustaining contribution >>>_**](http://trk.tedcruz.)_**

_A new era in Washington is coming - the countdown is on!_

President Trump's leadership is exactly what our nation needs to **reverse the damage done by the Biden-Harris administration** and **make us stronger and more prosperous than ever**.

Thank you, as always, for being part of the team. I'd encourage you to **[**check out upcoming episodes of the Verdict podcast**](http://trk.tedcruz.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4NzQ5MDg0NSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MzU0LWNmMWY2Mzg0OWM3MDQ3MDRiM2IzMmU2MTMxMmNlOGVkIiwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vb21ueS5mbS9zaG93cy92ZXJkaWN0LXdpdGgtdGVkLWNydXotMSJ9/m6-6Jl8IBvaARl2Nk49L0A)** as we get to work in the New Year on the issues that matter most and keep an eye on your inbox for my urgent alerts and updates.

For Liberty,

Ted Cruz
---
[](http://trk.tedcruz.-FXgIePefePyTKzGs7EA)
---
[ **DONATE NOW**](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
_PS: It 's vital that we rebuild our war chest now to protect this seat and take back the Senate this year. Every bit of support is a huge help - _[**_thank you for any contribution you can pitch in today_** _!_](http://trk.tedcruz._C9L5OBfwTvq3Rg)

name: Quentin & Stefanie
subject: Happy holidays, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-gP0Xd1LL-Lub7Gk22PHy9biRkT0ZFLBZo_8f8EnE7Jowo6A0R8oop8Rrw_kitS3sMwrJn2ozruxmkvaG936_l1duoWABImS72zia5WVvFdaAA9hnzd0bOHlVdPcSjEnUSQjqOo5IlihBrcKaQb-LZQjYpzEDjK8Ws5I7Qkiegjh3CTaQyjr5vlo0US9KMj4KLcFc6hb0FyUDjV9uUZwZsdrUa-qbRBuozPyF6flFZ3RNn9lgALGNLqavNqqh8fkEVu9koWLfRYPSCwqORr_iAQ-CMpC7Q1SYI7lpCChZZstJFoVYDyM0xa9GC7FgCu1TPWFH6FAR3HSDOpCoAVkK1HQW1lXP1LR0JunUGVvpjVY5iqwMg4440lf8p3E3f1Jpj3NcD3O4YVdaETOtqkQPOgOBJ3i9kruy3rC_M95Txf8-ocZrtV3EnvNoZyL-PGsk/4cf/hJ5H0DZ3QW-6Pu6x1l8nsg/h0/h001.cEBU_GigTIjSFfg8dTr_BjtaeK8U_-RCsSMbFyfZxBM) | | Peter,

As the year draws to a close, we want to take a moment to express our deepest gratitude for your unwavering partnership and support. Together, you have helped The Collective PAC advance our mission to build Black political power and create meaningful, lasting change in communities across the country.

Your commitment has been vital in strengthening our efforts to empower Black candidates, elevate voter engagement, and ensure that our democracy reflects the voices of all its people. The impact we’ve made this year is a testament to what we can accomplish when we work together for a brighter, more equitable future.

As we celebrate the progress of this past year, we’re filled with excitement and determination for the work ahead in 2025. We look forward to continuing this journey with you and achieving even greater milestones together.

Wishing you and your loved ones a joyful holiday season and a new year filled with peace, prosperity, and purpose.

With heartfelt gratitude,

Quentin, Stefanie and The Collective Family
* * *

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtMtM9o7MpfQTM1SqECAoa9PnuvrCzoBy5DfIGWsplANbnjpBAv4hJoqiZg5D3GXPrsKJxv6dnfrPMy5A5YBxfoE_za-5CaNjRbfzjF2Z-p6ghhm75-pajFT57onfPS5MOcFefd7AUDZN8h604LUzPU-kOsagn7Lc7lkxiwXEij2a0EFsGXdJZssNX2Zov0ljl8SjnVKcs3nDSWnbNV_W2WzNp0JhqSvwjBFOU33Z6jrCaZN32qwBvv6Hhp_j6L5lqY3hm503tpI6tPfi4EnXcC7ociHcHfsitCNgMlXW45IcEapouQSIe8EfI8tzr2N7u_tuR5X2NgN1jaP9jf5Jqsdhlq2THRLdBbIVEjCmfLDHxD4Xb2yJC-o3hpShKKL9A/4cf/hJ5H0DZ3QW-6Pu6x1l8nsg/h1/h001.kr7QYqBsQAkt_fKbAKVvcj5aJljcmqXDDFR-rmSEOJw) | The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 500 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, As the year draws to a close, we want to take a moment to express our deepest gratitude for your unwavering partnership and support. Together, you have helped The Collective PAC advance our mission to build Black political power and create meaningful, lasting change in communities across the country. Your commitment has been vital in strengthening our efforts to empower Black candidates, elevate voter engagement, and ensure that our democracy reflects the voices of all its people. The impact we’ve made this year is a testament to what we can accomplish when we work together for a brighter, more equitable future. As we celebrate the progress of this past year, we’re filled with excitement and determination for the work ahead in 2025. We look forward to continuing this journey with you and achieving even greater milestones together. Wishing you and your loved ones a joyful holiday season and a new year filled with peace, prosperity, and purpose. With heartfelt gratitude, Quentin, Stefanie and The Collective Family | The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 500 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. body:
I am NPPEF’s COO and I wanted to introduce myself.| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98946481/518352424/642808054?refcode=EM_F_241220intro_N_NPPEF_6_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk5NzM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY3YmU1NWJhLTE1YmUtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rpyzr7PGPR1Mrq7xzr6weSi6x0ZtCQLr7g2h4B6uV0M=)
---
| | Friend,

Stephanie here. I am NPPEF’s COO and I wanted to introduce myself.

I bring over 20 years of administrative experience to the NPPEF team, 15 of which I served with nonprofits. My past experiences in policy-based nonprofits made me realize that we won’t see policy changes until the people most affected by those policies are involved in the process. **That is why I decided to join the NPPEF team – and because of the passion demonstrated by the NPPEF staff for this work.**

As chief of staff and now COO, I see myself as a resource for staff on the ground, expanding the electorate. I believe they are the experts in the work we do, and I am proud to be able to provide them with support, including mentorship and coaching, to aid in professional development so we are more effective at reaching the communities we center.

**Positive change comes from the ground up when all communities, especially those historically disenfranchised, have a voice in their government, and team NPPEF is working to make that the reality.**

But here’s the thing: the support that staff needs is not always covered by grants. That is why we depend on grassroots support to get the job done.

[**Luckily, through the end of the month, a family foundation in Pittsburgh has pledged to match every dollar we raise up to $25,000. 2025 will be an important year, and we depend on your support to ensure we can sustain our work through next year and beyond. Will you consider donating a matched $25 donation or whatever you can today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98946482/518352425/642808054?refcode=EM_F_241220intro_N_NPPEF_6_NG_N_L1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk5NzM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY3YmU1NWJhLTE1YmUtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rpyzr7PGPR1Mrq7xzr6weSi6x0ZtCQLr7g2h4B6uV0M=)

# **[Kari Lake](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=ebadbbe4735c4adb984965a6542ac0ad&_e=DcKIX2LzNQRvMHkHWnl0pMTsQJn43_tzEnlupnCBS_mRH_3jePSf8t2L049dQQzPPQNexB_VlfL1bp6dd2oYQI_DYArYYH0KCl7UZ-mqeM5XZcF35wCM8SbjNcRlvOd_V1uEJ5XdrJzdXafeCyupkuhw9lliLkXhBcqmdTzGO15s-vaKQq53QT4rK_epDjuMANLUt4Sc6EfqcGuXZbrHN4FCWojvjmknArHgJZjlkldg3Kls2raJxpRkBQks80I9oeZ9ATUzpXpriQ_2xEpzLdLfr5a0KdTHpo3cRfZDKeAKfOqyUaobWgaFqwJZFUybYUX_73cbOINqZ9AGkrnU1fwzoTqY5qVEA-9NS-PnyWdRs3NqbJxDG-YvnhddhHQAELJ4AEBURCsLdJnywBjrIYTM1zATeRHy8nwBOds2q18%3D)**
---
|
---
Dear Peter,I wanted to send you this _Christmas Card_ to wish you and your family a Merry and Blessed Christmas. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Peter, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. clean_body: I want you to be my Official Cabinet-level advisor. | | | | | | | IMPORTANT MEMO FROM 45TH & 47TH PRESIDENT: | Big news, Friend! I’ve assembled my Official Cabinet, but I’ve always got room for patriots like you to lend me a hand. Thanks to your support, we won this election, and now Inauguration Day is just around the corner. That’s why I’m proud to appoint you as an Official Cabinet-Level Advisor. As my Official Cabinet-Level Advisor, YOU will play a key role in shaping my administration’s priorities. These questions will be easy, I promise. Friend I know I can count on you. Together, we’ll make America greater than ever before. Thank you for stepping up and doing your part to Save America, Donald J. Trump President - Elect of the United States | | | | | Contributions to Trump National Committee JFC Inc. are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Help House GOP cut wasteful spending and make America Great Again!

| | | _**" Biden Education Department Spent over $1 billion in DEI grants: report"\- Fox News**_
Peter,

We were disgusted when we saw this, but not surprised.

The Biden administration has spent BILLIONS of YOUR tax dollars on divisive DEI programs, and this is just the beginning.

The bloated and inefficient federal government has blown countless trillions of taxpayer dollars and strangled the American economy with burdensome regulations, and President Trump has promised to fix that.

**Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy are ready to shrink the size of the federal government and make government for the people once again._Are you with them?_

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: All eyes will be on us
body:
---
Derek, At the end of this month, we’ll close the books on our very last FEC deadline before Trump’s inauguration, and our fundraising numbers will be public. Here’s the truth: _Everyone_ will be looking at those numbers. Trump and the Republican Party are undoubtedly emboldened by this year’s election results. They’re counting on all of us being too tired and too disappointed to fight back against their Project 2025 agenda. We have to prove them wrong. As we head into 2025, there is no organization better positioned to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot, in 2025, 2026, and beyond. If everyone receiving this email pitched in $3, that would put us in a good position to hit our goals. But not everyone gives, which is why we’re hoping all Democrats who understand the stakes of this deadline and this moment give today. So we’re asking: [**Can Democrats nationwide count on you to contribute $3 directly to the Democratic National Committee today? Your support will help us reach our goals before our fundraising numbers are public, and we'll put it right to work preparing for _anything_ coming our way after Trump is inaugurated. **](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?amount=3&refcode=em_20241219_2419_fr&refcode2=2419_22930333_98NLpI&akid=2419%2E22930333%2E98NLpI) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20241219_2419_fr&refcode2=2419_22930333_98NLpI&akid=2419%2E22930333%2E98NLpI)**

We’ve lived through pivotal moment after pivotal moment in our country’s history. In a few short weeks, we’ll face another. Thank you for everything you’re doing to help us prepare,
The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._
clean_body: Derek, At the end of this month, we’ll close the books on our very last FEC deadline before Trump’s inauguration, and our fundraising numbers will be public. Here’s the truth: Everyone will be looking at those numbers. Trump and the Republican Party are undoubtedly emboldened by this year’s election results. They’re counting on all of us being too tired and too disappointed to fight back against their Project 2025 agenda. We have to prove them wrong. As we head into 2025, there is no organization better positioned to help elect Democrats up and down the ballot, in 2025, 2026, and beyond. If everyone receiving this email pitched in $3, that would put us in a good position to hit our goals. But not everyone gives, which is why we’re hoping all Democrats who understand the stakes of this deadline and this moment give today. So we’re asking: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | | ** | | | | | | | ** We’ve lived through pivotal moment after pivotal moment in our country’s history. In a few short weeks, we’ll face another. Thank you for everything you’re doing to help us prepare, The Democrats If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support.

subject: I hate to ask...
body:
| | | | [](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQwL4BGIy40Agg64MltFTVwSHFWaWNBPdtQtOmH4K0Z8TvWt_iJo2Nv06kVX0)
---

I hate asking for your help just weeks after this past election—but this is the reality we’re facing. We’re ALREADY being targeted by the House Democrats’ biggest Super PAC, and we cannot afford to show any weakness as we close the books on 2024 and report our fundraising with the FEC. The Democrats’ House Majority PAC (HMP) has already set their sights on our district for 2026. After spending nearly $200 million to flip House races this past cycle, they’re gearing up to do it all over again. We can’t afford to come up short, not now. I’m committed to defending southern Minnesota’s values, but I need your help preparing to fight against the flood of Democrat spending that is already taking shape. name: VoteVets
subject: The tank is running low, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
#
Peter,
Coming to you with a moment of complete honesty: Our tank is running low.
VoteVets spent extensively over the course of the last two years to fight back against Trump and the MAGA Right. In just the final months of the campaign we spent over $10 million, and the total amount across the campaign is millions and millions of dollars higher.
That might not sound like much when you think about Elon Musk putting up hundreds of millions against us, or the billions total spent in the presidential race.
But our focus is much more tactical. We spent against Trump, sure — but we’re just one organization in a much larger pool in that race. Where our efforts are most effective is down ballot: state legislatures, the U.S. House, the Senate.
And in the final tally, we had a hell of an impact. **With Derek Tran’s victory over Michelle Steel, VoteVets had 243 wins this cycle.** We’d measure that record against anyone... and suspect that very few (if any) can match it.
But after all that, we’ve drawn down our resources considerably. And as we approach the end of the year, it’s essential that we replenish our warchest. We all know what’s coming in January, and for VoteVets to enter 2025 in fighting shape we need to finish the year strong.
So, before the holidays and before everyone takes some down-time, we’re coming to you for help:
[**If you’ve got anything to spare, $20, $10, even $5, could you please make a donation to VoteVets as we work to shore up and prepare for what comes next?](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec24.0YbT0m&refcode=em241219-1-120&t=1&akid=34041%2E3013755%2EKUwon3)**

name: Reid Rasner, CEO
subject: Financial chats with family make you nervous?
body:
| Hi Peter, What's your first memory of money? How old were you and what stands out the most? These early money memories can shape our views of finance. So do the talks we have about money, not just as children but throughout our lives.1 That's one reason why talking finance with family is so important. But it's not the only one. Discussing money with family can create opportunities for connecting, sharing values, and planting the seeds for better financial decisions.2 Ideally, these conversations should happen regularly and across generations. That means talking about money with children of all ages — young kids, tweens and teens, and young adults. Spouses, parents, grandparents, and other loved ones should be part of the conversation too. When that kind of communication gets going, everyone can start to get on the page. Over time, that can create a much stronger foundation for lasting financial stability, not just for the family unit but for each individual who's a part of it.1, 2
---
|
---
[**Want to find out how to talk about money with loved ones? Click here to check out the rest.**](https://financeinsights.net/eg6DFeKzMiLdMYziAlQ3lHrm7b4?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) Sincerely,
---
**Reid Rasner - CEO**
Omnivest Financial
(307) 337-1223
[https://www.omnivestfinancial.com](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cub21uaXZlc3RmaW5hbmNpYWwuY29tIiwiaGFzaCI6Ik1kRVZUNGJCM2YxNE9YNCIsImNvbnRhY3RfZW1haWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9)
* * *
---
P.S. When was the last time you felt uncomfortable talking about money? What sparked your discomfort and what did you take away from that experience? Hit "reply" and share your story. I'd love to hear how you've handled tricky conversations about finance and what you've learned from them.
---
Sources 1\. [https://americasaves.org/resource-center/insights/talking-about-finances-as-a-family/](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC9hbWVyaWNhc2F2ZXMub3JnXC9yZXNvdXJjZS1jZW50ZXJcL2luc2lnaHRzXC90YWxraW5nLWFib3V0LWZpbmFuY2VzLWFzLWEtZmFtaWx5XC8iLCJoYXNoIjoiTWRFVlQ0YkIzZjE0T1g0IiwiY29udGFjdF9lbWFpbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0) 2\. [https://news.stonybrook.edu/university/why-talking-about-money-with-children-matters/](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC9uZXdzLnN0b255YnJvb2suZWR1XC91bml2ZXJzaXR5XC93aHktdGFsa2luZy1hYm91dC1tb25leS13aXRoLWNoaWxkcmVuLW1hdHRlcnNcLyIsImhhc2giOiJNZEVWVDRiQjNmMTRPWDQiLCJjb250YWN0X2VtYWlsIjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20ifQ)
