name: Riley Gaines
subject: Enough with their lies
body:
Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth.| |
---
| | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7cca548f27cf49d2910049dbc49c11fb&_e=p9b2VszHwU59we4CWAIZxLfmSo7koCnZNmznQCQsFavk7kz3YH20cjNeb4FU87iQ8413gib9YdCcJFq5E9VpNkbXmW8SizegW-qF9OGpkW_F_bhKjlBDWjpONERAPrVOCOwJYKZoQbIORjZGNu7EtTrckFyOft1M5q5vPOgEqvKsN2IqkQcLgGU781o8efxjcjRtGmrzQr5gDGxHsrkp-z67Z46NRLzYDhZ_jTIaokUieAF8447k-8-yfiUGNxBLemqHfG-O6o8c02kcOhuHeBVT_WbDkj4L76WDTEnmdIK1KelpUUNKM0TdzYf9TkARNq6ujjBaP5JLTlGQhcUMroG0sBlI-quiua3y07QcPSC3vxUui7ck9L10Dga7yW2kZTelDYuYC_0TJ3nTXV8XVw%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,
---
| | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery _slide_. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" _male_ swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me.
---
| [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7cca548f27cf49d2910049dbc49c11fb&_e=p9b2VszHwU59we4CWAIZxLfmSo7koCnZNmznQCQsFavk7kz3YH20cjNeb4FU87iQ8413gib9YdCcJFq5E9VpNkbXmW8SizegW-qF9OGpkW_F_bhKjlBDWjpONERAPrVOCOwJYKZoQbIORjZGNu7EtTrckFyOft1M5q5vPOgEqvKsN2IqkQcLgGU781o8efxjcjRtGmrzQr5gDGxHsrkp-z67Z46NRLzYDhZ_jTIaokUieAF8447k-8-yfiUGNxBL1tcUhKTZ-VHBNZ2aPITzy8u8YQUWhqEnG57gOIK5XsjYjnB4Lvwjpt4gRbD_-shZCy_VuHvCEm0YWSqfXZXZfiRDkVpYRJZq-XVWapP9PMc5mvQen86yixgev6BzPpiiDRjpRfB_1BCIYQmAahSF1A%3D%3D)
---
| | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. **[That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today -- before it's too late.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7cca548f27cf49d2910049dbc49c11fb&_e=p9b2VszHwU59we4CWAIZxLfmSo7koCnZNmznQCQsFavk7kz3YH20cjNeb4FU87iQ8413gib9YdCcJFq5E9VpNkbXmW8SizegW-qF9OGpkW_F_bhKjlBDWjpONERAPrVOCOwJYKZoQbIORjZGNu7EtTrckFyOft1M5q5vPOgEqvKsN2IqkQcLgGU781o8efxjcjRtGmrzQr5gDGxHsrkp-z67Z46NRLzYDhZ_jTIaokUieAF8447k-8-yfiUGNxBLzcokIkoD0rcDjgNmXEzE3ygF5EF_ILtS3_1A8jQTRn4BJvE4NJoPjoFxw9_aIlh91Ke2Ll2o9bZKI07A1VYCW5YDRa3opHbzIRwSP375RNEVHF0rnZCQB5YgNHqvLSWbBW2p5qETnQaM7XiiZEL_Uw%3D%3D)** My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."_Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women."_ It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."_Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot."_ Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.**God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that.** Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.**Your chance is right now -- and right by my side.** **[Please stand with me against the radical transgender movement by making an urgent tax-deductible donation today -- before it's too late.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7cca548f27cf49d2910049dbc49c11fb&_e=p9b2VszHwU59we4CWAIZxLfmSo7koCnZNmznQCQsFavk7kz3YH20cjNeb4FU87iQ8413gib9YdCcJFq5E9VpNkbXmW8SizegW-qF9OGpkW_F_bhKjlBDWjpONERAPrVOCOwJYKZoQbIORjZGNu7EtTrckFyOft1M5q5vPOgEqvKsN2IqkQcLgGU781o8efxjcjRtGmrzQr5gDGxHsrkp-z67Z46NRLzYDhZ_jTIaokUieAF8447k-8-yfiUGNxBL4iNjLmhGe-TCk2EU01w7Fpr_oE2g3kzxyksviDKyq6cavkKFTr2E2tkyONhJggmTZP2xzLkTU6MDSjiAmGqIS64PpAxuFuiDAjQLa1AQoslYhqWdEqvVqAH1CpBsnxuUMRAGPPes5StmdMD3IDc4dA%3D%3D) ** Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No."
---
>> But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations.
---
The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. **It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty.** **[And your tax-deductible gift today is going straight to help them.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7cca548f27cf49d2910049dbc49c11fb&_e=p9b2VszHwU59we4CWAIZxLfmSo7koCnZNmznQCQsFavk7kz3YH20cjNeb4FU87iQ8413gib9YdCcJFq5E9VpNkbXmW8SizegW-qF9OGpkW_F_bhKjlBDWjpONERAPrVOCOwJYKZoQbIORjZGNu7EtTrckFyOft1M5q5vPOgEqvKsN2IqkQcLgGU781o8efxjcjRtGmrzQr5gDGxHsrkp-z67Z46NRLzYDhZ_jTIaokUieAF8447k-8-yfiUGNxBLEZmpxRKCZMdvqNZC55KrMr4FqiWqEtW2XY1uf9TGDV6pmXId5aktFDwM-Bxp3CZOKWydFjezfIQGU7zs2L9wnvLESqf7waad3f5-266mfZL0BJULCv0HO4FMciAwgxMGYXdl9JHlg3_XTYYaEE-JWQ%3D%3D)** With the help of patriots like you, the _Center for American Liberty_ fights the transgender movement _in the courts_ because that’s the only way to stop them. And the _Center for American Liberty_ is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach.
---
**#1. They're fighting radical schools**.
---
I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors _encourage_ young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The _Center for American Liberty_ is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! **[When you make your tax-deductible gift today](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7cca548f27cf49d2910049dbc49c11fb&_e=p9b2VszHwU59we4CWAIZxLfmSo7koCnZNmznQCQsFavk7kz3YH20cjNeb4FU87iQ8413gib9YdCcJFq5E9VpNkbXmW8SizegW-qF9OGpkW_F_bhKjlBDWjpONERAPrVOCOwJYKZoQbIORjZGNu7EtTrckFyOft1M5q5vPOgEqvKsN2IqkQcLgGU781o8efxjcjRtGmrzQr5gDGxHsrkp-z67Z46NRLzYDhZ_jTIaokUieAF8447k-8-yfiUGNxBLPrDycAUvcJ_AU9iBVDtXnWnB4h8V45fdIE-Lv89t2Jhfb5rf5vtAocQXMUyIOp2e34Gtq2wUU8f3jeQvkjotNOQQzdsL4gaIK-LP72CG9A3S4nAj2S7B9mWbHTHA64sAiU_1W5n9EZMSSYlfXqjFeg%3D%3D), **you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals!
---
**#2. They're fighting radical doctors.**
---
There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince _even_ _conservative_ _parents_ that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the _Center for American Liberty_ is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. **[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7cca548f27cf49d2910049dbc49c11fb&_e=p9b2VszHwU59we4CWAIZxLfmSo7koCnZNmznQCQsFavk7kz3YH20cjNeb4FU87iQ8413gib9YdCcJFq5E9VpNkbXmW8SizegW-qF9OGpkW_F_bhKjlBDWjpONERAPrVOCOwJYKZoQbIORjZGNu7EtTrckFyOft1M5q5vPOgEqvKsN2IqkQcLgGU781o8efxjcjRtGmrzQr5gDGxHsrkp-z67Z46NRLzYDhZ_jTIaokUieAF8447k-8-yfiUGNxBLZ_6MQEWYlNLID9DSBOrNExmSshZlE1kEJb4XfosKaHfjLTLKJsXFuHkjIN0-3876sD3sovlOqmBrZ_v1NpUIp9MmwwCA3EDZOihybGd2ALIk7IqVNFWTtmOONDXXoIRka2eJQAXcJO7CfTx_w61ADA%3D%3D)** , you're helping Chloe and the _Center for American Liberty_ make sure this never happens to another child!
---
**#3. They're fighting for _your_ right to speak out against this evil.**
---
Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the _Center for American Liberty's_ specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished!**[**When you make your tax-deductible gift today**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7cca548f27cf49d2910049dbc49c11fb&_e=p9b2VszHwU59we4CWAIZxLfmSo7koCnZNmznQCQsFavk7kz3YH20cjNeb4FU87iQ8413gib9YdCcJFq5E9VpNkbXmW8SizegW-qF9OGpkW_F_bhKjlBDWjpONERAPrVOCOwJYKZoQbIORjZGNu7EtTrckFyOft1M5q5vPOgEqvKsN2IqkQcLgGU781o8efxjcjRtGmrzQr5gDGxHsrkp-z67Z46NRLzYDhZ_jTIaokUieAF8447k-8-yfiUGNxBLXKVgKVzntkGt-motNVpKTN5T_I0EZIms525tZGWRM01xrf7Myh6uTGC2SvQoIIFKMUN_itHMXZZmZEXruSmRtBdyVxJlBhzebIx7cOEBYiNjbyHaehAWPBDAnvifyOxr7CdD-3Trv6fqY5ETr9DOlQ%3D%3D)** , you're helping the _Center for American Liberty_ protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you.**[But all I'm asking you to do is make a tax-deductible gift of $30, $50, $75, $100 or even $250 or more today -- before it's too late.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7cca548f27cf49d2910049dbc49c11fb&_e=p9b2VszHwU59we4CWAIZxLfmSo7koCnZNmznQCQsFavk7kz3YH20cjNeb4FU87iQ8413gib9YdCcJFq5E9VpNkbXmW8SizegW-qF9OGpkW_F_bhKjlBDWjpONERAPrVOCOwJYKZoQbIORjZGNu7EtTrckFyOft1M5q5vPOgEqvKsN2IqkQcLgGU781o8efxjcjRtGmrzQr5gDGxHsrkp-z67Z46NRLzYDhZ_jTIaokUieAF8447k-8-yfiUGNxBLmiuq4bh8fbiBol2x5SGhQD6JMpuBkFetF0Q2oPiHC8nQ5uEpU5GLcSq63QVAT_nRkE_0RwyIlvX53QmeP7fEeRWlfHrCwFb4rbCJeR82nnuI3rMNd0LdQsFJF1yQjwBP3HHmSCu29UztBNMyBErU3Q%3D%3D)** Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. _The Center for American Liberty_ needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... I**t will be my honor to send you my new book _Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind_ as my free gift** **[**when you donate $100 or more to the Center for American Liberty.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7cca548f27cf49d2910049dbc49c11fb&_e=p9b2VszHwU59we4CWAIZxLfmSo7koCnZNmznQCQsFavk7kz3YH20cjNeb4FU87iQ8413gib9YdCcJFq5E9VpNkbXmW8SizegW-qF9OGpkW_F_bhKjlBDWjpONERAPrVOCOwJYKZoQbIORjZGNu7EtTrckFyOft1M5q5vPOgEqvKsN2IqkQcLgGU781o8efxjcjRtGmrzQr5gDGxHsrkp-z67Z46NRLzYDhZ_jTIaokUieAF8447k-8-yfiUGNxBLvmZAeTNe9yO44FdLC5c2Z9dDVCx7VFeKZWP3vdVzPmBSrL1kylXoRviFBs8lIbISG0jE8k0FkTpImhYlo-81SzVSqa9ZSLVTYFwcN-Na9PqlaktY2Dim0s3sOwoVzJOrPw42o64WAmoEJr_vV3UiAw%3D%3D)** Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: _For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18_ I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Riley Gaines

clean_body: Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth.| | | | I’m writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope. | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I'm writing to ask you to stand beside me at the top of a very slippery slope.Actually, in my case, it's a slippery slide. My name is Riley Gaines and I'm the University of Kentucky swimmer who had to compete against a fully intact 6'4" male swimmer dressed in a women's bathing suit.And after he stole the victory I had worked for my entire life, I had to go back to the women's locker room and undress out of my wet bathing suit while he did the same next to me. | | | I know the images I'm bringing up are horrible. But please don't stop reading -- because God-fearing, faith-filled people like you and me have a job to do today. We can't retreat into our homes and hope our government's evil culture just passes us by. My fellow conservative, you know this slippery slide.It's the same one you got pushed down when the Left told you abortion was going to be "safe, legal, and rare."Now abortion is a "right" and "women’s healthcare." And if you don’t support it up until the moment of birth, you must "hate women." It's the same slippery slide you got pushed down when the Left told you limiting gay couples to civil unions was "mean." You were told, "They just want to use the word "marriage" like everyone else. It's just a word."Now if you don't fully embrace a homosexual lifestyle by displaying rainbows and celebrating gay pride, you're a "hate-filled bigot." Enough with their lies. We have Truth on our side. And we need to start acting like it.God created man. And God created woman. It isn't any more complicated than that. Letting men believe they are women... letting girls believe they are boys... is a bold-faced rejection of God’s truth. And if we give this deranged movement one more inch, a year from now when you're forced by law to call boys "she"... when it becomes normal for kids to be taken away from parents who oppose this evil... I don't want you looking back with regret wishing you had done something when you still had a chance.Your chance is right now -- and right by my side. Maybe you're thinking like so many, "Riley, adults are free to do whatever they want. And children should be kept away from this evil by their parents."I agree this problem would have less traction if parents just said, "No." > But parents in MD had their child taken away because they refused to let their son transition to a "girl." >> Parents in Vermont are seeing their foster care licenses revoked because they admit they would not help a child who may be assigned to their home get puberty blockers or have sex change surgery.>> Parents in California got themselves elected to the school board, passed guidelines to protect their children from the transgender movement, and now the state of California is suing them. >> And Illinois is considering a bill that would change the definition of "child abuse" to include parents who oppose puberty blocking drugs and sex change operations. The radical transgender movement has parents backed into a corner. But when I'm speaking around the country, I meet so many seniors who say, "I wish someone had told me about this sooner." The good news is that right now, you still have a chance to help me stop the radical transgender movement before they push us down their slippery slide.And today I'm writing you on behalf of a group that is doing more work to block the transgender movement than anyone I know. It's the legal non-profit the Center for American Liberty. With the help of patriots like you, the Center for American Liberty fights the transgender movement in the courts because that’s the only way to stop them. And the Center for American Liberty is attacking this evil from all sides with their comprehensive three-pronged approach. #1. They're fighting radical schools. I know it may sound crazy to you but in today's taxpayer-funded schools, teachers and counselors encourage young children to socially "transition" at school and then facilitate the "transition" by giving children new names and even giving them new clothes so they can dress as the opposite sex.And they keep it all a secret from parents! The Center for American Liberty is taking these radicals to court in multiple cases. And they already have one major win! , you're making sure PARENTS have the final word in guiding their children -- not school radicals! #2. They're fighting radical doctors. There are doctors who mutilate children for profit in the name of transgender "care." They use their "expertise" to convince even conservative parents that if they oppose "transition," their child will commit suicide.Then these doctors pump children full of dangerous puberty blockers and perform gruesome surgeries to remove children's healthy breasts and other parts. Maybe you've seen a girl named Chloe Cole on Fox News. In a landmark case, the Center for American Liberty is helping her sue the radical doctors and hospital that gave her a double mastectomy at age 15. , you're helping Chloe and the Center for American Liberty make sure this never happens to another child! #3. They're fighting for your right to speak out against this evil. Fighting for Freedom of Speech is one of the Center for American Liberty's specialties and they've notched plenty of victories in this space. Their next one is going to be fighting for an 82-year-old grandmother who got banned for life from the YMCA.This grandma raised the alarm that a grown man dressed in a women's bathing suit was in the women's locker room "helping" two little girls get ready to use the bathroom.And she was the one punished! , you're helping the Center for American Liberty protect every American's right to speak out against this evil! I know you'd probably love to fund an entire court case on your own after all I've told you. Please donate whatever amount is right for you whether it's smaller or larger. The Center for American Liberty needs and appreciates every dollar that comes in.And because I believe so strongly in the work they're doing -- and because they are one of the few groups who've stood shoulder-to-shoulder with me in this fight... It will be my honor to send you my new book Swimming Against the Current: Fighting for Common Sense in a World That's Lost Its Mind as my free gift Before I go, please let me share one last thought with you.Every morning as a competitive swimmer, I would get up and think of this verse: For I consider that the sufferings of the present time are not worthy to be compared to the glory that is about to be revealed to us. Romans 8:18 I applied it to my swimming: work hard now and wins come later. But now I see that God has a much bigger plan for my life just as He does for yours.Thank you for reading my letter all the way to the end. I'm praying for you, and I hope you'll pray for me too. Sincerely, | | Riley Gaines | | | P.S. God made man and God made woman. The attempts to deny those basic truths, are attempts to deny the truth of God. Your help is so critical to the Center for American Liberty's work, Please hurry. It's getting hard to hold back this evil without you. I don't want you to look back a year from now and say, "I wish I had done something when I had the chance." | | | | | | | ---|---|--- The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251

name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: So what makes a GOOD candidate?
body:
Peter, We’ve spent a lot of time talking about the lunatics running for office in 2025, their dangerous records, and their di
|
---
| Peter, We’ve spent a lot of time talking about the lunatics running for office in 2025, their dangerous records, and their disingenuous campaigns. Calling out BS is one of our jobs as the Common Sense Majority. But maybe this has left you wondering. What makes a _good_ candidate? I know what I’m _avoiding_ as I evaluate candidates, but what should I be looking _for_?
---
| | [Push Common Sense Ahead! Join the Common Sense Club today >>](https://xtz223.keap-link020.com/v2/click/fc133f1aa75f40d3efd5cce97041ff21/eJyNkMsKwkAMRf8l62LpVEVnJ1KkVLsQXcvYBjvYeTCTig_6744PXCkIWSUnJ9zcgFALTXkNHM50ZSyFCBxW0krUNDeaRPWcstEwSZMIWqmPC2c6C_z2dfkDPNopm44joIvFgGzWs3mRl4vdMi-LQFrhwo0_PRP28WSrWb6Evv8pRiUpOwW3B06uw0eiWoZUtHVt4Bsi63kcV0Ypoz2GqtpuPzDuECtUe3S-kTYOJmEt6vr9hgIvL19_B7M4Zmk=)
---
| There will be a lot of offices and a lot of candidates on your 2025 primary and general election ballot, and while some criteria are specific to the office, there are some principle qualities you should look for in any candidate for any office.
1. **Consistency.** Have they moved with every political breeze or have they been consistent in standing for the same principles no matter which way the winds are blowing? And if they’ve changed a position, have they acknowledged it and explained their evolution in a way that’s genuine and believable?
2. **Integrity.** Do their prior actions (votes, activities, financial support, etc.) match their words?
3. **Allegiance.** Who do they answer to first and foremost? The people of New Jersey or the biggest donor, party bosses, and out of state elites and special interests? The best way to tell is by looking at the first two points. Where they lack consistency or integrity, follow the money (or the power). If you find consistency and integrity, that is a good sign they can’t be bought.
4. **Policy.** Dig deep on their policies on issues that matter, like security, the border, the economy, and wokeness. If you can’t find their stance, reach out and ask for it. If they dodge an issue when asked, beware.
5. **Boldness.** Are they unapologetic about what they stand for? Are they willing to defend it in the face of hostility? Now is not the time for spinelessness. Saving our state from Left Wing Lunacy will require courage.

We have a big opportunity in 2025. And it’s not just to get rid of the lunatics. If we don’t replace them with fearless leaders of integrity, we’ll have kicked the can down the road to be dealt with later – and to our detriment. So I encourage you to begin wisely evaluating candidates as they announce. And when you find winners who exemplify the five qualities, support them fully. The good guys need us. For New Jersey, Elizabeth Nader
---
|
---
| President
Common Sense Club [Share this newsletter on social media!](https://xtz223.keap-link020.com/v2/click/7ca0850d1dd68fe3ceba13f8effcc568/eJyNkMGKAjEMht8l56mDHRd0biIiw7geFj1LbIMWZ9rSZnRV5t2t7uLJhYWcki9f-HMDJouWKw0lfPNVygIyCKSMN2R55iyjek7lx2hYDDNojD0ugus8lLe3yy_g0S7kZJQBXzwlZP01ndXVarFdVqs6kR5DuvFPz1i-PPPPabWEvv9TTK3h-Sm5I5QcOnok0ial4k1oEn9g9rHMc-Xa1tlIqVTT7QYu7PPoxPmALFo8UhQo9s5podBqo5EpT3b0nqz-fU1Nl58b_R3wLW1q)
---
| Did you catch our previous email? If not, you can read it here now: We know (by “we,” I mean common sense New Jerseyans, not Hollywood, coastal elites or the mainstream media) that woke extremism is one major reason the Left lost big last Tuesday night. Taxpayer funding of sex-change surgeries for prison inmates. Pushing a sexual agenda on kindergartners. Biological men beating up women in athletics. It’s this type of woke extremism that so many common sense New Jerseyans rejected on Tuesday when Trump got closer to winning New Jersey than any Republican since 1992. Why? Because common sense is that a criminal’s gender transition (or really anyone’s) shouldn’t be the financial responsibility of the taxpayer. Common sense is that children should be children and that indoctrinating them with sexually explicit materials is abusive behavior. And that women shouldn’t be losing medals and scholarships to biological men – who were usually mediocre athletes at best before deciding to compete against women. That’s the “patriarchy” the Left should be worried about. So as we look to 2025 and saving New Jersey from Left Wing Lunacy in offices from top to bottom, have candidates on the Left learned anything? Will they be moving from wokism towards common sense to, if nothing else, save their political rears? If you look at gubernatorial candidate Sean Spiller, it’s clear they won’t. Sean Spiller, the President of the New Jersey Education Association (NJEA) has been the center of some controversy for funneling NJEA resources (i.e., teacher dues) to his political campaign. But that’s just the beginning. A few days ago, “Drag Queen Entertainment” posted this video of their presence and “Banned Book Story Time” at... the NJEA Convention. This is on top of convention calls for “queering the curriculum.” The convention theme – “Learning. Equity. Justice.” should have told us all we needed to know. The message at this convention for New Jersey educators? Pushing a sexual agenda on children is not only welcomed, but encouraged. This is grooming, plain and simple. And NJ educators shouldn’t have this agenda forced on them either, especially at a time when our students are struggling and they need to be focused on core academic subjects. This is all going on under President Spiller’s lead and it has his fingerprints all over it. He has all but said he’s running to force his NJEA agenda on the entire state of New Jersey. And let’s just call this like it is – crazy, and dangerous. If the commentary from media elites and leftist insiders is any indicator, Spiller won’t be alone in continuing to push a woke agenda. But unfortunately for them, my hunch is that common sense New Jerseyans aren’t going to take it in 2025 either. So what do we do? It’s simple. 1) Identify more members of the Common Sense Majority. 2) Recruit common sense candidates for the ballot at every level. 3) Get the Common Sense Majority out to vote in the Primary and the General. It might be a simple strategy, but it’s not going to be easy. We need all of us working together to grab back that megaphone and save our state. Here at the Common Sense Club, we want you to feel like this is your home. The place where you aren’t alone in saying “that’s nuts!” and the place where you can do something about the lunacy you see around you. So as you celebrate, make plans to get back in the fight with us because 2025 is just around the corner... Let’s go, Common Sense friends! For New Jersey, Elizabeth Nader
---
|
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://xtz223.infusionsoft.com/app/optOut/0/4fd6eb57577aacb0/24349392/346522b42fc3888a) Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States
---

For New Jersey, Elizabeth Nader | | Common Sense Club 165 Route 35 Red Bank, New Jersey 07701 United States

name: COURIER
subject: Trump sued the Des Moines Register because it published a poll he didn’t like
body:
Trump is suing pollsters for doing their jobs. Here’s why that should worry you.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98953748/518372196/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTlkMWFmZDktMWNiZS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZcmKyFJNPuIQaOCeON_3Xlz3PiJmkR-raNVpoEPtO_8=&emci=c0645b6b-14be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=19d1afd9-1cbe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=14016711)
Peter **–**
On Monday, Donald Trump launched another attack on the free press, suing pollster Ann Selzer, _The Des Moines Register_ , and its parent company, Gannett, over a poll that showed Kamala Harris leading him in Iowa just days before Election Day.
Announcing the lawsuit, Trump chillingly declared: _“I have to do it. We have to straighten out the press.”_
This isn’t just about one poll. It’s a calculated strategy to weaponize the legal system and intimidate the media into silence and submission.
**[Can you chip in $25 now to help COURIER build a progressive media network strong enough to stand up to Trump and his assault on the free press?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98953753/518372224/-593472309?refcode=20241219-EM-TrumpPoll&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTlkMWFmZDktMWNiZS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZcmKyFJNPuIQaOCeON_3Xlz3PiJmkR-raNVpoEPtO_8=)**
Trump’s lawsuit follows his recent legal victory against ABC News, where his team secured a baffling $15 million defamation settlement over a misstatement by George Stephanopoulos.
**Emboldened by that win, they’ve now turned their sights on Selzer and _The Des Moines Register_ , accusing them of “election interference” simply for publishing poll results.**
What makes this even more chilling is that, before this year’s contested poll, Selzer was widely regarded as the most accurate pollster in the country—known for getting it right when others fell short.
These are pure scare tactics, Peter—but if ABC News’ response is any indication, they’re working. The more fearful the legacy media becomes of taking Trump on, reporting the truth, or even publishing the results of rigorous polling, the more the truth is obscured—and the more our democracy suffers.
**That makes COURIER’s work to build a fearless, progressive alternative to the legacy media more important than ever.**
We refuse to bow to Trump’s threats or soften our reporting to avoid backlash. Our reporters in 11 battleground states work tirelessly to expose far-right lies and deliver fact-based news to communities most vulnerable to propaganda.
With Trump escalating his attacks on a free press, our mission is more critical than ever.
[**Can you chip in $25 now to help COURIER protect democracy by delivering fearless, factual journalism?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98953755/518372258/-593472309?refcode=20241219-EM-TrumpPoll&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTlkMWFmZDktMWNiZS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZcmKyFJNPuIQaOCeON_3Xlz3PiJmkR-raNVpoEPtO_8=)

name: Derrick
subject: Asking you to read this in its entirety
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Orden for Congress
body:
Long but worth the read

| |
---
| | | Peter, can you read this email all the way through?

At the end, I'm going to ask you for a modest $14, but I'm hoping you'll hear me out first.

I was raised in rural poverty by a single mother on food stamps. My mom did everything to make ends meet, and taught me and my brother that our poverty wouldn't define us. She taught us that if we worked hard, we could make something of ourselves and be someone we could be proud of.

So, with that in mind, at age 18, I joined the Navy.

It's hard to sum up everything I learned in my time in our military, but here are a few key points:
1. Seeing countries all over the world taught me how great America really is, and I had a new appreciation for what I was protecting
2. Ineffectual leadership from politicians like Barack Obama and Hillary Clinton can lead to grave consequences and cost American lives
3. Public service is the best way to effect real change in the world - whether it's on the global stage or even just in your local community

After 26 years and 5 combat deployments, I retired as a Navy SEAL Senior Chief. But I was called back to public service when I saw what the Biden-Harris Administration and Nancy Pelosi were doing to our country - moving our country's policies closer to the countries I fought in and further from what our Founders built.

The first time I ran for Congress I lost. But I'm not the type to accept defeat and go home with my tail between my legs.

I dusted myself off, ran again, and this time - I won. And I've defended this seat and our shared values ever since.

My mom and my service taught me self-reliance, but I'll be frank... **I _can 't_ keep on without your help.** The money these Democrats are raising is terrifying, and we have to band together if we want to fix the disaster they've created. This isn't about you or me, Peter - this about our country.

**[I'm graciously asking you to donate $14 to help this Navy SEAL and rib-rocked conservative fix our country.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=c23c3ce33a2249cabda17c8f163aa2fb&_e=fJK3nB8Zp76MjWH5sKnggx6wcvk0qOn5epAsYv-SN7NUVfZ2YlPht_OLEXjcpUd0edEZ98_lay3lB2r1hPL11_5oyP7g2PRv9qkFAkZExJ8m01qRpaKedkWIY-YTApJP2zWznbPuCe-fFJVT6HxYMYe8XxtR0mcVPPuho6dR6nqw1Dq9YRrVr4KE7llAe9b9bFJUlsF0cCnHTmNpUBpZ47QhwhizQj5sNI309NRqh3S5NocbC_DdxdzyATN6wz9l0zeE-TiQHnpWasfW0kZIduqvOmAtKDYmMPIuGSi5c7S7B8tWBg1PJliYb3Xi4M5RQHQnseCSob1hLU-1P3GbUMqkrtx51gxE5ONh6oZFiS8wRjMt5x9ljRTYlBJ4wfS9NaIgo5pZFLGbqShK8qhU08j_ZivAJgEbADxQqo5j1fCHQIymdrD5fmvLBH9I3y4J "I’m graciously asking you to donate $14 to help this Navy SEAL and rib-rocked conservative fix our country.")**

clean_body: Long but worth the read | | | | | Peter, can you read this email all the way through? At the end, I'm going to ask you for a modest $14, but I'm hoping you'll hear me out first. I was raised in rural poverty by a single mother on food stamps. My mom did everything to make ends meet, and taught me and my brother that our poverty wouldn't define us. She taught us that if we worked hard, we could make something of ourselves and be someone we could be proud of. So, with that in mind, at age 18, I joined the Navy. It's hard to sum up everything I learned in my time in our military, but here are a few key points: 1. Seeing countries all over the world taught me how great America really is, and I had a new appreciation for what I was protecting 2. Ineffectual leadership from politicians like Barack Obama and Hillary Clinton can lead to grave consequences and cost American lives 3. Public service is the best way to effect real change in the world - whether it's on the global stage or even just in your local community After 26 years and 5 combat deployments, I retired as a Navy SEAL Senior Chief. But I was called back to public service when I saw what the Biden-Harris Administration and Nancy Pelosi were doing to our country - moving our country's policies closer to the countries I fought in and further from what our Founders built. The first time I ran for Congress I lost. But I'm not the type to accept defeat and go home with my tail between my legs. I dusted myself off, ran again, and this time - I won. And I've defended this seat and our shared values ever since. My mom and my service taught me self-reliance, but I'll be frank... I can 't keep on without your help. The money these Democrats are raising is terrifying, and we have to band together if we want to fix the disaster they've created. This isn't about you or me, Peter - this about our country. "I’m graciously asking you to donate $14 to help this Navy SEAL and rib-rocked conservative fix our country." | | | "SEND IN $14" If you're still reading this, thank you for taking the time to hear me out. In service, Derrick Van Orden | | | "SEND IN $14" * | "Thanks to your help, I'm able to work for you every day, but a donation of any amount will go a long way!" | | | USE OF MILITARY RANK, JOB TITLES AND PHOTOGRAPHS IN UNIFORM DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT BY THE DEPARTMENT OF THE NAVY, THE DEPARTMENT OF THE ARMY, OR THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE. | Paid for by Van Orden for Congress | Hey, Peter! It's Retired Navy SEAL Derrick Van Orden. I'm in the tightest race in the country and I want to make sure I can update my top supporters on where my Team and I stand. Please add my email, team@email.vanorden4congress.com, to your address book to make sure you receive important messages from me and my Team! Follow the link below to your email provider to get step by step instructions on how to add us to your address book. If you don't know how to do that, you can see how here: , , , , Thanks so much for being on my Team! PO Box 1836 La Crosse, WI 54602 |

name: Ryan Mackenzie
subject: Congressman-Elect Ryan Mackenzie Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mackenzie For Congress]()
body:
Wishing everyone a Merry Christmas! | | | | |
---
|
---
| | | | | Friend,
Before we get to Christmas, I wanted to update you on our work ahead of my swearing-in as the Greater Lehigh Valley’s Representative in Congress. It has been a very busy time and, in the coming days, I look forward to sharing some exciting announcements about my committee assignments, staff, and offices.
Throughout the transition process, I’ve also been meeting with stakeholders in the community, learning more about their concerns, and how we can work together to help our region. My new staff and I are all very excited to get started! Come January 3rd, when I take office, I will be ready to serve you.
**Here are a few things I have been up to:**
* **Meeting Constituents**
* **Interacting with Local Organizations**
* **Spreading the Christmas Spirit**

Sincerely,
Ryan Mackenzie Congressman-Elect PA-7
---
|
---
| **Meeting Constituents**
While the campaign has ended, engaging directly with people throughout the area has not stopped. I’ve been traveling throughout the district the past several weeks — attending events, meeting with local groups, and enjoying meals where we discuss the issues facing our country.
While campaigning this fall, I met a South Whitehall resident named Edward who asked if I would join him and his family for dinner if I won. I said, “Absolutely!” Sure enough, I won and Edward invited me to dinner. It was a pleasure to get together with him, his family, and his friends recently. We had a great time - enjoying a delicious dinner, talking about our shared vision to improve our country, and also playing dominoes. Thank you, Edward, for the wonderful hospitality and friendship!
I also had the opportunity to meet Daniel, who recently won the African American Business Leadership Award from the African American Business Leaders Council. We always appreciate the opportunity to highlight those in our community who work hard to make the Greater Lehigh Valley such a terrific place.
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
| **Meeting with Local Organizations**
This week, I was able to meet with the Allentown Boys and Girls Club to see the incredible work they do in Allentown. Organizations like these keep our youth involved and teach them valuable life skills that they can put to good use after high school. Thank you to their wonderful staff for showing me around.
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
| **Spreading the Christmas Spirit**
I was delighted to have the opportunity to speak at Christmas tree lightings around the area as we ring in the holiday season with people from across our community.
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
|
---

Together, we’ll keep Minnesota’s democracy strong. Gratefully, Steve | = | = With Steve’s leadership, Minnesota has led the nation in voter turnout for the past three out of four elections. Our average contribution to emails like these is $27. Can we count on you to contribute that amount to GIFFORDS PAC today?
#

**$27.**
That’s right. Our average contribution to emails like these is just $27.
So please know that when we say our movement to end gun violence is fueled by small dollar donations, we really do mean it.
We know that we usually only ask you to make a contribution of $3 when we reach out to you. But today is a day where we need to pick up the pace on our fundraising. The truth is, we’ve been behind on our fundraising _significantly_ this month. With our end of year fundraising deadline less than two weeks away, this is not a time where we can fall short.
[**So please, can you make your first online contribution of $27—our average donation amount—to GIFFORDS PAC today? Your donation will help us reach our 2024 fundraising goals and prepare for the challenges we’ll face in the new year and beyond.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/57859?c0=giffords-em-dec24.cPtHOw&refcode=em241219-1-b&t=2&akid=9668%2E3935704%2E2NzIQA)

name: Supervisor David Canepa
subject: 2024 December e-newsletter
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
# 2024 December e-newsletter
---
|
---
| **Wishing you a happy, healthy and connected holiday season ** Dear friends, As 2024 concludes and the holidays approach, my wife Ana, son Piero and I want to wish all of you a happy, healthy and connected holiday season. Every year at this time, I love to share the family’s annual holiday card and reminisce on the days when Piero opened his first Christmas present or tasted his first cup of hot cocoa. For many, the holidays are the most wonderful time of the year, but we must remember for others it can bit lonely and isolating. The added pressures of being social, spending money, expectations from others that you should be jolly and even the sounds of Christmas music can trigger feelings of loneliness. There’s no cure for it but there are things we can all do to help ourselves and the people around us to connect in meaningful ways. In January, I sponsored a resolution declaring loneliness a public health crisis, making San Mateo County the first in the nation to do so. The resolution was prompted by U.S. Surgeon General Vivek Murthy after he declared loneliness an epidemic, noting that it can lead to poor health outcomes such as heart attack, stroke, suicide and that it impacts nearly 50% of all Americans. “Just as we need food and water, we need social connection to be healthy,” Dr. Murthy writes in the handbook “Recipes for Connection.” This holiday season, I am encouraging all of you to be sensitive to the fact that this time of the year isn’t joyful for everyone. I am challenging myself and you to be kind to strangers, to strike up a conversation with a workmate you don’t normally interact with, to call a family member you haven’t spoken with in a while, to get out of the house over the holidays and do a little volunteering and to be reasonable with what you expect of yourself and others. With that, I look forward to continuing to serve you on the San Mateo County Board of Supervisors in 2025 as we work together to improve the lives of all of our neighbors.
---
| **
I’m honored to be named Daly City’s ‘Outstanding Citizen of the Year’** I was honored to attend the 2024 Mayor’s Awards and to be named “Outstanding Citizen of the Year” by Daly City Mayor Juslyn Manalo at City Hall Monday, Dec. 16. Mayor Manalo said during the ceremony: “David Canepa has been named Outstanding Citizen of the Year for his exceptional dedication to improving the quality of life in Daly City. Through his leadership and tireless advocacy, David has secured $59,973,595 in funding for a variety of initiatives benefiting the community.” She continued: “His efforts have supported local nonprofits and churches, bolstered programs for Jefferson Union and Jefferson Elementary School Districts, and contributed to vital projects such as the Vista Grande Watershed Project and improvements to Midway Village and Gellert Park. David has also championed initiatives like Age-Friendly Cities and GotWheels!, ensuring resources and opportunities for residents of all ages. His unwavering commitment to Daly City continues to leave a lasting impact.” Throughout my 8 years serving on the Board and 8 years previous serving on the Daly City Council, I have always been committed to serving the needs of the residents of Daly City and will continue to do so in my final term. I must thank my wife Ana and son Piero for their devotion, inspiration and support as the job can be incredibly demanding. I must also thank my Chief of Staff Tony Bayudan, the best in the business, and legislative aides Mike Richardson, Bill Silverfarb, Sophia Brink, Hewan Talaktor, Bradley Murdock and Jet Penne for their outstanding commitment and the unique perspectives they bring to the county. Thank you, Daly City!
---
| **County funds new Natural History Gallery ** The San Mateo County Historical Museum in downtown Redwood City holds a very special place in my heart. The old courthouse has been a gathering place since 1858. Today, it has been transformed into an incredible museum that features interactive experiences as its exhibits are the place where you can explore the county’s rich and colorful history including its original inhabitants the Ohlone people who lived in the area 4,000 years before European explorers arrived. With the addition of the Carriage House being constructed now, the museum is taking an incredible transformation. And now I’m proud to say, with the Board of Supervisors approving my request of $500,000 in district-discretionary Measure K funds, the museum is transforming yet again with its new Natural History Gallery. The gallery will provide insights into the geological, biological and paleontological history of the Peninsula. Visitors will have the opportunity to explore a collection of rare fossils and skeletal remains, shedding light on the prehistoric evolution of the region, including mammoth mammal that inhabited the area 12,000 years ago during the Ice Age. As a former Board of Director to the Historical Association, I want to thank the current Board and the President’s Advisory Board and especially the museum’s president Mitch Postel for making this new gallery a reality, which is scheduled to open in 2026.
---
| **Turkey giveaway helps combat the holiday blues ** ** ** I was proud to partner with Friends of Old Town in a longstanding annual tradition to give free turkeys to people who need them most at the Morelos Hall in South San Francisco Saturday, Nov. 23. Old Town is one of South San Francisco’s oldest and most vibrant neighborhoods and the people who live there are some of the most welcoming and gracious. But many in this working-class community are older adults, some isolated and lonely, and others who are food insecure. This longstanding free turkey giveaway is an expression of gratitude and a way to help people connect at a time when some people might be feeling depressed and have the holiday blues. Special thanks to Sociedad Mutualista Mexicana Morelo, Painters and Drywall Finishers Local 913, Carpet, Linoleum and Soft Tile Workers Local 12 and South San Francisco Scavenger for sponsoring and volunteering at this event.
---
| **San Bruno Mountain Park to get new Interpretive Center, picnic area** I’m proud to announce San Bruno Mountain Park will get a new Interpretive Center and picnic area in the summer of 2025, a project I have partnered with the County Parks Department to fund. The San Bruno Mountain Day Use Improvement project is a capital improvement project that focuses on the replacement and modernization of an antiquated restroom building; the addition of an open-air interpretive pavilion; re-arrangement of the picnic sites and replacement of aged tables and BBQ grills; and improvements to path of travel, ADA accessibility, and landscaping. The new building will include 4 all-gender and ADA accessible toilet rooms with sinks and changing tables. There will be a 640 sq.-ft. covered area for use as an interpretive pavilion that will feature interpretive panels and multimedia, exhibit space, and/or gathering areas for interpretive events and public use. The current picnic area includes 14 dispersed picnic sites, 21 tables, seven grills, seven trash and recycle bins, and two water fountains. The updated picnic area will reduce the total number of sites to nine sites with 23 tables, with each site having 1, 2, or 4 table groupings. Six of the nine sites will be fully accessible to people of all abilities. Path of travel improvements will also be made connecting each of the ADA accessible picnic site through a circular paved pathway. Other path of travel improvements includes walkways around the new restroom building, re-positioning the existing ADA parking stalls, and creating a new connecting path between the parking lot and day use area. The updates to the picnic sites and general landscape for the day use area also include addition of timber benches, tree management and native vegetation plantings.
---
| **County pilots basic income benefit for survivors of domestic violence ** The Board of Supervisors established a new year-long pilot program in December to help survivors of domestic violence with at least one minor child ease the financial burden of leaving their abuser, a program I sponsored with Supervisor Noelia Corzo. The Board approved $348,000 for the Guaranteed Income Program for Domestic Violence Survivors: $240,000 for dedicated monthly payments of $1,000 to 20 eligible individuals and the remainder to administer and evaluate it. Community Overcoming Relationship Abuse, CORA, will operate the program through June 30, 2026, and is also contributing $10,000 in private funding toward the payments. Money should not be the sticking point of whether someone should stay or go. No person should feel trapped in an abusive relationship because they don’t have the economic ability to walk away. If these funds help determine someone’s decision to protect themselves and their children without fear of not having the means to live, it is money well spent. The funds come with no spending restrictions, allowing recipients to use the stipend as they wish for needs like transportation, food and shelter. The first payments are expected to begin in January 2025. Supervisor Corzo and I recommended the unconditional, unrestricted monthly payments to help those leaving domestic violence situations navigate common obstacles such as childcare, new housing and legal costs. Without financial independence and the ability to cover expenses, some may remain in abusive relationships because they are financially dependent.
---
| **County emphasizes a mental health-focused lens across all programs ** I am excited to announce the Board of Supervisors passed a resolution I sponsored that emphasizes a mental health-focused lens across all of San Mateo County’s goals, programs, and policies. The resolution reflects our commitment to the well-being of our community, aiming to make mental health a guiding principle in everything we do. Our Measure K priorities — affordable housing, support for children and families, and emergency preparedness — are already strengthening our community. These areas are crucial to mental wellness, providing stability, safety, and a sense of belonging. But we must go further. With this mental health-focused lens, we can create an environment where mental wellness considerations are embedded into policies and programs at every level, promoting resilience and reducing stigma. This resolution calls on us to adopt a multifaceted approach that includes increasing access to mental health services, promoting social connection, and supporting vulnerable populations facing isolation, homelessness, or other challenges. It also emphasizes the need to address mental health disparities affecting vulnerable communities, low-income individuals, and people with disabilities, ensuring that everyone has equal access to resources and support. With this mental health-focused approach, we envision a San Mateo County where all policies and programs — from housing and transportation to public spaces — foster connection and mental wellness. Together, we can create a San Mateo County where everyone has the opportunity to thrive—mentally, physically, and socially.
---
| **Interns wanted to join our team ** We are looking to add to our great group of interns we are currently working with. If you or someone you know may be interested in applying to my Internship Program, submitting this form is the first step: [https://forms.gle/hiKqtn7Rird5vXwB9](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=42f95ba7f7&e=c0babbc643). You can also reach out to Mike Richardson on my staff directly with any questions at [mrichardson@smcgov.org ](mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org )
---
| **Battling food insecurity **
Food insecurity is a problem some residents may still face as we continue to emerge from the pandemic. Here are some resources residents can access: **CalFresh:**
Is a program for people with low-income who meet federal income eligibility rules and want to add to their budget to put healthy and nutritious food on the table. Website: [https://www.cdss.ca.gov/food-nutrition/calfresh](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=e5ee0b9473&e=c0babbc643) Contact: (650) 802-6576, [antorres@smcgov.org](mailto:antorres@smcgov.org) **Daly City Partnership:**
DC Partnership is a local partnership that was formed to guide collaborative efforts and connect our community to services that promote well-being. Check out their website for times and locations. Website: [https://www.dcpartnership.org/covid19/](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=e926800265&e=c0babbc643) **Second Harvest Food Bank:**
Second Harvest offers food at various locations throughout San Mateo County listed on its webpage. Website: [https://www.shfb.org/get-food/](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=2b81712ee6&e=c0babbc643) Contacts: Call (800) 984-3663 or text GETFOOD to (408) 455-5181 In friendship,
David J. Canepa
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | |
---
| _Copyright © 2024 Supervisor David Canepa, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Supervisor David Canepa1618 Sullivan497Daly City, CA 94015
[Add us to your address book](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&e=c0babbc643&c=8cb1793d0f) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=ea541c4b96&t=b&e=c0babbc643&c=8cb1793d0f).

[](https://login.mailchimp.com/signup/email-referral/?aid=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5)
---

subject: Tell Judge Merchan: DO NOT dismiss Trump’s hush money case
body:

# [Tell Judge Merchan: DO NOT dismiss Trump’s hush money case](https://default.salsalabs.org/T60f4bf34-b699-4118-99ca-e01456f7dd8a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taa49e8a0-a59c-4ed5-9293-ad8a1949bee1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Trump’s lawyers are fighting to have the hush money case against Trump dismissed now that he’s won the presidential election. The case where Trump was convicted on 34 felony counts. No way!! Judge Merchan, who is overseeing the case, hasn’t yet decided whether to dismiss this case. We can’t let that happen – Trump MUST be held accountable for his crimes (at least for these 34!). Thankfully the judge just ruled that Trump cannot claim presidential immunity to overturn his felony conviction. But we must make sure those convictions stick. [Sign your name to tell Judge Merchan: DO NOT dismiss Trump’s hush money case! >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb38b334a-e9cf-498d-bc36-7fada1a73eac/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

The case where Trump was convicted on 34 felony counts. No way!! Judge Merchan, who is overseeing the case, hasn’t yet decided whether to dismiss this case. We can’t let that happen – Trump MUST be held accountable for his crimes (at least for these 34!). Thankfully the judge just ruled that Trump cannot claim presidential immunity to overturn his felony conviction. name: Tom Fitton
subject: A Special Request
body:
This is a very special time of the year...and I want to wish you and all those close to you a very Merry Christmas and holiday season, and a happy and prosperous New Year.

| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

This is a very special time of the year...and I want to wish you and all those close to you a very Merry Christmas and holiday season, and a happy and prosperous New Year.

[**I also want to ask you to consider making your best year-end contribution to Judicial Watch.**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71609&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)** Contributions are tax-deductible!**

Your support will help us keep:
* Fighting in state and federal courts to protect the **integrity of our elections** ;

* Using the legal system and the courts to support the Constitutional guarantee of "**equal protection under the laws "** by fighting reparations and other racist woke programs;

* Standing firmly with President-elect Trump to secure our borders and dismantle the Deep State;

* Continuing to be America's most prolific and effective private litigator of our nation's critically important open records laws.

These efforts represent just a small portion of our record number of investigations and lawsuits fighting public corruption and government secrecy.

[**Please help us with your best year-end contribution ...and thank you!**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71609&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)

Yours truly, Thomas Fitton
President

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! name: David Hogg
subject: Time to get back to work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
|
---
Friend, **It’s taken me a few days for me to figure out what to say about the election without feeling cliche or resorting to platitudes. Now, we’re left to figure out what’s next.** After Parkland, if we had given up and listened to the same talking heads who got us into this situation — the same talking heads who said nothing could be done about guns in Florida — **nothing would have changed.** Instead, we had the audacity to believe that change was possible, which resulted in Florida raising the age to buy a gun to 21 and passing a Red Flag law that has been used over 19,000 times. This moment calls on us to do the same. The most important thing we can do is remain hopeful because without that nothing will change. I refuse to give up, I hope that you don’t either. Young people have risen up and become leaders during times of great challenge: We helped elect the first openly transgender member of Congress ever, Sarah McBride, even as millions were spent by the GOP on hate-filled, transphobic ads. Dante Pittman flipped a seat in the NC legislature breaking the GOP’s supermajority in North Carolina, allowing a Democratic Governor, Josh Stein, more policy freedom. We flipped a seat in Georgia, electing Bryce Berry as the youngest person and first ever active public school teacher to ever serve in the Georgia state legislature. We re-elected Molly Cook to be the youngest person in the Texas Senate, Oscar De Los Santos to be the youngest member of leadership in the Arizona House, and we elected Christine Cockley to be the youngest member of the Ohio House. Of course, these victories are bittersweet against the backdrop of the presidential election, but we are going to need these young progressive champions fighting for us now more than ever. I’m so proud of the work we all did electing them. Your support has made it possible for these young people to win – and together with Serve America, we're ready to help even more young leaders succeed. [**Will you split a $20 donation between Leaders We Deserve and Serve America to help us recruit, train, and elect the next generation of progressive champions?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98956743/518381049/-150563143?refcode=241219_LWD_TimeToGetBackToWork&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjU4NzdlZC0yMGJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TnF7e7I0Gghqxyq-2a2Whq9W2gVTp8wCLNodkFueCD0=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98956744/518381050/-442632316?refcode=241219_LWD_TimeToGetBackToWork&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjU4NzdlZC0yMGJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TnF7e7I0Gghqxyq-2a2Whq9W2gVTp8wCLNodkFueCD0=) Hope is the most powerful force any movement can have. Thankfully, it is the one thing Donald Trump can’t take from us – the only way he truly wins is if we give up hope. I’m not. I know you won’t either. Thank you to everyone who has shown their support of our work. By joining forces with Serve America, we're building an even stronger movement to elect young progressive leaders. clean_body: | Friend, It’s taken me a few days for me to figure out what to say about the election without feeling cliche or resorting to platitudes. Now, we’re left to figure out what’s next. After Parkland, if we had given up and listened to the same talking heads who got us into this situation — the same talking heads who said nothing could be done about guns in Florida — nothing would have changed. Instead, we had the audacity to believe that change was possible, which resulted in Florida raising the age to buy a gun to 21 and passing a Red Flag law that has been used over 19,000 times. This moment calls on us to do the same. The most important thing we can do is remain hopeful because without that nothing will change. I refuse to give up, I hope that you don’t either. Young people have risen up and become leaders during times of great challenge: We helped elect the first openly transgender member of Congress ever, Sarah McBride, even as millions were spent by the GOP on hate-filled, transphobic ads. Dante Pittman flipped a seat in the NC legislature breaking the GOP’s supermajority in North Carolina, allowing a Democratic Governor, Josh Stein, more policy freedom. We flipped a seat in Georgia, electing Bryce Berry as the youngest person and first ever active public school teacher to ever serve in the Georgia state legislature. We re-elected Molly Cook to be the youngest person in the Texas Senate, Oscar De Los Santos to be the youngest member of leadership in the Arizona House, and we elected Christine Cockley to be the youngest member of the Ohio House. Of course, these victories are bittersweet against the backdrop of the presidential election, but we are going to need these young progressive champions fighting for us now more than ever. I’m so proud of the work we all did electing them. Your support has made it possible for these young people to win – and together with Serve America, we're ready to help even more young leaders succeed. = = Hope is the most powerful force any movement can have. Thankfully, it is the one thing Donald Trump can’t take from us – the only way he truly wins is if we give up hope. I’m not. I know you won’t either. Thank you to everyone who has shown their support of our work. By joining forces with Serve America, we're building an even stronger movement to elect young progressive leaders. = = In service, David Hogg Leaders We Deserve = [content goes here] Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States Paid for by Serve America PAC

name: Sarah McBride
subject: ☕ I *love* coffee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
I plan on working nonstop to get the job done. No matter how many Wawa runs it takes!
#
If you follow me on social media or read many of our emails, you probably know that I absolutely _love_ coffee. **Especially when it comes from Wawa!**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241219-1?refcode=em20241219-1626&amount=5&refcode2=1626_21716_2SiDNx&akid=1626%2E21716%2E2SiDNx)
While I take a quick coffee break, I wanted to reach out about something important: we’re closing in on the end of the year, and 2025 looks like it’s going to be as busy and hectic as ever. In addition to the coffee, I’ll be counting on [**your grassroots support**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241219-1?refcode=em20241219-1626&amount=5&refcode2=1626_21716_2SiDNx&akid=1626%2E21716%2E2SiDNx) to power me every step of the way.
Because while folks keep asking me about cream and sugar, they're also talking about the real issues — like how to bring down the cost of housing and groceries, how to make childcare more affordable, and how to make sure everyone has paid medical leave.
**These are the issues Delawareans elected me to fight for, and I plan on working nonstop to get the job done. No matter how many Wawa runs it takes!**
[**If you’re with me, will you pitch in $5 or more before our big end-of-year deadline on 12/31 to help me keep working for our neighbors up and down Delaware?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241219-1?refcode=em20241219-1626&amount=5&refcode2=1626_21716_2SiDNx&akid=1626%2E21716%2E2SiDNx)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20241219-1?amount=5&refcode=em20241219-1626&refcode2=1626_21716_2SiDNx&akid=1626%2E21716%2E2SiDNx)**
Thank you!
Sarah McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20241219-1&t=1&refcode2=1626_21716_2SiDNx&akid=1626%2E21716%2E2SiDNx)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1626%2E21716%2E2SiDNx)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=1626%2E21716%2E2SiDNx)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1626%2E21716%2E2SiDNx)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

name: OKGOP
subject: Leftists are trying to force us to have Democrats vote in Republican primary elections!
body:
| [ ](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=urG6o0YzHACIJY0G92IOaIOiUFGhm1XQHaiZ59fvCoY&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_leftists_are_trying_to_force&n=1)
---
Peter -- One month ago a group of leftists announced their plan to destroy the State of Oklahoma. That might sound far fetched, but that’s exactly what their scheme would do. They want to put in the Oklahoma Constitution that Republicans MUST allow Democrats to vote in our Republican elections! This nonsense can’t stand. If their plan succeeds we could have elections in November where the choices are between one Democrat & a second Democrat with ZERO Republican options on the November ballot. That’s exactly what they’ve done in California & we’ve seen how they’ve destroyed that once great State. We realize the holidays are imminent with Christmas coming just next week. But the price of liberty is eternal vigilance. This leftist group is going to be collecting signatures to solidify their plan in the Oklahoma Constitution. So we need your help. If you OPPOSE their plan we need you to sign our petition right away by **[clicking here](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YsX77jA2CoiOC0kiRLv8R6xazJihEvWraL_OhR-oDcDesAvBdmRUgC2hBZOgiDYULXrU-VNhMktvigk6VpXHSQ&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_leftists_are_trying_to_force&n=2)**. They want to collect signatures to support their terrible plan, so we are gathering signatures on our petition to OPPOSE it!!! We will fight to stop this destruction of our State & our elections by every legal means available to us. But we need you standing with us in this battle. You can do so by [**signing the petition today**](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YsX77jA2CoiOC0kiRLv8R6xazJihEvWraL_OhR-oDcDesAvBdmRUgC2hBZOgiDYULXrU-VNhMktvigk6VpXHSQ&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_leftists_are_trying_to_force&n=3). Thank you for joining us. We had HUGE victories in 2024, yet with this battle now before us the fight continues in to 2025 & beyond. -Team OKGOP P.S. Please let your family & friends know about this leftist plot to destroy our State. Share this link [https://secure.anedot.com/okgop/openprimariesarenotok](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YsX77jA2CoiOC0kiRLv8R6xazJihEvWraL_OhR-oDcDesAvBdmRUgC2hBZOgiDYULXrU-VNhMktvigk6VpXHSQ&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_leftists_are_trying_to_force&n=4) with them so they can also say NO to forcing Republicans to allow Democrats to vote in our Republican elections.

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_leftists_are_trying_to_force&n=5).
You can also keep up with OKGOP on [Twitter](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=JcrYNQ7dhdufXPgOgJxNGHSsRONv6mnq7ly6aBOUvGVprSj7jfHNOpP70kR_1QLA&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_leftists_are_trying_to_force&n=6) or [Facebook](https://okgop.nationbuilder.com/r?u=UQNagEd-DqbIXa37T8ODid9mG9NGbq3z9te4_riKc6EaGmrOrRzKc2wAaVTFbzRY&e=48f9f7a040435275f8f9fa993b0a5712&utm_source=okgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2_leftists_are_trying_to_force&n=7).

There’s only one thing we can do to keep Trump in check...
| Look, Republicans may be in control of the House, Senate, White House, and even Supreme Court...

**_But there’s still _one thing_ we can do to keep Trump in check:_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/nokingsact/?source=VPP_20241219_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=18254%2E878179%2Ep3PiRM) **[URGENT ACTION REQUIRED: DEMAND CONGRESS PASS THE NO KINGS ACT! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/nokingsact/?source=VPP_20241219_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=18254%2E878179%2Ep3PiRM)** | [**15,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED TODAY: ADD YOUR NAME TO DEMAND CONGRESS PASS THE NO KINGS ACT »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/nokingsact/?source=VPP_20241219_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=18254%2E878179%2Ep3PiRM)

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: We're already seeing the threats against the media
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Trump's lawsuits have already started. ABC ( owned by Disney ) chose to settle and pay Trump's foundation $15 million, while Trump just sued the Des Moines Register and legendary pollster Ann Selzer. We cannot waste any time passing this bill!
Sign on now: Demand Congress pass the PRESS Act immediately to protect journalists >> [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/pass-the-press-act-now-to-protect-the-free-press/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3Dpressact]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/pass-the-press-act-now-to-protect-the-free-press/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3Dpressact]
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121924_1&amount=25]
Team,
We know Trump’s constant attacks on the free press won’t stop in his second term. The U.S. House already unanimously passed bipartisan protections for journalists. Now, the Senate must act before Trump is inaugurated.
The PRESS Act would protect journalists and the investigative reporting the public relies on to understand the inner workings of our government. With this legislation, government officials would not be able to force reporters to give up their sources or seize the phone and email records of journalists.
The New York Times Editorial Board said, “ Hostility toward the news media in the polarized politics of the day makes it more urgent than ever to ensure that reporters can continue to pursue their essential role as watchdogs over the government without the threat of court-ordered demands for their sources and information. The PRESS Act is needed now. "
The House passed the PRESS Act without any opposition. The Senate must act now and pass this legislation!
Add your name today: Pass the PRESS Act now to protect the free press! >> [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/pass-the-press-act-now-to-protect-the-free-press/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3Dpressact]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/pass-the-press-act-now-to-protect-the-free-press/?source=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fifvap-actions%3Frefcode%3Dpressact]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121924_1&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121924_1&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121924_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121924_1&amount=25]

A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
