body:
This is what happens when RINOs and the Radical Left have the keys
|
Peter,

It should come as no surprise that career Radical Left and RINO politicians are threatening to push a huge omnibus bill through Congress right before President Trump takes office. This omnibus bill is a MASSIVE waste of taxpayer money. [**I need YOUR help to KILL THE BILL!**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=59ea877fdeff4be1a3c5b9483d53d1d2&_e=QHYSTWEXsHSKK_hSBud02ms8_K6dp9rZw0rycTAucUXr41fEKYloJzEempfMaKY7wzupSguwq9YEVQCCFGpNWS79V7R1l8IySFi2rNS4CAQOVzisHejNNNz9ZAkfoH60vLWKeBi5aQZ_hcXm-_Hmd_AD0zziCkeNXtlaPrveymCC8ZRC7g0mvdALsoCO_Oqx4xfQIjc6iHTyIu4iM3gv3jDi40rsy5Phf_z5P__45S1rVkORh5lUdg7WrODGvx7wSaXaw5-7lY5hR1_rAWy0eF7pyQvNYNINjEoFVB6lY3sspuxvPRLmowdYBZbKRFCnB2akL1KvpBKIv4q00YW_Ew%3D%3D)

Some have been calling it the Christmas "Swampbus," as the DC Swamp is attempting one last effort to sabotage President Trump's administration before it even begins.

If it passes, the Swampbus will:

* _PREVENT President Trump from cutting wasteful spending with Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy 's DOGE_
* _Pass a stopgap spending bill for an ENTIRE YEAR_
* _SUSPEND the debt limit, allowing Neocons and Radical Leftists to spend tax dollars with no end in sight_
* _SEND BILLIONS OVERSEAS!!_

This is what happens when RINOs and Radical Leftists are given the keys. President Trump would NEVER approve of this.

**All we can do is make our voices heard. This is supposed to be a Democracy.**

_That 's why I'm organizing a grassroots effort to amplify the mandate given to MAGA Republicans on November 6th._

[**I 'm looking for 250 Patriots to stand with me to plead with elected officials to KILL THIS BILL!**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=59ea877fdeff4be1a3c5b9483d53d1d2&_e=QHYSTWEXsHSKK_hSBud02ms8_K6dp9rZw0rycTAucUXr41fEKYloJzEempfMaKY7wzupSguwq9YEVQCCFGpNWS79V7R1l8IySFi2rNS4CAQOVzisHejNNNz9ZAkfoH60vLWKeBi5aQZ_hcXm-_Hmd_AD0zziCkeNXtlaPrveymCC8ZRC7g0mvdALsoCO_OqxIvYfAxtFpdlr5pknrO_hChpPR_MvBMVqhNB6QFmNdYJkyYWqCX-WnqogCjGNY9NJBfryNXKyfI0MbMZBIjEO6Jv7I1gZlnHsc8VQ6CIpVhDIfIG3GEMXZJNfvlZOUY9MSXUajHPf1EQot0ogoApIEg%3D%3D)

| [ **KILL THE SWAMPBUS BILL** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=59ea877fdeff4be1a3c5b9483d53d1d2&_e=QHYSTWEXsHSKK_hSBud02ms8_K6dp9rZw0rycTAucUXr41fEKYloJzEempfMaKY7wzupSguwq9YEVQCCFGpNWS79V7R1l8IySFi2rNS4CAQOVzisHejNNNz9ZAkfoH60vLWKeBi5aQZ_hcXm-_Hmd_AD0zziCkeNXtlaPrveymCC8ZRC7g0mvdALsoCO_Oqx9YvJFhWvAcpw6R74Cq8nguYDXWauDw6-ETgJdKJy1t8USMhzCwqdGgj6U8o_1kGTPrv7bAkCx0U1OVvR_rzt2fj0akP5pVyzsFAv5PoscTtgUPG5XSSr18ICSDo7_HcFqjQgjdDhvOP4DgTeWxw9zQ%3D%3D)

[**Can I count on you, Peter?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=59ea877fdeff4be1a3c5b9483d53d1d2&_e=QHYSTWEXsHSKK_hSBud02ms8_K6dp9rZw0rycTAucUXr41fEKYloJzEempfMaKY7wzupSguwq9YEVQCCFGpNWS79V7R1l8IySFi2rNS4CAQOVzisHejNNNz9ZAkfoH60vLWKeBi5aQZ_hcXm-_Hmd_AD0zziCkeNXtlaPrveymCC8ZRC7g0mvdALsoCO_Oqxref5wQuGy04bk2vmuRtGk8UdsGUHgCzX96aaas9tFikKePWswh1C7FiPMnm4IfAxU5FKgIXM5QfmheGYfad2_jfYigameNVNHTsjD1Q4QPGB5Fxe5pShIxo6mQJkodauZuKt0bkeF4Ih1LO9_SUXwQ%3D%3D)

The last two weeks have been eventful, to say the least. While we all eagerly await the release of the Congressional ethics report into Matt Gaetz (which likely won't reveal anything we don't already know), and prepare for the solstice and winter holidays, here are a few highlights of the last 10 days or so.
### Whistleblower lawsuit update
We're nearly done with depositions in my COVID-19 whistleblower & retaliation lawsuit. We're $5465,80 short of covering the court fees needed for depositions we've done, and likely need another $1,200 for those remaining. Every dollar counts, so if you are willing and able, please consider throwing a few dollars toward a worthy cause:
[Click here to donate](https://substack.com/redirect/c2b84756-7474-45b6-a325-dce499c04263?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
I can't discuss what's been disclosed so far. I can say, though, that the people of Florida have a right to know what state officials said about the pandemic, the governor, and my case during depositions.
The trial is set for March. We are so close to getting to the truth. Please help if you are at all able.
If you want to send donations directly to my legal team, who has established a legal trust for the purposes of this lawsuit, respond to this post and I can send you the mailing address.
### American Geophysical Union Annual Meeting
The theme of this year's annual AGU meeting -- the largest gathering of physical scientists in the world -- was "what's next for science." The answer to that question has changed since the July 31 abstract deadline earlier this year.
I sat down with some of the most respected voices in science to discuss "what's next for science," and will add that to a more in-depth piece I'll be publishing this weekend here on Mesoscale.
To read that post, please consider upgrading to a paid plan. From now until December 31, 2024, you can save 24% on an annual plan that unlocks every part of MesoscaleNews.com.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..vN1vt7yzopS5HTHADb33PK-bG4nhSGMiwgqw6iw9mqw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=153369989)
### Boeing
Click [here](https://substack.com/redirect/b5f27d3a-a588-4919-9b81-2eb2720cfc71?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and[ here](https://substack.com/redirect/df130eb8-b8bb-488a-b2ea-5162f9c8b6f3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to read previous posts about Boeing and the brave whistleblowers who fought for truth. Please also keep[ John Barnett ](https://substack.com/redirect/dc9dea12-cb5b-48b3-b5ea-12ed6fb74a62?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)in your thoughts as you read through the evidence against Boeing.
The Boeing whistleblowers are still out there fighting every day to hold the company accountable for two preventable crashes.
Please support their fight and share their stories. [This story just came out.](https://substack.com/redirect/fe4c16ec-ac6c-4fbc-9c7b-556a6d7edf06?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
### Maryland Clean Energy Center Appointment
I am honored to announce I've been appointed to the Maryland Clean Energy Center advisory board, where I'll help shape policy that prioritizes equity and inclusion in the clean energy transition.
The Maryland Clean Energy Center (MCEC) advances a clean energy future by making affordable, accessible technologies available to all Marylanders. Through innovative financing, climate tech, and project support, MCEC empowers communities, boost economic growth, and create jobs. MCEC's commitment to education and a stronger economy is creating a healthier, sustainable planet.
My term starts January 1 and I'll be continuing the kinds of meaningful work I've done this year in DC-MD communities.

clean_body: The last two weeks have been eventful, to say the least. Here are some of the highlights. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more | | Send the gift of Mesoscale News with Rebekah Jones this holiday season| | | ? Public Post (free!) Dec 19 | | | | | | | | | | | The last two weeks have been eventful, to say the least. While we all eagerly await the release of the Congressional ethics report into Matt Gaetz (which likely won't reveal anything we don't already know), and prepare for the solstice and winter holidays, here are a few highlights of the last 10 days or so. Whistleblower lawsuit update We're nearly done with depositions in my COVID-19 whistleblower & retaliation lawsuit. We're $5465,80 short of covering the court fees needed for depositions we've done, and likely need another $1,200 for those remaining. Every dollar counts, so if you are willing and able, please consider throwing a few dollars toward a worthy cause: I can't discuss what's been disclosed so far. I can say, though, that the people of Florida have a right to know what state officials said about the pandemic, the governor, and my case during depositions. The trial is set for March. We are so close to getting to the truth. Please help if you are at all able. If you want to send donations directly to my legal team, who has established a legal trust for the purposes of this lawsuit, respond to this post and I can send you the mailing address. American Geophysical Union Annual Meeting The theme of this year's annual AGU meeting -- the largest gathering of physical scientists in the world -- was "what's next for science." The answer to that question has changed since the July 31 abstract deadline earlier this year. I sat down with some of the most respected voices in science to discuss "what's next for science," and will add that to a more in-depth piece I'll be publishing this weekend here on Mesoscale. To read that post, please consider upgrading to a paid plan. From now until December 31, 2024, you can save 24% on an annual plan that unlocks every part of MesoscaleNews.com. Boeing Click and to read previous posts about Boeing and the brave whistleblowers who fought for truth. Please also keep your thoughts as you read through the evidence against Boeing. The Boeing whistleblowers are still out there fighting every day to hold the company accountable for two preventable crashes. Please support their fight and share their stories. Maryland Clean Energy Center Appointment I am honored to announce I've been appointed to the Maryland Clean Energy Center advisory board, where I'll help shape policy that prioritizes equity and inclusion in the clean energy transition. The Maryland Clean Energy Center (MCEC) advances a clean energy future by making affordable, accessible technologies available to all Marylanders. Through innovative financing, climate tech, and project support, MCEC empowers communities, boost economic growth, and create jobs. MCEC's commitment to education and a stronger economy is creating a healthier, sustainable planet. My term starts January 1 and I'll be continuing the kinds of meaningful work I've done this year in DC-MD communities. Mesoscale News with Rebekah Jones is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. You 're currently a free subscriber to Mesoscale.News with Rebekah Jones. For the full experience, upgrade your subscription. # **Buy And Store _Your Own_ Gold & Silver!**
---
|
---
| | Stability. Wealth Protection. Long Term Financial Growth. This is what many Americans are searching for when they purchase precious metals like gold and silver. But what’s the best way to buy these precious metals? Do you buy an ETF (Exchange Traded Fund), or do you get your hands on the real thing? Here’s the thing about ETFs...
---
| |
---
| You don’t actually own the gold or silver.
---
| |
---
| You can’t take physical delivery of the metal.
---
| |
---
| Taxes and fees can eat away at your gains.
---
| |
---
| Shares may or may not have sufficient gold or silver backing.
---
| | But with physical gold or silver, you are the one in the driver’s seat. You have the control you’re looking for with your hard earned money. Here are the top 5 reasons why you should own physical gold and silver...
---
1. **Immediate Access**
Being able to open your safe and put your hands on the physical gold and silver coins you own brings reassurance to many gold and silver owners.
2. **Complete control**
You can stick it under your mattress, hide it in a wall, store it in a safe, bury it in your backyard or put it in a bank safe deposit box.
3. **Easy Portability**
If you think there’s ever a potential situation in which you may have to leave your house at short notice, you’ll want personal possession of your metals.
4. **Convenient Flexibility**
Taking physical possession of gold and silver is just one more tool in the toolbox, one more way to diversify your retirement savings.
5. **No Pricey Fees**
With ETFs and other forms of owning precious metals, you are forced to deal with fund managers, exchanges, custodial storage, and even sales of fund assets that can carry pesky fees that add up over time.

---
| | If you want to learn more about buying and controlling your own physical gold and silver, get your free copy of...

Mike Huckabee's

Huckabee here,

are living in perilous times. But we must remain steadfast if we
want to protect our financial futures.

Today's world is
ominous and rocked with uncertainty.

There is conflict in
the Middle East,
soaring inflation,
and our national debt
is at crisis levels.

Gratefully, there is

nest egg.

I'm grateful knowing

all my family and friends.

Click here to request
your FREE Retirement Protection Kit now!

Mike Huckabee

name: Kari Lake
subject: There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Media Council
body:
As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=92c73a0607d042b2942f097eed09e0d6&_e=RCBvYpQ4OntGgNhkkb8vaHxd7iEk0fnsJnQRy47CrnzSD7F_OaVI7VWvCuGaKbIeTw2UxaeyonYs8shhpCqvlUsjwl4R_YuAeZRYtQM_0L40ls-pRUsjUhJGO8rDerMU0BpF-kaAnFxCIcs9s--22l42Do3oJyv0_eqIsvWBgIQREo6EgoZXl6fUkLhwPr4XaEm0HVB3DGZBtG-B0VaHdmOy1LcKLB862u-_bU8isQDt80k-YMYiu4G9SfDSCNavEmDP7woylFNQHa7TEY7LR7Y0YJhgv-OaGe99h-SzA_w_IAw_mDfDAfh9Kmk8t_VA-1ISM4IMU5MaV9Vf6ldM4jSJnSWofmQfNEw8_-LW1bUflUm5TNGmvtUnrKHdkDYK4McIg1SrMHpHD05yGisv1kc_duVpJcXJMZl5FkyzeJk%3D)

MERRY CHRISTMAS _From Kari, Jeff, Ruby, and Leo_
---
| | From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=92c73a0607d042b2942f097eed09e0d6&_e=RCBvYpQ4OntGgNhkkb8vaHxd7iEk0fnsJnQRy47CrnzSD7F_OaVI7VWvCuGaKbIeTw2UxaeyonYs8shhpCqvlUsjwl4R_YuAeZRYtQM_0L40ls-pRUsjUhJGO8rDerMU0BpF-kaAnFxCIcs9s--22l42Do3oJyv0_eqIsvWBgIQREo6EgoZXl6fUkLhwPr4XaEm0HVB3DGZBtG-B0VaHdmOy1LcKLB862u-_bU8isQDt80k-YMYiu4G9SfDSCNavEmDP7woylFNQHa7TEY7LR7SlJWKRqMrUE4ksAydRSmPNSSxiWv25w6sbA8tYx3qjS1ghJrtj1LhlBOFkpuI_jdGB-l93H20d5Vvb6AE6oMWJBmx34rcOCyaiMZKaAInmpHME4-ojngvigN7Uba34V0sIF1v6_wsQFZq9ci8YIQs%3D)**
---
|
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,I wanted to send you this _Christmas Card_ to wish you and your family a Merry and Blessed Christmas. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Fellow Patriot, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Fellow Patriot, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider **[generously helping me this Christmas.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=92c73a0607d042b2942f097eed09e0d6&_e=RCBvYpQ4OntGgNhkkb8vaHxd7iEk0fnsJnQRy47CrnzSD7F_OaVI7VWvCuGaKbIeTw2UxaeyonYs8shhpCqvlUsjwl4R_YuAeZRYtQM_0L40ls-pRUsjUhJGO8rDerMU0BpF-kaAnFxCIcs9s--22l42Do3oJyv0_eqIsvWBgIQREo6EgoZXl6fUkLhwPr4XaEm0HVB3DGZBtG-B0VaHdmOy1LcKLB862u-_bU8isQDt80k-YMYiu4G9SfDSCNavEmDP7woylFNQHa7TEY7LRwxUNrUlSgui-ZGBxEL5Sh380Eg6SgGf_jsBEQYmZC3m6j5wVZ_tQ8ZmSjB7jph6xETCXFf70Co21M5HEg7hKum5UQWui7W59nge4RJTF8Dqd1_KcMlywI_3RYJMXaWYm8so3nKoXvmhX9dZPUa_x74%3D)** Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That’s what happened to me.As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.I’ve been thinking a lot about what the left has done to President Donald Trump.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him – his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.Yet he fights on.He’s truly unstoppable.I thank God the American people realized this too.Fellow Patriot, I’m sure you’ve felt the shift over the past few weeks. America is hungry for change, and the energy is absolutely incredible. To be candid with you, it makes facing this lawfare even more frustrating.The left lost, but they refuse to understand why. And in retaliation, they’re doubling down on their worst schemes to destroy conservatives. Including their lawfare.That leaves me with hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal expenses to pay for legitimately questioning an election we all know was crooked to the bones.
---
Fellow Patriot, I’m **not** giving up.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.And I’m in this fight for you.
---
You’ve had my back from day one when no one else did. I can’t thank you enough for that. To me, facing these attacks unafraid was worth the millions of dollars it could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me, my family, and my country.
---
_Not_ the Left’s lawfare._Not_ power-drunk liberal prosecutors._Not_ litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.
---

Hey team,
We really want to talk to you about Luigi Mangione and the current state of our healthcare system.
To be clear, **NextGen is deeply committed to our stance against gun violence**. But if you’re not exactly broken up about what happened to UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson, we understand why. You’ve grown up in a country where CEOs at insurance companies just like this one let thousands of people die every year.
**And when we demand change, politicians tell us to deal with it.**
You may be one of the millions of young people who had to give up on opportunities like college and travel to take care of family members.
Or you might even have a chronic illness, disability, or other “preexisting condition” that makes dealing with insurance companies a nightmare.
Meanwhile, the establishment does nothing but close ranks to protect billionaires and corporations from accountability.
**It doesn’t have to be this way.** But if we want change, we have to stand up and do something about it.
[We deserve more than vigilante killings and internet memes. We deserve a healthcare system that works for everyone. Hey Peter, Congress needs to pass a spending bill by midnight tomorrow to avoid a government shutdown. Elon is playing politics with critical government programs and we’re already seeing frightened House members fall in line behind the money, forgetting their responsibility to the public good. **Elon wants to shut down the government until Trump’s inauguration. A shutdown will not faze _the wealthiest individual in the world_ , and it will cause catastrophic damage to poor and working-class families.**
* 72,000 workers in Pennsylvania alone would be furloughed or forced to work without pay, right before the holidays.
* Inspections of drinking water facilities, hazardous waste sites, and unsafe workplaces would cease.
* Travel would become increasingly unsafe from staffing shortages in air traffic controllers and other essential personnel.
* If the shutdown lasts long enough programs such as WIC, SNAP, SSI, and TANF would be put at risk.

**[Donate right now to OnePA to push back against the billionaire and wealthy CEO takeover of our highest government.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98960723/518394356/1243330821?refcode=EM_FL_OPA_20241219_fr_muskshutdown_fd_oc_act_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzY2MTk3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY0MmQzMjRiLTI3YmUtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mjDdA4g3ItNxPP5uLkDiuyU4K0gLveHjoD-9N1NSx1w=)** | | [Chip in $3 a month](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98960724/518394357/1243330821?refcode=EM_FL_OPA_20241219_fr_muskshutdown_fd_oc_act_xx_abt3&amount=3&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzY2MTk3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY0MmQzMjRiLTI3YmUtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mjDdA4g3ItNxPP5uLkDiuyU4K0gLveHjoD-9N1NSx1w=)

name: James Carville
subject: I selected you to take my brand new survey -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hey, it's James Carville here.

We're at a crossroads for our democracy, and I need to hear from the MOST passionate Democrats to help shape our strategy for the battles ahead. That includes YOU. [**So please, click here to take my strategy survey right away.**](http://go.dscc.org/go/20763?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241219-JamesCarville-CarvillePostElectionStrategySurveyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241219-JamesCarville-CarvillePostElectionStrategySurveyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=19154%2E9716520%2EE-nLs0)

| | [START YOUR SURVEY](http://go.dscc.org/go/20763?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241219-JamesCarville-CarvillePostElectionStrategySurveyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241219-JamesCarville-CarvillePostElectionStrategySurveyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=19154%2E9716520%2EE-nLs0)
---

I just turned 80, so you better believe I've seen a lotta crazy stuff go down in politics -- but I won't lie, this year's election had my stomach in more knots than a kitten's yarn. **Now it's more important than ever that we make a plan to stop Trump, flip the Senate, and keep pushing forward.**

I'm waiting with bated breath to see how this team responds -- **because if we don't get fired the hell up, the Senate could be putty in Trump's tiny hands for his entire presidency.**

We can't let that happen, and that's why I selected you to take my **brand new strategy survey****.** I need to hear firsthand from Democrats across the country -- not more pundits in DC!! -- so I can help my friends at the DSCC lead the charge against MAGA Republicans and win back the Senate.

**Will you calm my nerves by being one of the first to take my new survey and proving that we're not gonna back down to Trump's wackos?** [**www.dscc.org/StrategySurvey**](http://go.dscc.org/go/20763?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241219-JamesCarville-CarvillePostElectionStrategySurveyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241219-JamesCarville-CarvillePostElectionStrategySurveyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=19154%2E9716520%2EE-nLs0)

| [START YOUR SURVEY](http://go.dscc.org/go/20763?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241219-JamesCarville-CarvillePostElectionStrategySurveyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241219-JamesCarville-CarvillePostElectionStrategySurveyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=19154%2E9716520%2EE-nLs0)
---

Thank you,

\- James

[](http://go.dscc.org/go/20763?ask=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20241219-JamesCarville-CarvillePostElectionStrategySurveyRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20241219-JamesCarville-CarvillePostElectionStrategySurveyRF-Pros-sl1&akid=19154%2E9716520%2EE-nLs0)

Dear Fellow Patriot, If you agree that NPR shouldn't receive another penny of taxpayer dollars ever again, please **[sign your DEFUND NPR Petition immediately.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=ec20d86d04bd418790a35f3c253c6c2b&_e=CudyCk_ncL1FrHfIJzbKGaEXUc2yGJxDX5DCE5uKy-nEjLaujsvKxckGZulSLgT7VaXIVosA_rdrVWoaRs8FEPAKtQkQgDOzO7A96NEt95Zjg81n52-nY_ymBuH2SrjQd_wyrtCfI9AMY1pkV_2ATLvPOmtSd397Z62eXD7ZEbIwAI30WmtJ6k14eNA6T4aB7ivYP3ZvL7WdRXfCBjHonjWM3FwzpNwYvni8Jigli0fu8yf7J7MTSn8Un-Pf4vY2FersXqm_euQRZwbgbHpvYcvG0s1fgsHWDrbjKKeZm7bj2Dtz7auNevu0iNXdewQN_L35aZ3oKQGZS7hvPM_hwBpPPMxHp63162KjXnTD9gLWU9kuWrt7lM3NGj5-4K6GRIKanByKzWlaUuSz4inGuOW1gAHP8Aq6WxBplbnQpnQ5MSpzon4VFRfSV5V0JXeRgZeVuAwUm520WUtt5JvQgA%3D%3D)** As Elon Musk puts it... **_" NPR has become a hard left propaganda machine that tolerates no dissent."_** He's 100% right. I know because I was a news anchor in the mainstream media for 30 years. I witnessed first-hand how progressive radicals infiltrated newsrooms across the country - including my own. I watched as the mainstream media began using Communist tactics like fearmongering and manipulation to push a woke political agenda. I refused to bow down. So, I quit. The **good news** is that more and more people like you are turning off these so-called mainstream news channels and finding better sources. Unfortunately, you can't just turn off the flow of $500 million+ of your tax dollars to fund the Corporation for Public Broadcasting - which funds NPR. **But you can tell Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy at the _Department of Government Efficiency_ that NPR needs to be first up on the chopping block.** I will forward your signed **DEFUND NPR** Petition to Elon and Vivek right away. How exactly is NPR spending your money? Some of it goes to their "Disinformation Reporting Team." And some of it goes to write horrendous stories with headlines like:
---
**" The Clear and Present Danger of Trump's Enduring 'Big Lie'"** **" Trump Downplays Violence, Deaths of Black Americans'"**
---
Yes, these are real headlines. These stories should come as no surprise because NPR had 87 Democrats in editorial positions and 0 Republicans. There's an old saying that a fish rots from its head down... and NPR is as rotten as it gets at the top. Here are just a few quotes from the CEO of NPR, Katherine Maher. "_Donald Trump is a racist. '_ _" I mean, sure, looting is counterproductive. But it's hard to be mad about protests not prioritizing the private property of a system of oppression founded on treating people's ancestors as private property.'_ _" White silence is complicity."_ _" I think our reverence for the truth might have become a bit of a distraction that is preventing us from finding consensus and getting important things done."_ _" I do wish Hillary wouldn't use the language 'boy' and 'girl.' It's erasing language for non-binary people."_ These quotes are from an unhinged woke leftist - not someone who should be handed your tax dollars to produce "journalism in the public interest." I say it's time to turn off the spigot. I know that Donald Trump is on the side of We the People - and so is Elon Musk. That's a great start, but like anything in Washington, the entrenched Swamp creatures are going to resist every bit of change we try to push through. Bureaucrats are talking about ways to "Trump-proof" their programs through hiding information, slow rolling changes, and delaying decisions. And the ACLU is bragging that they sued the Trump administration over 400 times and are prepared to file even more lawsuits this term. I'm braced for a fight and you should be too. **We the People sent a message to the Swamp, the Deep State, and the fake news media by electing Donald J. Trump with a historic mandate.** And defunding NPR can be one of the first of many wins. With President Trump back in the White House - and his mandate to go "Nuclear" on the Fake News - now is our chance as conservatives to hit the mainstream media back hard for everything they've done to us. But we have to stand together, we have to out work them, we have to shout down their lies, we have to refuse to be intimidated... ...and we have to out fundraise them. That's why I've joined forces with the _American Media Council_. Their mission is to restore TRUTH in America's media before the Fake News can destroy our country. They publish the facts behind the top media hoaxes. They hold journalists accountable with their "Truth in Journalism Pledge." And they give out "Trustworthy Ratings" to help patriots like you know which sites you can trust. In case you were wondering, they rate NPR as _" Untrustworthy"!_ The _American Media Council_ and I are committed to defunding NPR. **[So I ask that you sign and rush back your DEFUND NPR Petition today](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=ec20d86d04bd418790a35f3c253c6c2b&_e=CudyCk_ncL1FrHfIJzbKGaEXUc2yGJxDX5DCE5uKy-nEjLaujsvKxckGZulSLgT7VaXIVosA_rdrVWoaRs8FEPAKtQkQgDOzO7A96NEt95Zjg81n52-nY_ymBuH2SrjQd_wyrtCfI9AMY1pkV_2ATLvPOmtSd397Z62eXD7ZEbIwAI30WmtJ6k14eNA6T4aB7ivYP3ZvL7WdRXfCBjHonjWM3FwzpNwYvni8Jigli0fu8yf7J7MTSn8Un-Pf4vY2FersXqm_euQRZwbgbHpvYcvG0s1fgsHWDrbjKKeZm7bj2Dtz7auNevu0iNXdewQNZdZBJ_Uw6QIN2TTispUM3To3UIfTIE93NzY3z6Ma32rF47HcUKgsZBZnaY2vqsbob0wo7sWdCobt5HzgjiKyBpEshWLC5LGQWbGKgEvD8uph37ow43gup8LUEgCz2LUaja2k-s8xdXR4-i__hLENcQ%3D%3D)**. I will immediately forward your signed Petition to Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy at the _Department of Government Efficiency_ to let them know you don't want another cent of your taxpayer dollars going to NPR's propaganda machine. And after you submit your signed Petition, could you include a generous, tax-deductible donation to the _American Media Council_? **[A donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, or more will be a tremendous help in their fight to Make Media Honest Again.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=ec20d86d04bd418790a35f3c253c6c2b&_e=CudyCk_ncL1FrHfIJzbKGaEXUc2yGJxDX5DCE5uKy-nEjLaujsvKxckGZulSLgT7VaXIVosA_rdrVWoaRs8FEPAKtQkQgDOzO7A96NEt95Zjg81n52-nY_ymBuH2SrjQd_wyrtCfI9AMY1pkV_2ATLvPOmtSd397Z62eXD7ZEbIwAI30WmtJ6k14eNA6T4aB7ivYP3ZvL7WdRXfCBjHonjWM3FwzpNwYvni8Jigli0fu8yf7J7MTSn8Un-Pf4vY2FersXqm_euQRZwbgbHpvYcvG0s1fgsHWDrbjKKeZm7bj2Dtz7auNevu0iNXdewQN6nzsVvi9daxGferxR2QhrsYSwAGX8GGBnuVlxkkPn58zcX4fitfxAaldgnohkJx4SZdCdEDSzFHbeq9NAmgJjBJVELk3NvWZCnjeLniDGhcRc39Ia-oIchEE9Jf6HNCtd0d2j3cVAiVezf7JvUsZew%3D%3D)** And I will be so thankful that you support them just like I do. So if you're in the position to send a larger donation today - [s](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=ec20d86d04bd418790a35f3c253c6c2b&_e=CudyCk_ncL1FrHfIJzbKGaEXUc2yGJxDX5DCE5uKy-nEjLaujsvKxckGZulSLgT7VaXIVosA_rdrVWoaRs8FEPAKtQkQgDOzO7A96NEt95Zjg81n52-nY_ymBuH2SrjQd_wyrtCfI9AMY1pkV_2ATLvPOmtSd397Z62eXD7ZEbIwAI30WmtJ6k14eNA6T4aB7ivYP3ZvL7WdRXfCBjHonjWM3FwzpNwYvni8Jigli0fu8yf7J7MTSn8Un-Pf4vY2FersXqm_euQRZwbgbHpvYcvG0s1fgsHWDrbjKKeZm7bj2Dtz7auNevu0iNXdewQNrplHNXQyvJVEB_cUq9voqHEJpn0WUwrg6xFP8d_185IwFsTtNMcH3NvslgBuffiTk5WW54wQyaUq9UxXWsmH60515_7_QZazDbRRPRrHzKNlu1AoprM0oMSta88MF7bEac3eH-Cqb0E8CQ7q9-RixQ%3D%3D)**[uch as $500, $1,000, or any amount that's right for you - please know that it will be a massive help in putting the NPR to the flames.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=ec20d86d04bd418790a35f3c253c6c2b&_e=CudyCk_ncL1FrHfIJzbKGaEXUc2yGJxDX5DCE5uKy-nEjLaujsvKxckGZulSLgT7VaXIVosA_rdrVWoaRs8FEPAKtQkQgDOzO7A96NEt95Zjg81n52-nY_ymBuH2SrjQd_wyrtCfI9AMY1pkV_2ATLvPOmtSd397Z62eXD7ZEbIwAI30WmtJ6k14eNA6T4aB7ivYP3ZvL7WdRXfCBjHonjWM3FwzpNwYvni8Jigli0fu8yf7J7MTSn8Un-Pf4vY2FersXqm_euQRZwbgbHpvYcvG0s1fgsHWDrbjKKeZm7bj2Dtz7auNevu0iNXdewQNyQxGJYHBQpFdbmd_T9-sTOHjzs2bmwrq3eJLf8-qXI5P4detoNSKhP1PxFeaICiBp9YBVUa1L6W6i6QJNF1Fb4HnpyjZBeqFkxmDN3lQTfV_KKxF_qie7BF8tetomza2zP4R2tKglUOtSYgwLBsmKw%3D%3D)** It will also help us print and distribute thousands more of these **DEFUND NPR** Petitions so we can build a massive show of force to Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy. NPR has done everything in their power to destroy and divide our country. They called President Trump "Hitler." They defamed innocent conservatives. They spread lies to cover-up corrupt liberals. We will never forget what NPR has done to us. **But now is our chance to fight back and cut them off.** Thank you for joining this critical effort today.

I firmly believe that your leadership is exactly what our nation needs at this critical time. >From the beginning, I have been a proud supporter of your efforts: 1) Your dedication to securing our borders, lowering taxes, strengthening our economy, and prioritizing national security has proven time and time again that YOU are the right person to lead America. 2) Your commitment to defending our families and restoring common-sense policies has had a lasting impact on our country, and I am confident that YOUR leadership will bring prosperity and safety BACK to our nation for all Americans. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: I have your back, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4552%2E35263%2EZ0fMmT)
Hi Peter, I hope you and your loved ones are having a restful and joyful holiday season. Throughout the campaign, and in the month since I was re-elected to the U.S. Senate, my team and I have traveled all over our great state and listened to our fellow Wisconsinites. **My goal in the Senate is to deliver progress on the issues that matter most to people across our state.** For people like the farmers and the dairy industry who I’ve fought alongside for years. For the workers on foundry floors who are getting more business because of my Made in America laws. For the women who had their rights stripped away and see me on the frontlines fighting for their freedoms. _For all Wisconsinites, no matter where you live or who you voted for._ Now that we’re back in the Senate and preparing for the upcoming Trump Administration, my team and I want to hear from you. We want to know what issues keep you up at night, what you think Senate Democrats should prioritize in the new year, and how we can best fight back to defend Wisconsinites from the incoming Republican trifecta. **I wish I could ask you these questions in person, maybe while sharing a beer, but in the meantime,[can you fill out our Strategy Survey today? It should just take a moment or two to complete, and your input goes a long way with my team.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/survey/Strategy_Survey_2024/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20241219_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4552%2E35263%2EZ0fMmT)** | | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/survey/Strategy_Survey_2024/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20241219_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4552%2E35263%2EZ0fMmT)
---
Thanks so much for sharing your thoughts with me, Peter!
— Tammy
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=4552%2E35263%2EZ0fMmT) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=4552%2E35263%2EZ0fMmT)**
PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
---

### A critical update on the injustices our tax dollars are funding, and the need to activate, organize, and keep the pressure on those in power
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Dec 19
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=153369075&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzMzY5MDc1LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczNDYyNzcwMCwiZXhwIjoxNzM3MjE5NzAwLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.stEOHxh0rgCRck9Hlb5gj2FIXpDKfc0IUWinPPLEt_g&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvcWFzaW1yYXNoaWQvcC9wYWxlc3Rpbmlhbi1mYW1pbGllcy1zdWUtdXMtc3RhdGU_.dnBS4g4O6Zl1kK6zEXC4AtZGcUWAVL786KjpXe-T9f8?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/qasimrashid/p/palestinian-families-sue-us-state?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

As the genocide of Palestinians rages on, Palestinian families are now suing the US State Department and Secretary of State Antony Blinken. Simultaneously, Israeli human rights organizations are sounding the alarm full blast that their government is committing war crimes. And meanwhile, the Biden administration continues to arm Netanyahu despite full awareness that he is committing war crimes. Here are the key updates on Israel's siege on Gaza that corporate media is ignoring, and what we must do going forward to demand justice. **Let 's Address This**.
**Quick Ask!** I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.**Subscribe and join the movement.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..SCb5pCCw8QYTuD0ZdUSRDuLHYlnjvVm9Rnnvfyr4q8Y?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=153369075)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f9ecbada-98a6-4f3d-b2b0-c7f9c2827869?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
US Secretary of State Antony Blinken (left) and ICC accused war criminal Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu (right) [Credit: Debbie HIll/Pool/AFP]
### Does the Lawsuit Have Merit?
In a word, yes. Palestinian families have taken an unprecedented step in filing a lawsuit against Antony Blinken and the US State Department for arming Netanyahu despite knowing he is violating the US Leahy Laws and international human rights law. [Specifically](https://substack.com/redirect/4704adb2-7378-4736-8ea6-644fa49b26ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> The lawsuit, filed in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia alleged that the State Department under Secretary of State Antony Blinken has deliberately circumvented a U.S. human rights law to continue funding and supporting Israeli military units accused of atrocities in Gaza and the Israeli-occupied West Bank.
In my opinion as a human rights lawyer who studies this closely, the Palestinian families behind this lawsuit have an extremely strong case. The facts are that Blinken's and the State Department's disregard for US and international law is well documented. For example, see the evidence uncovered by ProPublica--a well respected non-profit media organization dedicated to authentic, verifiable, and reliable investigative journalism. Founded in 2007, it has already won six Pulitzer prizes, among numerous other awards. Non-partisan media watch dog organizations [consistently rate ProPublica as ](https://substack.com/redirect/e52c1467-ec22-4c82-af66-e1f38e4d3bc3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[reliable](https://substack.com/redirect/e52c1467-ec22-4c82-af66-e1f38e4d3bc3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_. I offer this context lest critics attack ProPublica's reputation and credibility. Earlier this year ProPublica published a detailed report [documenting the following](https://substack.com/redirect/6dedd5fe-31f9-4657-a080-d5ea0c66a8cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> The U.S. government's two foremost authorities on humanitarian assistance concluded this spring that Israel had deliberately blocked deliveries of food and medicine into Gaza. The U.S. Agency for International Development delivered its assessment to Secretary of State Antony Blinken and the State Department's refugees bureau made its stance known to top diplomats in late April. USAID sent Blinken a detailed 17-page memo on Israel's conduct. The memo described instances of Israeli interference with aid efforts, including killing aid workers, razing agricultural structures, bombing ambulances and hospitals, sitting on supply depots and routinely turning away trucks full of food and medicine. Days later, Blinken delivered a carefully worded statement to Congress that said, "_We do not currently assess that the Israeli government is prohibiting or otherwise restricting the transport or delivery of U.S. humanitarian assistance_."
Human Rights Watch, OxFam, Amnesty International, and the UN have all issued similar reports. Antony Blinken, meanwhile, saw the official reports from his own two U.S. State Department agencies--all in full agreement that the Israeli government is committing the war crime of illegally blocking aid to Gaza as Palestinians starved to death--and decided to testify to the opposite effect to U.S. Congress.
The only possible logical conclusion is that Blinken knowingly lied. This is why Palestinian families are suing, arguing that Secretary Blinken should be prosecuted for lying to U.S. Congress in contravention to the factual USAID report, and then also prosecuted for illegally approving arms to Netanyahu in violation of the Leahy Laws.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..SCb5pCCw8QYTuD0ZdUSRDuLHYlnjvVm9Rnnvfyr4q8Y?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=153369075)
### Israeli Media & Human Rights Orgs Document Israeli War Crimes
Haaretz has led so assertively in calling out Israeli war crimes, that the Netanyahu administration has attacked them with the full force of [government censorship and sanctions](https://substack.com/redirect/380396b1-2aae-4d4d-8837-2de9a5cb5243?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). But that has not stopped Israel's oldest paper from documenting the Israeli Government's war crimes against Palestinians. This week Haaretz documented dozens more horrifying war crimes by the Israeli military, [reporting](https://substack.com/redirect/042a87e5-490f-4b39-8f25-ab49001d1193?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> [Israeli soldiers state] that "Everyone's a Terrorist." IDF Soldiers expose arbitrary killings and rampant lawlessness in Gaza's Netzarim corridor. [For example], of 200 bodies, only 10 were confirmed as Hamas members. IDF soldiers who served in Gaza tell Haaretz that anyone who crosses an imaginary line in the contested Neztarim corridor is shot to death, with every Palestinian casualty counting as a terrorist - even if they were just a child.
Likewise, premier Israeli Human Rights org B'Tselem [reports about Israel's war crimes](https://substack.com/redirect/b7ed26c9-b5a4-41f6-9dae-b76d9fe02c97?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> Israel is committing the war crime of starvation in the Gaza Strip. For months, Israel has been committing the crime of starvation under international law in the Gaza Strip. The severe hunger that has developed over recent months in the Gaza Strip is not a result of fate, but the product of a deliberate and conscious Israeli policy. It has been openly declared by decision makers, including a member of the Israeli war cabinet, from the very beginning of the war.
Finally, Breaking The Silence, an Israeli organization comprised of former Israeli Defense Force soldiers quotes a prominent former soldier to state,
> "We are now being dragged to occupy, annex, ethnically cleanse - look at the north of the Gaza Strip - transfer, call it whatever you want, and to settle in Jewish settlements. That is the matter." The former soldier who made the statement above is not one of our testifiers. Far from it. These are the words of Moshe Ya'alon, the former IDF chief of staff and Israel's former defense minister. And he didn't misspeak, either. When pressed, he only reiterated and reaffirmed his statements. "I stand behind the phrase 'ethnic cleansing.' I must warn you about what is happening here and is being hidden from us. War crimes are being committed here," he said, adding that he was speaking "on behalf of commanders who operate in the northern Gaza Strip and have been approaching me with dread."
Breaking the Silence goes on to give ample testimony that the [Israeli military is using Palestinian civilians as human shields](https://substack.com/redirect/b6500ae7-2f4e-408a-be27-9215b48e266b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in their siege on Gaza--which again is a war crime. Please note, none of these are the words of Palestinians, or even of any non-Israelis. This is documented facts from Israeli civilians, Israeli journalists, and Israeli military officers--all attesting to war crimes, ethnic cleansing, and genocide. And the fact is that the US Government is well aware of these atrocities, and refuses to hold Netanyahu or the Israeli military accountable.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..SCb5pCCw8QYTuD0ZdUSRDuLHYlnjvVm9Rnnvfyr4q8Y?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=153369075)
### Corporate Media Continues To Fail the American People
Meanwhile, new studies show just how dangerously corporate media remains complicit. The Nation issued a [damning report](https://substack.com/redirect/955b0390-59d7-457a-9aeb-a6faf10a0713?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on cable news and legacy media continuing to whitewash Israel's siege on Gaza:
> A survey of a year's worth of Palestine-Israel coverage by four Sunday morning news shows--NBC's _Meet the Press_ , ABC's _This Week With George Stephanopoulos_ , CBS's _Face the Nation_ , and CNN's _State of the Union_ with Jake Tapper and Dana Bash--reveals a startling statistic: With the exception of one interview, the Sunday shows covered and debated the so-called "Israel-Hamas war" for 12 months without speaking to a single Palestinian or Palestinian American. In addition, the survey shows, these programs display a consistent anti-Palestinian bias. They selectively use emotive words only to describe Israeli victims, ignore Palestinian human shield and rape victims, and routinely platform Israeli officials who have been credibly accused of war crimes--most notably Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu.
This is, in short, journalistic malpractice. To speak about the Palestinian people for a full year while refusing to invite Palestinian speakers is the definition of 'yellow journalism,' and this failure is coming from the wealthiest media outlets in the country. It is no wonder that Americans are sick and tired of this disinformation, and why CNN's ratings have more than halved since the Presidential election. It's also no wonder why ABC capitulated so quickly to Trump in his defamation suit against them. (More on this in tomorrow's post).
But in short, what we see is corporate media choosing to fail the American people. Americans should remember these betrayal of our trust, and demand actual journalists committed to facts and truth, not propaganda and disinformation. Because not only is it enabling genocide overseas, it is undermining democracy here at home. For example, months before the Presidential election [I wrote](https://substack.com/redirect/6317b4b3-369c-460e-abaf-9db2dd660641?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> Finally, remember that stopping arms to Netanyahu is not just the moral and legally smart decision, it is the politically smart decision. A recent national CBS/YouGov poll, reports [the following critical facts](https://substack.com/redirect/de849967-d08e-4a85-9c38-2b5985c0afe6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about how united Americans are to end the siege on Gaza by withholding arms from Netanyahu: 61% of Americans oppose weapons to Israel's assault in Gaza and 77% of Democrats reject US weapons to Israel. My fear is that the Biden administrations continued refusal to listen to the will of the American people hurts VP Harris's chances to win in November. In an election as tight as this election is shaping up to be, it is entirely meritless to enforce a position that more than 3 in 5 Americans and nearly 4 in 5 Democrats oppose.
While the Biden administration is absolutely responsible for its own grotesque failure on this issue, corporate media's refusal to hold accountable the Biden administration, or Trump's stated policy to let Netanyahu "finish the job" is similarly deplorable. Sadly, I was proven right in my above warning, as evidenced by not only the loss, but by the fact that young people who fueled Biden to victory in 2020 stayed home in 2024. But more importantly, what we do now matters, because we have a clear blueprint -- painful as it is to acquire via a lost election -- that demonstrates Americans do not want war, do not want to fund this war, and loudly condemn this genocide.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..SCb5pCCw8QYTuD0ZdUSRDuLHYlnjvVm9Rnnvfyr4q8Y?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=153369075)
### What Can We Do?
Earlier I said I believe the lawsuit has merit. This is true and the facts back it up. Whether the lawsuit is heard, however, is a different conversation. The US Government has something called _Sovereign Immunity_ , which means in short, that you can only sue the government if it gives you permission to sue them. I doubt the State Department will allow them to be sued for enabling these war crimes, nor would the Supreme Court allow the lawsuit to proceed. Still, this critical step from these courageous Palestinian families is not in vain, and exemplifies the need to speak up and raise our voices for the sake of justice and human rights, no matter how dire the circumstances or how small the chance of success. Accordingly I encourage each of you to do the following:
1. Look up your [member of Congress](https://substack.com/redirect/07c47f2e-8032-4f33-95af-019b5a35750d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and continue to raise your voice to stop spending our tax dollars fueling Netanyahu's war crimes and siege on Gaza and the Palestinian people. Call them, email them, visit their offices--make sure they hear your voice that you reject these violations of US and international laws.
2. Continue to support human rights organizations domestically and in Israel committed to ending this genocide. Palestinian Children's Relief Fund, MedGlobal, Humanity First, Breaking The Silence, B'Tselem, and ANERA are all well established organizations doing the hard work of saving lives in the most difficult of circumstances. These are all organizations I have personally supported and continue to support because they are leading by example to uphold justice.
3. Demand media accountability. Shut off the CNNs of the world and invest your dollars and time into voices not owned by billionaires or built around disinformation clickbait. Stay tuned for tomorrow's post for more details on this.

### Conclusion
Our responsibility remains clear--continue to raise our voices for justice, and continue to support those demanding accountability. Contact your member of Congress regardless of party affiliation, and demand our elected officials uphold US and international law. Silence is not an option, as that enables further war crimes, and in this case, genocide. You have my commitment to continue to speak up relentlessly at every opportunity, even when it isn't popular to do so, because human rights are not a popularity contest, they are a fundamental obligation upon all of us to protect.
As Legacy media continues to fail to hold the powerful accountable, your support of _Let 's Address This_ remains more critical than ever. **Please become an active member of this community and subscribe.**

ACROSS THE COMMONWEALTH
VOTE TODAY! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Make%20A%20Plan%20To%20Vote.png]
You can vote for November's elections NOW! Vote at your Registrar's office during business hours. Saturday early voting is available October 28th and November 4th. Learn More [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
Find your local Registrar's office here: https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/VWCC.jpeg] 15 years of the Community College Access Program at VWCC
Learn More [https://www.wdbj7.com/2023/09/26/virginia-western-celebrates-15th-anniversary-ccap-program/] CCAP is a successful public/private partnership that pays the cost of tuition for three years at Virginia Western Community College if a qualified student does not have sufficient financial aid to pay tuition costs.
This program has helped over 4,200 students achieve higher education!
CANDIDATE SPOTLIGHT
https://karenforvirginia.com/ [https://karenforvirginia.com/] Karen Jenkins for HB-89
Donate Here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/karenforvirginia] Karen Jenkins is a life-long resident of the City of Suffolk. Throughout her lifetime she has passionately advocated for others and currently serves on the Suffolk School Board with a proven track record and history of accomplishments. She is running for the House of Delegates for the 89th District to continue delivering results for the people of Virginia.
She is a champion for education, public safety and mental health. As your next Delegate for the 89th District, she will continue to fight and vote for meaningful policies and legislation to support the needs of the district. At the state level, she will be positioned to write and sponsor bills and laws to benefit the schools and communities in the 89th District and throughout the commonwealth.
LOCAL CANDIDATE EVENTS
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/lily%20canvass.png]
Canvass for Lily Franklin!
On Sundays, join Team Lily at the South County Library Parking Lot from 12 - 12:30 pm for a Roanoke canvassing event!
Bring your walking shoes, a charged cell phone, and water. When you arrive to their launch location you will receive a brief training and literature before being sent out to turf. Questions? Email Beth at egunter3@gmail.com [egunter3@gmail.com] or call 540-353-3645.
South County Library Parking Lot, 6303 Merriman Rd, Roanoke, VA 24018

Door knocking will begin about 12:30 pm!

Roanoke EnVision Center Kids Movie Night - Sept. 28 Fall Harvest Festival
The movie is free and there will be snacks and much more! Fall into wellness at the Harvest Festival!
Read More Celebrate the end of farm season with fun experiences for the whole family. Try new activities to support your well-being. Connect with others in a beautiful outdoor space. Free meals available with registration. This event is free and open to everyone!

Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game - Oct. 1 Henrietta Lacks Statue Unveiling - Oct. 4
Join us for the 6th Annual Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game, being held at the Home of the Salem Red Sox - Carilion Clinic Field. A dignified sculpture will commemorate the ongoing and long unrecognized contributions of Roanoke native Henrietta Lacks, who unknowingly provided the world with the HeLa cell, fueling decades of life-saving and life changing research.
Physicians, nurses and administrators will suit up for each hospital during the nine-inning contest. Proceeds will benefit the American Heart Association. Unveiling is October 4th at 11 am at Henrietta Lacks Plaza.
Admission is $5 at the gate, kids under 10 free. Gates open at 1pm and the game starts at 2pm. 410 3rd St SW, Roanoke, VA 24011

Roanoke City Democratic Committee meetings are now in-person and open to non-members. We meet the 3rd Thursday of each month. This month we are meeting at 6 pm at the Main Library (706 S Jefferson St, Roanoke, VA 24016). Sign up for meeting reminders and other information here [https://www.roanokedemocrats.com/subscribe] .

clean_body: [] [] ACROSS THE COMMONWEALTH VOTE TODAY! [] You can vote for November's elections NOW! Vote at your Registrar's office during business hours. Saturday early voting is available October 28th and November 4th. Learn More [] Find your local Registrar's office here: [] [] 15 years of the Community College Access Program at VWCC Learn More [] CCAP is a successful public/private partnership that pays the cost of tuition for three years at Virginia Western Community College if a qualified student does not have sufficient financial aid to pay tuition costs. This program has helped over 4,200 students achieve higher education! CANDIDATE SPOTLIGHT [] Karen Jenkins for HB-89 Donate Here [] Karen Jenkins is a life-long resident of the City of Suffolk. Throughout her lifetime she has passionately advocated for others and currently serves on the Suffolk School Board with a proven track record and history of accomplishments. She is running for the House of Delegates for the 89th District to continue delivering results for the people of Virginia. She is a champion for education, public safety and mental health. As your next Delegate for the 89th District, she will continue to fight and vote for meaningful policies and legislation to support the needs of the district. At the state level, she will be positioned to write and sponsor bills and laws to benefit the schools and communities in the 89th District and throughout the commonwealth. LOCAL CANDIDATE EVENTS [] Canvass for Lily Franklin! On Sundays, join Team Lily at the South County Library Parking Lot from 12 - 12:30 pm for a Roanoke canvassing event! Bring your walking shoes, a charged cell phone, and water. When you arrive to their launch location you will receive a brief training and literature before being sent out to turf. Questions? Email Beth at egunter3@gmail.com [egunter3@gmail.com] or call 540-353-3645. South County Library Parking Lot, 6303 Merriman Rd, Roanoke, VA 24018 [] Canvass for Sam and Trish! this is a place holder until the new facebook event is created Join us Sunday to canvass for Sam and Trish! Meet our Field Coordinator, Dom, on September 3rd at the Williamson Road Library, 12:00pm. Located at 3837 Williamson Rd, Roanoke, VA 24012. IN THE COMMUNITY [] [] Roanoke River Contamination Settlement Reached Roanoke Young Democrats Canvass Tailgate Without current regulations, the water contamination caused by these companies could have been so much worse. Come out to support Roanoke Valley Democratic candidates! Read More [] The Roanoke Young Democrats will be enjoying pizza, coffee, donuts and more before canvassing to knock for Trish White-Boyd, Sam Rasoul, Lily Franklin, Samantha Newell, Jade Harris, & Nancy Horn. Door knocking will begin about 12:30 pm! Read More [] Roanoke EnVision Center Kids Movie Night - Sept. 28 Fall Harvest Festival The movie is free and there will be snacks and much more! Fall into wellness at the Harvest Festival! Read More Celebrate the end of farm season with fun experiences for the whole family. Try new activities to support your well-being. Connect with others in a beautiful outdoor space. Free meals available with registration. This event is free and open to everyone! Read More [] [] [] Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game - Oct. 1 Henrietta Lacks Statue Unveiling - Oct. 4 Join us for the 6th Annual Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game, being held at the Home of the Salem Red Sox - Carilion Clinic Field. A dignified sculpture will commemorate the ongoing and long unrecognized contributions of Roanoke native Henrietta Lacks, who unknowingly provided the world with the HeLa cell, fueling decades of life-saving and life changing research. Physicians, nurses and administrators will suit up for each hospital during the nine-inning contest. Proceeds will benefit the American Heart Association. Unveiling is October 4th at 11 am at Henrietta Lacks Plaza. Admission is $5 at the gate, kids under 10 free. Gates open at 1pm and the game starts at 2pm. 410 3rd St SW, Roanoke, VA 24011 Read More [] Read More [] [] Join the Roanoke City Democrats! The Kroger/Albertsons merger is officially dead. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98962517/518399764/1605543321?refcode=em24_241219_kroger_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_241219_kroger_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=5a1731ae-2abe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTE3MzFhZS0yYWJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=COBL_CppA-jyy-w2YC1hBNw6nMS-wWecNdGkIESWJOs=) **Schrier Enthused About Unraveling of Kroger-Albertsons Merger**

_“...They're getting squeezed. We're paying higher prices for produce in the stores; [farmers] are not seeing a bit of this. Family farmers are going out of business. And if you had taken away competition between Kroger and Albertsons, it basically would have taken all negotiation power away from farmers.”_ Good news, Peter!

_**The Kroger/Albertsons merger is officially dead.**_

From the very beginning, Kim stood firmly against this merger – she knew it would lead to higher grocery bills for hardworking families across our district and threaten local jobs.

And now, we can celebrate this victory. This is a huge win for Washington families and a testament to what we can accomplish when we fight for what's right, _together._ But here’s the thing: Corporate greed isn’t going away, and neither are the challenges our communities face.

Kim’s work standing up for Washington families, protecting our local businesses, and holding corporations accountable is far from over. Now, more than ever, she’s counting on us to have her back – especially with dark money and corporate interests pouring into future elections to oppose leaders like her.

body:
| | | | Dear Patriot, Jimmy Patronis and Randy Fine are running for the TWO MOST CRITICAL SEATS in Florida that will determine whether we hold the line against the Woke Left's radical agenda--or lose EVERYTHING. **If these seats fall, our majority is gone.** And with it, any chance to stop:
* The left's open-border invasion
* Skyrocketing inflation crushing working families
* Radical indoctrination in our schools

The Radical Left know these races are the key to keeping their socialist dream alive. That's why they're pouring millions into flipping these seats blue. **The fight for America comes down to YOU.**

name: Jacob Carrel (NDRC)
subject: In 2011, I slept on the cold marble floor of the Wisconsin State Capitol
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
I’m so proud of what the fair maps movement has accomplished.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98964033/518404023/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzMTczMWFlLTJhYmUtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JfR-WO7adDdJWckyNrwIPNsGmWqw9aeAFBxQ5sm6cNE=&emci=67ecd076-7fbd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=531731ae-2abe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter,As someone who gets to spend their days thinking about redistricting policies — AND as someone who grew up in Wisconsin — I am so proud of what the fair maps movement has accomplished in the Badger state. This election cycle, our Democracy Defenders helped flip **14 seats** from red to blue across both the state assembly and state senate — ending the GOP’s underearned advantage that had been in place for the last 13 years. **Fair maps won big. It’s now quite possible that Democrats could take back majorities in both chambers in 2026.** This didn’t happen overnight. These wins took years of organizing, activism, and holding Republicans accountable. It’s the long-term vision of Attorney General Holder and this organization that made this possible. Let’s quickly review the last decade or so: Upon taking office in 2011, newly elected Governor Scott Walker wasted no time focusing on manipulating the state's legislative maps. I spent _three weeks sleeping on the cold marble floor_ in the state capitol building with 100,000 other concerned citizens, as part of a protest against his administration’s power grab. Nevertheless, Governor Walker and his extreme allies in the state legislature changed the rules of the state supreme court to undermine the state’s longstanding chief justice, gutted the state’s nonpartisan elections board, and enacted a horrifying gerrymander, which guaranteed them _an unearned lock on power for a decade_. **And then in 2017, the NDRC was founded. And the organization began building an infrastructure for activism and organizing which put a spotlight on just how badly Republicans were bending the rules — not just in Wisconsin but all across the country.** The NDRC endorsed Tony Evers as a Democracy Defender, and in 2018 he was elected Governor of Wisconsin, promising to be a fair maps champion. But the GOP-controlled legislature immediately stripped away many of his powers. **Instead of backing down, this community _doubled down_.** Since then, NDRC Chair Eric Holder has made numerous trips to mobilize voters, raised millions of dollars, and brought increased national attention to critical state-level races in Wisconsin. All that work culminated last year in the election of Judge Janet Protasiewicz to the Wisconsin Supreme Court, breaking the long-held conservative stranglehold on the body. Republicans knew their days of running rampant with maps were over. The legislature passed Governor Evers’ fair maps ahead of this year’s elections. **This cycle, for the first time since I became eligible to vote, Wisconsin’s state legislative maps were finally fair.** The NDRC endorsed 90 Wisconsin candidates as a part of our Democracy Defenders program. Committed Democrats like you understood the importance of these state-level races that too often go overlooked — and you put in the work. **That’s how we won: Laying the groundwork for fair representation by securing fair maps.** But our work is far from over. We need to build on the momentum from these incredible gains and bring it to other states in need of reform. I’m excited — and so grateful for the chance — to do that with this fair maps movement. Thank you. All the best, Jacob Jacob Carrel
Deputy Director of Litigation & Policy | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98964034/518404024/1701676424?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_WisconsinResultsRedux_email_20241219-NDRC-Tier1-WisconsinResultsRedux_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241219-NDRC-Tier1-WisconsinResultsRedux_&utm_campaign=WisconsinResultsRedux&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzMTczMWFlLTJhYmUtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JfR-WO7adDdJWckyNrwIPNsGmWqw9aeAFBxQ5sm6cNE=)

clean_body: I’m so proud of what the fair maps movement has accomplished. | Peter,As someone who gets to spend their days thinking about redistricting policies — AND as someone who grew up in Wisconsin — I am so proud of what the fair maps movement has accomplished in the Badger state. This election cycle, our Democracy Defenders helped flip 14 seats from red to blue across both the state assembly and state senate — ending the GOP’s underearned advantage that had been in place for the last 13 years. Fair maps won big. It’s now quite possible that Democrats could take back majorities in both chambers in 2026. This didn’t happen overnight. These wins took years of organizing, activism, and holding Republicans accountable. It’s the long-term vision of Attorney General Holder and this organization that made this possible. Let’s quickly review the last decade or so: Upon taking office in 2011, newly elected Governor Scott Walker wasted no time focusing on manipulating the state's legislative maps. I spent three weeks sleeping on the cold marble floor in the state capitol building with 100,000 other concerned citizens, as part of a protest against his administration’s power grab. Nevertheless, Governor Walker and his extreme allies in the state legislature changed the rules of the state supreme court to undermine the state’s longstanding chief justice, gutted the state’s nonpartisan elections board, and enacted a horrifying gerrymander, which guaranteed them an unearned lock on power for a decade. And then in 2017, the NDRC was founded. And the organization began building an infrastructure for activism and organizing which put a spotlight on just how badly Republicans were bending the rules — not just in Wisconsin but all across the country. The NDRC endorsed Tony Evers as a Democracy Defender, and in 2018 he was elected Governor of Wisconsin, promising to be a fair maps champion. But the GOP-controlled legislature immediately stripped away many of his powers. Instead of backing down, this community doubled down. Since then, NDRC Chair Eric Holder has made numerous trips to mobilize voters, raised millions of dollars, and brought increased national attention to critical state-level races in Wisconsin. All that work culminated last year in the election of Judge Janet Protasiewicz to the Wisconsin Supreme Court, breaking the long-held conservative stranglehold on the body. Republicans knew their days of running rampant with maps were over. The legislature passed Governor Evers’ fair maps ahead of this year’s elections. This cycle, for the first time since I became eligible to vote, Wisconsin’s state legislative maps were finally fair. The NDRC endorsed 90 Wisconsin candidates as a part of our Democracy Defenders program. Committed Democrats like you understood the importance of these state-level races that too often go overlooked — and you put in the work. That’s how we won: Laying the groundwork for fair representation by securing fair maps. But our work is far from over. We need to build on the momentum from these incredible gains and bring it to other states in need of reform. I’m excited — and so grateful for the chance — to do that with this fair maps movement. Thank you. All the best, Jacob Jacob Carrel Deputy Director of Litigation & Policy | = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, Suite #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

USO Supporter,
My name is Brad Meuli, and I'm a proud third-generation U.S. Marine.
My grandfather, dad and I all had the honor of serving our country. But one of the hardest parts of military life was knowing I may have to spend Christmas away from my family -- especially when I was a young Marine with a wife and two small boys.
That's why I'm reaching out on behalf of the USO today. The USO set a goal to raise enough funds via email and text messages through Wednesday to provide 3,000 warm meals and other critical programs for service members far from their families.
**[Will you donate now to show your military support this holiday season? name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Here’s what’s alarming
body:
Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion.| | | If you haven’t heard about the “See You at the Library Day” on Fox News or Newsmax or your other favorite news sources, please let me tell you why it’s so critical.
---
| | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=90c8a132234341e7a2b0b8d775c4b7e1&_e=6W0j4ROm42izZlKjUQJwsA5SCGECFgyYnQFCfNjPSfm6k-Tjga_L5u-F3hbnxKHHVnTBkUY86G7kqIWo6LS9V85TVT4qirsCR9Un27U7eMbW24Jhj4M3utfMXxmvwjo9OfDifJnZU_3IoR8Um0shOkS8Zr16z_XwEBiQxjjZZxYM5l4D6j4H0Mp3CwJfBq8ccN7jDCMiMIdwkclmkg_55ezeSoXk7QdfieTGjVUoPDb4DnGLCiydAnk8vWM0uu66GRT_LpK_WFaH2K_jIX92viOZiVXXfIGaa1PVFCiHtbYV2uetzpjzKnVZdhJC9df2jqwXbRqFBWwLzOPkFs-3f9b4ChsDrYydPO2dDHNps2vX77IKtMnt5oSWnq8i-XJt4OCcFIdOUQVnCrpKOLbf5A%3D%3D)
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Back when you were growing up, you may remember lazy Saturdays at the library with a kind but stern librarian. She would fill your mind with classics like _Pat the Bunny_ and _The Little Engine That Could_. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the _Three Musketeers_ , _Treasure Island_ and _Charlotte’s Web_.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call _Adventure of Huckleberry Finn_ and _To Kill a Mockingbird_ “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” _Little House_ series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. An ABC board book for “families who want their kids to grow up in a space that is unapologetic about activism, environmental justice, civil rights, LGBTQ rights, and everything else that activists believe in and fight for...”
---
| | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=90c8a132234341e7a2b0b8d775c4b7e1&_e=6W0j4ROm42izZlKjUQJwsA5SCGECFgyYnQFCfNjPSfm6k-Tjga_L5u-F3hbnxKHHVnTBkUY86G7kqIWo6LS9V85TVT4qirsCR9Un27U7eMbW24Jhj4M3utfMXxmvwjo9OfDifJnZU_3IoR8Um0shOkS8Zr16z_XwEBiQxjjZZxYM5l4D6j4H0Mp3CwJfBq8ccN7jDCMiMIdwkclmkg_55ezeSoXk7QdfieTGjVUoPDaLZUYYdz44P_aswRgY7a3jgW7vFx8omMwZkUIJgy_vRqSJol7_lZUOS1NWE0UrQM82nAijrLkkjS1ahLqTVws4AAftqw18WPVnvZNSaXxGvaS6pvDaqq_AqOA4cO2rmbjWqQEZ6U6bTB8dgNzU0oFwjwbodB-GRxFHz0PuYBmWnQ%3D%3D)
