| | For decades, the ultra-liberal Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation and George Soros’ Open Society have spent millions radicalizing the ALA. And as a result, a new generation of pink-haired, activist librarians have made it their mission to fill library shelves with anti-American, LGBTQ-friendly, and explicitly sexual content.Maybe you’ve noticed all the displays at your own library celebrating Pride Month or elevating “the environment” to a type of religion. The “Teen Zone” is filled with books like: _Rick_ about a cross-dressing Grandpa, _Melissa_ filled with graphic nudity, and _Darkstalker_ featuring gory violence and domestic abuse.But here’s what’s really alarming.We can’t just sit back and say, “Well, I’ll just make sure my family doesn’t go to “Drag Queen Story Hour” and we won’t check out those inappropriate books.”That may be good for your family – for now.But meanwhile, the ALA uses our taxpayer-funded libraries to lure in millions of other children who grow up to be the very activists who are destroying our country and conservative values! **[**I hope you see why I need your help today to TAKE BACK OUR LIBRARIES.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=90c8a132234341e7a2b0b8d775c4b7e1&_e=6W0j4ROm42izZlKjUQJwsA5SCGECFgyYnQFCfNjPSfm6k-Tjga_L5u-F3hbnxKHHVnTBkUY86G7kqIWo6LS9V85TVT4qirsCR9Un27U7eMbW24Jhj4M3utfMXxmvwjo9OfDifJnZU_3IoR8Um0shOkS8Zr16z_XwEBiQxjjZZxYM5l4D6j4H0Mp3CwJfBq8ccN7jDCMiMIdwkclmkg_55ezeSoXk7QdfieTGjVUoPDYo_AVCRBhQWIq_Xe2-61D_Lhc65w2I_k41_6fV5jKZE2SOn5r3goAsHEUYPaDkk8bHjdDOQhNBxKmKTkIHuupNZ3adIGpYu42XBgdQvObayw5TGSxlMyUQUf-90fNQLXCs6StvYwa3j-GAfiTa9YqXLMNSKs2N3M39uqktHwHWYA%3D%3D)** My name is Kirk Cameron. Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Left Behind.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **Brave Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome Brave Books that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), Brave Books was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking Brave Books how they could host Story Hours of their own.So Brave Books has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries. Now with the guidance of Brave Books, committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.And whenever we can, Brave Books authors like swimmer Riley Gaines, TV personality Missy Robertson, and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And our ambitious goal is to expand our “See You at the Library” movement to reach over 100,000 children in the next year.Which is why we need you! __**[_I hope you’ll be able to give a sponsorship gift of $35, $50, $75, $100, $150 or more today._..](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=90c8a132234341e7a2b0b8d775c4b7e1&_e=6W0j4ROm42izZlKjUQJwsA5SCGECFgyYnQFCfNjPSfm6k-Tjga_L5u-F3hbnxKHHVnTBkUY86G7kqIWo6LS9V85TVT4qirsCR9Un27U7eMbW24Jhj4M3utfMXxmvwjo9OfDifJnZU_3IoR8Um0shOkS8Zr16z_XwEBiQxjjZZxYM5l4D6j4H0Mp3CwJfBq8ccN7jDCMiMIdwkclmkg_55ezeSoXk7QdfieTGjVUoPDaxUx7gSHDKjbeqnIX2gDw5yN55P1akJ3GIt6SFNqmJaE9ASQRyKH0rgMlHjave4tYobsdSw9fIvNevbVrzLUuzvJME5NWn7i_qyGOCuKtXU1iyqcYTQtz6QM1ccPjO-HAWBpCOeYpGW61z5svVWt7UL1jJfdch6bZungSEDglGRA%3D%3D)**Your sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library.The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. Brave Books is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 100,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, **_[_please consider a sponsorship gift of $175._](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=90c8a132234341e7a2b0b8d775c4b7e1&_e=6W0j4ROm42izZlKjUQJwsA5SCGECFgyYnQFCfNjPSfm6k-Tjga_L5u-F3hbnxKHHVnTBkUY86G7kqIWo6LS9V85TVT4qirsCR9Un27U7eMbW24Jhj4M3utfMXxmvwjo9OfDifJnZU_3IoR8Um0shOkS8Zr16z_XwEBiQxjjZZxYM5l4D6j4H0Mp3CwJfBq8ccN7jDCMiMIdwkclmkg_55ezeSoXk7QdfieTGjVUoPDbqpvx6MvdTuLel_1uewIEnJO-Nh7mDkNb8OhpOsDPi0pSlLUY5ySmN2-nkdR-mYe8GshkaVZcC4_y3m39nAMiA2kDqO5b4lryrWUevWWYoH8MhRqrHAXO5gNA5Lxv9bXQ5OTTO8gMTz10ViMnJ2dECGOHf_XhxOHJX0ATP08ZtCw%3D%3D)_** That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. **_[Whatever you can give whether it’s $35, $175, or anything higher or lower will be necessary for the success of the next “Story Hour Kit” to be sent.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=90c8a132234341e7a2b0b8d775c4b7e1&_e=6W0j4ROm42izZlKjUQJwsA5SCGECFgyYnQFCfNjPSfm6k-Tjga_L5u-F3hbnxKHHVnTBkUY86G7kqIWo6LS9V85TVT4qirsCR9Un27U7eMbW24Jhj4M3utfMXxmvwjo9OfDifJnZU_3IoR8Um0shOkS8Zr16z_XwEBiQxjjZZxYM5l4D6j4H0Mp3CwJfBq8ccN7jDCMiMIdwkclmkg_55ezeSoXk7QdfieTGjVUoPDZbkPjgel3fFP6rJ3Toc0ieVHQ9fqllMf8RfNg6aUtP5X_2jxNCJEuHoQpkoLLDRnY9Qj7K-AZQB5SjFOIXUUhsQI7NP3XPaiXszDs1QaK_9ZziDjqJ47zRD5P_h1nL8TLjZctNTtQ4A0JycbXVy90PWrza8nN5TCeichwE3F4V_Q%3D%3D)_**

She would fill your mind with classics like Pat the Bunny and The Little Engine That Could. And eventually you got old enough to roam by yourself and discover adventures like the Three Musketeers , Treasure Island and Charlotte’s Web.But today, all that has changed.The president of the American Library Association (ALA) is a self-described “Marxist lesbian.”Radical librarians call Adventure of Huckleberry Finn and To Kill a Mockingbird “racist.” They’ve stripped Laura Ingalls Wilder’s name from a prestigious book award because of her “problematic” Little House series.And they bring men in wearing full makeup, dresses, and high heels for “Drag Queen Story Hours” where books like these are read to children of all ages... A is for Activist. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me. I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandad, and a Christian.When I saw what book publishers and libraries were doing to indoctrinate children with anti-God, anti-family, anti-America messages, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named Brave Books , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.And then we decided to go one step further and counter those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” with a wholesome Story Hour of our own. Our idea was to read the classic books you and I grew up with plus new wholesome Brave Books that captivate children with lessons in bravery, honesty, kindness, and patriotism.And boy, the ALA and radical librarians didn’t like that one bit.>> Over 50 libraries rejected our request to host our Story Hour. >> The ALA helped local libraries scheme ways to keep us out including booking all the event rooms for themselves.>> Social media blew up with attacks: I was compared to a Nazi (that’s original), Brave Books was accused of trying to “confuse and demoralize children,” our supporters were described as “bored moms/busybodies who need something to feel good about,” and on and on. I can’t even print most things these radicals said because it’s so vile.In the end we got two libraries to reverse course by reminding them that their censorship violated the Constitution of the United States.And thousands of parents and grandparents brought their little ones to those Story Hours where we pledged allegiance to the flag, sang “God Bless America,” and read wholesome and Godly books.It was incredible.But here’s the greatest part...From there, parents and grandparents started asking Brave Books how they could host Story Hours of their own.So Brave Books has organized a nationwide grassroots “See You at the Library” movement to take back our libraries. Now with the guidance of Brave Books, committed conservatives just like you book event rooms at their local library for conservative Story Hours that fill children’s hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God.And whenever we can, Brave Books authors like swimmer Riley Gaines, TV personality Missy Robertson, and myself stand shoulder-to-shoulder with conservative parents, grandparents, and patriots at these Story Hours......for a very simple mission – to reject the Left’s radical ideas and reclaim childhood innocence in America’s libraries.And our ambitious goal is to expand our “See You at the Library” movement to reach over 100,000 children in the next year.Which is why we need you! sponsorship gift will be used to send a “Story Hour Kit” to every parent, grandparent, and patriot who’s organizing an event at their library.The kit includes everything they need to bring your conservative values back into our public libraries: instructions for booking their library space and running their Story Hour, small American flags for the little ones, fun stickers, wholesome books, Bible memory verse cards, and other specialty items. Brave Books is a small Christian company. They don’t have the millions behind them like the giant taxpayer-funded ALA.Your sponsorship gift is the only way we can fund our Story Hours for over 100,000 children to counter the radical leftists who’ve taken control of our libraries. Knowing that, That’s enough to sponsor one entire “Story Hour Kit” yourself. Singlehandedly, you’ll be reaching 50 children with our wholesome, Godly, and patriotic message. Thank you! God Bless You and God Bless America, Kirk Cameron | | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | | ---|---|---

Folks, your support was critical to so many of our accomplishments this year. Thanks to this grassroots team, we kept New Mexico blue and delivered strong wins down the ballot — including reelecting Sen. Martin Heinrich and Rep. Gabe Vasquez to defend our shared New Mexico values. But as we head into the new year and prepare for another Trump Presidency, it’s never been more important to know that you’ll continue to stand with us. We’ll face many new challenges over the coming months and years, and knowing you’re on our side will mean a lot to Martin and the whole team. name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:

| | Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. We must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a8f15f075e534346a2ccb0984ce57563&_e=gPEQyHUWBqF-TQ4L4qI1Vrd-ooHYPYkySwMbVba43Y6-uBySt112bDbvq6g7I1mEErUqe1pWmqJ0MuSUkzj-Ny9gAhPV1Eh1laopgR0vloTJ1-OGYe7rzX67oLahMLJIQWrFPAjZyILrjD-BWNwOKU1T9eCfoWJ1AHcj6EwTnG9trLr7oKIs-94BABcM6W_DnIuUeJF2QrqQakmSpcuZ5VXyv3rxjk7RFV111GgqBew3laZ4HDCnlQOBx2DOcneh875XbrFjqH1_iHA2L6WTzoS-dxgGmsxCx3QP0-GpZaKgVtBkfx-dF__TW5UNu9Xxb1ByJYmu7Ssaw9b60DDrzrgvf4_5JhP7gIFl3hWr53w0Q08RD_I5aNOxWi3JbTHTI1-N-S79fPeBoTyqmf9afraoSHDZOZd9YNMrWUy3c_9RYFMHw9OjT3YDsC9oMVmj)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=a8f15f075e534346a2ccb0984ce57563&_e=gPEQyHUWBqF-TQ4L4qI1Vrd-ooHYPYkySwMbVba43Y6-uBySt112bDbvq6g7I1mEErUqe1pWmqJ0MuSUkzj-Ny9gAhPV1Eh1laopgR0vloTJ1-OGYe7rzX67oLahMLJIQWrFPAjZyILrjD-BWNwOKU1T9eCfoWJ1AHcj6EwTnG9trLr7oKIs-94BABcM6W_DnIuUeJF2QrqQakmSpcuZ5VXyv3rxjk7RFV111GgqBew3laZ4HDCnlQOBx2DOcneh875XbrFjqH1_iHA2L6WTzlCGNlTVKFjo-XBrhlWDl52T1ozhrSsSB3I7-1wAj3z-vlQUz5tuBTgOrYq1h_nD6df-oGWAuEKJSEoiayBAGRzdC7dKeXfsOaSWyiLc--PTQyykcbLFkKsIBF9iWQYCT66sLUnCvuXx4gPDeNN74MR1k1WsVYqfbu2CDJhQAKX-) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.

name: Michael Bennet
subject: I hear you.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_121924_postelectionsurvey_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_121924_postelectionsurvey_act]
Hi team,
A few weeks ago, my team sent you our post-election survey. We wanted to understand what people were thinking and feeling, after the November election.
Thank you to everyone who generously shared their thoughts. It is invaluable to us. My team and I have been spending time reading through your responses and learning from what you have to say.
Many of you are disappointed and angry with the results of the election. Several of you expressed fear about what the next four years mean for our future.
I hear you, friends. Beyond your fear and anger, I also heard something else. Energy and determination.
It’s clear that many of you are eager to channel your emotions into action — and I'll be with you every step of the way.
We will need to work together to resist President Trump’s worst impulses and protect the progress we’ve made for Coloradans.
In our survey, we also asked about the issues most important to you. You all named climate change, reproductive freedom, affordable healthcare, immigration reform, and protecting our public lands as top priorities.
These are my top priorities too.
To make progress on these issue and many others, I’m ready to work in good faith at every opportunity and stand our ground whenever necessary.
For the fight ahead, I’m going to need you by my side every step of the way. If you are ready to join us, we could use you on the team >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_121924_postelectionsurvey_act]
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_121924_postelectionsurvey_act&amount=5] DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/embutton?refcode=X_121924_postelectionsurvey_act&amount=25]

Let’s roll up our sleeves and rise to the task at hand.
Thanks,
Michael Bennet

name: Greisa, United We Dream
subject: United We Dream is leaving Twitter/X.
body:
💪 We’ll keep fighting for our communities — where to find us: | | |
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.v2UrIOJHHKkg0Pk-aGvhyzCKAdQv6ANAIbZ_2K5v_dApjFj9324YihWhmIoPxrX6NmEXIuPa_7Ka1Wm4ihMN36EP0pVp3s8epNtJDVMYIBLmvKlOt2B4CRA5pKd9C_CZHZEds0MSuRo1ZdCuu2FMCNwOQpvJ4tHIjDHLtC6-K4atCeqvIzDV1lrEj9Wum4OeQEfYqtYz5CT8bjQAu-mRP5MbqVTbyYvrFQc4LRZp0applXrzq5LsXuw2kOBm6dt7FCfeGLX1VgqRGERa59k-JdC-epqZprckVUIMQtFb7NHTDQXBZHaGzdoD2CUeo5tBBnUESGvkrP0X4fXBu213Yw/4cf/Jkcn1bMRRFaAk84owccPVA/h0/h001.m1q9j4xueU2JF8jVru276XODanjWYLwPYLikunfV9PE) Hey Peter, I’m Greisa, the Executive Director at United We Dream. I wanted you to be the first to hear about a major decision our team has made: **United We Dream will be leaving X, formerly Twitter, by the end of 2024.** As the largest immigrant youth-led network in the country, we’re committed to empowering young people to get in the driver’s seat and make their voices heard! **It’s no secret that over the past two years, X has turned into an echo chamber of misinformation, anti-immigrant hate, and a propaganda machine to spread authoritarian ideas that go against our fight for liberation for all.** This wasn’t an easy decision to make. But the fact is that X is currently rigged and built to oppose the work we do. The platform and tool that we used to organize our communities — and where we were able to reach over 120,000 followers like you over the past decade — no longer exists. Now, in its place, is a digital platform that, by design, acts as a megaphone to amplify bad actors who want to harm our communities. 😡 **As organizers, our goal has been and always will be to show up for our communities, to reach our people where they are, and to fight for a safer, inclusive world for all.** X no longer serves the needs of our communities and continuously tries to suppress voices fighting for justice. **While some in our communities might continue to use the platform, we strongly urge you and our progressive allies to leave the platform with us.** Together, we turned Twitter/X into a powerful space for organizing — where we shared the lived experiences of our communities and delivered resources to our loved ones when they needed it most. **No matter what, we will bring this creativity anywhere else we go. People did not follow us on Twitter/X because of the platform, they followed us because of our vision.** We’ll keep fighting for the future we need — one where we can all live in safety and dignity!**Find us across our other social media platforms to continue getting the latest calls to action, DACA updates, and more:** **[On Bluesky](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.jTd4CJP2oHMhBHdrjS9uuqqbWgahNQJNOLkWs71YUznZELa8ZICU4q3LLbV88t1g3YZoo7-u5PD0M-Djmn9qK6JxUw9g8pQk8hekFPl-we66bxA9Aq8Piry-XX_RUUO0_GYa5fWsFdRE5414leg7pJQE2fZxpcyNjFtWw7nGBnlvy93ce138o2qPD8Ls2pSDrrtRMlvrH-IqYrkStt0rZ90n5X5mZX3RgnhW2lURkReL8ghjfsSgESSJqwpYv7p6XCnL7NSU_6peczCaC8-cGOZNxNzYFrsn6uGjoXPiSC_P3mIOZU0OCR9Xh7ObMrIj/4cf/Jkcn1bMRRFaAk84owccPVA/h1/h001.aPxDPAacQmMj_T9hMZ-UhfupUPus_H48uXYDeHKtFzM)** clean_body: 💪 We’ll keep fighting for our communities — where to find us: | | | Hey Peter, I’m Greisa, the Executive Director at United We Dream. I wanted you to be the first to hear about a major decision our team has made: United We Dream will be leaving X, formerly Twitter, by the end of 2024. As the largest immigrant youth-led network in the country, we’re committed to empowering young people to get in the driver’s seat and make their voices heard! It’s no secret that over the past two years, X has turned into an echo chamber of misinformation, anti-immigrant hate, and a propaganda machine to spread authoritarian ideas that go against our fight for liberation for all. This wasn’t an easy decision to make. But the fact is that X is currently rigged and built to oppose the work we do. The platform and tool that we used to organize our communities — and where we were able to reach over 120,000 followers like you over the past decade — no longer exists. Now, in its place, is a digital platform that, by design, acts as a megaphone to amplify bad actors who want to harm our communities. 😡 As organizers, our goal has been and always will be to show up for our communities, to reach our people where they are, and to fight for a safer, inclusive world for all. X no longer serves the needs of our communities and continuously tries to suppress voices fighting for justice. While some in our communities might continue to use the platform, we strongly urge you and our progressive allies to leave the platform with us. Together, we turned Twitter/X into a powerful space for organizing — where we shared the lived experiences of our communities and delivered resources to our loved ones when they needed it most. No matter what, we will bring this creativity anywhere else we go. People did not follow us on Twitter/X because of the platform, they followed us because of our vision. We’ll keep fighting for the future we need — one where we can all live in safety and dignity!Find us across our other social media platforms to continue getting the latest calls to action, DACA updates, and more: In power, Greisa and the United We Dream team P.S: | Follow us on: | | | | |

name: Hillsdale College via Red Conservatives
subject: A new birth of freedom
body:
Our nation is at a crossroads. Patriotic Americans have an opportunity in 2025 to take fundamental steps...

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=97c067b2aa6a4510944e93c74947977c&_t=vxMY77s-cgdlq1j9scPrpFvDyrD4r-_9SQjiiLSjZc6YcbXjOiRxKSdgFTwK0IxMv5FkD7njC-z70lHyj3td_LKkgstyY0_By70bFWV7wa7TxVRi9nM_w0DGJTi538kP)_
---
[](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=97c067b2aa6a4510944e93c74947977c&_e=lSS5lGjfFUwYhdFl7r9cY9VWlQb_Cdd_XeNy2XrKYwc5ch1DkG43lmfQzgLIuAT2rHO4XZIR_PsSHTqmVa_H1wXz_9N_-o3Hn4UXo4gW3jbeGMzjxb0VN1rRdJxr1svMfVi98ks6Q1lysIxZjvpGYM7-NB5pE5dUwE6HiTzGl15UyJADtKn0SVwSkE2b3IJvx7U8zj_Yu5JV6uDWhJ7ExCN0m_DUE4bnyfXTZ3fb2zqIic_w10hs5rNqNyrXEcIHpxJkDJo1844aMolGOQ-5Pzx6SYUKvIlmdQcfvWgjR94w_EwaVQsVJkMO3UXG8Z7Wh_gsptxrAu4LuRJ2mfOdaIYUnrOypY-u3Ga2JxJ02OBQpGCGOaNieCFVf-KuGgaO)
| |
Dear Friend,

Our nation is at a crossroads. Patriotic Americans have an opportunity in 2025 to take fundamental steps in the direction of reviving and preserving liberty and free government.

It is imperative to make the most of this opportunity in order to pass on the blessings of the American way of life to future generations.

As you may know, Hillsdale College is the only educational institution in the country that is in a strong position to reach and teach millions of Americans about America's founding principles and its great heritage of liberty. And we are expanding our efforts to do just that.

To press forward with our educational mission on behalf of liberty during a critical time for America, we have set an ambitious goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31 to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education** in 2025.

[Will you partner with us in defending the cause of liberty and free government nationwide through education with your year-end support and make a generous gift to Hillsdale College today?](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=97c067b2aa6a4510944e93c74947977c&_e=lSS5lGjfFUwYhdFl7r9cY9VWlQb_Cdd_XeNy2XrKYwc5ch1DkG43lmfQzgLIuAT2rHO4XZIR_PsSHTqmVa_H1wXz_9N_-o3Hn4UXo4gW3jbeGMzjxb0VN1rRdJxr1svMfVi98ks6Q1lysIxZjvpGYM7-NB5pE5dUwE6HiTzGl15UyJADtKn0SVwSkE2b3IJvx7U8zj_Yu5JV6uDWhJ7ExCN0m_DUE4bnyfXTZ3fb2zrmWSBuTbPxht3Ya2biQEH2wzXb95v97ry0_KsQQLN9nAC4FtrFHiEx6ZpkKAQSpkxm2w6dW5Az4m7yJoFADn9kmsnAIvm37sHERU1eAEyE10KkzMvLTOLjN-kCMssWtGY7EQXua4QlMHLJfq_AbRtJ)

What all of us do today will have significant consequences for the survival of the American way of life. We have the opportunity to make 2025 a year that future American patriots will look back on with gratitude.

Make no mistake. Powerful forces who seek to undermine our way of life--not only socialist politicians but also the legacy media, the entertainment industry, and Big Tech--will be working tirelessly to undermine liberty and free government, including in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.

Indeed, successfully engaging the Left on the battleground of American education is of fundamental importance if we are to revive and preserve liberty for future generations.

But success will require the faithful and generous support of patriotic Americans like you--citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty in a free republic. [That's why we're asking for your year-end support to continue and expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=97c067b2aa6a4510944e93c74947977c&_e=lSS5lGjfFUwYhdFl7r9cY9VWlQb_Cdd_XeNy2XrKYwc5ch1DkG43lmfQzgLIuAT2rHO4XZIR_PsSHTqmVa_H1wXz_9N_-o3Hn4UXo4gW3jbeGMzjxb0VN1rRdJxr1svMfVi98ks6Q1lysIxZjvpGYM7-NB5pE5dUwE6HiTzGl15UyJADtKn0SVwSkE2b3IJvx7U8zj_Yu5JV6uDWhJ7ExCN0m_DUE4bnyfXTZ3fb2zp0C_e7smzqGxmRXYjAM1Gk5Ou3Gkp2F2Mvq7vvjFj3q_O3S28IlLXbsAXWonM8oCn1Yj0AS3iXRi5fs98_ylcGJcE06A-bsDvSUgu1Qx8GFO7htaCDw5FHc6QroLQSiKeyhGGVn8rIRtc1YcN_eYnD)

**We must do all that we possibly can.**

With the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's educational mission, we are determined to redouble our efforts at this critical time for our nation.

You will help us to ...

* **Reach an additional 600,000 American households and businesses with _Imprimis_ , our monthly digest of liberty.** With your support, we plan to increase the circulation of _Imprimis_ to more than 7 million households and businesses in 2025.
* **Teach citizens nationwide, especially younger Americans, through our FREE online courses.** Your donation will help us to create new online courses and add 900,000 new students in 2025.
* **Restore excellence to American K-12 education.** Your faithful generosity will help us to launch and guide increasing numbers of classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Reading and watching the news reminds us every day that our work is far from finished. America remains deeply divided. The gains we've made on behalf of liberty in recent years are fragile.

**With your help, we will succeed --because we must succeed for our country!**

Hillsdale College **conducts its educational outreach efforts** --as it does all its work--while refusing to accept **one penny** of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

To meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we will need thousands of gifts between **$25** and **$100**. Most of our supporters' contributions are in this range.

We will also need a significant number of **$500** to **$1,000** donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated.

Since we have less than a month remaining to fund this project for 2025, we urgently need your help.

**You can safely and securely renew your support using this link:[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](http://links.redconservatives.com/u/click?_t=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_m=97c067b2aa6a4510944e93c74947977c&_e=lSS5lGjfFUwYhdFl7r9cY9VWlQb_Cdd_XeNy2XrKYwc5ch1DkG43lmfQzgLIuAT2rHO4XZIR_PsSHTqmVa_H1wXz_9N_-o3Hn4UXo4gW3jbeGMzjxb0VN1rRdJxr1svMfVi98ks6Q1lysIxZjvpGYM7-NB5pE5dUwE6HiTzGl15UyJADtKn0SVwSkE2b3IJvx7U8zj_Yu5JV6uDWhJ7ExCN0m_DUE4bnyfXTZ3fb2zpIboVFkJb35oyC5Ud2mLPxQX6eTr4KFEbalT2n_MfCiG4is2xLeM3_uYBbHBZf4a2CjVf2yYIIqbBkDKLltBAnkZj3TMA-v0Yc9yNpcDGLNXAo04d6mszIjV5mRwaq25ei4cvfJuqMoW0nK7zAqNEm)**

It is not an exaggeration to say that the future of American liberty and the American way of life depends on the efforts of patriotic Americans over the next few years.

That's why I hope you'll make your most generous year-end gift to Hillsdale College before the **December 31** deadline.

Every dollar you give will get us closer to our **$6,000,000** online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.

Please partner with Hillsdale College to make 2025 a significant turning point in the revival and preservation of the American way of life.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 [Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=97c067b2aa6a4510944e93c74947977c&_t=vxMY77s-cgdlq1j9scPrpFvDyrD4r-_9SQjiiLSjZc6YcbXjOiRxKSdgFTwK0IxMv5FkD7njC-z70lHyj3td_Oc5BdKMg7GzpniD4YaeULk5AnGkT1BX5KSMa4haSoj_yOQwatD29VlNeOlMUGu6IuAXvJ5Nm5cAb8mxS5mXMuo%3D)

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.redconservatives.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=66ce1250519441959ebe70cf27686494&_s=97c067b2aa6a4510944e93c74947977c&_t=vxMY77s-cgdlq1j9scPrpFvDyrD4r-_9SQjiiLSjZc6YcbXjOiRxKSdgFTwK0IxMv5FkD7njC-z70lHyj3td_LKkgstyY0_By70bFWV7wa7TxVRi9nM_w0DGJTi538kP).
---

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Medicare for All is the solution, but it needs more support in Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Public outrage over private insurance companies and our broken, for-profit
healthcare system is currently at a high — and we can understand why.

The United States is the only high-income country in the world without
universal healthcare. To make matters worse, we spend more than most
countries on healthcare, yet our health outcomes like life expectancy and
infant mortality rate are worse.

People are sick and tired of arguing with insurance companies to cover the
care they need, waiting months on end to see providers, and ending up in
heaps of medical debt while insurers, hospitals, and Big Pharma rake in
historic profits. A new poll backs this up:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241219?refcode=em20241219-36245&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36245_1203867_wDAq7q&akid=36245%2E1203867%2EwDAq7q ]Tweet from More Perfect Union: Sixty-two percent of U.S. adults, the
highest percentage in over a decade, say it’s the federal government’s
responsibility to ensure all Americans have healthcare coverage, according
to new Gallup polling.

It’s clear: our country is long overdue for a universal, single-payer
healthcare system that guarantees care and coverage for everyone,
regardless of their income level — which would be created through Medicare
for All.

Justice Democrats’ Rep. Pramila Jayapal is a cosponsor of the Medicare for
All bill in Congress, and every one of our members supports it. But with
corporate Democrats abandoning their commitment to Medicare for All over
the past few years, we need to elect more working-class, progressives to
Congress if we’re going to have enough MFA champions to pass it into law!

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241219?refcode=em20241219-36245&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36245_1203867_wDAq7q&akid=36245%2E1203867%2EwDAq7q ]We’re recruiting candidates to run for Congress and challenge the
Democratic establishment in 2026: help us find and support them with a
grassroots donation of $5 or more now.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20241219?refcode=em20241219-36245&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36245_1203867_wDAq7q&akid=36245%2E1203867%2EwDAq7q ]Contribute $5

Too many Democrats in power take campaign contributions from the
healthcare industry and its lobbyists. We need to change that if we’re
going to pass Medicare for All, transform our broken system, and finally
achieve healthcare justice in the United States.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20241219-36245-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36245_1203867_wDAq7q&akid=36245%2E1203867%2EwDAq7q

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36245%2E1203867%2EwDAq7q

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: How we got here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|
---
Hey Peter, It’s been just over a month since election night now, and while many people are trying to put politics out of their minds and getting ready to ring in the new year, **my team and I are hard at work.** We’re building a young, diverse, hard-working team that reflects the community we serve. Peter, we know that the Trump Administration and the right-wing majorities in the House and Senate will work to enact harmful policies that will hurt our economy and our climate and will target marginalized groups and our labor movement. But that’s why we’re preparing an agenda that will allow us to hit the ground running on day one. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98968067/518417686/-988752728?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20241219_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTE0ZGUzMS0zM2JlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EvvJz_vVL2ZfXJl4z7odrinwspyTjhwVqheWyrB7usc=) I recently wrapped up an incredible 48 hours in Boston learning from experts on issues from our economy to the youth vote alongside other Democratic and Republican incoming freshman Congressmembers. And I’ve also been tasked to lead Democrats’ coalition of freshman members in the 119th Congress, creating opportunities for my colleagues to connect and engage with one another. Our party needs young voices that are ready to lead, and I’m committed to helping our party build our grassroots infrastructure in the coming years to take back the House in 2026. [**We’ve got a plan of action, and we’re ready to fight for the people of Arizona’s 3rd District. If you’re with us, will you make a grassroots contribution to support our team before our final deadline of 2024?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98968070/518417689/-988752728?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20241219_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTE0ZGUzMS0zM2JlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EvvJz_vVL2ZfXJl4z7odrinwspyTjhwVqheWyrB7usc=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98968073/518417692/-988752728?express=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20241219_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTE0ZGUzMS0zM2JlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EvvJz_vVL2ZfXJl4z7odrinwspyTjhwVqheWyrB7usc=)

I'm outraged. You should be, too.
Days before Christmas, our military men and women are facing the prospect of a [government shutdown](https://substack.com/redirect/76fe44c6-3fae-48bc-a3e0-ec35c756b73d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). They will be required to show up for duty, but won't be paid until the government is fully funded again, likely after January 20, 2025.
The same party that insists I call out "Merry Christmas" (instead of "Happy Holidays") is now delivering coal and ashes to our enlisted troops, and all who work in the federal government. Of course, contractors who are not directly employed by the military will soon feel the impact as well.
In the Fort Drum area alone, we're talking about a direct impact on tens of thousands of people. And then there will be the fallout felt throughout the community in the surrounding region as people are not able to shop and enjoy entertainment in the area. This is from the website, _[Military Installations](https://substack.com/redirect/28234778-3f9a-48ec-afaa-917fc2474ce0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ :
> Population:
> * More than 15,000 Military Service Members
> * 18,613 Family members
> * 3,700 Civilians
> * More than 3,000 Military Retirees
>

> Watertown, NY: 24,575 Jefferson County: 116,295
And that's just Ft. Drum. Remember we also have large numbers of military contractors in the Oneida County area at the former Griffess Business and Technology Center, and the Air Force Research Laboratory in Rome.
In other words, the impact of the government shut down will have a profound ripple effect throughout NY's 21st Congressional District.
The impact won't be fully felt until the first week of January, when paychecks would normally be sent out. That cuts the enthusiasm for the 4.5% pay increase that was supposed to be in paychecks for active duty men and women starting in 2025. (Remember that the original House proposal was to give a [19.5% pay increase](https://substack.com/redirect/544102ea-ae20-4e3f-9199-3416fc635fee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to junior enlisted troops. More pay increases are supposedly in the works, but the new administration may not approve them.)
For now, organizations such as the [American Federation of Government Employees (AFGE)](https://substack.com/redirect/f4d6115b-1c8b-4e37-96db-c39dc3a492af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) are speaking with their members and doing their best to keep them informed.
Withholding pay for any group of employees is awful. Withholding pay from our military men and women is especially egregious. And what words could adequately describe the cruelty of dropping this on our troops mere days before the holidays?
The public needs to be very aware that the decisions they made just weeks ago in the November 2024 election have quick and powerful impact on our nation's military.
MAGA candidates who ran on a platform of being pro-military need to be called out for this egregious offense to our federal employees.
Tell your neighbors. Tell your friends and family. We have an opportunity to get better representation for Ft. Drum and throughout the congressional district if and when a Special Election is called. When that happens, I remain hopeful that the local party leaders of the Democratic Party will choose me to run on the ballot line.
For now, you can learn more about me at [www.paulacollinsforcongress.com. ](https://substack.com/redirect/6d8cfdc0-5c1a-4328-9917-47b0ffb8ff7d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
_If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democratic and Working Families Party Candidate who ran in New York's 21st Congressional District. I hope to run in the Special Election in 2025. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. _
[Pledge your support](https://substack..NvltPRISNw78ev-_FGqSX5ixpnjaMzK4rde-tjKCPwI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=153374823)

* * *
Amazon's two-day Prime delivery promise has a shocking twist: your zip code might disqualify you without your knowledge! While still charging millions of dollars for memberships that promise the shipping benefit, Amazon secretly excluded customers in certain zip codes, disproportionately affecting historically underserved communities. **The DC Attorney General has filed a lawsuit, alleging that Amazon covertly cut off Prime delivery to some predominantly Black neighborhoods in the District of Columbia.** **[Friend, has this happened in your state? Sign on and tell your Attorney General to investigate Amazon for this discriminating practice!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39V-ksHE6hqSxBoII33NDxFMgBuxp1Ky0OR2uMUGuAEXRZL13dZsGXNeCP1ts094WHx37oIW-CnPvmdfVyGCIHtkMqNPx1JzLk4gtf2jBqY8g8iPBljYFyxpjnob7-ZpU0bFfxSh5YYUpizjkbQVe2QJ5MWT_Fa2RV8IGb5wZKv1JmMV7QbWkh4QZfpYorx9_LyszdLY6umXqyuoqRQ2r2dCT6RbSVgVrpZLqzc_YYVa0voxH_ZEBzvlj2fWzJABH5c98Hz-Ou7GO3ulPb0rWyP-hpCdEIQQ-TvTxBxVqs01tGehJEljFcT2QPXEPnq-KQkI7c3VOHvuihouCg3LWS8RvyHb2bY1YdoQHaYiPbTrK5kqhW2GhRJ7HMtEvkJ0ojHFN-bQnNATS_sInPdb41BScpu0-DB6jgfIiIP6eervtGWN9fFd-Mizmzid-ZcHarTIdA8K2XiOy1O7-0p65qYO09sTSg40qoUmELLzIuFqG8-EzBnIftqy1TqHVYxOu3qNFkQwilaqGCopFpQKNrZ6zG-ZDmf8I43dGUiEUjEFKcQc6ujCD-0z62kMMoN6qc/4cf/TX6zXnQ1SVeYYbJF8WmnhQ/h2/h001.iHHWYzf-vqtfEkx1EB_RTxoWolD0EsswB6LvxOkhBgo)** **** | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39V-ksHE6hqSxBoII33NDxFMgBuxp1Ky0OR2uMUGuAEXRZL13dZsGXNeCP1ts094WHx37oIW-CnPvmdfVyGCIHtkMqNPx1JzLk4gtf2jBqY8g8iPBljYFyxpjnob7-ZpU0bFfxSh5YYUpizjkbQVe2QJ5MWT_Fa2RV8IGb5wZKv1JmMV7QbWkh4QZfpYorx9_LyszdLY6umXqyuoqRQ2r2dCT6RbSVgVrpZLqzc_YYVa0voxH_ZEBzvlj2fWzJABH5c98Hz-Ou7GO3ulPb0rWyPnCTz8IRPAnNP62EQNoT2bmzW1A1MSA3xVLNREu5CvbNfE3WRdmR3Gg81nEfLJ7OWCqwlq_2vQ8mvgpxzFgg-G_LGCJdtrBZS9wPt3i90ZiVIMGE7vlr9RwL1WZNR8-30syo3ivuJL2ZZG1g19xc1PMtTZVqTyRQ2dfHFOSl_8cAJgNEQuI7uwzl-8m81MqQVfnOdbA-eqoej7KlKv0Z4iQzJDgD6laihb6qXy8pDLggE8ChC-nMiNB40zL1XdyHftr3IqYjYjfccTLfcBPe-wchLV7v2dzkouDRiiT-WcWw/4cf/TX6zXnQ1SVeYYbJF8WmnhQ/h3/h001.Ndm9IsoRc5fIxq2_r6RceDN0735sLojwicJ4e72m4f8)

****
These communities, already grappling with systemic inequities, have seen their two-day delivery rates plummet from over 72% to a mere 24%. Yet, residents continue to pay the same $139 annual fee as everyone else.
This isn't a new issue—similar disparities were uncovered in 2016, and Amazon promised reforms. Here we are again, with certain zip codes left behind!
**It’s time to demand accountability! Every state’s Attorney General must investigate Amazon’s delivery policies. If they find evidence of bias and deception, they should file lawsuits just like DC has done.**
**[Sign the petition now and urge your Attorney General to investigate Amazon’s “Discriminatory and Deceptive” practices targeting Black neighborhoods!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39V-ksHE6hqSxBoII33NDxFMgBuxp1Ky0OR2uMUGuAEXRZL13dZsGXNeCP1ts094WHx37oIW-CnPvmdfVyGCIHtkMqNPx1JzLk4gtf2jBqY8g8iPBljYFyxpjnob7-ZpU0bFfxSh5YYUpizjkbQVe2QJ5MWT_Fa2RV8IGb5wZKv1JmMV7QbWkh4QZfpYorx9_LyszdLY6umXqyuoqRQ2r2dCT6RbSVgVrpZLqzc_YYVa0voxH_ZEBzvlj2fWzJABH5c98Hz-Ou7GO3ulPb0rWyPGH5gz8Yjdp2gpNV0b5CYUmugxT-nSWypRjl-eCRoo6FOZg6d7MOvkJf0rNN9DGeU5FoD-C8xAxOeFbm1s7jHntOC68iZOgYclWIAz_26PKKlEpHLz74UIKbIsCVQfYmNXtBA7jw0Jl3jeiODJ2NhgImX9cH3fHkuAsETieSBzcL3JIlHVrEoQb5sgLPKLWUq_UpPi0eA_Z6k5n7_TgAIsWuohPPohXq4TrM5gMtpEYvowtkdUDGZD6y_jFYvwsChDFg5oi-JCIGzttnp15XNvQC6nocL9e9nt16uGLk3TLQ/4cf/TX6zXnQ1SVeYYbJF8WmnhQ/h4/h001.Mmg_U513dn9q4umNHiW_R9ISsn33geR6kg4ctUvYjLc)**
We need transparency, fairness, and justice for all communities.

clean_body: | | | Amazon's two-day Prime delivery promise has a shocking twist: your zip code might disqualify you without your knowledge! While still charging millions of dollars for memberships that promise the shipping benefit, Amazon secretly excluded customers in certain zip codes, disproportionately affecting historically underserved communities. The DC Attorney General has filed a lawsuit, alleging that Amazon covertly cut off Prime delivery to some predominantly Black neighborhoods in the District of Columbia. | These communities, already grappling with systemic inequities, have seen their two-day delivery rates plummet from over 72% to a mere 24%. Yet, residents continue to pay the same $139 annual fee as everyone else. This isn't a new issue—similar disparities were uncovered in 2016, and Amazon promised reforms. Here we are again, with certain zip codes left behind! It’s time to demand accountability! Every state’s Attorney General must investigate Amazon’s delivery policies. If they find evidence of bias and deception, they should file lawsuits just like DC has done. ** We need transparency, fairness, and justice for all communities. -Cedar Key Progress Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. subject: The New York Sun is Different
body:
It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.
And we need you to join us.

# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Reader In over sixty years in the legal profession, I’ve experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today’s media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It’s a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun’s deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don’t agree with everything that can be found in the Sun’s pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I’ve been impressed by the Sun’s growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun’s success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don’t wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

name: Rushern Baker III
subject: It’s Time to Restore Stability in Prince George’s County
body:
In uncertain times, we deserve leadership we can trust. That’s why I’ve decided to run for Prince George’s County Executive, again. | | | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=676463b429079969a87cadcc&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.rushernbaker.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D67640ce5d426082e7b82473f%26ss_email_id%3D676463b429079969a87cadcc%26ss_campaign_name%3DIt%25E2%2580%2599s%2BTime%2Bto%2BRestore%2BStability%2Bin%2BPrince%2BGeorge%25E2%2580%2599s%2BCounty%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-12-19T18%253A19%253A33Z&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_67640ce5d426082e7b82473f&l=en-US&s=tjG0oOc1UcMyCdydtIXR4i45GCM%3D)
---
| | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=676463b429079969a87cadcc&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Frushern-baker-iii-1&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_67640ce5d426082e7b82473f&l=en-US&s=XpylEfibSQdsEw62ddmz--tfZ2Q%3D)
---
**My friends,**[**I’m thrilled to share some exciting news: today, I officially filed to run for County Executive of Prince George’s County at the Board of Elections.**](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=676463b429079969a87cadcc&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Frushern-baker-iii-1&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_67640ce5d426082e7b82473f&l=en-US&s=XpylEfibSQdsEw62ddmz--tfZ2Q%3D) This marks the start of an incredible journey to lead our community toward a brighter, stronger future.But now, I need your help. To build a winning campaign, we must reach our critical fundraising goal of $100,000 [**immediately**](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=676463b429079969a87cadcc&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Frushern-baker-iii-1&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_67640ce5d426082e7b82473f&l=en-US&s=XpylEfibSQdsEw62ddmz--tfZ2Q%3D)**.** Yesterday, thanks to the generosity of supporters like you, we raised nearly $25,000 in just one day! That momentum has brought us within striking distance of our goal — we’re now just [**$27,360 away**](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=676463b429079969a87cadcc&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Frushern-baker-iii-1&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_67640ce5d426082e7b82473f&l=en-US&s=XpylEfibSQdsEw62ddmz--tfZ2Q%3D)**.** With the holiday season upon us, there’s no better time to invest in the future of Prince George’s County. Your support today will fuel our efforts to engage voters, share our vision, and deliver results for every family in our community.[**Can I count on you to contribute $25, $250, or even $2,500 today?**](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=676463b429079969a87cadcc&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Frushern-baker-iii-1&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_67640ce5d426082e7b82473f&l=en-US&s=XpylEfibSQdsEw62ddmz--tfZ2Q%3D) Every dollar makes a difference. Together, we can ensure that our campaign has the resources to hit the ground running and fight for the progress our county deserves.As we celebrate this festive season, let’s come together to give Prince George’s County the gift of visionary leadership. Your contribution is a powerful statement of your commitment to our shared future.
---
[_ _**DONATE NOW** _ _](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=676463b429079969a87cadcc&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Frushern-baker-iii-1&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_67640ce5d426082e7b82473f&l=en-US&s=XpylEfibSQdsEw62ddmz--tfZ2Q%3D)
---
Thank you for your support and belief in my leadership.Wishing you and your loved ones a joyful holiday season and a prosperous New Year!Warm regards,
---
|
---
**Rushern L. Baker III**
Candidate for County Executive[P.S. Let’s carry this momentum into the new year and hit our $100,000 goal! Your contribution of **$25, $250, or $2,500** today will bring us closer to victory.](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=676463b429079969a87cadcc&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Frushern-baker-iii-1&w=621a637cd079466c7b27a083&c=b_67640ce5d426082e7b82473f&l=en-US&s=XpylEfibSQdsEw62ddmz--tfZ2Q%3D)

name: Blake Gendebien
subject: I’m a dairy farmer, not a career politician
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
The North Country doesn’t need another career politician who isn’t even from our district and is just using us to further their political ambitions.

| Peter,

**I’m not a career politician. I’m a dairy farmer.**

I know what it’s like to get up for work at 3:30 am, trudge through feet of snow to feed my herd, and make difficult decisions to keep my farm afloat while providing for my family and employees. That’s exactly why I decided to run for Elise Stefanik’s seat and why I’m asking for your support today.

[_**This is the closest House majority ever, so this race presents a real opportunity—and the work we do in the early days of the campaign will play a vital role in our success. body:
In 2023, the Colorado Supreme Court ruled that Donald Trump was ineligible to run for President. Peter,
In 2023, the Colorado Supreme Court ruled that Donald Trump was ineligible to run for President.

It was a landmark decision — an attempt to hold Trump accountable for his dangerous and anti-democratic actions. But now, one year later, despite everything, Donald Trump has regained control of the White House.

Peter, let’s be clear: Donald Trump has made it crystal clear he will stop at nothing to erode our democracy for his own personal and political gain. Now, the same Republican Party that claims to be the party of “law and order” has completely surrendered to his MAGA extremism, **proudly rallying behind a convicted felon.**

Together, they’re working to roll back our rights, undermine free and fair elections, and push a dangerous agenda that puts their political power above the needs of everyday Americans. Wesley has dedicated his career to fighting for justice, accountability, and common sense, and in Congress, he’ll always vote against Donald Trump’s dangerous agenda – _but he can’t fight back alone._

It was a landmark decision — an attempt to hold Trump accountable for his dangerous and anti-democratic actions. But now, one year later, despite everything, Donald Trump has regained control of the White House. Peter, let’s be clear: Donald Trump has made it crystal clear he will stop at nothing to erode our democracy for his own personal and political gain. Now, the same Republican Party that claims to be the party of “law and order” has completely surrendered to his MAGA extremism, proudly rallying behind a convicted felon. Together, they’re working to roll back our rights, undermine free and fair elections, and push a dangerous agenda that puts their political power above the needs of everyday Americans. Wesley has dedicated his career to fighting for justice, accountability, and common sense, and in Congress, he’ll always vote against Donald Trump’s dangerous agenda – but he can’t fight back alone. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Team Bell = PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI PO Box 190669, ST LOUIS, MO 63119

Happy Holidays, Peter! I hope you enjoy the opportunity to slow down, reflect, and celebrate what matters most this holiday season.
This year, I’ve been reminded time and again of the strength, resilience, and generosity of my constituents & of Tennesseans across the state. Your trust and support mean the world to me, and I couldn’t be more grateful for the opportunity to continue serving Tennessee in our legislature.
Together, we’ve stood strong to protect our Democratic seats this year, and I know we’ll keep moving forward—side by side—with hope, determination, and a shared vision for a brighter future in Tennessee.
Wishing you a wonderful holiday season and a happy new year!
Sen. Heidi Campbell

name: Team Squad Victory Fund
subject: It’s not just a policy — it's a point of pride
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20241219-1156-foote&t=1001&akid=1156%2E342411%2EqF9fpm ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

If you’ve been reading our emails for some time, you’ve probably noticed a
message that appears at the bottom of each one. It says that we won’t take
a cent from corporate PACs, lobbyists, and other bad actors who think they
can buy our democracy.

This isn’t just a policy — it’s a point of pride. It’s part of what makes
the Squad so special.

There’s an enormous amount of money flowing into politics these days —
money from big corporations, shady PACs, and wealthy donors who want to
control the system. And they would love nothing more than to silence the
voices of those who fight for justice, equality, and progress. But the
Squad refuses to be part of that system.

Our Squad isn’t beholden to special interests and they don't take
corporate PAC contributions. Alexandria, Ayanna, Rashida, and Ilhan are
all in Congress to show up for working families, everyday people, and the
communities who have too long been left behind by the establishment.

But the reality is, our Squad needs our help to keep pushing forward.
Powerful, far-right forces want to send us back. But our grassroots
people-power has proven time and again that we can withstand the
far-right’s financial influence and win long-standing victories for
working families.

As we head into 2025, it’s more important than ever that we stand unified
and prepared. That’s why we’re asking you today to consider making a
donation to ensure they can keep working for all of our communities in
Congress.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20241219-movement.9DQ9Vw&refcode=em20241219-1156&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1156%2E342411%2EqF9fpm ]Please consider chipping in a donation of $5 or more to ensure that we
can protect our Squad as we head into 2025.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20241219-movement.9DQ9Vw&refcode=em20241219-1156&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1156%2E342411%2EqF9fpm ]Contribute ››

It’s an honor to be in this fight with you. Thank you for being a part of
our movement.

Together,

The Squad

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1156%2E342411%2EqF9fpm

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Cori Bush for Congress, and Bowman for Congress.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Cori Bush for Congress, Politivist PAC, Jamaal Bowman for Congress, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Cori Bush for Congress, and Jamaal Bowman for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

Sen. Kirsten Gillibrand calls for the immediate certification of the Equal Rights Amendment**
---
As Donald Trump's second term in the White House threatens the future of gender equality and reproductive freedom, Kirsten is fighting tirelessly to safeguard our rights. **But she needs to know if grassroots supporters like you have her back, and your response is still missing:**

**It hasn't been an easy time, friend:** Donald Trump was once again elected president — throwing the future of our most fundamental freedoms into frightening uncertainty.
The GOP have already shown us how far they're willing to go to limit reproductive rights. In red states across the country, they've passed abortion ban after abortion ban — all while threatening to pass a _nationwide_ abortion ban if they regained power. Now, they've done exactly that, and we need to do everything we can to keep them from making good on their threat.
Certifying the Equal Rights Amendment is our __best__ chance at stopping the GOP and restoring access to abortion before Donald Trump takes office and enacts his dangerous agenda.

**That's why we need to send a clear message that Democrats are standing behind Kirsten and supporting the ERA, but we're still waiting to hear from another 83 supporters before midnight — including you. So please, tell us before midnight:**
**Do you support the Equal Rights Amendment?**

body:

| | **Hearing Protection** **Is A Must While Shooting**
---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19421/6374453/a91eb027523345e60a4905fd86b9d8f164dd53d5/114b8f8c6925613f4bac89589badd837d3c214a9)
---
A gunshot is an impulse high decibel noise, which can be harmful to the human ear, so much so that even a single shot can cause permanent damage without the right hearing protection. **Depending on the caliber of the firearm, every gunshot registers above the safe hearing DB levels, at which hearing damage can occur quickly.** EarArmor.com's Earmuffs Rated with a [Noise Reduction Rating (NRR) of 21](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19421/6374453/a91eb027523345e60a4905fd86b9d8f164dd53d5/114b8f8c6925613f4bac89589badd837d3c214a9), EarArmor offers best-in-class hearing protection from noise levels across all firearm calibers.

**[Order Your Pair of EarArmor.com Earmuffs& Save 50% Off Today!](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19421/6374453/a91eb027523345e60a4905fd86b9d8f164dd53d5/114b8f8c6925613f4bac89589badd837d3c214a9)** On Your 6,

Thank You.

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Peter Berkowitz on Socialism and Capitalism
body:
In recent years, there has been a noticeable shift among young Americans who increasingly favor socialism over capitalism.

| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5815539cf9614895a4c1a4baec1b06ab&_e=qFxyG3dORBl3WBpRb1xKAaiv3ycT-Zcsi1nSVitrdVKCElA6Lq5So0Q6RFrqG38NebB-OisJTHQfk-xay9R-yLnNSt85mVPfmf-Dm4oRHlIVlEr2vwsNGS9i_9yEwFmTYIcEDm_kf6uPEejLmM5_6sJMB7TRcNgg5apYibFlHZsYkTHCNgPwFStM54iLKS6uMzpeQwfNeJJrLOUx41Jw2vaaVZqNFtavUc8YXzCd29D4HnzAkIIioov2ENd3YDwbrhQcIkPZ3N3qYnn3vBALdsWWXtrEW1lBXgr_5heLhL3vl829UlcyFSzofCTGXSZTdxCcppuRb6ZE2s-kIUOhEJzisMn2JfrvYzbi2xbHPj59e1iHGOGFb70n0Ob8S8qSiyf_kH5mwkBzmzE4QQwBag%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend, In recent years, there has been a noticeable shift among young Americans who increasingly favor socialism over capitalism. This trend raises a critical question: do they fully understand these two systems' historical contexts and real-world outcomes?
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5815539cf9614895a4c1a4baec1b06ab&_e=qFxyG3dORBl3WBpRb1xKAaiv3ycT-Zcsi1nSVitrdVKCElA6Lq5So0Q6RFrqG38NebB-OisJTHQfk-xay9R-yLnNSt85mVPfmf-Dm4oRHlIVlEr2vwsNGS9i_9yEwFmTYIcEDm_kf6uPEejLmM5_6sJMB7TRcNgg5apYibFlHZsYkTHCNgPwFStM54iLKS6uMzpeQwfNeJJrLOUx41Jw2vaaVZqNFtavUc8YXzCd29D4HnzAkIIioov2ENd3YDwbeyuWjEl_9X9oDiRNSAzTzwRIbSqbwC6fylo92aKXFZtFPSk2D5HwNiDKsldlRLYvoIpkbHPppgcSTed4QMa__1rShS4i82wk_7eRTx1flIaVlz11WXQs1-iZt9jJw7u42v5OiJEz168-4ggV2FUREQ%3D%3D)
---
| | To address this, we have created a new eBook, _**The History of Socialism and Capitalism**_ , authored by two of the most prominent voices in today's political discourse, Hoover Institution senior fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson.

This new eBook offers a deep dive into the origins, development, and impacts of socialism and capitalism. Each scholar presents an in-depth analysis through two different lenses. It's hard to overstate the relevance of this eBook in today's policy debates, where radical proposals are gaining traction.

Understanding the historical and practical implications of socialism and capitalism is crucial for making informed decisions about our economic and political future. The insights provided by Ferguson and Hanson will equip you with the knowledge to critically evaluate these competing ideologies and their potential impact on society.

Don't miss this opportunity to enhance your understanding of these pivotal economic systems. [Click here to request your free copy of **The History of Socialism and Capitalism** today.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5815539cf9614895a4c1a4baec1b06ab&_e=qFxyG3dORBl3WBpRb1xKAaiv3ycT-Zcsi1nSVitrdVKCElA6Lq5So0Q6RFrqG38NebB-OisJTHQfk-xay9R-yLnNSt85mVPfmf-Dm4oRHlIVlEr2vwsNGS9i_9yEwFmTYIcEDm_kf6uPEejLmM5_6sJMB7TRcNgg5apYibFlHZsYkTHCNgPwFStM54iLKS6uMzpeQwfNeJJrLOUx41Jw2vaaVZqNFtavUc8YXzCd29D4HnzAkIIioov2ENd3YDwbhGnx_LwtZZzIuVX_62lPrhm2TR-0yaUAspfLejH9Cj-i8Uhz-bjomX7WT2JDdmOuPYy88kDeNPNgNg0y8x4hbTlReBP2tV1NJePMZUjw8PJhqMjdq1f5cI9jhrOgdsll1jLF2_DR-ixRfEM7zY67Rg%3D%3D)
Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 – trading the truth of God for a lie

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4f6a9bf9135c4a33b18aca863ef4090f&_e=HcR-PjYrsimbGSjoTuJCSytLGU6d_i2ouc2rrztFJiWaR9JLcVxFQqphVs_LsOTkX5UH0JIoBHi3-KpvvurZAtUZlNNEe0xXUQhe_g9DExLFLIrdj9YmQvYlycb7IXRjfuvpRRmkBFeTSKenCaD_bdckkkj5aVhHwZcm4M74MZ9aXGzXEGEsN2zx89ziV63n_WCSNxSS-DR7liM4JfYl4J8JzTChcCxtnTjWllZts1I_QyCmTndVtZktY1ncMHZSJbE0tqMIIhzKwq2WM5etqj0F6eRmV_QUaRMtZi9WjSZPxYjBSplIkB5UULGYLnM-UIr-cXkgN2WQdbAdAtNXMkZ9_Bua-ae-UWcuF1Mp-sTU9uX5wjamQFXBQUVJLGba52QBo6jT-m6TwvsMpV-Pt2PL9pvYolkB9qiUUXZ3pemG65UGX1dFBCvgQa0U2oCc)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4f6a9bf9135c4a33b18aca863ef4090f&_e=HcR-PjYrsimbGSjoTuJCSytLGU6d_i2ouc2rrztFJiWaR9JLcVxFQqphVs_LsOTkX5UH0JIoBHi3-KpvvurZAtUZlNNEe0xXUQhe_g9DExLFLIrdj9YmQvYlycb7IXRjfuvpRRmkBFeTSKenCaD_bdckkkj5aVhHwZcm4M74MZ9aXGzXEGEsN2zx89ziV63n_WCSNxSS-DR7liM4JfYl4J8JzTChcCxtnTjWllZts1I_QyCmTndVtZktY1ncMHZSJbE0tqMIIhzKwq2WM5etqvufkPCcm5f6tQAXvNoVnkrJz7B8Wn-4OyX98yI6ksdvoEMMg8USMKZvXrbKmM3y9iNVfiKXTkQALCmC6D4xm0urfh6OK5R4onjOJ17IkIBUJJxbx0OYc_2Wg_CjOvm3Rz3dfC8nCAYY4D7HVUxB9jePAt0-DI16kBcFFXaJiyEq)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4f6a9bf9135c4a33b18aca863ef4090f&_e=HcR-PjYrsimbGSjoTuJCSytLGU6d_i2ouc2rrztFJiWaR9JLcVxFQqphVs_LsOTkX5UH0JIoBHi3-KpvvurZAtUZlNNEe0xXUQhe_g9DExLFLIrdj9YmQvYlycb7IXRjfuvpRRmkBFeTSKenCaD_bdckkkj5aVhHwZcm4M74MZ9aXGzXEGEsN2zx89ziV63n_WCSNxSS-DR7liM4JfYl4J8JzTChcCxtnTjWllZts1I_QyCmTndVtZktY1ncMHZSJbE0tqMIIhzKwq2WM5etqt_sIYioh3PakEmz_8mC4ByUhBTqcdBH6TpD5UCTqYlQjunNIsjY98nKGyOkDn_dacaBAF8V7wrBztqn9pQWSPSzb9PyLnJFken6bQgdvZfYETkJyAHHS6QrQ0oQKz8nwxuRrArJy8tkqqC4prN8wUDUoDZZBkRnztPFYtRtbd-j)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas

# **Buy And Store _Your Own_ Gold & Silver!**
---
|

| | Stability. Wealth Protection. Long Term Financial Growth. This is what many Americans are searching for when they purchase precious metals like gold and silver. But what's the best way to buy these precious metals? Do you buy an ETF (Exchange Traded Fund), or do you get your hands on the real thing? Here's the thing about ETFs...
---
| |
---
| You don't actually own the gold or silver.
---
| |
---
| You can't take physical delivery of the metal.
---
| |
---
| Taxes and fees can eat away at your gains.
---
| |
---
| Shares may or may not have sufficient gold or silver backing.
---
| | But with physical gold or silver, you are the one in the driver's seat. You have the control you're looking for with your hard earned money. Here are the top 5 reasons why you should own physical gold and silver...
---
1. **Immediate Access**
Being able to open your safe and put your hands on the physical gold and silver coins you own brings reassurance to many gold and silver owners.
2. **Complete control**
You can stick it under your mattress, hide it in a wall, store it in a safe, bury it in your backyard or put it in a bank safe deposit box.
3. **Easy Portability**
If you think there's ever a potential situation in which you may have to leave your house at short notice, you'll want personal possession of your metals.
4. **Convenient Flexibility**
Taking physical possession of gold and silver is just one more tool in the toolbox, one more way to diversify your retirement savings.
5. **No Pricey Fees**
With ETFs and other forms of owning precious metals, you are forced to deal with fund managers, exchanges, custodial storage, and even sales of fund assets that can carry pesky fees that add up over time.

---

name: Autism Health Inc.
subject: Happy Holidays from Autism Health Inc.
body:
|
---
| |
---
| |
# Wishing You a Season of Joy and Gratitude!
---
| [ ](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=d262d43b54&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| **Dear Supporters,** As 2024 comes to a close, we at Autism Health Inc. want to take a moment to express our deepest gratitude to our incredible sponsors, donors, and supporters. Their generosity and belief in our mission has made a profound impact on countless families navigating the autism journey. At Autism Health Inc., our mission is to empower families, give hope, and share transformative resources that support holistic health and healing for individuals with autism. Together, we’re building a brighter future for the autism community.
---
| **Join Us at the 2025 Autism Health Summit!**
---
| Mark your calendars for April 11-13, 2025, at the stunning Town & Country Resort in San Diego, CA for the Autism Health Summit. To celebrate this season of giving, we’re offering an exclusive 25% discount on all ticket types ~ General Admission, VIP, or Professional. Don’t miss this chance to save and be part of this life-changing event! Use promo code HOLIDAY25 at checkout for your 25% discount.
---
| [Buy Now](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=9cf0249316&e=3a42edfdc4 "Buy Now")
---
| **Support Our Scholarship Fund**
---
| This holiday season, consider making a donation to our scholarship fund. Your contribution helps families who might not otherwise have the opportunity to attend the Autism Health Summit and other educational events and training. Every donation, big or small, brings us closer to our goal of making these scholarships accessible to all. Your support is more than just a contribution, it’s a lifeline for those who need it most.
---
| [Donate Here](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=1caaa91919&e=3a42edfdc4 "Donate Here")
---
| Thank you for your kindness, compassion, and commitment to making a difference. From our family at Autism Health Inc. to yours, we wish you a holiday season filled with love, peace, and hope, and a very Happy New Year!. Together, we’re making a difference!
With gratitude,
The Autism Health Inc. Team
---
|
---
| **YOUR DONATIONS MAKE A DIFFERENCE!**
---
| Autism Health Inc. depends on generous donations from our community. Large or small, every donation gets us closer to achieving our goals. We are grateful for your assistance!
---
| [Donate Now](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=bccc5b524f&e=3a42edfdc4 "Donate Now")
---
| Autism Health is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to educating individuals, families, and communities about autism spectrum disorder (ASD). Autism Health provides educational programs, workshops, events and resources tailored to meet the diverse needs of those impacted by autism and other neurological disorders.
---
| **Autism Health Inc.
San Diego, CA**
**[www.AutismHealth.com](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=56d120305c&e=3a42edfdc4)**
---
| | | | | | | [](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=a566f499e2&e=3a42edfdc4)
---

---

---

name: The Jane Fonda Climate PAC
subject: Jane’s Birthday Celebration Starts NOW! 🎉
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Honor Jane’s incredible legacy and fight for climate justice with a gift that gives back.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98972132/518429307/1328794144?refcode=ea.17e7fe40-3abe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ms=ea.17e7fe40-3abe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE3ZTdmZTQwLTNhYmUtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Hh9XX0JwnzoDdK0uStWyWRXxvtfHnKS-XjLeuKt64U4=&emci=65457fae-75bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=17e7fe40-3abe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=4823105)
---
Hi there! This weekend, Jane will celebrate her 87th birthday and — like she reminds our team of young climate fighters _fairly_ often — _anybody can be young, but only the lucky get to be old._ And, of course, she’s right. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98972133/518429308/-1039531188?refcode=ea.17e7fe40-3abe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ms=ea.17e7fe40-3abe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE3ZTdmZTQwLTNhYmUtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Hh9XX0JwnzoDdK0uStWyWRXxvtfHnKS-XjLeuKt64U4=) We may be youngsters, but we have it on good authority that Jane’s birthday wishlist is pretty short this year. All she wants for her big 8-7 is to save the planet we call home 🎂🌎 _That’ll fit in a recycled gift bag, right?_ Help Jane and our team continue our fight for Mother Earth (who’s 4.5 billion years old, by the way), and celebrate Jane’s lifetime of fearless activism by taking home one of our limited edition and eco-conscious hoodies, shirts, totes, or stickers.
