clean_body: Honor Jane’s incredible legacy and fight for climate justice with a gift that gives back. | Hi there! This weekend, Jane will celebrate her 87th birthday and — like she reminds our team of young climate fighters fairly often — anybody can be young, but only the lucky get to be old. And, of course, she’s right. = We may be youngsters, but we have it on good authority that Jane’s birthday wishlist is pretty short this year. All she wants for her big 8-7 is to save the planet we call home 🎂🌎 That’ll fit in a recycled gift bag, right? Help Jane and our team continue our fight for Mother Earth (who’s 4.5 billion years old, by the way), and celebrate Jane’s lifetime of fearless activism by taking home one of our limited edition and eco-conscious hoodies, shirts, totes, or stickers. 🎁 = 👕 Every purchase directly supports JanePAC’s fight to elect climate champions, hold Big Oil accountable, and protect our planet for future generations — just like Jane asked for. What better way to celebrate Jane’s legacy than by doubling down on the mission she’s dedicated her life to? Let’s make her 87th birthday unforgettable — for Jane, and for the movement. | = The Jane Fonda Climate PAC Sarah, Dan, Christa, Margaret, and Brit | = | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Marie Gluesenkamp Perez
subject: Still grateful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marie for Congress
body:
| | Peter,

Over a month after our victory here in WA-03, I am still so grateful for all of the hard work, perseverance, and sacrifices this team of grassroots supporters made to defend our shared values and keep extremism out of our community.

I’ll never stop being thankful for having you in my corner, and I know that representing the working families of Southwest Washington starts with listening.

Since day one, I have made it a priority to hear directly from parents, small business owners, and other members of our community about our most pressing challenges.

[Now, I’m checking in one more time before the end of the year to get your thoughts on what Congress needs to focus on in the new year. Will you take 1 minute to complete our survey today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98972215/518429541/379031582?refcode=MGP_EM_SV_180DO_241218_1_1&refcode2=4c31d928-3bbe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzMxZDkyOC0zYmJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fQP7zWietRjAYbdhSmMYzEVOEg6h-yQi93d1vzalxVs=&emci=fa8eaf0a-96bd-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=4c31d928-3bbe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=31138575)

name: Next DNC Chair via Our Revolution
subject: ADD YOUR NAME: Say No to Rahm Emanuel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis — Rahm
Emanuel is seriously considering a run to be the new DNC Chair. He’d be a
DISASTER for our movement and the Party.

Emanuel has always been an obstacle to progress — in the Obama and Clinton
administrations, in Congress, and as Chicago Mayor. If he’s at the head of
the Party, Democrats can wave goodbye to any chance of winning back the
working-class voters needed to win elections. It’d be handing a huge gift
to corporations, billionaires, and Trump.

Rahm is a symbol of everything that’s wrong with the Party: coziness with
corporate America, a brand of politics completely disconnected from
working people, and an old way of thinking about elections that has failed
Democrats time and again.

As part of our grassroots fight to put people ahead of corporations,
overpaid consultants, and the egos of Party elites, we MUST show that our
movement opposes Emanuel. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20727?source=email-20241219&t=1011&akid=7418%2E5885482%2EYmI-ct ]Add your name right away to OPPOSE Rahm
Emanuel as DNC Chair. Let’s make it clear that Rahm shouldn’t even run.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20727?source=email-20241219&t=1012&akid=7418%2E5885482%2EYmI-ct ]ADD YOUR NAME

As President Obama’s chief of staff, Rahm worked to block efforts to grow
unions and sided with bank execs and insurance companies while SCREWING
over the people suffering during the 2008 financial crisis.

In the Clinton admin, Emanuel played a key role in pushing NAFTA, which
devastated American manufacturing jobs and hurt working people.

We’re in a fight for the very future of this country. Trump is heading
into a second term after beating the Democratic Party elites AGAIN. Yet,
corporate Democrats are still fighting progressives harder than they fight
MAGA extremism. But there’s hope if we elect a DNC Chair that takes the
Party in a new direction. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20727?source=email-20241219&t=1013&akid=7418%2E5885482%2EYmI-ct ]Rahm is NOT the leadership we need right now!

If we band together and mobilize to stop Rahm from becoming DNC Chair, we
not only have a chance to implement our party reform agenda, we also have
a chance to shape a progressive future for the Party.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20727?source=email-20241219&t=1014&akid=7418%2E5885482%2EYmI-ct ]Urgent action is needed now to stop Rahm Emanuel from becoming DNC
Chair. With only a few weeks left before Democrats choose a new leader, we
need you to join us and say loud and clear that it can’t be Rahm.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20727?source=email-20241219&t=1015&akid=7418%2E5885482%2EYmI-ct ]ADD YOUR NAME

While you’re there, chip in any amount to make sure our pressure campaign
for party reform is fully funded. This is a moment for real change that we
cannot afford to squander.

When we organize, we win!

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] Peter Willis — Rahm Emanuel is seriously considering a run to be the new DNC Chair. He’d be a DISASTER for our movement and the Party. Emanuel has always been an obstacle to progress — in the Obama and Clinton administrations, in Congress, and as Chicago Mayor. If he’s at the head of the Party, Democrats can wave goodbye to any chance of winning back the working-class voters needed to win elections. It’d be handing a huge gift to corporations, billionaires, and Trump. Rahm is a symbol of everything that’s wrong with the Party: coziness with corporate America, a brand of politics completely disconnected from working people, and an old way of thinking about elections that has failed Democrats time and again. As part of our grassroots fight to put people ahead of corporations, overpaid consultants, and the egos of Party elites, we MUST show that our movement opposes Emanuel. [ ]Add your name right away to OPPOSE Rahm Emanuel as DNC Chair. Let’s make it clear that Rahm shouldn’t even run. [ ]ADD YOUR NAME As President Obama’s chief of staff, Rahm worked to block efforts to grow unions and sided with bank execs and insurance companies while SCREWING over the people suffering during the 2008 financial crisis. In the Clinton admin, Emanuel played a key role in pushing NAFTA, which devastated American manufacturing jobs and hurt working people. We’re in a fight for the very future of this country. Trump is heading into a second term after beating the Democratic Party elites AGAIN. Yet, corporate Democrats are still fighting progressives harder than they fight MAGA extremism. But there’s hope if we elect a DNC Chair that takes the Party in a new direction. [ ]Rahm is NOT the leadership we need right now! If we band together and mobilize to stop Rahm from becoming DNC Chair, we not only have a chance to implement our party reform agenda, we also have a chance to shape a progressive future for the Party. [ ]Urgent action is needed now to stop Rahm Emanuel from becoming DNC Chair. With only a few weeks left before Democrats choose a new leader, we need you to join us and say loud and clear that it can’t be Rahm. [ ]ADD YOUR NAME While you’re there, chip in any amount to make sure our pressure campaign for party reform is fully funded. This is a moment for real change that we cannot afford to squander. When we organize, we win! name: NextGen PAC
subject: Protecting our democracy from the Trump Administration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by NextGen Climate Action Committee; [http://nextgenpac

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98972997/518432052/992867983?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS85OTMyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTlmYmViNi0zYmJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Kj-1_uAecWR0rAKUvdob3LWMDna3KxcTTR5qFPqiT8=&emci=647b8fdd-30be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=a99fbeb6-3bbe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=6787172)

Our mission in 2025 is very simple, team: **Protect our democracy from the Trump Administration.**
Donald Trump hasn't even taken office yet, but corporate stooges, Republicans in Congress, and far-right extremist groups are already falling over themselves to help him take away our rights and freedoms.
If we're going to stand a chance at protecting our democracy, we have to continue engaging young voters. And come January, we’re ready to take on the fights that will disproportionately affect them.
Here's what we're gearing up our network of over 3 million young voters to do in the new year:
* Apply pressure on their senators to appoint cabinet members who are interested in moving us forward, not bowing to corporate interests.
* Apply pressure on their Representatives to overturn Executive Orders that threaten DEI programs, allow for mass deportations, and attack the LGBTQ+ community.
* Fight against Federal and State Legislations that restrict abortion access, undermine workers' rights, damage our environment, and much more.

Our democracy is worth fighting for. And investing in the youth vote is our best way to do just that.
[With your support, we'll be able to keep up the fight for our democracy against the Trump Administration. Please, if you believe our future is worth fighting for, will you chip in $5, $10, or anything you can right now to empower young voters?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98973000/518432053/647858764?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS85OTMyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTlmYmViNi0zYmJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3Kj-1_uAecWR0rAKUvdob3LWMDna3KxcTTR5qFPqiT8=&emci=647b8fdd-30be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=a99fbeb6-3bbe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=6787172)

name: Team WFP
subject: What we’re building together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, Are you tired of how our political system works? Of how the two-party system continues to come up short, and leave us in the lurch? Same here. And we made a new video to share more about how we already have a third option in politics — one that answers to working people, not CEOs and billionaires. [**Can you take a few minutes to watch it here, and then make a contribution before our critical end-of-year fundraising deadline? We have a long road ahead, and we’ll start by breaking down the current shortcomings of the two-party system, highlighting some key victories in 2024, and why an alternative approach to politics is the best way forward in the new year.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9IMCZqG23MZNa_R3nK0XZCN1Llm_iq605UX_h9nau6NLUfY1mMFtWOjNfyNTtkFmhMafYQFHNP7HgGHBFTdoR1R3ChWFnW3DkbzDNmxglRbrvR1BJMfR9RI0512PWjOUlnAuZ7BMRrd5GsaU189zH7-Mga4JUE5e84E3a93JvDNSmYBnMApjMI_HGdlzEMH-40vh96O_vsiGjr5VY3gXX25oSY-s-CkBfrKiUevLTobsYjLLbQSrExd27z0-3Nei4Nj7kdSrxI9nyuQbVpMI_AgUAY-IXLR7r6UkniexCX9ndePZGl7_T48O8LPy-Fmcs/4cf/CZEJzXqaTyWmoIxxhVQMMw/h0/h001.HZBW5BTzJyBWQetg7tLFywQQ3Bxms7XM16dlTjvUnBw) [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9IMCZqG23MZNa_R3nK0XZCN1Llm_iq605UX_h9nau6NLUfY1mMFtWOjNfyNTtkFmhvrh6PgyqaoIGzD6U23UD1ZxLm9FD1FYuUjFDvTlhcrFiqHsrsi8xLAQy5VtDBK7qu--YGLw_ZJHpNDRJEoMc4Rm1J8icKjEGWBE1n3ZForTXkByu4MbF9EL_l0CEkusNANOabjWRd-mmoQUDv02YDvjoobeYmNjeUo2cPGGhj4mDzogVfnL5NNZJ4-xilD_Q6WR46fzITpqm9qs3R5NJGyhAn1LG4zHZCaPuPY48GqGx0oj_Q6nnlOQazHkNwFRe/4cf/CZEJzXqaTyWmoIxxhVQMMw/h1/h001.wL-wlpoxugwg9qa88yKlH6gG8AeeOuknn47YEUmN3mU) **[Contribute $10 »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9IMCZqG23MZNa_R3nK0XZCN1Llm_iq605UX_h9nau6NLUfY1mMFtWOjNfyNTtkFmhkJ4HrJ1F68oHGR_nueiwsCFfFFpOrXPuhSZM9zulZONad2qVyYkCtfdAIW_jzo5TizTWaJ8nVl5tD4R1cNTZpka-c4BmH3VRRpy_RE66dMbaUrx3B_s3jgvxg4ywhE6QMEMUKo5fw1rkKtHtNB0MJLINo8h-UXvh9UFt5YsVcqhTXUo3xgbwheI4AmcgusHoadaVe3xArPmPVMvj_eXlNf-58xKbVYTbmc_bSLgocI2OTdf3QlIrIl87YTmLEPY_/4cf/CZEJzXqaTyWmoIxxhVQMMw/h2/h001.7WRffulN1WGZYaMvYfZwCybn5tvmRoBnxZg4Gm82pfw)** The path out of this crisis requires us to be FULLY committed to building real connections with working class people of all races. And it’s something we have to choose every single day. The Working Families Party isn’t _just_ a political party. It’s also a practice. It’s action. It means putting in the work, not just at the ballot box when elections roll around, but in our communities throughout all the weeks in between. **That’s what we’re building together, Peter.** [And by choosing to support WFP during this final stretch of 2024, that is what you’re building, too. We've set a goal of raising $100,000 by the end of December, and hitting that goal will help ensure that we’re well-staffed and well-equipped to hit the ground running once the new administration takes office. Please make a contribution here.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9IMCZqG23MZNa_R3nK0XZCN1Llm_iq605UX_h9nau6NLUfY1mMFtWOjNfyNTtkFmhW6EOPCMHgU_YklExt_ok7YKCf9Vv9loefZsAy76lJGEFaBiVflYXVCs4lahGMAzn-g5h0G8SmaumARQG5TdRvZL3N9mSQwV3D-AYST-v1GxURepoYaul8CoDFTFYWpW3_TmTuP9YFZisFWP6CIcolRVM8MTZ_3wEHIh5d9SWYwPECjla0IbgeQHMToTPF4m8ld5QC6nsfMXRjjW0Qp_QXZCgfz5xAxbR24Oza_WVllPh1W_nVCdlJjEL8A6k3TL2/4cf/CZEJzXqaTyWmoIxxhVQMMw/h3/h001.oVzvsepUYu14QloRW6u3_iAtP2E6WIw9ui_84MYa5lk) clean_body: | | | Peter, Are you tired of how our political system works? Of how the two-party system continues to come up short, and leave us in the lurch? Same here. And we made a new video to share more about how we already have a third option in politics — one that answers to working people, not CEOs and billionaires. The path out of this crisis requires us to be FULLY committed to building real connections with working class people of all races. And it’s something we have to choose every single day. The Working Families Party isn’t just a political party. It’s also a practice. It’s action. It means putting in the work, not just at the ballot box when elections roll around, but in our communities throughout all the weeks in between. That’s what we’re building together, Peter. And know that we are so, SO grateful for all that you do. In solidarity, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . body:
This would change everything...
| | **FACT:** DC Statehood would likely give Democrats 2 more Senators. It _almost_ happened in 2021, when the House passed the DC Statehood bill!

**FACT:** 2 more Democratic Senators would virtually guarantee a Democratic Senate majority, _so Republicans are TERRIFIED of DC becoming a state!_

**FACT:** If we can build massive grassroots support NOW, we can finally put DC back on the path to becoming our 51st state and secure a Democratic Senate majority for years to come!

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. clean_body: Hang on a second. Just when you think we’re crawling back to something resembling the America we know and love, BAM! Out comes the sneaky, slimy Democratic machine, reminding us we’re living in some bizarro-world simulation where they’re the all-powerful wizards behind the curtain. It’s almost comical—almost. But here we are, smack dab in another [...] | Hang on a second. Just when you think we’re crawling back to something resembling the America we know and love, BAM! Out comes the sneaky, slimy Democratic machine, reminding us we’re living in some bizarro-world simulation where they’re the all-powerful wizards behind the curtain. It’s almost comical—almost. But here we are, smack dab in another [...] Read More Donald Trump has never been shy about stirring the pot, and his latest jab—half-jokingly suggesting that Canada become the 51st state—was classic Trump. “Many Canadians want Canada to become the 51st state,” he quipped on Truth Social. “They would save massively on taxes and military protection. I think it’s a great idea. 51st State!!!” Predictably, [...] Oh, here we go again. Washington is playing its favorite game: kick the fiscal can down the road, but this time, President-elect Donald Trump isn’t having it. On Wednesday, Trump shredded Speaker Mike Johnson’s spending deal, calling it a gift-wrapped present for Democrats and a raw deal for everyone else. Trump’s rallying cry? Republicans need [...] The media’s loathing for Donald Trump is no secret. Yet even his most vocal critics must acknowledge one of his defining traits: accessibility. Love him or hate him, Trump engages—often directly and without the layers of gatekeeping typical of most political figures. This was evident during his first presidency, buried beneath endless headlines about alleged [...] The fallout at ABC News following its $16 million settlement with Donald Trump over defamation claims has sparked a media firestorm, leaving anchor George Stephanopoulos “apoplectic” and insiders fuming. The settlement, which included a $15 million payment to Trump’s presidential foundation and $1 million for legal fees, has been described as a significant embarrassment for [...] Well, this is rich. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 – trading the truth of God for a lie

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d5320620a8af468c9d5c49f91cc0b9ab&_e=Tsj4zzXqjY4lx64g9Yt4W1Sp3VR_KsLoeH32HqG0gGSPUP8RtI38YPCTzjjo8UCbUDNgpgXok7nk-wyqib5Aj57hCoksoHMqSekHP0eWsehg9PGnaTZvW3y4Qg0LeIrVGAJEQ7yOlZYsf1iD0b7lbhzCHQzVBVZUzyee1jnJi7ezqOgSWMLkHqp_VDCsKT4Aa7nxYlkipshz6KeDJQHxbDMGd2Kb5ddjVDHZEJJHFUpwQzFgEC4aZm70q_uaNYp-QDFqa755k3Mom1zfouajMMvLfuLrZTUd3zYZU2drlkXbcoum3CGJ_G6Ol5rK2xf_wSFDoOWKTnscTeJfNfAuqvXwNSVgxpjNrHfIrB8KFS39pwwUt0qMPBvg864zPqHKZJZTdz-PtzshXNSS1VoVm9b3sLfgDw4cGOy_OGAse04WGBsQOFLe_sztju-IiqkS)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d5320620a8af468c9d5c49f91cc0b9ab&_e=Tsj4zzXqjY4lx64g9Yt4W1Sp3VR_KsLoeH32HqG0gGSPUP8RtI38YPCTzjjo8UCbUDNgpgXok7nk-wyqib5Aj57hCoksoHMqSekHP0eWsehg9PGnaTZvW3y4Qg0LeIrVGAJEQ7yOlZYsf1iD0b7lbhzCHQzVBVZUzyee1jnJi7ezqOgSWMLkHqp_VDCsKT4Aa7nxYlkipshz6KeDJQHxbDMGd2Kb5ddjVDHZEJJHFUpwQzFgEC4aZm70q_uaNYp-QDFqa755k3Mom1zfouajMDjblWEgjPBOXCHvT_PGq55Tm_WoixWN5M6vsgqB_OZUMUBkzrP12NlTGoORqH_oWvv6_YYF-CYsMBvUZ1NOKTAYFD9Op13HL0ESttXTMkthqttmTeAoHgSDvCDA2xErjtkXfz2iC6Pmpb5TBuEnw9VJwBgH2SOnI-A4rg2ptJ4-)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.

Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d5320620a8af468c9d5c49f91cc0b9ab&_e=Tsj4zzXqjY4lx64g9Yt4W1Sp3VR_KsLoeH32HqG0gGSPUP8RtI38YPCTzjjo8UCbUDNgpgXok7nk-wyqib5Aj57hCoksoHMqSekHP0eWsehg9PGnaTZvW3y4Qg0LeIrVGAJEQ7yOlZYsf1iD0b7lbhzCHQzVBVZUzyee1jnJi7ezqOgSWMLkHqp_VDCsKT4Aa7nxYlkipshz6KeDJQHxbDMGd2Kb5ddjVDHZEJJHFUpwQzFgEC4aZm70q_uaNYp-QDFqa755k3Mom1zfouajMCsRVF3XK4KtI5px9XyorekYcYAfE7JhmPvqksIgw9Rr2drSXncsCcc46o6L7aMkGj_5NpxJ1mj1OXf0KhcFIjUlk-EKgcViQgOz3HdNiWUfpomoieXJ1Xe15Tj6bURt1j43BjZS8eurg6dnjqIZvhU4itG676kUeb_tqVyLTbra)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

Defend the Constitution

name: Voter Action Project
subject: The madness is already here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Yesterday was emblematic of why we need to step up, Team. These are not serious people, but they're going to be in charge, and they're tanking a bland 90-day funding bill for no real reason -- and may harm so many of our fellow Americans in the process by shutting down the federal government over the holidays.
It's on people like us to stand up, defend our country, and hold those in power accountable. Our fellow Americans need us and we need to show them -- through our actions -- that good people are willing to step up and fight.
We can't wait to get started. RUSH $25 or more right now to help us defend the right to vote, increase voter participation, and so much more >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=121924_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121924_2&amount=25]
Team,
It may seem like there isn’t much we can do to better our world after the election we just had and opponents of voting rights seemingly tightening their grip on our country. But, in reality, the fight has just begun.
It’s time to lace up our boots and fight for our democracy. Opponents of voting rights are dead set on dismantling our democratic system. State legislatures start in a few weeks and even when the vote suppressors don't win at the ballot box they codify their power however else they can.
That's exactly what we are gearing up to stop. We've worked too hard for too long to quit now.
We set an important goal to be ready for whatever suppressive bills come in 2025's new legislative sessions. Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can today and help us protect voting rights? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=121924_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://twitter.com/voteractionproj [https://twitter.com/voteractionproj] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121924_2&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=121924_2&amount=25]

name: Illinois Review
subject: 🚨ALERT: Could JB Pritzker Be Disbarred?
body:
IL Gov. JB Pritzker's knowingly false allegations against President Trump may jeopardize the good standing of his Illinois law license.

We thought you may be interested to receive this conservative news alert from Illinois Review, the largest conservative media source in Illinois, and the only source in Illinois that has been shared by President Donald Trump.

Pritzker, a Licensed Attorney, Could Face State Disciplinary Action for Falsely Stating Trump is a “Rapist,” Says Blagojevich (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/12/pritzker-a-licensed-attorney-could-face-state-disciplinary-action-for-falsely-stating-trump-is-a-rapist-says-blagojevich.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0fa0ce4833-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/12/pritzker-a-licensed-attorney-could-face-state-disciplinary-action-for-falsely-stating-trump-is-a-rapist-says-blagojevich.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0fa0ce4833-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
Gov. JB Pritzker speaks to reporters in Chicago in 2020. (Jose M. Osorio/Chicago Tribune)
By Illinois Review

On Wednesday, during an appearance on Newsmax, former Ill. Gov. Rod Blagojevich suggested that Gov. JB Pritzker – a licensed Illinois attorney, could face disciplinary action from the Illinois Attorney Registration and Disciplinary Commission (ARDC) after the Democratic governor falsely and repeatedly referred to Trump as an “adjudicated rapist.”

“He’s a lawyer. He’s a licensed attorney. And lawyers have a responsibility as officers of the court, even in the public square, to be truthful and honest,” said Blagojevich during his interview with Newsmax host Greg Kelly. “When you say something like that, calling somebody a rapist when you know that he’s not, and you happen to be a lawyer, you’re actually running the risk of losing your law license.”

clean_body: IL Gov. JB Pritzker's knowingly false allegations against President Trump may jeopardize the good standing of his Illinois law license. view in browser () | update preferences () | unsubscribe () This IR e-Blast Powered By: Dear Peter, We thought you may be interested to receive this conservative news alert from Illinois Review, the largest conservative media source in Illinois, and the only source in Illinois that has been shared by President Donald Trump. Twitter () Facebook () IllinoisReview.com () Pritzker, a Licensed Attorney, Could Face State Disciplinary Action for Falsely Stating Trump is a “Rapist,” Says Blagojevich () Gov. JB Pritzker speaks to reporters in Chicago in 2020. (Jose M. Osorio/Chicago Tribune) By Illinois Review On Wednesday, during an appearance on Newsmax, former Ill. Gov. Rod Blagojevich suggested that Gov. JB Pritzker – a licensed Illinois attorney, could face disciplinary action from the Illinois Attorney Registration and Disciplinary Commission (ARDC) after the Democratic governor falsely and repeatedly referred to Trump as an “adjudicated rapist.” “He’s a lawyer. He’s a licensed attorney. And lawyers have a responsibility as officers of the court, even in the public square, to be truthful and honest,” said Blagojevich during his interview with Newsmax host Greg Kelly. “When you say something like that, calling somebody a rapist when you know that he’s not, and you happen to be a lawyer, you’re actually running the risk of losing your law license.” CLICK TO READ FULL ARTICLE () Twitter () Facebook () IllinoisReview.com () Copyright © 2023 IR Media Corp., all rights reserved. name: Bill Gray
subject: Big media vs. new media
body:
You think this is the end of an era?

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b374c70199c443c89f92d1c5d81c3d66&_e=GTTHDqRX5rlQfEtBJw71bT2bqFoz8KmnhsJsDOwN_8TOnOuw1GXM01jHy6GAqP6FuUITJpFyZVx5g0vrnSEMKXlfTjl-BpQWSrVTA4ZeEkXfqYSFIrZMFn1Pb_IhJ6p402YAvDZ9X8ypzK6Edzb1Y75TDYXRqE3N58-VcaxTImVMjPurXNfWhRzY3cBKkdlMWp4-eGwdS1MZAW5ynjiswkOebsY8EvIkWKv0z79VmWW66HDt2TCj2eNr9Z8r-83UTP6PSbT04_7bmNlPhQYNrGWXOXtaj0MUXhzg9iukr6PnCipRvsQhtlRYETOJypPUjj-yvA-krFeMqfDtIheLABXHqiqJ87zGkQFsJHSDjCx9J3CBE7QE4xlAyeNTOG_e_PNFDBb_63ws4A4BOszGxA%3D%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend, how are you today? I'm reaching out with a bold prediction--what do you think about this...

**Big media is over**.

It's the end of an era. And I can't say I'm sad to see it go.

But the death spiral of the legacy news media means that [I need YOUR urgent help to be forward-thinking during this news revolution.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b374c70199c443c89f92d1c5d81c3d66&_e=GTTHDqRX5rlQfEtBJw71bT2bqFoz8KmnhsJsDOwN_8TOnOuw1GXM01jHy6GAqP6FuUITJpFyZVx5g0vrnSEMKXlfTjl-BpQWSrVTA4ZeEkXfqYSFIrZMFn1Pb_IhJ6p402YAvDZ9X8ypzK6Edzb1Y75TDYXRqE3N58-VcaxTImVMjPurXNfWhRzY3cBKkdlMWp4-eGwdS1MZAW5ynjiswkOebsY8EvIkWKv0z79VmWV2ym2taevB1PQXQtYZWIpVrdPYn-nubIcWooJCJMIiYEqyYNP-ExL2Ywj1DA4vMBDj9O5Kz5bINkW7vjDchqiwQhjPU8GnckXKholjbyIubg52_E4nqXXxcRjN-uGahdoei5EKh2726d2qRy2NkVKjZpSGTnGaOrxyom6uqNOugA%3D%3D)

I'll tell you more about how you can help in just a moment, but first, let me tell you why we need to act right away.

Next year, there's one thing we can absolutely expect...

Big media will continue to call for censorship of new media. And honestly, is that any surprise to you?

The ladies on _The View_ are already blaming the election results on X (formerly Twitter) and "misinformation." The _New York Times_ claims we're experiencing a "dark turn in democracy." Rachel Maddow cried on MSNBC about the dangers of Elon Musk and new media. Here's the thing--so-called "Big Media" has been corrupt and one-sided for a long, long time. In fact...

[**Hillsdale has led the fight against "Big media" for decades--with YOUR help!**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b374c70199c443c89f92d1c5d81c3d66&_e=GTTHDqRX5rlQfEtBJw71bT2bqFoz8KmnhsJsDOwN_8TOnOuw1GXM01jHy6GAqP6FuUITJpFyZVx5g0vrnSEMKXlfTjl-BpQWSrVTA4ZeEkXfqYSFIrZMFn1Pb_IhJ6p402YAvDZ9X8ypzK6Edzb1Y75TDYXRqE3N58-VcaxTImVMjPurXNfWhRzY3cBKkdlMWp4-eGwdS1MZAW5ynjiswkOebsY8EvIkWKv0z79VmWVtbjEMo_Rrtg0CW6o_73Cfjw2Ap6I6od8GFnSFnYhw9PFlqzOu5ZBJ0iBYASdDiGtW1n8rkpk9T15TSOW-34Jf1lW-QFCVpVB5c2W_-SVwuF1NxZFnodVS8hCZ0ftsxAFA3IG-YzfAHOLJSvq-wDsRhKIH4wbtzT9gT_udUfEbdg%3D%3D)

_Imprimis_ --an important alternative to pervasive and pernicious far-Left narratives--first reached the mailboxes of a few thousand readers in 1972. Now, we fight against dangerous ideologies through our **free** online courses, **Hillsdale College Podcast Network** , and all our **outreach on social media**.

**And our outreach numbers in the millions --a far cry from the few thousand folks that received the first issue of _Imprimis_ back in '72!**

We've also partnered for decades with talk-radio shows and podcast hosts like Mark Levin, Tucker Carlson, and Charlie Kirk. We've also had the blessing to work with some of the best radio hosts in history--Rush Limbaugh and Paul Harvey--to promote the principles of liberty that Hillsdale staunchly defends.

**This has been some of our most important work. And it 's work we couldn't do without YOU.** You've especially been a big help to us during attacks from legacy media and censorship from Big Tech companies like Facebook.

Thank you so much!

Next year--as Big Media clings desperately to remain relevant--we can expect more attacks, so [I pray you'll continue to stand with us for TRUTH against Leftist dogmas.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b374c70199c443c89f92d1c5d81c3d66&_e=GTTHDqRX5rlQfEtBJw71bT2bqFoz8KmnhsJsDOwN_8TOnOuw1GXM01jHy6GAqP6FuUITJpFyZVx5g0vrnSEMKXlfTjl-BpQWSrVTA4ZeEkXfqYSFIrZMFn1Pb_IhJ6p402YAvDZ9X8ypzK6Edzb1Y75TDYXRqE3N58-VcaxTImVMjPurXNfWhRzY3cBKkdlMWp4-eGwdS1MZAW5ynjiswkOebsY8EvIkWKv0z79VmWXdbijACg9-gyGyxSVnjOEY6Pv4UeeapAZrIZCkFieRWgCLaFoKJkqfbbBJGdhWf3Bp6uHD8RP1b623rYyRj4CVNvidnPGrPZTTDKiG2vJhbzitfMrF1YpJEHnKPKHbYaJ8asH2pD1Xt9uiF7kvNPlmTofWkk-jbx99KfEETZv0rQ%3D%3D)

An important part of our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education** will be confronting Big Media head-on. As more Americans begin turning off MSNBC and canceling their _New York Times_ subscriptions, with your generous gift today, you will provide...

* Free subscriptions to _Imprimis_ --our digest of liberty--featuring constitutional perspectives on contemporary problems, including immigration, the weaponization of government, and education.
* Podcasts including "The Larry Arnn Show," "Hillsdale Dialogues," and "Liberty and Learning with Mark Levin," all on **our Hillsdale College Podcast Network** , part of the "New Media" that more and more people--especially and including young people--are tuning in to.
* Free online courses on the Constitution, American history, Christianity, and Marxism--especially important as our audience for these courses begins to become younger and younger. We've got a great lineup of courses planned for 2025, by the way...
* Massive outreach on social media--including X (formerly known as Twitter)--where we often share our educational content, such as lectures from Hillsdale events, free online courses, informative surveys, and our learning videos.

**I hope you know we can only accomplish all of this with your help.**

[**Are you with us?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b374c70199c443c89f92d1c5d81c3d66&_e=GTTHDqRX5rlQfEtBJw71bT2bqFoz8KmnhsJsDOwN_8TOnOuw1GXM01jHy6GAqP6FuUITJpFyZVx5g0vrnSEMKXlfTjl-BpQWSrVTA4ZeEkXfqYSFIrZMFn1Pb_IhJ6p402YAvDZ9X8ypzK6Edzb1Y75TDYXRqE3N58-VcaxTImVMjPurXNfWhRzY3cBKkdlMWp4-eGwdS1MZAW5ynjiswkOebsY8EvIkWKv0z79VmWWi065xM2n1qyzW7J33yqJzlCKoGFcwfV4d2O8tfuxpCWURuD5nyKIFZIFILbYpygpoJ2UFy8_vSrJx_venuN4A87jm9vXJojczSwfrfH6t3LgvYCgfP1uAM0dl54RQtlizGEs2BvbajRHr_C6uslD9mlLf7ocp3lprId3xIieFbg%3D%3D)

This is an exciting time when we can do so much to restore liberty. Together, we will STOP Big Media LIES and propaganda and TEACH the American people the TRUTH about the principles underlying our Constitution.

To do so, we must expand these programs further than we ever have before--and that brings me to my last point...

I'm asking for your most generous year-end support for next year's **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.

**If you haven 't renewed your support yet, can I count on you to please give your best tax-deductible year-end gift right away?**

**You can make your gift online, safely and securely, at this link:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b374c70199c443c89f92d1c5d81c3d66&_e=GTTHDqRX5rlQfEtBJw71bT2bqFoz8KmnhsJsDOwN_8TOnOuw1GXM01jHy6GAqP6FuUITJpFyZVx5g0vrnSEMKXlfTjl-BpQWSrVTA4ZeEkXfqYSFIrZMFn1Pb_IhJ6p402YAvDZ9X8ypzK6Edzb1Y75TDYXRqE3N58-VcaxTImVMjPurXNfWhRzY3cBKkdlMWp4-eGwdS1MZAW5ynjiswkOebsY8EvIkWKv0z79VmWXfIACs5pH4yFX-ka8b8Zd3Nni23qynJ_tIiLCWiHiwYn8V9woMH2lZJb01FOiGDjJM3l_ZkL0viTJbGE0OLrQZzxQJOCWCQBiEqfPletdMnbxYrogvrTe2f7-F0xa9JwfDgK8cZcysJzM62r7TMrYxfXvR2SiczvK4Iy0xS6hn8w%3D%3D)

And because we can count on the support of informed patriots like you, we'll continue to accomplish our goals without taking ONE PENNY of government funding--even indirectly in the form of student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY--to remain INDEPENDENT.

So please help us reach our $6,000,000 year-end online goal by **December 31** (that's only a few days away!).

Your gift of any size will help us restore liberty today, and secure liberty for the long term. After all, there is only one way to save liberty in America--EDUCATION.

Thank you for helping us meet this historic moment head-on--and for reading all the way to the end of this email! Really appreciate you,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** The era of Big Media is over. But next year, as legacy media attempts to cling to relevance, we can expect even more attacks. So I need your help to provide all our outreach, including _Imprimis_ , the Hillsdale College Podcast Network, and free online courses, to millions for FREE. Next year, we plan to expand our outreach to newer and younger audiences.

Thanks to the help of informed patriots like you, we remain on the vanguard of new media--standing up to the lies and propaganda of the legacy media with the TRUTH about the principles underlying our Constitution. This work will be even more important in 2025.

**That 's why I hope I can count on you today for a generous, tax-deductible gift to help us meet our $6,000,000 online funding goal--before December 31.** I've included your secure link to give right now here:

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b374c70199c443c89f92d1c5d81c3d66&_e=GTTHDqRX5rlQfEtBJw71bT2bqFoz8KmnhsJsDOwN_8TOnOuw1GXM01jHy6GAqP6FuUITJpFyZVx5g0vrnSEMKXlfTjl-BpQWSrVTA4ZeEkXfqYSFIrZMFn1Pb_IhJ6p402YAvDZ9X8ypzK6Edzb1Y75TDYXRqE3N58-VcaxTImVMjPurXNfWhRzY3cBKkdlMWp4-eGwdS1MZAW5ynjiswkOebsY8EvIkWKv0z79VmWVsFvCP7DxRg_OYrW-6rKmQQk4WLtV3zInJ-GkVk2mIwygKIJYucoc6hcECosyFCgoR7MBpUI-qgXRUg7_qxpFRONmw6uK8dlyvz6CcKKEhyiflpKBdjoEoGTL8sGu6d5cyFjFv9raN3XOoV3_PnjhMgk36CyazrVaO09NkOQx6BQ%3D%3D) [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=b374c70199c443c89f92d1c5d81c3d66&_t=FMwwYSD0Saf8nxl2ccza2nSaZ8Fvx2xYpURDiXTCP-0Cg6RwsEcfmLvlAifb8Cw_3wYNPRlt08o6heFXxpZeeQOBCBZrDPFeNjBpy4l05ciYhqr3PUk3vW0FbrB-RnNf)

---

name: Rick Larsen
subject: "Let us never negotiate out of fear. But let us never fear to negotiate."
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
The Republican Chaos Caucus is living up to its name this week and making the possibility of the government shutting down all too real.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98974046/518435667/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTljODE5Zi0zZmJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uWxgOogIBdBGfCfVIHV-sgYmNHGUW4H_BqFA4cItsoA=&emci=83d74182-37be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=b59c819f-3fbe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=9494239)
---

| | The Republican Chaos Caucus is living up to its name this week and making the possibility of the federal government shutting down all too real. My staff and I are working around the clock to avoid that outcome, which would shut off the services that Northwest Washington veterans, seniors, and working families need to live their lives — among other devastating impacts across the country. Here is my statement on a potential federal government shutdown: "Let us never negotiate out of fear. But let us never fear to negotiate." Democrats have continually negotiated bipartisan, good-faith agreements during this Congress. Take a look at the aviation safety bill, the defense bill, defending our values by supporting Ukraine, and many other issues where Democrats have been part of these agreements. The Democrats were part of the bipartisan, bicameral agreement to pass a bill to keep the federal government funded and provide disaster relief to families that are victims of Hurricanes Helene and Milton. Republicans, under direction from cosplaying President Elon Musk and a confused Donald Trump, have pulled out of the bipartisan agreement. The GOP helped write this agreement and the GOP Speaker was the only person with the authority to schedule a vote on it. The GOP folded like an old television tray once Musk ordered a government shutdown. Democrats stand ready to negotiate in good faith but don't know who, if anyone, is in charge with whom to negotiate. In the meantime, middle-class Americans are being held hostage by the billionaires who are pulling Trump's puppet strings. It is time for Republicans to stop the theatrics and get back to work. clean_body: The Republican Chaos Caucus is living up to its name this week and making the possibility of the government shutting down all too real. | | | | The Republican Chaos Caucus is living up to its name this week and making the possibility of the federal government shutting down all too real. My staff and I are working around the clock to avoid that outcome, which would shut off the services that Northwest Washington veterans, seniors, and working families need to live their lives — among other devastating impacts across the country. Here is my statement on a potential federal government shutdown: "Let us never negotiate out of fear. But let us never fear to negotiate." Democrats have continually negotiated bipartisan, good-faith agreements during this Congress. Take a look at the aviation safety bill, the defense bill, defending our values by supporting Ukraine, and many other issues where Democrats have been part of these agreements. The Democrats were part of the bipartisan, bicameral agreement to pass a bill to keep the federal government funded and provide disaster relief to families that are victims of Hurricanes Helene and Milton. Republicans, under direction from cosplaying President Elon Musk and a confused Donald Trump, have pulled out of the bipartisan agreement. The GOP helped write this agreement and the GOP Speaker was the only person with the authority to schedule a vote on it. The GOP folded like an old television tray once Musk ordered a government shutdown. Democrats stand ready to negotiate in good faith but don't know who, if anyone, is in charge with whom to negotiate. In the meantime, middle-class Americans are being held hostage by the billionaires who are pulling Trump's puppet strings. It is time for Republicans to stop the theatrics and get back to work. More soon, Rick | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. | This email was sent by . name: The Forward Party
subject: Looking Back, Moving Forward - What A Year We've Had
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Thank you to all who could come together last night - to those who couldn't, here's what you missed...

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_follow_up&n=1)
---
Thursday, December 19, 2024 | Peter -- Last night was a phenomenal gathering of Forawardists from across the country. Hundreds of you joined us to reflect on the successes of 2024 and plan out how we're going to keep winning in 2025. We heard from Forward leadership, some of our best volunteers, and even from **Senator-Elect John Curtis and Representative Don Davis** , the first members of the U.S. Congress to officially affiliate with the Forward Party. **The Silent(ish) Auction!** But that's not all. We also talked about an extra special opportunity for you all - a _silent(ish)* auction_ for **a lunch with either Forward Party Co-Founders Andrew Yang or Governor Christine Todd Whitman!**** (Both are up for auction) The auction is open until 5 pm today, and the **current winning bid is $30,000! Can you beat it?** We may even be able to give away more than one lunch, so make your pledges even if you can't beat the top one and you might just score yourself a lunch anyway. | [](https://home.forwardparty.com/yang_silent_auction?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_follow_up&n=2 "Bid On Lunch With Andrew Yang Now!") [Bid On Lunch With Andrew Yang Now!](https://home.forwardparty.com/yang_silent_auction?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_follow_up&n=2)
---
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/ctw_silent_auction?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_follow_up&n=3 "Bid On Lunch With Governor Whitman Now!") [Bid On Lunch With Governor Whitman Now!](https://home.forwardparty.com/ctw_silent_auction?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_follow_up&n=3)
---
Participation is easy! [Just go to this page to bid on lunch with Andrew Yang](https://home.forwardparty.com/yang_silent_auction?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_follow_up&n=4) and [this page to bid on lunch with Governor Whitman](https://home.forwardparty.com/ctw_silent_auction?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_follow_up&n=5) and make a pledge. Whoever makes the highest pledge before tonight at 5 pm will win the chance for lunch! If you aren't the winning pledge, you won't have to donate the amount you pledged (but we would appreciate anything you can chip in, anyway!).
**Support us into the next year!**
Finally - it's the season of giving, and two of our generous donors have committed to a **$20,000 match in December!***** That means every dollar you donate will count double (until we hit $20,000 raised)! Can you chip in and double your gift this year?
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate_2024_eoy?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_follow_up&n=6 "Chip In $25 Today!") [Chip In $25 Today!](https://home.forwardparty.com/donate_2024_eoy?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_follow_up&n=6)
---
Thank you for everything you’ve done to make this year such a success. We’re excited to see what we can accomplish together in 2025. Happy holidays and happy new year!
With Thanks,
The Forward Party
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_follow_up&n=7)[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_follow_up&n=8)[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_follow_up&n=9)[](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_follow_up&n=10)[https://home.forwardparty.com/](https://home.forwardparty.com/?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eoy_event_follow_up&n=11)

Senate Approves Defense Bill Blocking The Military From Funding Child
Sex Changes
http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7gb7918dngq3h0t0d9ervn9alplt722md4dfdlg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t46mqj4t5m6gpr8dhheirr7ctl6tr779hnmmrq6d9k65qn4t9h6uh60oj1cui64pt4c3jqct9jmgonadd461o74ttjekr7b89l6cqj7djl6mh39cdhmmh33dtm6qqb7dplk5obadd5mior9cbk69qfb8pieuqrb8pleeoj9ctn6mj31d5hm4qqct9gumj31d1jmsqjctt246h22sh2s8i6epj1cdim2or2c5h2bs

The U.S. Senate on Wednesday passed a defense bill that includes a

name: Anika Page
subject: Don’t Wait to Get Your Tickets: Reverend Joshua Robertson on School Choice
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/springspeakerseries-11573596?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Good afternoon Friend,
If you haven’t already, now is the perfect time to secure your spot for our next event featuring **Reverend Joshua Robertson, on Tuesday, February 4th, 2025!** Reverend Robertson is not only the Senior Pastor of The Rock Church but also a passionate advocate for educational opportunity. His work through founding the Black Pastors United for Education (BPUE) and The Rock City Learning Center has transformed the lives of countless students, showing the power of faith and determination to make a difference. This event will be an incredible opportunity to hear Reverend Robertson’s powerful message about how school choice can empower parents and improve outcomes for children across Mississippi.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=5337d9884a&e=5703353baa)
---
_Click above to purchase your tickets!_
| Tickets are available now, but they won’t last long—make sure to get yours early! As always, I'm looking forward to seeing you!
---
| |
---
Warmest wishes,

Anika Page
Director of Operations
---
|
---

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 12/19/2024
body:
Tina Peters has been transferred from Mesa County to Larimer County jail
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hey everyone,
I asked my followers on X/Twitter what they miss most about old-school Colorado and the [responses](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) have both broken and warmed my heart. I miss going skiing in the 80s and 90s in about an hour up I-70 to A-Basin. Day trips stink now! What do you miss most about the good ole' days? Reply to this email or respond on the X thread [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)!
Here's a summary of today's newsletter:
**🏔️ Here in Colorado...** Former Mesa County Clerk Tina Peters has been [transferred to Larimer County Jail](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) due to safety concerns, marking the next phase of her nine-year sentence for a range of charges, including official misconduct and conspiracy. Meanwhile, a Healthier Colorado poll shows undecided voters dominate the [2026 Democratic gubernatorial race](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), with potential candidates like Joe Neguse and Jena Griswold vying for attention amidst scrutiny over their records.

🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** Trump's incoming "border czar" Tom Homan urged Aurora police to collaborate with ICE after the [arrest of 14 gang members](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). ****
**🗣️ RMV Commentary Spotlight...** Kelly Sloan critiques the Left’s [alarming justifications for violence](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in response to corporate policies, using the murder of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson as a stark example of eroding law and order. We also feature a similiar opinion piece where C.J. Garbo warns against the cultural normalization of violence, arguing for a [recommitment to justice](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and moral values as societal pillars. Greg Walcher calls out federal agencies for contributing to [environmental mismanagement](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) while punishing others.
This is the Mountain Minute for Thursday, December 19, 2024.
– Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Tina Peters has been transferred from Mesa County to Larimer County jail](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY BRIAN PORTER, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
Former Mesa County Clerk and Recorder Tina Peters has been transferred from the Mesa County jail to the Larimer County jail.
According to Larimer County booking information, Peters was processed as an inmate into the Larimer County jail at 11:53 a.m. Wednesday. No other booking information was provided.
On Oct. 3, 2024, Judge Matthew Barrett sentenced Peters to a 9-year prison sentence after she was previously found guilty of three counts of attempting to influence a public servant, conspiracy to commit criminal impersonation, official misconduct, violation of duty and failure to comply with an order by the secretary of state.
She was immediately taken into custody following sentencing. The sentence includes 120 days in the Mesa County jail and 8.5 years in the Colorado Department of Corrections, with three years of parole following her incarceration. As of Dec. 18, Peters had served 76 days of her sentence in the Mesa County jail.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**

**[Who will Democrats support for governor in 2026? Poll is inconclusive](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [COLORADO POLITICS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* A Healthier Colorado poll reveals that 37% of Democratic and unaffiliated voters remain undecided about their preferred candidate for Colorado's 2026 gubernatorial race.
* Among potential candidates, Jena Griswold leads in both favorability and unfavorability, while Joe Neguse and Ken Salazar show consistent approval ratings. Phil Weiser lags with the lowest favorability score.
* None of the individuals included in the survey have officially declared their candidacy, reflecting an early and competitive stage in the race to succeed term-limited Governor Jared Polis.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Incoming Trump ‘border czar’ has a message for Aurora chief of police after arrest of suspected gang members](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [FOX NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Incoming "border czar" Tom Homan urged Aurora Police Chief Todd Chamberlain to collaborate with ICE in deporting 14 arrested gang members linked to violent crimes.
* Homan emphasized the need for local law enforcement to assist in combating transnational crime and expressed readiness to work with mayors nationwide on immigration issues.
* President-elect Trump announced plans for the largest deportation effort in U.S. history, starting with violent criminals, as part of a broader strategy to address the border crisis.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Sloan: CEO killing is case study in Left’s anarchical view of law](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY KELLY SLOAN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_The political diagnosticians poking around at the remains of the last election, on behalf of the Democratic Party, are compiling a gestating list of items seeking to explain why what happened on Nov. 7._
_The lists get pretty long, but close to the top of nearly all of them is the general sense that the streets are manifestly less safe than were even four years ago; that the decay in respect for law and order has made our erstwhile civil society far less civil and far more dangerous._
_This sort of post-mortem is a normal and healthy exercise in democratic hygiene, undertaken by both parties periodically, the point of which is to identify what motivates the voters and to adjust approaches to self-government accordingly. One would expect, then, that the Democrats, who just received a fairly thorough rebuke from the voters, would take pains to move in a direction that might assure the public that their commitment to the maintenance of civilized order is intact._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Garbo: The alarming normalization of murder in Brian Thompson’s death](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY C.J. GARBO, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_A recent poll revealing that 41% of young voters find the murder of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson acceptable is deeply troubling._
_This statistic underscores a dangerous shift in societal values, one that signals a disregard for the sanctity of life and a fundamental misunderstanding of justice. Such attitudes are symptomatic of a society in moral decay, where divisive rhetoric and a growing disillusionment with institutions have fostered a warped perception of right and wrong._ ___Political polarization and incendiary rhetoric have created an environment where individuals increasingly see themselves as arbiters of justice. When leaders frame opposition as not just wrong but inherently evil, it legitimizes extreme responses. This degradation of civil discourse erodes faith in the judicial system, leaving many — particularly young people — feeling as though justice is unattainable through lawful means._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Walcher: Federal agencies should look in the mirror](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY GREG WALCHER, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_In the 1950 movie version of Grimm’s Fairy Tale, the cruel stepmother scolds Cinderella, “You clumsy little fool – clean that up!” But, of course, it was the stepmother, not Cinderella, who made the mess._
_Sometimes it seems like the world is full of people who expect others to clean up their messes._
_It is a recurring theme among critics of federal agencies, which often regulate and even fine others for environmental damage, but rarely admit the role they themselves played in creating the problem. A lawsuit against the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service (USFWS), filed by the Rocky Mountain Elk Foundation and the Property and Environment Research Center (PERC), has again focused attention on an agency blaming everyone but itself._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️**
**[Schumann: Socialist seeds in conservative soil? The new battle for Western Colorado’s identity](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY JEN SCHUMANN | COMMENTARY | DECEMBER 18** _Beneath the wide-open skies of Western Colorado, a clash of ideologies is quietly unfolding that could shake the foundations of its conservative stronghold._
**[‘Something is seriously wrong, and we’re going to try and fix it,’ APD Chief Chamberlain says in vision for future](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY BRIAN PORTER****| LOCAL | DECEMBER 17** _It was a long night for Todd Chamberlain and the Aurora Police Department. Oft the subject of news reports during the last year, The Edge at Lowry apartments were yet again the location of overnight police activity Tuesday, Dec. 17._
[**‘Bound, pistol-whipped, beat, victimized and terrorized’: Aurora PD chief describes home invasion**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[****](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**BY BRIAN PORTER****| LOCAL |****DECEMBER 17** _More than a dozen persons were arrested overnight related to an armed home invasion in the 1200 block of Dallas St. in Aurora._ _“This is without question a gang incident,” said Police Chief Todd Chamberlain. “It could be [Tren de Aragua], it could be [a gang] other than TdA. This is gang activity and there are Venezuelans involved.”_ __

clean_body: Tina Peters has been transferred from Mesa County to Larimer County jail | | | | PRESENTED BY | | Hey everyone, I asked my followers on X/Twitter what they miss most about old-school Colorado and the have both broken and warmed my heart. I miss going skiing in the 80s and 90s in about an hour up I-70 to A-Basin. Day trips stink now! What do you miss most about the good ole' days? Reply to this email or respond on the X thread ! Here's a summary of today's newsletter: 🏔️ Here in Colorado... Former Mesa County Clerk Tina Peters has been due to safety concerns, marking the next phase of her nine-year sentence for a range of charges, including official misconduct and conspiracy. Meanwhile, a Healthier Colorado poll shows undecided voters dominate the , with potential candidates like Joe Neguse and Jena Griswold vying for attention amidst scrutiny over their records. 🇺🇸 On the National Stage... Trump's incoming "border czar" Tom Homan urged Aurora police to collaborate with ICE after the . ** 🗣️ RMV Commentary Spotlight... Kelly Sloan critiques the Left’s in response to corporate policies, using the murder of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson as a stark example of eroding law and order. We also feature a similiar opinion piece where C.J. Garbo warns against the cultural normalization of violence, arguing for a and moral values as societal pillars. Greg Walcher calls out federal agencies for contributing to while punishing others. This is the Mountain Minute for Thursday, December 19, 2024. – Heidi Ganahl | TODAY'S TOP STORIES BY BRIAN PORTER, Former Mesa County Clerk and Recorder Tina Peters has been transferred from the Mesa County jail to the Larimer County jail. According to Larimer County booking information, Peters was processed as an inmate into the Larimer County jail at 11:53 a.m. Wednesday. No other booking information was provided. On Oct. 3, 2024, Judge Matthew Barrett sentenced Peters to a 9-year prison sentence after she was previously found guilty of three counts of attempting to influence a public servant, conspiracy to commit criminal impersonation, official misconduct, violation of duty and failure to comply with an order by the secretary of state. She was immediately taken into custody following sentencing. The sentence includes 120 days in the Mesa County jail and 8.5 years in the Colorado Department of Corrections, with three years of parole following her incarceration. As of Dec. 18, Peters had served 76 days of her sentence in the Mesa County jail. | The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support! | A Healthier Colorado poll reveals that 37% of Democratic and unaffiliated voters remain undecided about their preferred candidate for Colorado's 2026 gubernatorial race. Among potential candidates, Jena Griswold leads in both favorability and unfavorability, while Joe Neguse and Ken Salazar show consistent approval ratings. Phil Weiser lags with the lowest favorability score. None of the individuals included in the survey have officially declared their candidacy, reflecting an early and competitive stage in the race to succeed term-limited Governor Jared Polis. | Incoming "border czar" Tom Homan urged Aurora Police Chief Todd Chamberlain to collaborate with ICE in deporting 14 arrested gang members linked to violent crimes. Homan emphasized the need for local law enforcement to assist in combating transnational crime and expressed readiness to work with mayors nationwide on immigration issues. President-elect Trump announced plans for the largest deportation effort in U.S. history, starting with violent criminals, as part of a broader strategy to address the border crisis. | BY KELLY SLOAN, The political diagnosticians poking around at the remains of the last election, on behalf of the Democratic Party, are compiling a gestating list of items seeking to explain why what happened on Nov. 7. The lists get pretty long, but close to the top of nearly all of them is the general sense that the streets are manifestly less safe than were even four years ago; that the decay in respect for law and order has made our erstwhile civil society far less civil and far more dangerous. This sort of post-mortem is a normal and healthy exercise in democratic hygiene, undertaken by both parties periodically, the point of which is to identify what motivates the voters and to adjust approaches to self-government accordingly. One would expect, then, that the Democrats, who just received a fairly thorough rebuke from the voters, would take pains to move in a direction that might assure the public that their commitment to the maintenance of civilized order is intact. | BY C.J. GARBO, A recent poll revealing that 41% of young voters find the murder of UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson acceptable is deeply troubling. This statistic underscores a dangerous shift in societal values, one that signals a disregard for the sanctity of life and a fundamental misunderstanding of justice. Such attitudes are symptomatic of a society in moral decay, where divisive rhetoric and a growing disillusionment with institutions have fostered a warped perception of right and wrong. _Political polarization and incendiary rhetoric have created an environment where individuals increasingly see themselves as arbiters of justice. When leaders frame opposition as not just wrong but inherently evil, it legitimizes extreme responses. This degradation of civil discourse erodes faith in the judicial system, leaving many — particularly young people — feeling as though justice is unattainable through lawful means. | BY GREG WALCHER, In the 1950 movie version of Grimm’s Fairy Tale, the cruel stepmother scolds Cinderella, “You clumsy little fool – clean that up!” But, of course, it was the stepmother, not Cinderella, who made the mess. Sometimes it seems like the world is full of people who expect others to clean up their messes. It is a recurring theme among critics of federal agencies, which often regulate and even fine others for environmental damage, but rarely admit the role they themselves played in creating the problem. BY BRIAN PORTER**| LOCAL | DECEMBER 17 It was a long night for Todd Chamberlain and the Aurora Police Department. Dear Friend,
---
Today I wanted to do a #ThrowbackThursday to last year's New Year's Eve celebration in Phoenix, Arizona! Thousands of Believers flooded into Phoenix to bring worship into 2024. It served as a launch into 2024 and the final leg of the Kingdom to the Capitol Tour. And what happened in Phoenix was POWERFUL!! _**Check the 2023 NYE recap below!**_
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=adc42ababf4a4eaf887cddeec13305da&_e=DSJms6yJLKJGpfqtPwoZkLs4JA1pMWJdhXveHKIKFcTr2dsAEQA3UnOxqTFHD1KlTKmpdkF_H6g7AbeoJl3ThcwxG96S9Typx7k92bor6pj21R3cQ1YG1TUd0rz6s3xvV5jF-lZHYknEmos1Hb5Hmw_gvuWilMHsc34alkZ-S-Oh2k1LHMs-7AVDplSEf0htxvazB_gNe9mV1JJjNuGrEC7t_ZQDdsd_5bLLy2VvV-j86zAtaZ-L_gd-ZRyV8UfiFrD2CgKvVC3MbB7RjkSOrrXM5riRUyihqR5yWHFZx-2QFEBL4YqtynV2Ql5OdiZR)
---
The reason we look back to last New Year's Eve is in anticipation of what God has in store for THIS New Year's Eve. In less than two weeks, Let Us Worship will take over Clover Park in Port St. Lucie, Florida, and we want to see thousands of Believers descend on the stadium and pack the stands for Him!!! Worship will start at 9PM and go all through the night and into the new year!

This is our last revival of the year, and we are looking for Believers to help partner with us to make it possible. If you want to help fund our last revival of the year, contribute **[HERE](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=adc42ababf4a4eaf887cddeec13305da&_e=DSJms6yJLKJGpfqtPwoZkLs4JA1pMWJdhXveHKIKFcRn5I1IZxN1Ar92--yR5bCpEhflzxQz5ojsZBiAaJ5tFzoGkzSg8gUmCuw-yVh4YbP51yNhXhvL43IvltmATL6QD7DKpcB08Gh-wbuzS1IUE4SirCtIJu_YTD9QGNS5CRD2P_IfR2qbdT-RUWvUXHLbkGmNMZQliiJVVgd2WvytXYTNFI2gCromZ4smSQEvkgct7Dl6uU6ePl-YUiVkRyhecjiwmSMZvV_0bF6fRMwGWnCm1KoatSaOAhnwgb1f7kSndj9OjIKTrMbMNvt8GWNo)** or at the button below!

Peter,
---
The continuing resolution bill is 1500 pages of woke garbage and pork barrel spending. How is this travesty coming from a Republican House?! The American people spoke, and this is the kind of monstrosity they rejected at the ballot box!

At every turn, President Trump is being saddled with disastrous policies before he gets into office, starting with a dangerous escalation with Russia, and now a bloated bill. This continuing resolution bill won't get my vote-- they need to go back to square one!

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Stop the indoctrination of our children
body:
Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. | | | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---
| |
---
| | Peter, Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Take it from me, Peter, as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, **_you are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children_**. Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---

name: Wes Moore
subject: Who’ll get the crown?
body:
Friend, you know I love Baltimore Ravens football.

Saturday is a big matchup at the Bank. Yep, there are games on Saturday now too. My apologies to all those football fan spouses whose loved ones will be glued to the TV the whole weekend. The 10-4 Pittsburgh Steelers are taking on our 9-5 Ravens in a game that could ultimately decide who gets the AFC North crown.

As we close out the season strong, I’m making it an official priority for all Marylanders: let’s see as much visible support as possible for our team.

I want jerseys worn to work.

Flags on cars and porches.

Heck, let me see those purple camo sweatpants.

Let’s go, Flock!

Elevate,

Wes

P.S. This photo was one of the best perks of serving our state as Governor.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90457/images/unnamed.png]

Contribute » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20241219-1?refcode=em20241219-1]

---

name: Judicial Watch On the Air Report
subject: Fani Willis Caught Red-Handed!
body:
Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton joins "The Simon Conway Show" to discuss Fulton County, Georgia District Attorney Fani Willis being found in default for not answering Judicial Watch's open records request for records about her office's communications with Special Counsel Jack Smith and the House January 6th Select Committee.
| | | | |
---
|
---
---
|
---
| **Fani Willis Caught Red-Handed!

[](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=71617&L=34124&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1OWElZenNtajF6RSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1vbit0aGUrYWlyJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=e837cab2f0df68d38e2dc0490d38409d225b8047517d4270fd9d9956e080d468)** Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton joins "The Simon Conway Show" to discuss Fulton County, Georgia District Attorney Fani Willis being found in default for not answering Judicial Watch's open records request for records about her office's communications with Special Counsel Jack Smith and the House January 6th Select Committee.

**FARRELL: Fani Willis is Still Hiding Records!

–--SAMPLE OF THE THANK YOU PRESIDENT BIDEN CARD BEGINS BELOW–--
Dear President Biden,

I wanted to take a second to **_thank you_** for all that you have done for our country over the past four years.

You created a model for what good, strong Democratic leadership looks like.

You put the American people’s interests first and created millions of jobs, defended democracy here and abroad, and passed historic climate legislation.

As we step into the New Year, I want you to know that thousands of Democrats just like me are energized and prepared to build on your accomplishments. **[That’s why I’m signing this card to THANK YOU and show my commitment to keep fighting for the Democratic agenda in 2025 so we can keep electing Democrats and defend democracy! »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98976589/518444233/-2109688963?refcode=NDCAF_20241219_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDViNzYwMC00OGJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g8_yMQCewj6gg0dnB30yx4sB2nmtpkI0NmyOpf6g8vg=&emci=81cafeb8-25be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=345b7600-48be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=48524772)** | [ADD YOUR NAME TO SIGN THE THANK PRESIDENT BIDEN CARD »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98976590/518444234/-2109688963?refcode=NDCAF_20241219_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDViNzYwMC00OGJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g8_yMQCewj6gg0dnB30yx4sB2nmtpkI0NmyOpf6g8vg=&emci=81cafeb8-25be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=345b7600-48be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=48524772)

name: Liz Walters, ODP Chair
subject: Guess what Ohio Republicans want for Christmas?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
You’re not going to believe what’s on their list
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98976669/518444659/469102654?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_WishList_241219_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjBjMWRkNy00OGJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M9VMbU80mz48IRocFEskWwfYGGWty_Om5Pxpyu2Aztk=) Team,

Ohio Republicans made the naughty list this year. So naturally, their Christmas wish list is about as terrifying as you’d imagine.

Before we ask you to [_**chip in to help us fight back against the GOP’s dangerous agenda,**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98976670/518444660/469102654?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_WishList_241219_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjBjMWRkNy00OGJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M9VMbU80mz48IRocFEskWwfYGGWty_Om5Pxpyu2Aztk=) here’s a sneak peek at what they want under the tree this year:
* **A Senate seat for special interests:** Ohio Republicans are quietly hoping for a surprise gift this holiday season – a Senate appointment to replace J.D. Vance. But no matter who they unwrap, their loyalty will be to extreme special interests, not Ohioans.

* **A Trump endorsement:** The GOP’s wish list is topped by one thing: Donald Trump’s endorsement. As Republican hopefuls for every federal & state office scramble to be the most extreme candidate in the race, Trump – a 34-time convicted felon – is busy preparing disastrous policies that Ohioans will regret finding under the tree.

* **A free power grab for AG Yost:** Dave Yost has a special gift in mind – unearned power to reject citizen petitions he doesn’t like. Even after the courts said no, GOP legislators want to wrap it up and deliver it to him anyway, silencing Ohioans’ voices in the process.

* **A cover-up for DeWine, Husted, & Yost’s bribery:** State officials are hoping for a different holiday miracle: erasing their roles in the largest corruption scandal in Ohio history. But no amount of ribbon and wrapping paper can cover up the evidence voters will remember.

Long story short: they want total control, no accountability, and a fast track to trampling over our democracy.

[_**But here’s the kicker: We’re the Grinch in their story, and we’re here to steal their Christmas.
