clean_body: You’re not going to believe what’s on their list | = Team, Ohio Republicans made the naughty list this year. So naturally, their Christmas wish list is about as terrifying as you’d imagine. Before we ask you to = here’s a sneak peek at what they want under the tree this year: A Senate seat for special interests: Ohio Republicans are quietly hoping for a surprise gift this holiday season – a Senate appointment to replace J.D. Vance. But no matter who they unwrap, their loyalty will be to extreme special interests, not Ohioans. A Trump endorsement: The GOP’s wish list is topped by one thing: Donald Trump’s endorsement. As Republican hopefuls for every federal & state office scramble to be the most extreme candidate in the race, Trump – a 34-time convicted felon – is busy preparing disastrous policies that Ohioans will regret finding under the tree. A free power grab for AG Yost: Dave Yost has a special gift in mind – unearned power to reject citizen petitions he doesn’t like. Even after the courts said no, GOP legislators want to wrap it up and deliver it to him anyway, silencing Ohioans’ voices in the process. A cover-up for DeWine, Husted, & Yost’s bribery: State officials are hoping for a different holiday miracle: erasing their roles in the largest corruption scandal in Ohio history. But no amount of ribbon and wrapping paper can cover up the evidence voters will remember. Long story short: they want total control, no accountability, and a fast track to trampling over our democracy. = Don’t let them unwrap their dream of turning Ohio into a right-wing fantasyland. Thank you, Liz Walters, ODP Chair = | Ohio Democratic Party PO Box 130 Columbus, Ohio 43216 | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Click here to from the Ohio Democratic Party's email list.

Jennifer Homendy, the National Transportation Safety Board (NTSB) Chair, is facing mounting criticism for refusing to share newly uncovered evidence of manufacturing defects connected to the two deadly 737 MAX crashes with international accident investigators. The sharing of relevant and potentially significant information is a legal requirement under International Civil Aviation Organization (ICAO) Annex 13 standards.
In a November 29, 2024 letter addressed to Ms. Homendy, The Foundation for Aviation Safety cited new evidence which includes official Boeing and FAA documents that were not shared with international accident investigators in the wake of the 2018 Lion Air Flight 610 (JT610) and 2019 Ethiopian Airlines Flight 302 (ET302) disasters, which claimed 347 lives1.
The letter draws a striking comparison between the NTSB's approach to the 737 MAX investigations and its more thorough examination of the January 2024 Alaska Airlines blowout accident. The Foundation delivered the new evidence to the NTSB in July, arguing that Boeing successfully diverted attention away from the manufacturer's operations following the MAX crashes but was unable to do so in the aftermath of the Alaska accident. After the Alaska accident the NTSB launched a full investigation into Boeing's manufacturing processes.
In a sharp critique, the letter points out a glaring oversight: after the two fatal crashes of the two month old JT610 airplane and the four month old ET302 airplane, international investigators failed to examine Boeing's Renton, Washington factory where the 737 MAX is assembled. ...

clean_body: NTSB Chair Sparks Outrage by Refusing to Share Key Evidence with International Crash Investigators | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? NTSB Chair Sparks Outrage by Refusing to Share Key Evidence with International Crash Investigators | Dec 19 ---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | Jennifer Homendy, the National Transportation Safety Board (NTSB) Chair, is facing mounting criticism for refusing to share newly uncovered evidence of manufacturing defects connected to the two deadly 737 MAX crashes with international accident investigators. The sharing of relevant and potentially significant information is a legal requirement under International Civil Aviation Organization (ICAO) Annex 13 standards. In a November 29, 2024 letter addressed to Ms. Homendy, The Foundation for Aviation Safety cited new evidence which includes official Boeing and FAA documents that were not shared with international accident investigators in the wake of the 2018 Lion Air Flight 610 (JT610) and 2019 Ethiopian Airlines Flight 302 (ET302) disasters, which claimed 347 lives1. The letter draws a striking comparison between the NTSB's approach to the 737 MAX investigations and its more thorough examination of the January 2024 Alaska Airlines blowout accident. The Foundation delivered the new evidence to the NTSB in July, arguing that Boeing successfully diverted attention away from the manufacturer's operations following the MAX crashes but was unable to do so in the aftermath of the Alaska accident. After the Alaska accident the NTSB launched a full investigation into Boeing's manufacturing processes. In a sharp critique, the letter points out a glaring oversight: after the two fatal crashes of the two month old JT610 airplane and the four month old ET302 airplane, international investigators failed to examine Boeing's Renton, Washington factory where the 737 MAX is assembled. ... Continue reading this post for free in the Substack app | | | | | | | (C) 2024 Rebekah Jones PO BOX 3371, Silver Spring, MD 20918 ? ?

body:
Did you know that Amazon is suing the federal government in an attempt to abolish the National Labor Relations Board? | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWagAKMZbD6yK5h_eZEQ_vI-D1PXiNghYH2PGv0tHxfzBJ6aFxIl4I4I9kBnP0v94CzkX5BqRQDZrPFEpFLXHXK7U4kkw7YA-4W4LRW9s1aYm2-CNDSBFaDyDN1fJdddJMAfJPyHF6-EuSPSOv8mXXnJ13mOoWbQ0ASpp2l93fpU2d59-4nPddAp1aLvVZWa2R9waWpwU6GkvExWr5svr-MN8PGxfXNgmDNEKOqbYQ740/4cf/61gL-F9hT9OkxjE6Ej1xeg/h0/h001.EbBUZYTIlNPaiN61JW12K2UsFlk4eh8t7s-QEpO4zAM)

Friend, Amazon workers are on strike. In the spring of 2022, Amazon warehouse workers on Staten Island, New York voted to become the first unionized Amazon workers in the country. I know the power of unions. When my dad joined the UAW, working the assembly line at Ford, our family got healthcare coverage for the first time. Unions are instrumental in achieving fair wages, safe work environments, fair scheduling, and more. But, more than two-and-a-half years later, management at Amazon is still refusing to negotiate a contract with Amazon Labor Union – International Brotherhood of Teamsters Local 1. But Staten Island Amazon workers are not alone. From southern California to Skokie, Illinois to Queens, New York, workers at numerous Amazon facilities have all voted to strike. [**Click here to watch a new report from our allies at More Perfect Union, where they speak with striking Amazon workers, then add your name to demand Amazon come to the table and negotiate a fair union **Did you know that Amazon is suing the federal government in an attempt to abolish the National Labor Relations Board (NLRB), which advocates for workers rights, including the right to unionize?**
Thanks to the NLRB, we know that in 2022, Amazon was responsible for 53% of all injuries in the warehouse industry, even as Amazon employs just 36% of warehouse workers in the U.S.
That same year, the NLRB ordered a new union election at an Amazon warehouse in Bessemer, Alabama, ruling that Amazon had illegally interfered with the previous year’s union vote, manipulating the manner of the election to try to intimidate workers.
[**Click here to check out this brand new report on Amazon workers striking at a Staten Island Amazon warehouse, then add your name to stand in solidarity with workers today.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-8BpvUjLjYtzo-jv5kKOUr97JfFzupqVga2KFpcJY1QR90RrNayprjQUQqwxqCwepAatwPwmTBWVJfPqQqpsG2dbmDpP8lCWdbhfs51i2870Ka8Ju9rNR5fUA2g-SFpp0UNaUyV4AOgKkpopXZPQHXgk-1RHLDDhrI_-Rba5zN2uRIuUZ92GFDxmnlJFjkHhvS2y-bfhPu2-vFgDqTWIinWjsI6b-7W9579SMCdFFmM2F-YaMQc-IsVey3bUqJCsQrk82tQDWuKeHV_1jkVaNPa5mbWsgg5MZq3w7z_mycIN4wozPOzehiDINlKW_kuGbkfs-J9WpGfsZOdQkxS8Bcwb42SY0922w0N2JIXFhne-vtT5yn8tsIrRFtAq4QbTvsCeSg5dNTqktYb_OWGG3K9E7Bh3s4C-B85N3Jmk_4AD8DhQd7jn_E55YDnMJuXj_1RdfLQBT1T21hyllmm8k-_U_V5Y_SHjae_NLoKngGv_TKWfhaAPt4AdqjpxIfA72ImxONOVIjY01dCzVxGlky/4cf/61gL-F9hT9OkxjE6Ej1xeg/h4/h001.j7pF2ZbZy4-71F_ssZLX7JuArD86T2d3VFxorPj5Z6M)
Together, we're uplifting the demands of workers everywhere as they stand up to greedy corporations that put shareholder profits over workers’ rights and wages.
In solidarity,
Rashida

name: April McClain Delaney
subject: Trump and Elon Musk are leading us to a shutdown
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY APRIL MCCLAIN DELANEY FOR CONGRESS
body:
Yesterday, the Trump-Elon partnership killed a critical spending bill that would have provided funding for disaster relief, critical infrastructure, economic assistance for farmers, and repairs for the Scott Key Bridge here in Maryland.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98976807/518445280/-1583825582?refcode=BLU_EM_AMDC_2024-12-19_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzY0MTY3MWEtNGFiZS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AQQlH5b_kLNEfMaaYrrjl_CvO0B7Rmay9GuVyGQ44Fc=)
---
| Peter,

If you haven’t been keeping up with the news cycle this week, Trump and House Republicans, led by Elon Musk, are leading us to a potential government shutdown right before the holidays.

Yesterday, the Trump-Elon partnership killed a critical spending bill that would have provided funding for disaster relief, critical infrastructure, economic assistance for farmers, and repairs for the Scott Key Bridge here in Maryland. Without a new deal before midnight tomorrow, we risk a government shutdown–a possibility that would impact millions of Americans.

Here in our state, **_Marylanders stand to lose millions of dollars in disaster relief and economic assistance for farmers._

With Elon Musk at the helm, Trump and his tiny Republican majority in Congress have decided to put the interests of the wealthiest man in the world ahead of the American people.** Instead of working across the aisle, Republicans have steered us away from the bipartisan plan. Millions of farmers, veterans, seniors, and families across the country will be impacted by this shutdown, and the long-term implications of this Trump-Elon partnership are beyond concerning.

**Our communities deserve leaders who lead with integrity and work together to find common ground, not to line their own pockets. In Congress, I’ll make sure I spend every spare minute working to deliver for Marylanders and fighting back against egregious partisan nonsense.[_I hope I’ll have your support._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98976808/518445281/-743377158?refcode=BLU_EM_AMDC_2024-12-19_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzY0MTY3MWEtNGFiZS1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AQQlH5b_kLNEfMaaYrrjl_CvO0B7Rmay9GuVyGQ44Fc=)**

Onward,

April

clean_body: Yesterday, the Trump-Elon partnership killed a critical spending bill that would have provided funding for disaster relief, critical infrastructure, economic assistance for farmers, and repairs for the Scott Key Bridge here in Maryland. | = | Peter, If you haven’t been keeping up with the news cycle this week, Trump and House Republicans, led by Elon Musk, are leading us to a potential government shutdown right before the holidays. Yesterday, the Trump-Elon partnership killed a critical spending bill that would have provided funding for disaster relief, critical infrastructure, economic assistance for farmers, and repairs for the Scott Key Bridge here in Maryland. Without a new deal before midnight tomorrow, we risk a government shutdown–a possibility that would impact millions of Americans. Here in our state, Marylanders stand to lose millions of dollars in disaster relief and economic assistance for farmers. With Elon Musk at the helm, Trump and his tiny Republican majority in Congress have decided to put the interests of the wealthiest man in the world ahead of the American people. Instead of working across the aisle, Republicans have steered us away from the bipartisan plan. Millions of farmers, veterans, seniors, and families across the country will be impacted by this shutdown, and the long-term implications of this Trump-Elon partnership are beyond concerning. Our communities deserve leaders who lead with integrity and work together to find common ground, not to line their own pockets. In Congress, I’ll make sure I spend every spare minute working to deliver for Marylanders and fighting back against egregious partisan nonsense.= Onward, April | = * | | = PAID FOR BY APRIL MCCLAIN DELANEY FOR CONGRESS April McClain Delaney for Congress PO Box 83940 Gaithersburg, MD 20883-83940 United States | = = We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. name: Hillsdale College via Liberty Pulse
subject: Preserving liberty and free government
body:
Our nation is at a crossroads. Patriotic Americans have an opportunity in 2025 to take fundamental steps...

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=5041bfc486c44896a49d2859c87f185d&_t=2PYo_IY026KCsPPgCuOnlDi1NXEvQZdiF0ZPj6nC9F1sF9TGJkNwKZD_Hxn0_p2UJU-3q3ESF3lwB1537_7cTW7jpXeENPVP4oC8EeIYOKz-Ycb-gbSD5osMoYOalwqN)_
---
[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=5041bfc486c44896a49d2859c87f185d&_e=rRvqdBhdhPGQJfxhW2yJOYgyQ-NxPSFNX2-y0m8VMDi6hm7WPfM6vVO-tOmEiptoyY10RdLTkJ71nrTwEM7Fy0eIFlT8DG3qJQDrSkrS-X9CBlOwRKbcriPorTbHAK_TDDkqVcebJhNlShp23gmU3_K0fuGNhJcHWiKdTCkw7DASdkjCRDSPK6p8tR_bnASY0WwUE6Zrme1ZnUCdAKsDdM-yTIGRoatrcQC8Dc5EpJIrnh5svYTzz-qddCFvtTJSFMjW0AM3hv4XExQXGL1WMLCYUtJ3odAUk1QXWEuC7fDKv-tTBphCsyFRdNZcPZLgBwKoSrKFAEtHS3gp0-8xWcxHPe9q9UDIvnCHucfn2mf1811YSHzPMhkCpPpPjy_1)
| |
Dear Friend,

Our nation is at a crossroads. Patriotic Americans have an opportunity in 2025 to take fundamental steps in the direction of reviving and preserving liberty and free government.

It is imperative to make the most of this opportunity in order to pass on the blessings of the American way of life to future generations.

As you may know, Hillsdale College is the only educational institution in the country that is in a strong position to reach and teach millions of Americans about America's founding principles and its great heritage of liberty. And we are expanding our efforts to do just that.

To press forward with our educational mission on behalf of liberty during a critical time for America, we have set an ambitious goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31 to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education** in 2025.

[Will you partner with us in defending the cause of liberty and free government nationwide through education with your year-end support and make a generous gift to Hillsdale College today?](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=5041bfc486c44896a49d2859c87f185d&_e=rRvqdBhdhPGQJfxhW2yJOYgyQ-NxPSFNX2-y0m8VMDi6hm7WPfM6vVO-tOmEiptoyY10RdLTkJ71nrTwEM7Fy0eIFlT8DG3qJQDrSkrS-X9CBlOwRKbcriPorTbHAK_TDDkqVcebJhNlShp23gmU3_K0fuGNhJcHWiKdTCkw7DASdkjCRDSPK6p8tR_bnASY0WwUE6Zrme1ZnUCdAKsDdM-yTIGRoatrcQC8Dc5EpJI_AZZ4MVi_nSXo8W-4OsFPjixFi6aLyfyfe0fH9W3-lNkcOF28WcaotsymzJSGRNjof0kC-UJAjmJop9BXORHFx2GywgNj5pl4VTX1cw9eKtWnRv1IxCuyQSnT5pBsHCQmfPBMkjLnNoWnN4oiul-Q)

What all of us do today will have significant consequences for the survival of the American way of life. We have the opportunity to make 2025 a year that future American patriots will look back on with gratitude.

Make no mistake. Powerful forces who seek to undermine our way of life--not only socialist politicians but also the legacy media, the entertainment industry, and Big Tech--will be working tirelessly to undermine liberty and free government, including in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.

Indeed, successfully engaging the Left on the battleground of American education is of fundamental importance if we are to revive and preserve liberty for future generations.

But success will require the faithful and generous support of patriotic Americans like you--citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty in a free republic. [That's why we're asking for your year-end support to continue and expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=5041bfc486c44896a49d2859c87f185d&_e=rRvqdBhdhPGQJfxhW2yJOYgyQ-NxPSFNX2-y0m8VMDi6hm7WPfM6vVO-tOmEiptoyY10RdLTkJ71nrTwEM7Fy0eIFlT8DG3qJQDrSkrS-X9CBlOwRKbcriPorTbHAK_TDDkqVcebJhNlShp23gmU3_K0fuGNhJcHWiKdTCkw7DASdkjCRDSPK6p8tR_bnASY0WwUE6Zrme1ZnUCdAKsDdM-yTIGRoatrcQC8Dc5EpJJgzso-6YJKFDh2bNiK6PUzW9JabNuBlvgiYgiwg_bl08OITdYz8Z6rHuhvEui_qxI-JE0DBmsrv6ZwBQBj168rJuh_NdB13Mo_0WzEvtl0vlgtqG8_uxhn2_h0lJLFZ1dVaKGRJsm2cvjTgas5Q1m_)

**We must do all that we possibly can.**

With the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's educational mission, we are determined to redouble our efforts at this critical time for our nation.

You will help us to ...

* **Reach an additional 600,000 American households and businesses with _Imprimis_ , our monthly digest of liberty.** With your support, we plan to increase the circulation of _Imprimis_ to more than 7 million households and businesses in 2025.
* **Teach citizens nationwide, especially younger Americans, through our FREE online courses.** Your donation will help us to create new online courses and add 900,000 new students in 2025.
* **Restore excellence to American K-12 education.** Your faithful generosity will help us to launch and guide increasing numbers of classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Reading and watching the news reminds us every day that our work is far from finished. America remains deeply divided. The gains we've made on behalf of liberty in recent years are fragile.

**With your help, we will succeed --because we must succeed for our country!**

Hillsdale College **conducts its educational outreach efforts** --as it does all its work--while refusing to accept **one penny** of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

To meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we will need thousands of gifts between **$25** and **$100**. Most of our supporters' contributions are in this range.

We will also need a significant number of **$500** to **$1,000** donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated.

Since we have less than a month remaining to fund this project for 2025, we urgently need your help.

**You can safely and securely renew your support using this link:[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=5041bfc486c44896a49d2859c87f185d&_e=rRvqdBhdhPGQJfxhW2yJOYgyQ-NxPSFNX2-y0m8VMDi6hm7WPfM6vVO-tOmEiptoyY10RdLTkJ71nrTwEM7Fy0eIFlT8DG3qJQDrSkrS-X9CBlOwRKbcriPorTbHAK_TDDkqVcebJhNlShp23gmU3_K0fuGNhJcHWiKdTCkw7DASdkjCRDSPK6p8tR_bnASY0WwUE6Zrme1ZnUCdAKsDdM-yTIGRoatrcQC8Dc5EpJLSgiRVnZoQU5650ynwzqNlKZuVwV129rKALZoa1uuYxaAkt_Rp6IIE1j3NYLIr3yzFwQC-dd2k-RyDF07i0P_N8_ZnP98uZtJFImJrNnjqMknnECX3uXjFqQXnZTVJOGvuSKZqwpXhea78geJjo3up)**

It is not an exaggeration to say that the future of American liberty and the American way of life depends on the efforts of patriotic Americans over the next few years.

That's why I hope you'll make your most generous year-end gift to Hillsdale College before the **December 31** deadline.

Every dollar you give will get us closer to our **$6,000,000** online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.

Please partner with Hillsdale College to make 2025 a significant turning point in the revival and preservation of the American way of life.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 [Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=5041bfc486c44896a49d2859c87f185d&_t=2PYo_IY026KCsPPgCuOnlDi1NXEvQZdiF0ZPj6nC9F1sF9TGJkNwKZD_Hxn0_p2UJU-3q3ESF3lwB1537_7cTWuTkFjyGKtud-Eu0PfEW4U1Sb8noYAZ2Dtcgo12azll3OZ7Gee9YPi0WMW9ffEGZZU0HhIAX2nVj4jvflJTiXo%3D)

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=5041bfc486c44896a49d2859c87f185d&_t=2PYo_IY026KCsPPgCuOnlDi1NXEvQZdiF0ZPj6nC9F1sF9TGJkNwKZD_Hxn0_p2UJU-3q3ESF3lwB1537_7cTW7jpXeENPVP4oC8EeIYOKz-Ycb-gbSD5osMoYOalwqN).

name: Hillary Scholten
subject: we’re once again facing a potential shutdown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
Now, we’re once again facing a potential shutdown if a deal isn’t reached by midnight tomorrow. This shutdown will cost Michiganders millions of dollars during the holiday season.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98977444/518447570/-1774287068?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2024-12-19_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTMyYzAzNS00Y2JlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wf_2qLGI9fP3WVZb8juQZMyXRyW96DGiTXpfW2GLWwA=)
---
| If you haven’t seen the news lately, the Trump-Elon Musk coalition has just killed a critical spending package that would have funded disaster relief, critical infrastructure, and so much more.

Now, we’re once again facing a potential shutdown if a deal isn’t reached by midnight tomorrow. This shutdown will cost Michiganders **_millions of dollars_** during the holiday season.

This was a bipartisan, bicameral deal that was struck down not by any elected representative but by the wealthiest person in the world, unelected Elon Musk. **Let me be clear: a man making 55 million dollars every.single.day. should not have the ability to jeopardize the lives of millions of Americans, including veterans, the elderly, and children just so the Republicans can give billionaires like himself tax cuts.** He has no idea how much this will hurt everyday Americans.

It’s becoming increasingly clear that Trump, his Republican majority in Congress, and Elon Musk are working for each other, not the American people.

**Next year, I’ll be spending every spare minute fighting back and ensuring our communities remain protected from the chaos of the Trump-Elon administration.[_But I need your support. The more we can raise now, the less time I’ll have to spend fundraising in 2025 and focusing on protecting our democracy. Can I count on your support?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98977445/518447571/664569763?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2024-12-19_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTMyYzAzNS00Y2JlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wf_2qLGI9fP3WVZb8juQZMyXRyW96DGiTXpfW2GLWwA=)**

clean_body: Now, we’re once again facing a potential shutdown if a deal isn’t reached by midnight tomorrow. This shutdown will cost Michiganders millions of dollars during the holiday season. | = | If you haven’t seen the news lately, the Trump-Elon Musk coalition has just killed a critical spending package that would have funded disaster relief, critical infrastructure, and so much more. Now, we’re once again facing a potential shutdown if a deal isn’t reached by midnight tomorrow. This shutdown will cost Michiganders millions of dollars during the holiday season. This was a bipartisan, bicameral deal that was struck down not by any elected representative but by the wealthiest person in the world, unelected Elon Musk. Let me be clear: a man making 55 million dollars every.single.day. should not have the ability to jeopardize the lives of millions of Americans, including veterans, the elderly, and children just so the Republicans can give billionaires like himself tax cuts. He has no idea how much this will hurt everyday Americans. It’s becoming increasingly clear that Trump, his Republican majority in Congress, and Elon Musk are working for each other, not the American people. Next year, I’ll be spending every spare minute fighting back and ensuring our communities remain protected from the chaos of the Trump-Elon administration.= | = | = | = | = | = So grateful to have your support, Hillary * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Hillary Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49510 United States | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . body:
Justice Allison Riggs beat her Republican challenger by just 734 votes out of more than 5.5 million — that’s just over 7 votes per county.

Peter,As a supporter of the fair maps movement, you know just how critical state supreme court justices are to ensuring fair representation in our democracy. It’s why we’re so excited about the re-election of Justice Allison Riggs — one of our 2024 Democracy Defenders — to the North Carolina Supreme Court. Justice Riggs’s re-election keeps a strong, pro-democracy voice on this important court in a state that is once again one of the most egregiously gerrymandered states in the country. **And get this: Justice Riggs beat her Republican challenger by _just 734 votes_ out of more than 5.5 million — that’s just over 7 votes per county.** With razor-thin margins like that, it’s safe to say that every single little thing we did helped make the difference. **But our work did not end on Election Day. And with an incoming Trump administration and Republican-led government, the stakes are high.** [**To protect fair maps, combat ongoing gerrymandering, and prepare for the redistricting battles coming our way in 2025 and beyond, please make a contribution to the NDRC right now.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98977738/518448456/1701676424?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_AllisonRiggs_email_20241219-NDRC-Tier1-AllisonRiggs_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20241219-NDRC-Tier1-AllisonRiggs_&utm_campaign=AllisonRiggs&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiMzJjMDM1LTRjYmUtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vJ6yU5xZuAVW_Ltcux85gwZpLNCZZWdx6r1T3SJAEiw=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

The NDRC and our affiliates have a strategic plan for political, electoral, and legal engagement throughout the decade, to build and shift power so that pro-democracy leaders are in the right places in advance of the next redistricting cycle.
Together, we can ensure states with independent redistricting commissions run full and transparent processes that result in fair maps, call out elected officials who are working to draw bad maps, build and participate in a strong coalition that exemplifies fair map-drawing practices, and support legislation to support fair redistricting practices.
**All of it takes support from this community ahead of key fundraising deadlines like this one at the end of the year.** If you’re reading this, you’re no ordinary Democrat — you understand that fair representation relies on people standing up against egregious, partisan efforts to manipulate democracy.
Thank you for all that you do,
Ted
Ted Corcoran
Deputy Campaigns Director
National Democratic Redistricting Committee

clean_body: Justice Allison Riggs beat her Republican challenger by just 734 votes out of more than 5.5 million — that’s just over 7 votes per county. | Peter,As a supporter of the fair maps movement, you know just how critical state supreme court justices are to ensuring fair representation in our democracy. It’s why we’re so excited about the re-election of Justice Allison Riggs — one of our 2024 Democracy Defenders — to the North Carolina Supreme Court. Justice Riggs’s re-election keeps a strong, pro-democracy voice on this important court in a state that is once again one of the most egregiously gerrymandered states in the country. And get this: Justice Riggs beat her Republican challenger by just 734 votes out of more than 5.5 million — that’s just over 7 votes per county. With razor-thin margins like that, it’s safe to say that every single little thing we did helped make the difference. But our work did not end on Election Day. And with an incoming Trump administration and Republican-led government, the stakes are high. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = The NDRC and our affiliates have a strategic plan for political, electoral, and legal engagement throughout the decade, to build and shift power so that pro-democracy leaders are in the right places in advance of the next redistricting cycle. Together, we can ensure states with independent redistricting commissions run full and transparent processes that result in fair maps, call out elected officials who are working to draw bad maps, build and participate in a strong coalition that exemplifies fair map-drawing practices, and support legislation to support fair redistricting practices. All of it takes support from this community ahead of key fundraising deadlines like this one at the end of the year. If you’re reading this, you’re no ordinary Democrat — you understand that fair representation relies on people standing up against egregious, partisan efforts to manipulate democracy. Thank you for all that you do, Ted Ted Corcoran Deputy Campaigns Director National Democratic Redistricting Committee = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, Suite #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Hollywood groomers are destroying America
body:
| | | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---
[View in Web Browser](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kMuO4jAURL_G2RHFZSfBCy9myJjFaEa9oaVm51eIaQdCXih8fQuaZls699ZR6baLoV4kKX8ToAluIABhvwgwjexd73b_-mW1v-nVlcHfY4LNk5zxYk9WZ_tqyi67_8Nh69Rx_jAzfdHj0vkX-6xMfatDvKdllTjJoWltEy9pyXjBkZd50kgYmmdg3tZwhaHCMGYsN-vCWeFMkSdBIgOnoAI0ExApY2zNoT10zeC4ITx7FKV17_3YhNOn750OcUntuU2ibMaxGx5iikCdnUlPk41-Gr6v7LklUE9lAjUTqPxyXP5e39xNEKYek7Fqq-Nm_lOJpJeuu4YYw1CUhGeHny_JLPEVAAD__zL-bjk)

| | Dear Patriot, Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth. Take it from me, Patriot, as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life, **_you are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children_**. Today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kU1vnDAQhn-NubGyx8bAgUMSL6iHVEraXSm5IGMPu274Khgi-usrENrLHB490jvzjm6HxtVrRuJnAnB3diIAhD8RgNnzq75cXsc1_Pynw28OuGECL4e5wMPtjKafaqZ_Lz-nW2HzP8tHtbCH7dcBH-4RecJWu2ajsQpsJkCz2gSYsZgLKSCKo-CeSSkBmYEqStIkElGKVDPQWEMCtU1p4DKgIBiwFBhNIT1xzhMBGkHXHKyoiKB70KkeEf3ddV84Wu2a9WT6Nmiyu_fDtC-WE8gnNPOIJ92h7f1mEMirUS8YVn3_NRHILYPUmMqECZUQCuQ6rEwkw4jRpBIAlUwM4fns29Lj2BKuam8ZAbmRqZ9Hg4SrZ1WE7-frgVu0bt7U8-tBjG4H7W4d4eq4Lyl_FMUHL9_P1_LX76f3cBsEZNk1zhKukvXWvb1po_wO909yVejmZTmrNBgzO3y7pnGTjImgt72SrYElg_8BAAD__6xWmwk)
---
| | And the result of this constant propaganda? An upside-down world where children lecture you on what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas. But you and I know your ideas aren’t old-fashioned or mean at all. They are the same biblical values that made America the greatest country on earth. **That’s why I’m reaching out to you. Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love.** **[**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children's television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kbtupEAQRb-myUB0VfMKCGw3oNXKG3g9I9kJ6hczbfNaaBiNv34FQpNUcHSkW3VLdGNrm3tOkmcCcLV6JgAEnwjA4vAsTqfX6e5__gj_hmA2TODlMFd4uL0S4Sdfwn-nP_Ol0uXX-iFX-rDdfTQP94gMTCdsu9GEezpnIGijPJPTBFnMIEoi75pnMmwYFSZRqpGKZRjHWimZSSlVE9HGszmEwCjQDGiYQRYgYspAGBANgmaSsHAPCprJGHe1_beZtLDtPVBD57X51blx3hcrCZSzUctkAtEbPbjNIFDKSazGl8PwPRMoNYVMKan8NIzBZwaFL1UU-xENU8kAZJwqguXiutqZqSPIG6cpgXgj87BMyhDkz7zy34rzgTuj7bKpxetBlOhGYS89QX7cl9a_quoD67fiXP99f3rzt0EgrvvWaoL89pvP-F586Z8d7p9EXon2ZS145k25Hm-2be0cJ4SFl72SrYE1h_8BAAD__9q7nJg)** And it's only possible with the help of motivated Christians who want to see a Christian resurgence in America like you. Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_. This ground-breaking live-action television show captivates children... ...but more importantly, it builds their character at the same time. Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth. Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart. Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. **[**Because I can't beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter.**](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kbuO20AMRb9m1MnQkKNXocK7sowUm8KJDew2BmeGsifWK3otnK8PJAhuWBwc4JKXVHeVK5-ZiN8EwN3ZQQAI3AuAacQLnc8f_dP_-kf-NwIvWMD7Zs7wchtDwVc-BX_PP4fb0RZ_5k89y5c9Pjt-uVvkjmty1ULj3LOZApKl8TiTMapIQRiH3j0DHUAKDNJaBIU2CbUhWdrQELKm0HMZBKAkyBRkkEK6Q8REATFQiWCVFipYg3ZlzzzeXfPg3pKrnjvT1l6V3cexG9bFCgHFwGbqeUcN23ZcDAGF7mlmX7ftYxBQWAmpMdr4SRCBrxjJ1yaM_FAGiVYAOkqMwGIa6-vIfS0wL0crBUQLGdqpNywwf8uP_ulw2XDN1k2LevjYiKG6I3drBObbfcn1x_H4idfT4XL99Xt_8pchILo2lbMC85j2Wk0F8mOF6ycxP1L1Ph_y1Osz2327qnJDFAsV3NZKlgbmDP4HAAD__6B2m2A)** Season One of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ has ten lesson-filled episodes planned. And each episode costs around $70,000 to produce. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously we won’t work through Hollywood. Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $70,000 per episode.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kbuOo0AQRb-myUDdVc0rIPAMBm0wG3jX1s4kqOhu7J7htby83q8fgZCTCo6OdKtuUdPXtnokLHxhADerRwbA8MAA5gkvdD6_DQ_34z-5dwSzYgavu7nA020V8Y905n_PP8drrrPP5b1cxNOeHr15unukZxqy9UrD1NGJBBKVckwiQpSBBD_0nVtSGsFDVCQERTyUxLmO_EqAiCIkw9GxCXCQAkQMgscQe4gYSSADVCFoWTLJtyCvGoyZbrb9MoMmWz881TVOndymqR-3xTIG2WjUPBiPWqO7aTUYZOVAi3HLrvsaGWRaQKxUqdyIB-BKg-SWyg9cX_ColABlECmG2Tw1xWSGhmFaTVowCFYydvOgDMP0Jc3d0_Gy48ZoO6_q8W0nipqe7LVlmO73RcWPPH_H4nS8FL9-H07uOhgERVtbzTD9BDr8-9MMvtzg9klMc6pfl2MaO0Oi-7utazsGIZP8ulWyNrAk8B0AAP__cZWalQ) ** Whether you can send $35, $50,000, or anything in between, or anything higher or lower -- please know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated. As your special "Thank You" for joining me as a **Founding Supporter** at the $35 and above level, we’ll send you**** all ten episodes of**_Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ **for your family to enjoy**** FREE on DVD.**** Thank you for joining us as a **Founding Supporter.**

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: The new Republican House is already collapsing.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
[|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/N3E0WzOjYjXed_pNIbpbKw~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRpRxOzP0QgaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZXJpY2ZvcmlsbGlub2lzLmNvbS9XA3NwY0IKZ1W_jmRnb1pOelIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAABs~)
| | New House GOP, same problems as the last House GOP. Donald Trump hasn’t even been sworn in yet, and the new Republican House is already collapsing. **Get this: Since Republicans won control of the House two years ago, they have not passed a**** _single_****new package that would keep our government open.** This is not a typo, Peter.The government has been kept open by continuing resolutions since in 2022. This is not normal, and House Republicans have once again shown that their only function is more dysfunction. I made a promise from day one to work with anyone – regardless of party – who is interested in solving real problems. But the number of GOP colleagues I can work with seems to shrink by the week – as reasonable Republicans are either kicked out or silenced by extremists. The GOP is in disarray headed into 2025, and it's a concerning sign for what another two years of Republican control will look like: More chaos, discord, and gridlock. And it’s the people outside of the Capitol who suffer. **Our neighbors depend on us being able to come together to do what’s right for the people of the 17th District. It starts by clearing out extremism from the House.** I’m ready to roll up my sleeves to do it, and I hope you’re with me too. -Eric | **[Donate](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/JgiKJxPV0-_tO2A5iq8Aeg~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRpRxOzP0TlaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2VzLXE0LTIwMjQ_Y2l0eT1DcmVzY28mY291bnRyeT1VUyZlbWFpbD1kcHdpbGxpczY3JTQwZ21haWwuY29tJmZpcnN0bmFtZT1QZXRlciZsYXN0bmFtZT1XaWxsaXMmcGhvbmU9JTJCMSslMjg3MTclMjkrODY3LTUzMDkmcmVmY29kZT1lbS0xMi4xOS4yNC1hbGwtYSZyZWZjb2RlTm1yb0JtaWQ9ODAyMjI1MTM3JnN0YXRlPVBBJnppcD0xODMyNlcDc3BjQgpnVb-OZGdvWk56UhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAGw~~)**

Peter, after disavowing Project 2025 throughout the campaign trail, Donald Trump has been publicly praising its far-right policies that seek to strip us of our fundamental freedoms, undermine our democracy, and create a safe haven for MAGA extremism for years to come.
Not only that — he’s tapping the very authors of the far-right playbook to serve in critical positions of power throughout his administration.
As we prepare for yet another Trump White House, we’re circulating an internal petition to gauge public opinion of Project 2025 after the election. [Will you take our anonymous, one-click poll to share your thoughts?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/98978933/518452042/891278921?source=SBD_DPG_EM_ENG_121924_1_1_Project2025&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2NjMTM2OC01MGJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_aK1xdJJRUJa5ok9FXCKG1ckTp8DKrsZfQbvXo7N6t8=&emci=c745f47c-3fbe-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=67cc1368-50be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=43566853)

name: AZ Pro-choice Majority (via azdem.org)
subject: They’re saying the quiet part out loud.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Arizona Democrats
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/azd-em-header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/azd-em-header]
Opinion: Comstock is Trump and the GOP’s backdoor to a national abortion ban
— Copper Courier, October 19, 2024
"Comstock is an archaic law Trump and his MAGA allies plan to misinterpret to completely bypass Congress. In fact, Trump’s lawyer, Jonathan F. Mitchell, a key architect of Project 2025 and virulent anti-abortion crusader, put it plainly, “We don’t need a federal ban when we have Comstock on the books.” Trump told us his goal was to overturn Roe v. Wade. Now that they have clearly stated their plan to use the Comstock Act—we need to believe them."
STAND WITH THE PRO-CHOICE MAJORITY [https://secure.ngpvan.com/4cHit2l3a0ezeU-fgN5IFA2]

Let us be clear: Arizonans voted resoundingly to enshrine abortion care and reproductive access in our state constitution, and AG Kris Mayes will work day and night to ensure that the rights of Arizonans are upheld.

But with Donald Trump in the White House, anti-choice majorities in the House and Senate, and a Health and Human Services nominee working to enact the GOP’s anti-choice agenda, we’ll have to be vigilant and ready to protect our right to abortion care.

We have no doubt that the GOP will use every tool at their disposal to attack abortion care nationwide and we need to make sure our pro-choice coalition is stronger than ever to resist the attacks of the next Trump Administration.

Will you add your name as part of the pro-choice majority in Glendale and help us stand up against the anti-choice movement? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/4cHit2l3a0ezeU-fgN5IFA2]

STAND WITH THE PRO-CHOICE MAJORITY [https://secure.ngpvan.com/4cHit2l3a0ezeU-fgN5IFA2]

— Arizona Democratic Party
Arizona Democratic Party
PO Box 36123
Phoenix, AZ 85067-6123
United States
info@azdem.org [info@azdem.org]
Paid for by Arizona Democrats
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please unsubscribe. body:
We’re diving headfirst into the work ahead and getting to work here in Virginia. With less than a year to go, we’re gearing up for the most watched and most competitive race in the country.

| Peter,

We’re diving headfirst into the work ahead and getting to work here in Virginia. With less than a year to go, we’re gearing up for the most watched and most competitive race in the country.

In 2021, a razor-thin margin determined the outcome of the Governor's race here in Virginia, and 2025 will be no different. But here's the good news: we've faced tough battles before, and we know how to win.

Our history of success speaks volumes. Abigail has won some of the hardest-fought races in the country since 2018. **And how did we do it? By starting early, working tirelessly, and staying focused on what matters most.**

[_**But we can’t do it alone. Your support — right now — is essential to building the foundation for our victory in 2025. With less than a year to go, we’re gearing up for the most watched and most competitive race in the country. But here's the good news: we've faced tough battles before, and we know how to win. Our history of success speaks volumes. Abigail has won some of the hardest-fought races in the country since 2018. body:
Preservation of the middle class is vital to protecting the vision, identity, and security of the United States of America.

NY-21 Updates on the Congressional Race
* * *
# [Manifesto for the Middle Class](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=153384464&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzMzg0NDY0LCJpYXQiOjE3MzQ2NDQ5MzksImV4cCI6MTczNzIzNjkzOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI2MTgyNjEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.LGoi7L9Zfuu69faytNYuva6mREr58HxMCG198IZYXM8)
### Preservation of the middle class is vital to protecting the vision, identity, and security of the United States of America.
| | [Paula Collins](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)
---
| Dec 19
---
| [](https://substack.com/@paulaforcongress)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2618261&post_id=153384464&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzMzg0NDY0LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczNDY0NDkzOSwiZXhwIjoxNzM3MjM2OTM5LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjYxODI2MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Gc-YYw17X9E6d5Lk7dtVCUeD7mWq_7_1o94lrMiORlg&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/paulany21/p/manifesto-for-the-middle-class?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/20b3d12a-47d7-4c45-9d32-5bbf49f57201?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Preservation of the middle class is vital to protecting the vision, identity, and security of the United States of America.
The erosion of a strong middle class has caused the United States to become vulnerable to authoritarianism and other non-democratic influences from outside our borders and from within our government.
The U.S. Congress must work tirelessly to pass legislation that favors the vast majority of everyday Americans, rather than the minority numbers of millionaires and billionaires that occupy the House of Representatives and the Senate.
The following Manifesto for the Middle Class is intended to lift the voices of voters from all states, counties, and municipalities of the United States.
**Healthcare**
Congress must offer Medicare for All as an option, alongside private health insurance for those who prefer their employer-provided healthcare plan. Too many people are paying unaffordable premiums, facing insurmountable deductibles, and expensive co-pays for healthcare that is needed. Our communities need individuals to have access to healthcare in order to maintain public health standards throughout our communities.
Prescription drug prices should not exceed $15 for a 30 day supply of doctor-prescribed medications.
Veterans should never have to pay for health care or prescriptions. They served our country. We need to take care of them.
Mental Health care and care for recovery from addictions should be provided in communities for the good of the community, as well as for the good of the individual. Mental health care providers shall be available at every medical care facility, no more than 50 miles from the closest other such care facility.
Elder care and long-term care shall be funded through Medicaid and Medicare.
All forms of women's healthcare should be provided, including healthcare that involves gynecological or obstetrical procedures.
All forms of hormonal therapies should be provided, including therapies necessary for those therapies provided for gender-affirming care.
We need a model comparable to City Year or the Peace Corps that ensures communities that primary care physicians and support staff in fully-equipped clinics are no further than 50 miles from the next group of primary care physicians and support staff in fully-equipped clinics.
**Education**
Without cancelling the option for private and parochial education, we need free public education from Pre-K through post-Graduate university programs. Nobody should have to go into debt in order to receive an education.
The Department of Education shall oversee implementation of programs including Special Education programs through which the goals of individual education plans (IEPs) are implemented and delivered.
**Childcare**
Without cancelling private childcare options for those who so choose it, we need licensed and regulated government-subsidized child care facilities to help any parent who needs a safe place for their child to be while they are at work. Licensed and regulated, government-subsidized child care facilities shall be no further than 50 miles from the next licensed and regulated, government-subisdized child care facility.
School breakfast and lunch shall be free for all children.
**Paid Family Leave**
To support families in their times of physical and emotional need, every worker in America should get paid daily leave to care for a close family member, as well as 4 months of paid family leave for terminal care of a loved one, or the birth of a new child.
**Wages**
The basic wage should be adjusted annually to be 10% above the poverty level for every county in the United States.
Working conditions must meet minimum standards imposed by OSHA or by the National Labor Relations Board, including setting the 40-hour work week, guaranteed paid overtime, and 2 days off for every 5 days worked.
**Stability in Employment, Retirement, and Pensions**
The federal civil service program shall remain neutral from executive interference, and shall not be based on loyalty to elected officials.
Employers who offer private pensions hold a fiduciary duty to maintain their pension investments and distributions to beneficiaries. The management and investment of employer-based pensions is subject to scrutiny and regulation by the SEC and the FDIC.
Public pensions, such as Social Security benefits, are available to wage earners after 40 quarters of credit and payment into the Social Security system and age 65 years.
The Social Security system shall not be privatized.
Receipt of private pension funds or a secondary government pension shall not be a barrier to collecting social security by those who are otherwise qualified.
**Immigration**
The U.S. Government should conclude its review of an asylum petition within 3 years of the initial filing. Failure to review an asylum petition within 3 years of its initial filing shall result in grant of lawful permanent residence status.
Within 2 months of submission of an asylum petition, an individual may apply for a work visa.
A petition for citizenship should be concluded no later than 5 years from the date of original application.
**Consumer protection**
The US Health and Human Services, in conjunction with the USDA and FDA, shall maintain a list of basic groceries that shall be exempt from price increases in excess of 5% per year.
Consumer debt, including unsecured debt and medical debt, shall not be subject to wage garnishment.
Interest rates on consumer debt held by active-duty men and women should not exceed 15%.
Bankruptcy rules shall be reformed to allow for discharge of local, state, or federal individual income tax debt that is older than three years and on student loan debt. Bankruptcy filing fees and attorney fees on record with the trustee and the court shall be payable on an installment basis over twelve months.
**Housing**
The inventory of available housing in each county shall be assessed every ten years, and government-subsidized housing constructed any time the inventory of available housing is 10% below the number of households in each county, per U.S. Census reporting.
Government-subsidized housing, regulated and maintained according to safety standards offered by HUD, offered on a sliding scale not to exceed 33% of a renter's regular monthly income shall be provided in each county.
**Public Transportation**
In municipalities where the population exceeds 100,000 people, a public mass transportation system must be developed and maintained by the county.
The government-subsidized Amtrak system shall be extended to have no fewer than two stops in each state.
**Climate**
A federal climate policy that includes funding for mitigation of the impacts of climate-related damage, sustainability grants to build new hard infrastructure, grants to support development of climate-friendly farming practices in order to protect our nation's food supply, and development of alternatives to fossil fuel energy shall be enacted with statutory protections and requirements by no later than December 31, 2026.
Cleanup of forever chemicals and PFAS will be funded by the federal government.
**Government Accountability**
Accountability in government and judicial systems is vital to building and maintaining trust in our systems of bureaucracy. There shall be no exemptions to criminal liability by elected officials at any level of government. Correctional facilities shall be open for public review and inspection. The disparities in rates of incarceration shall be open for review by members of the community. Judges, including Supreme Court justices, are required to retire at age 75. Members of Congress may serve no more than 16 years.
_______________________
_**I am Paula Collins, a Democrat in New York 's 21st Congressional District. I am hopeful that I will be selected by the local party leaders to run in the Special Election that is anticipated in 2025. Please explore my Substack, and also find me at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com. **_
_If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democrat who ran in New York's 21st Congressional District. I hope to run in the Special Election in 2025. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. _

Climate A federal climate policy that includes funding for mitigation of the impacts of climate-related damage, sustainability grants to build new hard infrastructure, grants to support development of climate-friendly farming practices in order to protect our nation's food supply, and development of alternatives to fossil fuel energy shall be enacted with statutory protections and requirements by no later than December 31, 2026. Cleanup of forever chemicals and PFAS will be funded by the federal government. Government Accountability Accountability in government and judicial systems is vital to building and maintaining trust in our systems of bureaucracy. There shall be no exemptions to criminal liability by elected officials at any level of government. Correctional facilities shall be open for public review and inspection. The disparities in rates of incarceration shall be open for review by members of the community. Judges, including Supreme Court justices, are required to retire at age 75. Members of Congress may serve no more than 16 years. I am Paula Collins, a Democrat in New York 's 21st Congressional District. I am hopeful that I will be selected by the local party leaders to run in the Special Election that is anticipated in 2025. Please explore my Substack, and also find me at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com. ** If we haven 't met yet, I am Paula Collins, the Democrat who ran in New York's 21st Congressional District. I hope to run in the Special Election in 2025. Your comments are invaluable to me. Please let me hear from you. Remember that you can always visit my website at www.paulacollinsforcongress.com or by sending me a text at 315-230-3920. | | | | | | | (C) 2024 Paula Collins 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

| WASHINGTON (AP) — President [Joe Biden](http://links.conservativevictories.com/u/click?_t=8bd8e0acf83e479da35569fff26d4bee&_m=654e9bb82df64cd49d5c995a86666103&_e=M8L0kcMy3O-ljEmRp73xRD0i-G7D9aNYZ3GcqjgXxN5mIdztek5ScCGhk3uE6IdbDfBqTnwW1iKu2CSnZzq0SCMJZSSTKMLJEFCpB269GLnaufyV_m6fmr5pnt_nBkqkdweHsxndk3-I94gXnJSGVqhiaU1RYE1XaijOBa9kwIdfJ7mkTjh8nvDmtGHw0m7tr-LsyM2zOAoKE74dWiC6Ug%3D%3D) pardoned his son, [Hunter](http://links.conservativevictories.com/u/click?_t=8bd8e0acf83e479da35569fff26d4bee&_m=654e9bb82df64cd49d5c995a86666103&_e=M8L0kcMy3O-ljEmRp73xRIlzVUoWAGXip87p1dbMuD4nbqS9U0-EKycO9olwYzgTsv1cTG7tpA4hd2zIEpc8VAPopLE43jEX1SWa_ig2w-UEXgPyINg3mtrslkgmX96iFCVzW2_W6s0yOO3HMW5x6j4bKaBRZRVFFNQFepNSvUhBmNJKaEqyjzP9Nk0U1e2xzEhviq5I-5Er37VSrDO6Nw%3D%3D), sparing the younger Biden a possible prison sentence for federal felony gun and tax convictions and reversing his past promises not to use the extraordinary powers of the presidency for the benefit of his family.

Friend, It was Donald Trump and the GOP’s most destructive scheme of 2020... After the results of the election were tallied and it was clear President Biden had won, Republicans in key swing states chose to ignore the will of the people. Instead, they _ILLEGALLY_ posed as “fake electors” for Trump in Wisconsin, Arizona, Georgia, Michigan, Nevada, New Mexico and Pennsylvania. And now this year, these same fake electors from 2020 are casting 2024 votes for Trump, all while facing felony charges. It’s a chilling reminder that the fight for our democracy isn’t over — it’s happening right now. Donald Trump has emboldened the MAGA movement that will stop at nothing to cling to power, no matter the cost to our democracy. [**That’s why your support is more critical than ever. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Will Heaven Be the Same for Everyone?
body:
How can we be sure that heaven exists?
How can we be sure that heaven exists?
| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=c38c7da679d54587946c8a6c55b51301&_t=Qbp8_2Ke6XEszhgrVFbyE2-DDY4k8Ya4O1bPVOdeJV2RI6Dh3utRcYzYrblhuV11kOlH1IXiSwBdXsGiiOl1qfYvQjt9nKEdcHPsppofXU41ZSbVG7y0vzga1v3PpWPx)_

[](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=c38c7da679d54587946c8a6c55b51301&_e=hVgjIC6Ry3tPlhBGhClZ6qX4lyoLaSIsKhGyop5VgT1eWns1OH1WYEFWaXYdjNcHZ43nyh2SeN-ebPSwtFiW6Vbaq79Gy9i3V1U7GppGWI4AW6ndSU4blBxX4tfbHbvP5TqPFGesoLuIs3yBnpUNDCJfHOF2t9rS1JUE8r6C_vn_d12KC0OB99oyNLZdgPr12V8-YMgSWB7r0MH_KBlOKlrpJHQgmlr77F23bpJHA1qjWMkUZlMFZOioxJ9y9s_dvr0VD5N6tP3w0hI4hFOpZhY7jPNygAZ_52uV1PIE8emLKRk-JsvKLd04iJmmE7jmJmEJ0JlFX00qb7d13lrn2b0uZcy2-7bKNsEAKxc-Rf9CLkTToTpH66rTypau8osRW9yZ-LFJsncldAwBJpNG4lIX6sXMZcBPSMvyRFUuJjo%3D)
Hi Friend,

_How can we be sure that heaven exists?_

It's a question that has crossed the minds of many. Is heaven just a comforting idea to help us get through life, or is it a real, tangible place where we will one day dwell?

The good news is that the Bible gives us clear answers. Jesus Himself said, "_I go to prepare a place for you ... I will come again and receive you to myself, that where I am, there you may be also_" (John 14:2-3). Heaven is a real destination for those who trust in Christ, and it's where we will spend eternity with God.

But what do we really know about this place? What will we do there? Will we recognize our loved ones?

In my book _A Place Called Heaven_ , I answer 10 surprising questions about heaven, offering a clear biblical picture of our eternal home, including:
* What Will We Do in Heaven?
* Will Heaven Be the Same for Everyone?
* How Can I Prepare for My Journey to Heaven?
* And several more

This resource will encourage you and help you prepare for the ultimate destination God has promised.

For your gift of any amount to _Pathway to Victory_ , I'd love to send you a copy of _A Place Called Heaven_. I pray that this book will give you a greater sense of peace and excitement about the future and a renewed focus on living for eternity today.

Get your copy here: [https://secure.ptv.org/a-place-called-heaven-generous-gift-1](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=c38c7da679d54587946c8a6c55b51301&_e=hVgjIC6Ry3tPlhBGhClZ6qX4lyoLaSIsKhGyop5VgT1eWns1OH1WYEFWaXYdjNcHZ43nyh2SeN-ebPSwtFiW6Vbaq79Gy9i3V1U7GppGWI4AW6ndSU4blBxX4tfbHbvP5TqPFGesoLuIs3yBnpUNDCJfHOF2t9rS1JUE8r6C_vn_d12KC0OB99oyNLZdgPr12V8-YMgSWB7r0MH_KBlOKlrpJHQgmlr77F23bpJHA1qjWMkUZlMFZOioxJ9y9s_dHRp3nMiy93TqYcnz6MlxoP7-yNVGm_6XYk198C1psIAHM-DsMyJYDjO9s8RbwShfhUY5EtFQCiHjBBXLnVO4xbm-Ls1llwQTkzF1HMqe5s-0ZQ0QpoJelxCHjIAxI6Axv8_0PD54I70nN_v6Xv2Z-PkPkleJMMPib66pNfn6pgg%3D)

Thank you for your partnership in sharing the hope of Christ with the world!

Sincerely,
Dr. Robert Jeffress

P.S. - For your generous gift of $125 or more, I'll send you not only the book but a companion gift book called _Encouragement from A Place Called Heaven_ , as well as our ministry-exclusive brochure, the sermon message series on DVD and MP3 audio, and _A Place Called Heaven for Kids_ --a beautifully illustrated book designed to help children understand their eternal home with Jesus. Click here to claim your resources: [https://secure.ptv.org/encouragement-from-a-place-called-heaven-mega-kit-1](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=c38c7da679d54587946c8a6c55b51301&_e=hVgjIC6Ry3tPlhBGhClZ6qX4lyoLaSIsKhGyop5VgT1eWns1OH1WYEFWaXYdjNcHZ43nyh2SeN-ebPSwtFiW6Vbaq79Gy9i3V1U7GppGWI4AW6ndSU4blBxX4tfbHbvP5TqPFGesoLuIs3yBnpUNDCJfHOF2t9rS1JUE8r6C_vn_d12KC0OB99oyNLZdgPr12V8-YMgSWB7r0MH_KBlOKlrpJHQgmlr77F23bpJHA1qjWMkUZlMFZOioxJ9y9s_dow2Dsxj9ArXvvZhF1dY57uCYiaLXGbFnQbEloliSPSfRna4rTSBh706xwvazLTyp7FtZ3Nqe9-COa2-mGIDGM-qmPrHPYRxrVaa5yIwGvBoBlXclpDUSxU_qI-1Geovhi5RW68lHYmCxoQWAirMN6iQ5yn6povnUWqgh65Z6hwQ%3D)

name: Sarah Long, Movement Labs
subject: Putting our money where our mouth is
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rapid Resist Action
body:
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/98980692/518458479/855222454?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjJkMWZmNC01NmJlLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nTvaBmJ_ciV3H-9i5kuB-LWEYaf3T0wTG_obIqvmqMY=&emci=3c775560-1ebc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=cb2d1ff4-56be-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=5534179)
---

| | This is a long-term game. In red districts, purple districts, rural, exurb, battleground state or not, we're giving Democratic activists what they desperately need: time, money, and infrastructure. **We refuse to settle for "the way things are," so we're helping to support and fund 300 county parties for locals to reach out to other locals in sustained long-term organizing.** Democrats are in a rough patch, and the only thing that can dig us out of it is supporting real people organizing in their own communities and talking to their own neighbors about what worries them. So, we put our money where our mouth is to support local Democratic parties so they can train volunteers, host events, open offices, advocate, and support the local candidates and causes most important to them. **We're thrilled to be an organization of action.** We award grants of $2,000 annually to county parties who are doing the hard work and developing face-to-face relationships with voters over the long haul. We can reshape our country county by county, and we can build – and ultimately, pass – a progressive agenda, but it starts with supporting the scrappy, hungry, passionate Dems on the ground right now. _Sarah_ Sarah Long
Director of Development

We refuse to settle for "the way things are," so we're helping to support and fund 300 county parties for locals to reach out to other locals in sustained long-term organizing. Democrats are in a rough patch, and the only thing that can dig us out of it is supporting real people organizing in their own communities and talking to their own neighbors about what worries them. So, we put our money where our mouth is to support local Democratic parties so they can train volunteers, host events, open offices, advocate, and support the local candidates and causes most important to them. We're thrilled to be an organization of action. We award grants of $2,000 annually to county parties who are doing the hard work and developing face-to-face relationships with voters over the long haul. We can reshape our country county by county, and we can build – and ultimately, pass – a progressive agenda, but it starts with supporting the scrappy, hungry, passionate Dems on the ground right now. Sarah Sarah Long Director of Development Movement Labs | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Movement Labs instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Rapid Resist Action. Contributions to Rapid Resist Action, a 501(c)(4), are not tax deductible for income tax purposes. |

Trump's new border czar Tom Homan **[STOOD HIS GROUND](https://substack.com/redirect/d3ae7896-904b-4d7a-b3f3-cf59a32fce66?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** while CNN reporter Kaitlan Collins framed him as a cruel villain set on tearing apart families and deporting them, during a tense Wednesday night interview.
**[Watch the live sparring match below:](https://substack.com/redirect/d3ae7896-904b-4d7a-b3f3-cf59a32fce66?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d3ae7896-904b-4d7a-b3f3-cf59a32fce66?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/d3ae7896-904b-4d7a-b3f3-cf59a32fce66?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"As you know, there's a lot of mixed status households in the United States," Collins started. "Do you plan to take both parents into custody if there are minor children in the house?"
**[Homan, unfazed by the leading question, said bluntly,](https://substack.com/redirect/d3ae7896-904b-4d7a-b3f3-cf59a32fce66?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "If you are in the country illegally, we're gonna detain you, we're gonna arrest you, we're gonna remove you."
"If they have a U.S. citizen child,... and they think that a court order doesn't mean anything anymore, what kind of message are we sending to the whole world? Go ahead and cross the border illegally,... and have a baby and you're fine?!" Homan said.
Homan added that if he made exceptions for mixed status families then the immigration court "wouldn't mean anything anymore" and the whole immigration system would be made pointless.
"We cannot send a message to the whole world that you can violate laws in the country,.. and if you have a U.S. citizen child then you're okay!" Homan insisted.
* * *

"As you know, there's a lot of mixed status households in the United States," Collins started. "Do you plan to take both parents into custody if there are minor children in the house?" "If you are in the country illegally, we're gonna detain you, we're gonna arrest you, we're gonna remove you." "If they have a U.S. citizen child,... and they think that a court order doesn't mean anything anymore, what kind of message are we sending to the whole world? Go ahead and cross the border illegally,... and have a baby and you're fine?!" Homan said. Homan added that if he made exceptions for mixed status families then the immigration court "wouldn't mean anything anymore" and the whole immigration system would be made pointless. "We cannot send a message to the whole world that you can violate laws in the country,.. and if you have a U.S. citizen child then you're okay!" Homan insisted. name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: The Trump Presidency hangs in the balance.
body:
I don’t care what it takes. Shut it down.

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9I7E/?__vbtrk=MjY2NTU1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY2NTU1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Peter – They are trying to stuff the worst spending increase I’ve ever seen through the House **right now**.
Chuck Schumer thinks he can threaten us with a shut down. The Uniparty wants to believe we have no choice. Democrats think they are going to stuff their entire wishlist down our throats before President Trump can stop it.
[KILL THE BILL](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9I7E/?__vbtrk=MjY2NTU1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY2NTU1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
I know they read my emails, and I’ve got news for them:
_**I don’t care if we shut the entire government down until President Trump’s inauguration. **_
_**I don’t care if career bureaucrats never receive another paycheck in their lives.**_
_**I don’t care if Chuck Schumer and Uniparty Republicans all lose their positions over this – in fact, I HOPE THEY DO!**_
I don’t just want to maim the Uniparty: _**I want to gut and destroy it.**_
_**I’ve had my fill**_ of walking through the halls of Congress and having to be cordial to my House colleagues who are only there to line the pockets of **defense contractors & pharma CEO’s**.
_**I’ve had my fill**_ of the people who are supposed to be representing the American people going and only working for the lobbyists and special interest groups that have them and their campaigns by their throats.
Peter – I am not joking when I say, **if we allow this bill to make it through the House, it will do so much damage to our economy, our country may be unrecognizable in the aftermath.**
I know this has been a wordy message, but here is the point:__**[We desperately need your assistance if we are going to stop this before they destroy our country before President Trump can save it](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9I7E/?__vbtrk=MjY2NTU1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY2NTU1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**__ _**.**_
The entire Trump Presidency hangs in the balance.
This bill includes special protections for corrupt bureaucrats, and jams massive spending through to make sure that President Trump & DOGE are so busy playing catch up that they can’t accomplish any of their promised reforms for YEARS after they take office.
[KILL THE BILL](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9I7E/?__vbtrk=MjY2NTU1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY2NTU1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
I am already being attacked by all sides: **the Democrats, the Media, and even members of my own party have painted a BIG RED TARGET on my back.**
They want me to sit down, shut up and let them continue business as usual.
HELL NO.
This is a coordinated push by the lobbyists, Deep State, intel goons, RINO’s, and Democrats to stuff their wishlist through the House before President Trump can stop them.
__**[My back is against the wall right now. Can I count on you to be there and help us SHUT THIS THING DOWN](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9I7E/?__vbtrk=MjY2NTU1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY2NTU1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**__ _**?**_
[KILL THE BILL](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9I7E/?__vbtrk=MjY2NTU1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY2NTU1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_Yours Sincerely,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9I7E/?__vbtrk=MjY2NTU1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY2NTU1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
_Marjorie Taylor Greene_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9I7E/?__vbtrk=MjY2NTU1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY2NTU1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
| | |
---

_[unsubscribe from this list](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9I7F/?__vbtrk=MjY2NTU1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjY2NTU1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_

If you do not wish to receive future emails from me, please [click here](https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=266555&trkid=565773778&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)

name: Team Pramila
subject: We’d say this is unbelievable, but sadly, it’s not.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Elon Musk spent over a quarter billion dollars to get Trump elected this year, and he did it to buy his own way into power.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20241219-4604-footer&t=1&akid=4604%2E420207%2Ew4xOve)
We'd say this is unbelievable, Peter, but sadly, at this point we're not surprised.
Republican Speaker Mike Johnson negotiated a deal with Leader Jeffries, Chuck Schumer, and President Biden to avoid a government shutdown ahead of the holidays. **But then Shadow President Elon Musk objected:**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241219?refcode=em20241219-4604&amount=3&refcode2=4604_420207_w4xOve&akid=4604%2E420207%2Ew4xOve)
Let’s be clear about this: Elon Musk spent over a quarter billion dollars to get Trump elected this year, and **he did it to buy his own way into power.**
[**Will you pitch in $3 right now to help Pramila get Big Money out of politics and take back our government for the working class?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241219?refcode=em20241219-4604&amount=3&refcode2=4604_420207_w4xOve&akid=4604%2E420207%2Ew4xOve)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241219?amount=3&refcode=em20241219-4604&refcode2=4604_420207_w4xOve&akid=4604%2E420207%2Ew4xOve)**
When the government shuts down, the people that are hurt most are poor, working class Americans.
So the hypocrisy of two billionaires — Trump and Musk — calling for the government to shut down over the holidays reveals just how out of touch they are with the working people they claim to support.
This bill included critical funding for disaster relief to help those affected by recent hurricanes, among other important priorities.
But instead, Shadow President Musk and the MAGA Republicans who obey his every command are planning to stop critical government services and withhold paychecks from millions of federal employees.
Flying to your family over the holidays? A shutdown might mean longer lines at TSA — and missed flights home.
**This is one more reason we have to get Big Money out of politics and create a government that truly serves the working class, not billionaires and big corporations.**
[**But Peter, we can’t do it without you. Pitch in $3 or anything you can today to help Pramila keep up this fight:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241219?refcode=em20241219-4604&amount=3&refcode2=4604_420207_w4xOve&akid=4604%2E420207%2Ew4xOve)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241219?amount=3&refcode=em20241219-4604&refcode2=4604_420207_w4xOve&akid=4604%2E420207%2Ew4xOve)**
In solidarity,
Team Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20241219-4604-footer&t=2&refcode2=4604_420207_w4xOve&akid=4604%2E420207%2Ew4xOve)**

* **TOP NEWS**

“**Texas population growth leads nation in 2024,** ” Houston Chronicle's **Sam González Kelly** — “Texas led the nation in population growth again in 2024, according to new data released Thursday by the U.S. Census Bureau, marking at least the 14th year in a row that Texas has added more residents than any other state in the country.

Texas added over 560,000 residents in 2024, according to the bureau's latest**** population estimates. That's nearly 100,000 more than second-place Florida, and more than twice as many new residents as California, which was third in population growth.

The Lone Star State is now home to over 31 million residents, a nearly 2% increase from 2023 and over 7% jump since 2020. Only Idaho and Florida have grown at higher rates since 2020, census data shows.

($5/mo or $50/yr or $199 lifetime) | TOP NEWS “Texas population growth leads nation in 2024, ” Houston Chronicle's Sam González Kelly — “Texas led the nation in population growth again in 2024, according to new data released Thursday by the U.S. Census Bureau, marking at least the 14th year in a row that Texas has added more residents than any other state in the country. Texas added over 560,000 residents in 2024, according to the bureau's latest population estimates. That's nearly 100,000 more than second-place Florida, and more than twice as many new residents as California, which was third in population growth. The Lone Star State is now home to over 31 million residents, a nearly 2% increase from 2023 and over 7% jump since 2020. Only Idaho and Florida have grown at higher rates since 2020, census data shows. » Texas State Demographer Lloyd Potter said that Texas' relative affordability, coupled with its growing economy and the job opportunities that come with it, have made the state a destination for over a decade. "Relative to other states, Texas is still affordable," Potter said. "We don't have income tax, so those factors — the jobs that we have, the affordability and the overall quality of life in Texas — make it an attractive place for people to move to." » Texas' continued surge comes amid a year of remarkable population growth across the entire country, which the Census Bureau said was driven by an increase in international migration. The 1% growth nationwide marks the fastest annual population growth since 2001. The Census Bureau also, for the first time, ., though only at a national level. Immigrants accounted for about 84% of the 3.3 million new people in the U.S. in 2024, the bureau said. It was not immediately clear how many of those 2.8 million people were considered refugees, but part of the spike comes from improved methodology within the bureau to track net migration, the agency said." * **TOP NEWS**

"**Texas population growth leads nation in 2024,** " Houston Chronicle's **Sam Gonz alez Kelly **-- "Texas led the nation in population growth again in 2024, according to new data released Thursday by the U.S. Census Bureau, marking at least the 14th year in a row that Texas has added more residents than any other state in the country.

Texas added over 560,000 residents in 2024, according to the bureau's latest**** population estimates. That's nearly 100,000 more than second-place Florida, and more than twice as many new residents as California, which was third in population growth.

The Lone Star State is now home to over 31 million residents, a nearly 2% increase from 2023 and over 7% jump since 2020. Only Idaho and Florida have grown at higher rates since 2020, census data shows.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/3556357f-b90a-49db-a64a-33c046b14dd1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Texas State Demographer **Lloyd Potter** said that Texas' relative affordability, coupled with its growing economy and the job opportunities that come with it, have made the state a destination for over a decade.

"Relative to other states, Texas is still affordable," Potter said. "We don't have income tax, so those factors -- the jobs that we have, the affordability and the overall quality of life in Texas -- make it an attractive place for people to move to."
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/3556357f-b90a-49db-a64a-33c046b14dd1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Texas' continued surge comes amid a year of remarkable population growth across the entire country, which the Census Bureau said was driven by an increase in international migration. The 1% growth nationwide marks the fastest annual population growth since 2001.

The Census Bureau also, for the first time, [included refugees in its count of immigrants in the U.S](https://substack.com/redirect/a98578fa-6bb1-4332-9b77-59c165a10778?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)., though only at a national level. Immigrants accounted for about 84% of the 3.3 million new people in the U.S. in 2024, the bureau said. It was not immediately clear how many of those 2.8 million people were considered refugees, but part of the spike comes from improved methodology within the bureau to track net migration, the agency said."
